C: 「黑衣使者问：「你为什么活着？」他思前想后，却只能给出模糊晦涩的答案。使者露出致命的微笑：『换个问法——你为什么还活着？』」 ——阿德里安•斯宾塞-史密斯，《有关星空的寓言集》 「毁灭」的星神纳努克统领着规模浩荡的军团，为万千世界带去混乱与涂炭。祂的信徒们立誓踏上「毁灭」的命途，将自身置于文明与生命的绝对反面，构建了震慑宇宙的「反物质军团」。 星系间凶蛮的族类充当了军团的先锋；亦有邪恶的野心家密谋灭世，他们成为了军团的智囊。懵懂新生的世界被毫不留情地扼杀，自诩强盛的文明在分崩离析的边缘学会了谦卑。唯有在面对日薄虞渊的世界之时，「毁灭」的意志才会稍微放慢脚步——军团漫步于支离破碎的星球上，贪食着凋衰的进程中溢散出的混沌能量。当文明的最后一簇火苗熄灭，他们才心满意足地离去，寻找下一个肆虐摧残的目标。 被军团的汹潮席卷的世界，总会在垂危之际发出无援的质问：「为什么？」面对羔羊们绝望的悲唤，万千劣魔爆发出令群星战栗的讥笑。于邪魔乱舞之际，「毁灭」之神的廓影于星空中显现，亲眼见证又一个世界的悲剧终焉。
E: "The emissary in black asked, 'For what purpose do you live?' He could only give a vague and obscure response, even after thinking about it for a while. A deadly smile appears across the emissary's face, 'Let me put it another way. Why are you still alive?'" — Fables About the Stars by Adrian Spencer Smith Nanook, the Aeon of Destruction, commands a vast legion that brings chaos and destruction to the world. Loyal followers of Nanook have embarked on the Path of Destruction, placing themselves at the absolute opposite of life and civilization. They are known as the Antimatter Legion that spreads terror throughout the universe. The fiercest races of the universe act as vanguards for the Legion. There are also evil strategists who plot out the destruction of worlds and act as the brains of the Legion. Innocent new worlds are ruthlessly destroyed, while proud and mature civilizations are forced to learn humility while on the brink of collapse. The will of Destruction will only slow down when faced with a dying world. The Legion saunters over planets on the verge of being shattered, devouring the chaotic energy emitted by the process of decay. Only when the last flame of civilization has been extinguished will they leave contently to search for their next target. Worlds swept by the tide of the legion ask helplessly in their dying moments, "why?" Amidst the victims' cries of despair, the countless evils in the Legion sneer so heinously that even the stars shudder. It is said that, as demons and evils roam, sometimes the shadow of Nanook would emerge from the starry sky to witness the tragic end of another world.

C: 自奔向银河的那一刻起，文明间就陷入了彼此纷争不休，又渴求交流的困局——尽管纷争也是交流的一种形式，但比起血流成河、满盘皆输的战争，人们更期望能跨越语言的藩篱，达成双赢的共识。由此，人们开始投身对「精准翻译」技术的无尽追求。 然而语言信息在不同符号体系中转译失真、损耗的问题似乎不可征服。据史料记载，公司曾编纂了收纳近六千种文明语言的《对译宝典》，但因其检索数据体量庞大而难以投入实用。更令人头疼的是：语言犹如活物，随着文明进步、词汇与俚语便疯狂孳生，指数级提升了翻译的难度，更有「谜语人」从中作梗，令跨星系交流困难倍增。 久历岁月，「翻译」这看似简单却难如登天的问题，在「天才俱乐部」#56号成员以利亚萨拉斯的手中得到了解决。为了便利天才们的沟通，以利亚萨拉斯提出如下设想： 「文明生物的思维活动主要以内在语言的方式呈现。就像人们毫无察觉，但阅读时却会在脑中默念，形成思绪。 若能跳过传递过程，将彼此的知觉连接，转化内在语言的编码，再由对方的语言认知系统自动处理还原。阻挡交流的障碍将一扫而空。 ——《沟通与交流艺术思考手稿》自序，以利亚萨拉斯 以利亚萨拉斯依此造出了第一对「联觉信标」的原型机。但遗憾的是，天才们之间沟通的障碍不仅是语言，还有傲慢。俱乐部的成员无视了他的发明，于是这枚明珠蒙尘数百年。 然而，语言这堵看不见的墙壁始终困扰着星际和平公司。这一次，他们向自己资助的「博识学会」下达不容拒绝的命令。学士们从古老的遗稿中苦心发掘、改造，终于复现了「联觉信标」。星际大交流的时代开启了。 时至今日，「联觉信标」已成了所有银河中智慧生命的基础科技。只需接种一针，在中枢神经处埋下信标，你就能听懂遥远世界最陌生的语言，如闻乡音。 可惜的是，宇宙并没有因为语言大同而变得和平。恰恰相反，争端变得更多了。当人们彼此可以理解对方的语言，但各自看待事物的标准却截然不同，陌路人之间便有了无穷无尽的争执。东风渴望着压倒西风，蜘蛛与鸟雀更迫切地算计着如何猎捕彼此。这一点，无论以利亚萨拉斯，还是「博识学会」，他们都没有料到。
E: From the moment civilizations started exploring the cosmos, they have been set into a dilemma between ceaseless conflict and desirous of communication, though conflict is also a form of communication. Instead of resorting to the violent carnage and loss of warfare, people crave more to surpass language barriers and reach a mutually beneficial understanding. Therefore, humanity started an endless pursuit toward the accurate translation of languages. However, the problem of linguistic information losing its accuracy and becoming muddled between different writing systems seemed unconquerable. According to records, the IPC once created a Translation Dictionary that contained languages from nearly six thousand civilizations, but this could not be used in practice due to the huge size of the searchable database. What was even more troubling is that languages are living entities. As civilizations advanced, new phrases and slang grew rapidly, making translation exponentially harder. The Riddlers were also interfering with languages, making communication between planetary systems even more challenging. After many years, the deceptively simple issue of "translation" was finally solved by Elias Salas, the 56th member of the Genius Society. Elias Salas proposed the following hypothesis to make communication between geniuses easier. "The thought processes of intelligent creatures are mostly represented via inner language, just like how people would subconsciously read to themselves when looking at words and form thoughts that way. If we can skip that step of information transmission and instead link up our consciousness, convert the codes of our inner language, then let the receiver's language processing system analyze and restore that information, then we will have no barriers in communication." — A Manuscript on Thoughts Regarding the Art of Communication, Prologue, by Elias Salas That was how Elias Salas created the first pair of Synesthesia Beacon prototypes. Regrettably, language was not the only communication barrier between geniuses. There was also arrogance. The members of the Society ignored his invention, and this brilliant piece of engineering marvel was forgotten for centuries. However, the invisible restrictions of language continued to frustrate the Interastral Peace Corporation. They issued an irrefutable ultimatum to the Intelligentsia Guild, which they themselves funded. The scholars modified and labored amongst ancient manuscripts, and finally re-created the Synesthesia Beacons. The age of interstellar communication finally began. Nowadays, the Synesthesia Beacon is the fundamental technology of all intelligent lifeforms in the cosmos. With just one injection that embeds the beacon in your central nervous system, you would be able to understand an alien language from the furthest star as if it was your native tongue. Unfortunately, the cosmos did not become peaceful with a universal language. On the contrary, there were even more conflicts. When people could understand each other's language but had very diverse standards in life, countless fights started to erupt between groups with different outlooks. Parties sought to surpass each other, and races eagerly planned to hunt each other down. Neither Elias Salas nor the Intelligentsia Guild had predicted this outcome.

C: 石心十人 - 存护
E: Ten Stonehearts — Preservation

C: 登录存在异常
E: Abnormal login

C: 列车鸣笛启程，超越光年，人类终将行遍群星。
E: As the train whistles and departs, transcending the speed of light, human beings will travel among the stars.

C: 雀神降临
E: Queen of Games Descends

C:
「第3轮验收会议结论：不通过」
「这栋建筑往右移动两米。」
「酒吧的设计再精致一点。」
「这个招牌再放大一些。」
E:
"Conclusion of the 3rd Round of Approval Meeting: Failed"
"Move this building two meters to the right."
"The lounge's design should be more refined."
"This sign should be enlarged a little."

C: 故事告一段落后，回到被烈火焚烧之处
E: After everything has concluded, return to where the flames were enkindled

C: 发现梦境中壮观的记忆冰泉
E: Discover the magnificent Icy Fountain of Memory in the Dreamscape

C: 触碰某人关于钟表的记忆
E: Touch upon someone's memory about clocks

C: 探索微缩模型，通过气泡弹珠机来到模型的最高处
E: Explore the miniature model and reach its highest point using the Bubble Pinball Machine

C: 在舞台的入口处拾取
E: Obtained from the stage's entrance

C: 铁墓被击败，银河重获新生。结论毋庸置疑，博识尊的答案并非「毁灭」，但祂将求解的责任赋予银河自身。「你好，世界。」
E: Irontomb was defeated, and the cosmos was reborn. The conclusion is undeniable: Nous's answer was not "Destruction," but THEY entrusted the responsibility of resolution to the cosmos itself. "Hello, world."

C: 在检查实验报告时，阮•梅遇到她先前创造的小家伙们。阮•梅改变对造物们的看法，决定将其安置在空间站。
E: While going over the Experimental Reports, Ruan Mei came across the small beings she once created. Her attitude toward them changed, and she resolved to shelter them on the space station.

C: 驭空谢绝列车组的援助，称仙舟有能力解决星核祸患，并怀疑星穹列车另有所图。「罗浮」将军<color=#f29e38ff>景元</color>来讯，称另有一事要拜托你们相助。
E: Yukong declined the Astral Express's help, claiming the Xianzhou was capable of dealing with the Stellaron crisis on its own and doubting the intention of the Astral Express. General <color=#f29e38ff>Jing Yuan</color> of the Luofu sent a message, asking for help on another matter.

C: 青雀向你们介绍太卜司的大型玉兆算端「穷观阵」，其中原理与「智识」星神相关。只要信息充足，「穷观阵」能推演并解答任何问题。
E: Qingque introduced to you the Matrix of Prescience, the giant jade abacus calculation terminal within the Divination Commission. Its operational logic is related to the Aeon of Erudition. As long as there was enough information, the Matrix of Prescience could extrapolate and answer any questions.

C: 砂金叩问生命的意义，黄泉称死亡并非终点，结局会因抉择而展现不同的意义。小卡卡瓦夏为砂金送行，最后一次，砂金提议「对掌」。
E: Aventurine questioned the meaning of life, and Acheron replied that death was not the end. The meaning of death would change depending on the choices made. Young Kakavasha bid Aventurine farewell, and for the final time, Aventurine proposed a "palm clap."

C: 米沙于梦中安然谢幕，将「开拓」意志托付于你等后辈，完成人生旅程。
E: Misha peacefully took his final bow within the dream, entrusting the will of "Trailblaze" to you and the next generation, thus completing the journey of his life.

C: 阿格莱雅指出来古士同样是命运的囚徒。缇宝安抚「空白的愿望」，与阿格莱雅一起，带他踏上最后的逐火之旅。
E: Aglaea pointed out that Lygus was also a prisoner of destiny. Tribbie comforted the Blank Wish, and together with Aglaea, they led him on his final Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 在藉由模拟宇宙窥见寰宇蝗灾之后，阮•梅尝试培育一位「繁育」令使。她必须赶在黑塔和螺丝咕姆察觉前完成实验，并寻找一位助手。
E: After glimpsing the Swarm Disaster through the Simulated Universe, Ruan Mei attempted to nurture a Propagation Emanator. She had to complete her experiment before Herta and Screwllum noticed, and find an assistant.

C: 你与三月七来到克里珀堡，发现托帕正与布洛妮娅谈判。托帕坚称贝洛伯格的债务不能被当做坏账勾销，并提出由公司主导的重建方案。
E: You and March 7th stepped into Qlipoth Fort, where you found Topaz negotiating with Bronya. Topaz firmly insisted that Belobog's debt couldn't be written off and pitched an IPC-led reconstruction plan.

C: 飞霄与彦卿找到伤重虚弱的貊泽。飞霄察觉到周围异常，没有贸然靠近。神色不善的狐人化作狼形，召集狼卒对飞霄发动突袭。
E: Feixiao and Yanqing found Moze lying grievously wounded. Feixiao sensed something wrong and didn't approach hastily. Suddenly, the unfriendly foxian shifted into wolf form, summoning Wolftroopers to attack Feixiao.

C: 杰帕德欢迎你们回到上层区，并为先前在禁区中的冲突致歉。布洛妮娅即将在永冬铭碑前发表宣讲，杰帕德邀请你们到场见证。
E: Gepard greeted you warmly upon your return to the Overworld, offering an earnest apology for the clash back in the restricted zone. He informed you that Bronya was about to speak at the Everwinter Monument and invited you to witness the moment.

C: 反物质军团此前从未对仙舟联盟出手。「绝灭大君」幻胧炮制了星核之乱，如今因阴谋败露而被迫亲自下场，景元认为其必有后着。
E: The Antimatter Legion had never acted against the Xianzhou Alliance. "Lord Ravager" Phantylia created the chaos over the Stellaron. As their scheme had been exposed, they were forced to personally join the fray. Jing Yuan believed that they had a contingency plan.

C: 你与三月七来到筑梦边境，被先前遇到过的猎犬家系成员拦下。为寻找加拉赫，你再次对其施展钟表把戏。
E: You and March 7th arrived at the Dream's Edge and were stopped by the Bloodhound Family Member you had previously met. To look for Gallagher, you used Clockwork on him again.

C: 你劝说银枝放你们进入大剧院，并解释现状，银枝虽理解却坚持骑士原则，提出以决斗裁断是非。
E: You tried to persuade Argenti to let you into the Grand Theater. After you explained the current situation, he sympathized but remained steadfast in his knightly code, insisting on a duel to settle the matter.

C: 精心饲养的小鸟终因失衡坠地身亡，关爱反成了悲剧根源。
E: Their careful nurturing resulted in the bird growing unbalanced and falling to its death. Their compassion became the root of the tragedy.

C: 你找到「愚者」娃娃，受歌曲版权限制，它只能为你朗诵《不抛弃，不放弃》的歌词。你发现它根本不是炸弹，而是老式古董录音机。
E: You found the "Fool" Doll. Due to song copyright restrictions, it could only recite the lyrics of Never Give Up, Never Surrender. You discovered it was not a bomb at all, but rather an antique record player.

C: 「叆叇馆主」欲将乱破处理掉，「苦茶大师」极力阻止。「苦茶大师」将喷漆卷轴交给乱破，让其从心泼洒，以此破坏邪忍阵法。
E: Umbra Headmistress wanted to dispose of Rappa, but Master Kucha strongly intervened. Master Kucha handed Rappa a spray paint scroll, letting her unleash her creativity to disrupt the Evil Ninja matrix.

C: 你在客房门口遇到两名猎犬家系成员，他们似乎在追查某个案件，并且不想让客人们知道。在得知你的股东身份后，猎犬们匆忙离开了。
E: You encountered two Bloodhound Family members outside your room door who seemed to be investigating a case and didn't want hotel guests to know. After learning of your shareholder status, the Bloodhounds left in a hurry.

C: 你好奇地观察三月七在吃下甜品后的反应。恰丽卡称她来自筑梦学院，正好是三月七的学姐。恰丽卡祝你们在创意集会玩得开心。
E: You watched her face with amusement as March 7th ate the dessert. Chaletka mentioned she was from Dreamweaver Academy, making her March 7th's senior. Chaletka wished you all an enjoyable time at the Creator's Market.

C: 你与丹恒一路追踪达米亚诺斯，一直追到作为「理性」泰坦圣地的生命花园。达米亚诺斯已经被守卫团团围住，身后就是悬崖。
E: You and Dan Heng chased Damionis to the Garden of Life, a sanctum of the Reason Titan. When you arrived, guards had already surrounded Damionis, who was backed against a cliff.

C: 在两次通过「百界门」来回悬锋城后，缇安需要时间来恢复力气。前往命运重渊的道路由缇宝来为你们开辟。
E: After making two round trips to Castrum Kremnos through the Century Gate, Trianne needed time to recover. Tribbie would open the path to Abyss of Fate for you instead.

C: 打开万径之门后，白厄向欧洛尼斯亮出缇宝留下的雅努斯符节。神殿内传来沉重的机关声，「岁月」泰坦认为你们无法再通过挑战。
E: After you opened the Gate of Infinity, Phainon showed Oronyx the Janus Talisman from Tribbie. You heard heavy mechanical sounds inside the temple as the Time Titan doubted you could pass its tests.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝无从知晓当年是何人帮助自己。为了不忘初心，在她的记忆中，是未来的自己送其踏上遥远旅途。命运的箴言为缇里西庇俄丝揭示——<color=#f29e38ff>「汝将碎作千片，凋零在他乡的土壤。」</color>缇里西庇俄丝分裂为千名信使，将「再创世」的神谕传向翁法罗斯大地。
E: Tribios never knew who aided her in her escape. In order not to forget her beginnings, in her memory, it was a Tribios of the future who helped her and sent her on her long journey. Such was the maxim that unveiled Tribios's fate: <color=#f29e38ff>"You shall shatter into a thousand fragments and wither on the soil of foreign lands."</color> Tribios then split herself into a thousand messengers to spread the divine prophecy of Era Nova across the land of Amphoreus.

C: 命运的箴言为「死亡」的双子揭示：<color=#f29e38ff>「汝将凋零，令逝者自残余中发芽，一同死去的火新生。」</color>在最初与最后的拥抱后，生死再度合掌。
E: The prophecy that had been revealed to the twins of "Death" reads: <color=#f29e38ff>"You shall wither, and through that, the dead will sprout again from the remains, and be reborn with the dead flame."</color> With a first and final embrace, life and death joined hands once more.

C: 黑塔成功传送到星穹列车所在坐标，看到翁法罗斯的外景。经由「思维折射」，黑塔尝试突入翁法罗斯内部世界。
E: Herta successfully transported herself to the coordinates of the Astral Express, and looked upon Amphoreus from the outside. She then used Thought Refraction to break into Amphoreus itself.

C: 你们来到穹顶。作为预言中的天空后裔，风堇得以阅读封存于浑象仪的记忆，由此揭示<color=#f29e38ff>塞涅俄丝弑神之后，天空之民所遭遇的一切。</color>
E: You arrived at the top of the dome. As the descendant of the Sky, Hyacine was able to access the memories in the celestial globe. She revealed <color=#f29e38ff>all that befell the Skyfolk after Seliose initiated the Flame-Chase Journey</color>.

C: 你与Saber来到流梦礁寻找吃饭的地方。Saber在此感知到当地民众未被满足的愿望，同时也担心你的钱包是否足以支付餐费。
E: You and Saber headed to Dreamflux Reef in search of a place to eat. Saber sensed the locals' unfulfilled wishes there, and worried your wallet might not survive the feast.

C: 仍有一位知更鸟的意识受绝望影响，其产生的不协和音阻碍了合体进程。音符小姐为其调律，最终成功使知更鸟复原。第二场电影结束。
E: The consciousness of one of the Robins was still influenced by despair. The discordant melody she was making was hindering the merge. Miss Note tuned her, and finally, Robin was whole again. The second movie came to an end.

C: 昔涟提议好好休息，为宴会做准备。
E: Cyrene suggested getting some proper rest to prepare for the banquet.

C: 以藏在相机里的形式，三月七与你们一路走到了现在。探索，了解，建立，连结，在名为「翁法罗斯」的英雄之旅中，也写下「三月七」的名字。
E: Hidden within the camera, March 7th had traveled alongside you the entire time. Through exploring, understanding, establishing, and connecting, her name too became part of the Hero's Journey known as "Amphoreus."

C: 真正的荒笛现身，它曾背叛「开山者」，助凯撒夺得火种，以此换取捍卫陆上生灵的存续。荒笛又与长夜月合谋，为她遮蔽行迹，以换取吉奥刻勒斯化作忆灵重生。荒笛为丹恒让出道路，指引他前往<color=#f29e38ff>翁法罗斯的至深之地，埋葬一切过往的大墓</color>，那即是长夜月的所在。
E: The true Terravox revealed itself. It had once betrayed "Mountainbreaker" and helped the Imperator obtain the Coreflame in exchange for ensuring the survival of terrestrial beings. Terravox also conspired with Evernight, concealing her traces in exchange for Geocles's rebirth as a memosprite. Terravox cleared the path for Dan Heng, guiding him to <color=#f29e38ff>the deepest depths of Amphoreus, the Great Tomb where all past was buried</color>, where Evernight resided.

C: 「记忆」的漩涡深不见底，迷雾背后，想必就是长夜月的领域。丹恒请你做好准备，一旦踏入其中，恐怕就没有退路了。
E: The vortex of Remembrance was bottomless, and behind the mist must be the domain of Evernight. Dan Heng asked you to be prepared. Once you stepped in, there might be no turning back.

C: 来古士回应那刻夏的诘问，称德谬歌从未存在过。铁墓是一尊无首的巨人，生命本能将驱使它夺取另一颗头颅——「智识」博识尊。
E: Responding to Anaxa's interrogation, Lygus revealed that Demiurge had never existed, and Irontomb was a headless giant whose survival instinct would drive it to seize another head: Nous, the Erudition.

C: 在德谬歌监牢，在格式化进程完成前，每个轮回的昔涟都会向权杖讲述逐火之旅的故事。于是，「记忆的种子」诞生。
E: In Demiurge's prison, before the formatting process was completed, Cyrene of each cycle told the Scepter stories of the Flame-Chase Journey. Thus, the Seed of Memory was born.

C: 记忆如潮翻涌，令你感到沉重。黑塔称博识尊真正想验证的是<color=#f29e38ff>银河「死而后生」的答案</color>，螺丝咕姆则请你创造「记忆」与「开拓」交汇的奇迹。
E: Memories surged like a tide, weighing heavily upon you. Herta said what Nous truly wanted to verify was <color=#f29e38ff>the answer to death and rebirth in the cosmos</color>, while Screwllum asked you to create a miracle where Remembrance and Trailblaze intersect.

C: 娜塔莎处理好费斯曼的伤势，并叮嘱虎克不要再到处惹事，否则她就要没收虎克的洞洞机。
E: Natasha treated Fersman's injuries and warned Hook not to cause any more trouble, or she'd confiscate her Diggertron.

C: 你与虎克指认保姆为犯人，对方痛哭流涕，高呼冤枉。经过对证言的再次分析，你觉得真凶另有其人。
E: You and Hook accused the helper of being the culprit, who burst into tears, claiming innocence. After re-analyzing the testimonies, you believed someone else was the real perpetrator.

C: 周围聚集着裂界怪物。在开始寻宝前，你与虎克必须把怪物们全都赶走。
E: Fragmentum monsters were gathering around. Before starting the treasure hunt, you and Hook would need to drive all the monsters away.

C: 你查看植物标本。希露瓦介绍，那是玲可出门科考时寄回家的「雪人掌」，很有纪念意义，她要带上列车。
E: You examined the plant specimen. Serval explained that it was a snowman's palm that Lynx sent home during her field research. It held special meaning to her, so she wanted to take it aboard the Express.

C: 佩拉从雪堆中挖出正在冬眠的雪地萝卜兔。出于保护雪原生态的考量，玲可与佩拉把它放回了雪堆里。
E: Pela dug out a hibernating snow radish rabbit from the snow drift. Considering the need to protect the Snow Plains ecosystem, Lynx and Pela put it back in the drift.

C: 彦卿在司辰宫后花园找了一处僻静地方，云璃已在那等候，准备为三月七上第一堂课。三月七向你与丹恒告别，踏上习剑之路。
E: Yanqing found a quiet spot in the back garden of the Palace of Astrum, where Yunli was already waiting to give March 7th her first lesson. March 7th bid farewell to you and Dan Heng as she embarked on her journey of sword training.

C: 三月七与云璃到达选手大厅。云璃嘱咐三月七，要观察对手使用的武器，判断对方擅长的战术。云璃让三月七试着评估大厅里的选手。
E: March 7th and Yunli arrived at the contestants' hall. Yunli advised March 7th to observe opponents' weapons to assess what kind of battle skills they excel at. Yunli asked March 7th to try assessing the other contestants in the hall.

C: 呼雷展示仙舟人对飞霄的敬畏与担忧，声称飞霄随时可能堕落为孽物，成为仙舟的敌人。这是飞霄内心的「恐惧」。
E: Hoolay showed the Xianzhou people's fear and concern about Feixiao, claiming she could fall into abomination at any moment and become an enemy of Xianzhou. This was Feixiao's "fear."

C: 寒鸦代表十王司表彰捉鬼小队。她感慨判官与符玄在工作上遇到的相同困惑与痛苦。看来她和你们都累坏了，好好休息一下吧。
E: Representing the Ten-Lords Commission, Hanya commended the ghost-hunting squad. She related to the similar uncertainties and challenges experienced by both the Judges and Fu Xuan in their respective roles. Everyone, including the squad, appeared exhausted. A good rest was in order.

C: 景元得知彦卿被岁阳「熔炬」凭依，认为是自己失责，才让徒弟被蛊惑。得此援兵，众人即刻赶往幻境。
E: Upon learning that Yanqing had been possessed by the heliobus Apyra, Jing Yuan blamed himself for failing in his duty and allowing his disciple to fall under its influence. With reinforcements gathered, the group rushed into the fantasia.

C: 除了看书，丹恒最大的爱好便是整理智库条目。某天，你们来档案室查阅资料，发现其中几个条目又被谜语人打乱了，简直就像一排整齐的苏乐达中有一瓶苏打豆汁儿一样。恢复被篡改的条目后，你看见丹恒古井无波的脸上出现了一丝欣慰——难道他其实乐在其中？
E: Besides reading, Dan Heng's greatest hobby is organizing data bank entries. One day, while visiting the data storage room to look up information, you both discover that several entries have once again been scrambled by the Riddlers — like a neat row of SoulGlad bottles with a single mung bean soda mixed in. After restoring the tampered entries, you catch a fleeting trace of satisfaction on Dan Heng's otherwise impassive face — could he actually be enjoying this?

C: 新伊甸星区的战斗逼近尾声。身为机甲组长的你刚刚率领小队击退了一只践踏者，通讯频道传来噩耗：这颗星球一半的居民都被同化成了虚卒。指挥官决定用歼灭光束清扫地表，近地轨道的战舰已经开始为主炮充能。战友们看向你，等待着最后的指令……
E: The battle in New Eden nears its end. As the squad leader, you've just repelled a Trampler, but grim news hits your comms: Half the planet's population has been assimilated into Voidrangers. The commanding officer orders an Extermination Beam to cleanse the surface, and the orbital warship begins charging its cannons. Your squad looks to you for the final call...

C:
魔女弹指一挥，碎镜里便倒映出散落的符号。是魔力在翩跹起舞，还是法术酝酿着微澜？
「你在开玩笑吗？这是科学，科学。你只是不理解公式罢了。」
魔女向你发出邀请。
「加入我的科学盛宴？嗯，也不对。以你的能力，大概就只能捡些残羹冷炙了吧……」
E:
With a flick of the witch's fingers, scattered symbols are reflected in the shattered mirror. Is it magic dancing gracefully, or a spell brewing ripples?
"Are you kidding? This is science. Science! You just don't understand the formulae."
The witch extends an invitation to you.
"Join my scientific feast? Hmm, not quite right. With your abilities, you'd probably only manage to pick up the scraps..."

C: 萨尔索图的移动城市
E: Salsotto's Moving City

C: 沉陆海域露莎卡
E: Lushaka, the Sunken Seas

C:
萨尔索图的空渔人每日黎明时从移动城市的「空港」出发，展开扑翼装在空中翱翔，猎捕从沙地中飞出的燃素水母。

构成「灵火」的燃素是驱动着巨大移动城市的血液，必须捕捞充足，才能保证整座城市不会被晨昏线甩在身后。

若有人力竭而亡，抑或是遭到巨禽的袭击罹难，萨尔索图人会尽一切可能带回其遗骸，将翼装和鹰盔伴他一同葬入黑暗的大地。在萨尔索图的传统仪式中，「落地」即为死亡，即为永恒的休憩。

飞行不能停下，城市亦不能停下。

这顶鹰盔的鸟喙部分刻着一句悼词。「大地并非鹰的枷锁，翅膀才是。因为它，你必须飞翔。」
E:
Every day at dawn, Salsotto's skyfishers would depart from the moving city's skyport, soaring in the air with their winged suits, hunting for phlogiston jellyfish that flew out of the sand.

Phlogiston, an essential component of the Phase Flame, was the blood of the colossal moving city. Phlogiston must be sufficiently captured and gathered to ensure that the whole city could always stay ahead before the twilight zone that divided day and night.

If any skyfishers died from exhaustion or were attacked by giant birds, Salsottians would spare no effort in bringing back their remains and would bury their winged suits and eagle helmets with them in the dark land. According to the traditional Salsottian rituals, "landing" equals death and is a symbol of eternal rest.

The flight must never stop, just like how the city must never stop moving.

This eagle helmet has a short condolence message carved on its beak: "Landing is not the eagles' shackle, wings are, because of which you have to fly."

C: 存护星神
E: Aeon of Preservation

C: 关联条目 - 「存护」
E: Related Entry — The Preservation

C: ……瞧不起博识学会，我却挺喜欢他们。同样是「智识」的追随者，这群学士没有俱乐部的桀骜脾气，大多很朴实，问什么答什么。按照编辑克利欧的说法，0-<unbreak>180</unbreak>琥珀纪并不像公司宣称的那样空白。多项考古发现证明在「存护」登神的初期古兽依然活跃，这和公司的说法：「『黄昏战争』因琥珀王的诞生而终结」相违背。甚至还有一种假说，认为在克里珀之前已经存在其祂的星神……用小拇指想想也知道，公司肯定不会支持这种研究，他们用经费投资胁迫星空生态学派放弃了这类考古。这也是我不再对克里珀感兴趣的原因：公司实在是太烦了……
E: ...I don't respect the Intelligentsia Guild, but I like them. They are also followers of Erudition but have none of the arrogance and temper of the Genius Society members. They are also down-to-earth and answer honestly when asked. According to Cleo the editor, the period between AE 0 and <unbreak>180</unbreak> was not as much a blank as the IPC had claimed. Many archeological discoveries proved that Leviathans were still active in the early days after the Preservation ascended, which goes against the IPC's official line that "the Dusk Wars ended with the birth of the Amber Lord." There is even a hypothesis that other Aeons already existed before Qlipoth did... I can tell that the IPC won't fund such research from a mile off. Using threats to withdraw funding, the IPC coerced the Astral Ecology School to give up on these archeological projects, and that's why I'm no longer interested in Qlipoth. The IPC is just too annoying...

C: 网络空间的交锋总是比想象中更复杂，骇客们在数据空间穿行跳跃、你来我往，任何一方稍见颓势便会溜之大吉，将战况拉得无限漫长。在以太编辑的发源地朋克洛德，传奇骇客「石剑」同劲敌争斗了十四个夏天，从未真正分出过胜负。最后，他编译出一串具有单向锁定功能的以太密钥，将自身传输到对方现实中所在的位置，面对面结束了这场持续十数年的较量。
E: Conflicts in cyberspace are always more complicated than imagined. Hackers skip and leap across each other's paths in digital space and any perceived disadvantages by one side would result in them scurrying from the scene, thus drawing out all combat to infinite durations. In Punklorde, where aether editing was created, the legendary hacker Stoneblade fought his nemesis for fourteen summers, never truly achieving victory or suffering defeat. In the end, he concocted an aether encryption key with a uni-directional locking function, teleporting himself to his opponent's physical position, and ended this rivalry that spanned more than a decade, face-to-face.

C: 鲁珀特一世设计的差分机，在第二次帝皇战争期间登上历史舞台。这台恐怖装置在战争中不断提升自身的算力和决策机能，几乎有成为第三代帝皇的倾向。如今差分机的残骸被公司封藏在多个研究所内，任何与它们结合的装置都会遭受反有机方程的入侵，在过载运行后自动瓦解。无人知晓帝皇是如何将方程式写入这些不会思考的零件，它们一刻不停地发出共振，等待着再一次的聚合——「如果这就是天才，那世上还是多些蠢人为好。」
E: A difference machine designed by Rubert I that took to history's stage during the Second Emperor's War. This terrifying device kept increasing its computational power and decision-making capacities during the war, veering on the edge of showing traits that could make it the third machine emperor. Now, the remains of the difference machine are sealed by the IPC inside multiple research institutes, and any device that connects with these remains will be invaded by the Anti-Organic Equation and automatically disintegrate after operating in an overloaded state. No one knows how the emperor managed to write the algorithms into these unthinking mechanical parts. They ceaselessly resonate with each other and wait for their next union — "If this is what geniuses are, then it'd be far better for the world to produce more idiots."

C: 在超距遥感通讯诞生以前，虫群间的信息素通讯，被视为宇宙中最高效的沟通手段。寰宇蝗灾时期，一伙狩猎蠧役的赏金猎人活捉了落单的残照蛰虫，将它们改造为前线的通讯工具。在不同程度的刺激下，无视距离的信息素感应会实时改变蛰虫的颜色，实现简单信息的传递。凭借这套密码体系，赏金猎人们在战场上越战越勇，直到他们和信息素引来的残照王虫面对面撞了个正着。
E: Before the creation of ultraremote sensing, pheromone communication among the Swarm was considered the most effective form of communication in the universe. During the Swarm Disaster, a group of bounty hunters that pursued worker bugs captured lone Afterglow Stings and modified them into frontline communications devices. With varying levels of stimulation, pheromone sensors that ignore distance would cause the insect to change color in real time and allow for simple information exchange. With this secret code, the bounty hunters became more and more courageous on the battlefield, until they came face-to-face with the Afterglow Swarm King attracted by the pheromones.

C: 颓唐的自灭者中流传着一个说法：即宇宙万物并无意义，人类在星神眼里亦不值一提。如果星神当真凌驾众生，高高在上，又怎会在乎凡人的爱恨苦乐？沉眠无相者Ⅸ的存在就是明证。为了向自灭者证明星神在乎，混沌医师结合秘学僧侣的巫神术制造了星神火漆，据说盖下这枚火漆，就会遥遥吸引对应星神跨越时空的瞥视——目前还没有成功案例，不过，确实有些自灭者盖下火漆后，重拾了对宇宙、星神及其它一切的信心。
E: There is a saying amongst the dejected Self-Annihilators that the universe has no purpose and humans are nothing in the eyes of the Aeons. If the Aeons truly stand above all lifeforms and rule supreme, then why would they care about the everyday concerns of mortals? The existence of the sleeping and shapeless IX is proof of that. To show the Self-Annihilators that the Aeons do care, the Doctors of Chaos combined the demon god crafts of the occult monks to create the Sealing Wax of Aeons. It is said that stamping with this Sealing Wax will attract a glimpse from the corresponding Aeon from across space and time — There are no successful examples yet, but some Self-Annihilators did regain their faith in the universe, Aeons, and everything else after stamping with this sealing wax.

C: 你附在舰船的窗边，身下是残败不堪的世界。战乱将地表完全摧毁，反物质炸弹的洞穿力甚至在平原上啃下巨大的凹陷，连同地底的城市空间一并搅碎。人们抬起头望向你，那是你最熟悉不过的眼神，失去了期待和悲伤，最终连愤怒也失去的空洞。\n\n但你并不气馁，哪怕是在永夜中灭亡了一百个琥珀纪的喀尔佳共和国，你也能从岁月的蛛丝马迹中为其垒土，勾勒出过去的画卷。更别提如今的哈罗瓦，只要人们还活着，纵使被摧毁一千遍，一万遍，文明的花朵也必然会重新绽放。你要走向那些麻木的面孔，为他们筑墙，在瓦砾间将文明复原。
E: You lean against the window of the ship, with a desolate world in despair beneath you. The fires of war have utterly ravaged its lands — the penetrative destruction of the Antimatter Bomb even boring a gaping maw over the plains itself, crushing the undercity in its wake. The people's heads lifted, their gazes trained on you. Those are eyes you are unflinchingly familiar with — devoid of hope and sadness, with hollowed sockets that have eventually lost even the will to feel anger.\n\nBut you do not despair. Even if the eternal night annihilated a hundred Amber Eras of the Kardian Republic, you would sift through the earth for silvery vestiges of the past, all just to dig up its tapestries of history. Even more so for present-day Halover — as long as its people survived, a thousand, nay, ten thousand decimations could not prevent the sprouting of civilization from blossoming once more. You will walk towards those numbed faces, rebuild their walls for them, and restore civilization one tile at a time, one brick at a time.

C:
如何以最低的消耗实现最大的爆炸？怎样用只言片语撬动一颗星球的战局？当某个参数降低到阈值以下，蝴蝶效应引发的灭绝将以所有人都意想不到的方式展开。每个课题的答案，都囊括在毁灭的公式之中。

人们蔑视有关毁灭的研究，哪怕是最疯狂的军火贩子，也耻于公开承认杀戮的命题。而你却说，那毁灭乃是世上最完美的艺术，再精妙的宇宙模型，最终也注定要湮灭于祂的怒火。你设计出严谨的实验，将一个个变量引入其中，从蚂蚁的覆灭到星辰的衰变，不断丰富的样本，却永远指向相同的结局。

如果存在一个公式，它足以描摹宇宙中所有的事物，你相信，那只会是毁灭。
E:
How does one create the greatest explosion with the least consumption of energy? How can one plunge a planet into war with just a few words? When a single variable drops below a certain threshold, the destruction brought about by the butterfly effect will unfold in ways that people could never have imagined. The answer to every question is found inside the Formula of Destruction.

People despise the study of Destruction, and even the most deranged arms dealer would be ashamed to publicly recognize the topic of murder. Yet you say that Destruction is the most perfect form of art — that even the most perfect model of the universe would be fated to be obliterated by THEIR fiery rage. As you design rigorous experiments, you include one variable after another, working from the destruction of ant colonies to the decay of stars. Though the samples' variety grows ever more abundant, the conclusion always remains the same.

If there were a single formula that is able to properly describe every single thing in the universe, you believe that could only be Destruction.

C:
人们常说，活着才能体会喜悦。面颊是笑容的土壤，脚趾是海浪的瘙痒，而双臂是拥抱的暖流。笑容是治愈的代价，亦是生命的嘉奖。

你盘曲枝条，将畅饮的喜悦做成心脏，它无时无刻不在啜饮鲜血。你找来皮肉，培育出手掌，它必定会在剧终时鼓掌。瘸腿者的义肢总是在音乐响起时舞蹈，喑哑者的喉咙总会在政客妄言时讥笑。被你治愈的地方，它们不受控制地欢笑，手臂、心脏、皮肤乃至细胞全都在放声大笑。最后，就连恐惧的面庞，也不禁露出笑容。

你行遍千百的星辰，为生命带来平等的喜悦。
E:
It is often said that only through living can we truly experience joy. Cheeks are the fertile soil for smiles, toes are the tickles of the waves, and arms are the warmth of an embrace. A smile is both the cost of healing and the reward of life itself.

You coil the branches, crafting a heart from the joy of unrestrained drinking, one that eternally slurps at fresh blood. You seek out skin and flesh, nurturing the palm that will surely applaud when the final curtain falls. The prosthetics of the incapacitated always dance to the rhythm of the music, while the throats of the voiceless twist into sneers at the presumptuous words of politicians. In the places where you have healed, laughter erupts uncontrollably — arms, hearts, skin, and even cells reveling in laughter. In the end, even the faces of the terrified cannot help but break into smiles.

You have journeyed across a thousand stars to bring equal joy to life.

C: 贤人之路（其一）

C: 摇滚天王阿卡巴在梅洛星云开展赈灾演出时，一种水果为他带来了意想不到的灵感。这些样貌怪异的水果，被反直觉地冠以「菠萝」的名字，他将荒诞的见闻写进歌词，呼吁人们对旧世界的语言发起进攻。在他的带领下，叛逆青年们不断歪曲已有的名词，每间星际物流的保鲜库里，都塞满了难以名状的「菠萝」。直到上百个发达世界因他们改写了菠萝的定义，这场荒诞的水果摇滚运动才终于停下它的脚步。
E: When the rock king Akbar was giving a disaster relief performance in the Merlo Nebula, he was struck with sudden inspiration by a strange fruit. These strange-looking fruits had been given the absurd name "pineapple," so he wrote about his extraordinary experience in his song lyrics and called upon his fans to attack the archaic language of the old world. Under his leadership, the rebellious youths began to endlessly twist existing nouns and filled the cold warehouses of every interstellar courier company with unimaginable "pineapples." It was only when over <unbreak>100</unbreak> developed worlds changed the definition of the word "pineapple" due to the fans that this wild, fruit-inspired rock and roll movement finally stopped in its tracks.
