C: 能力为「六相冰」，但三月七一直坚称那不是冰，而是某种凝聚态结晶。 「拜托，你有见过这么好看的冰么？」 战斗时使用的弓矢也是用「六相冰」凝成的，但实际上对自己使用弓箭一事并不满意。 「你有见过哪个大佬是用弓的么？」 「况且，用我凝结出的弓矢去攻击我凝结出的护盾，根本什么事都不会发生啊！」 为此还曾经刻苦修行名为「斩星破宙•大琉璃剑」的绝招，目前成效为零。 「小三月，听名字应该是大剑吧？」 「嗯，但感觉好像不如冰雕…砸。」
E: March 7th's ability is "Six-Phased Ice," but she has always insisted that it is not ice but some kind of condensed crystal. "Come on, ice can't be this beautiful." The bows and arrows March 7th uses in battle are also made of the Six-Phased Ice, but she is not satisfied with the fact that her weapon is a bow. "Great warriors never use bows!" "Besides, if I use my ice arrow to attack my ice shield, nothing will happen at all!" March 7th has also worked hard to practice a unique skill called "Starshatter: Shard Supreme," but she never succeeded. "March, judging by the name, it should be a greatsword, right?" "Well, but it feels like it may not even be as good as an ice sculpture... Ugh."

C: 姬子的记性非常好。 旅途越来越长，同伴越来越多，她仍能记住许多。 她记得自己与帕姆有一搭没一搭地聊天，记得列车最初的两位客人是瓦尔特和他的金发同伴。她记得寡言的丹恒如何一枪击退吞食星辰的巨兽。她记得开朗的三月七如何从陨冰中苏醒，记得自己为三月七设计的每一套装扮，记得女孩的最爱。她记得列车组如何抵达空间站「黑塔」，如何与{NICKNAME}相会，如何再次踏上全新的旅程。 她记得列车每一个零部件的规格参数，记得它们是如何插接匹配。她记得何时为列车的轴承上油，记得何时为列车上的每一株绿植浇水。她记得帕姆有决不能触及的底线，记得瓦尔特也有十分年轻的爱好。她记得丹恒总是通宵整理智库，记得三月七爱睡懒觉。她记得列车组每个人的性格，习惯，爱好，生日以及其他纪念日，还有更多。 如果大家能在列车上找到自己的终点，对于姬子来说则是最欣慰不过。 「旅程总有结束的时候，到时候，我一定会微笑着和大家告别吧。」 她总是这么说，但她一定会记得。 正是记忆汇成她来时的路，终又必复归于起点的海。
E: Himeko's memory is very good. The longer the journey gets, the more travel companions she accrues. She can still remember many of them. She remembers her awkward chit-chats with Pom-Pom, and how the first two passengers aboard the Express were Welt and his blond friend. She remembers how the taciturn Dan Heng defeated the monsters that can swallow stars with just one strike of his lance. She remembers how March 7th had awoken from her icy slumber, all the outfits she'd designed for March, and what March loves the most. She remembers how the Crew arrived at Herta Space Station, how she met {NICKNAME}, and how they'd embarked on a new journey once more. She remembers the specifications for every single component of the Express and how they're assembled. She remembers when to oil the Express' bearings and when each plant on the Express needs watering. She remembers Pom-Pom's non-negotiable bottom line, and that Welt has rather juvenile hobbies. She remembers that Dan Heng is always pulling all-nighters to organize the data bank, and how March 7th loves to sleep in. She remembers the personality, habits, hobbies, birthdays, and other anniversary days of everyone aboard the Express. And she remembers much, much more. The greatest pleasure for Himeko is that everyone can safely reach their destination on the Express. "Traveling always has an end point. When it happens, I'll smile and say goodbye to everyone." She always says that, and she'll definitely remember to do that. It's memory that has formed the road she came from, and memory that will eventually return her to the seas from whence she came.

C: 如果哲学家所说的理想国需要一位统治者，那么眼前的这位少女或许就是不二之选。以天下人的幸福生活为奋斗目标，她终其一生都以锄强扶弱作为自己的行动指南。譬如说，她所率领的骑士之所以被称为「圆桌」，乃是强调王与骑士一概平等…… 「太啰嗦了。这里不应该写一些更有用的话吗？」 此话不假。 对王而言，国家的繁荣与和平才是唯一重要之事。与此相比，个人的奋斗、荣辱，都不过是为了实现这一目标而落下的棋子。可微妙之处在于——如今的她乃是一名「从者」，是从遥远历史的长河中照进现实，依赖诸多神秘才得以存在于世的特殊生命。 故国的兴衰早已写进书本的历史，王也曾经试图将其改变…但正如那句古老谚语所说，天下没有免费的午餐。历经诸多波折之后，少女终于收获一颗能够坦然面对过往的心…… 「等等，谁说我豁达到没有遗憾了？ 「不过，为此而寻求许愿的圣杯，的确是一种愚行。 「唯有走过漫长的道路，理想乡才会真正来到一个人的面前。 「否则，即便它近在眼前，也根本无从得知。」
E: If the ideal kingdom the philosophers' speak of needs a ruler, then the girl before you might just be the perfect choice. Devoted to the happiness of all, she has lived by one creed: to defend the weak and challenge the strong. Her knighthood, for instance, was called the "Round Table" to embody one principle: The king and knight stand as equals... "Too long-winded. Shouldn't this space be used for something more useful?" Fair enough. For a king, only the nation's peace and prosperity truly matter. Personal struggle, pride, and shame are nothing more than chess pieces laid upon the board to achieve that aim. But here lies the twist: She now walks the world as a Servant, a special lifeform summoned from the distant tides of history, sustained only by layers of Mystics. The rise and fall of her homeland have long been etched into the pages of history. The king once tried to change its fate... But as the old saying goes: There's no such thing as a free lunch. After all she's endured, the girl finally gained a heart at peace with the past... "Wait, who said I'm so optimistic that I lack all regrets? "But chasing the Holy Grail just to fulfill that desire... yes, that was indeed foolish. "It's only by walking the long road that paradise ever truly reveals itself. "Otherwise, even if it stood right before your eyes, you'd never know."

C: 通常来说，男子是一个会冷静完成工作的现实主义者。 可就像某些到了年纪的上班族一样，他有时也难免暴露出因阅历而带来的悲观，又因这种悲观产生自我的厌恶，时常有意无意说出辛辣的话语。 「不，这是一种误解。 「大多数人无法消解伴随着年龄而增长的自我厌恶，是因为他们没法和过去的自己真正打一架。 「不对，打一架也不是什么好事。 「…还是忘记这个话题吧。」 总之，只要没有正面对上过去那个不成熟的自己，或是那些与此有几分相似的人，男子绝对称得上是一名成熟稳重的从者。尽管时不时要对手头的工作抱怨一番，他仍尽心尽力完成自己的使命，兢兢业业毫不马虎。 ——但不得不说，那些抱怨往往犀利又毒辣，甚至会让人觉得他以前是不是当过作家。 「没办法，得理不饶人可是我的本性。说实话，但凡被那种蛮不讲理的大小姐闯入过生活，任谁都会变成这样吧？」
E: Most days, the man conducts himself as a composed realist who efficiently completes his tasks. But similar to seasoned office workers of a certain age, he sometimes betrays the pessimism that experience brings, which fuels a disgust with himself, leading to sharp-tongued comments that slip out whether he intends them or not. "No, that's not quite right." "Most people never overcome the self-loathing that accumulates with age because they can never truly confront the person they once were." "Not that confrontation is always beneficial." "...Let's just move on from this topic." In essence, as long as he avoids direct confrontation with his less mature former self or anyone who resembles that person, the man proves himself an exceptionally stable and mature Servant. While he occasionally grumbles about his current responsibilities, he fulfills every task with absolute dedication and meticulous care. — Though it bears mentioning that his complaints often cut with such precision and insight that observers wonder if he once pursued a career as an author. "I can't help being brutally honest. It's in my nature. Truthfully, would anyone who's had their life disrupted by such an irrational, demanding young lady turn out any differently?"

C:
被机器人养大的女孩，有着超越年龄的通透和坚持。
对克拉拉而言，史瓦罗理性的计算是世界法则，绝不会出错。
直到发现「计算」得到的结果，并不一定能带给大家幸福。
怯生生的女孩决定勇敢起来。
E:
A young girl raised by a robot. Her perceptiveness and tenacity are far beyond her years.
For Clara, Svarog's logical calculations are the laws of the world and are infallible.
That is, until she realizes that the results from the calculations don't always necessarily bring joy to everyone.
The once shy little girl then decides to cast aside her timidness.

C: 「██年██月██日  天气：还是好冷  心情： 不好  普通」 「今天，阿丽娜的爸爸妈妈来看她了。阿丽娜很开心，看到阿丽娜这么开心，我也很开心。」 「我想起了爸爸妈妈，我已经好久都没有见过他们了！虽然费斯曼老爹对我非常非常非常好了，但我还是好想爸爸妈妈！」 「晚上，老爹又给我解释了一遍爸爸妈妈回不来的原因。但其实我都记得…因为老爹已经讲过好几次了！」「我发现，老爹最近好像很容易忘记自己说过的话！我去问了娜塔莎姐姐，她说这是因为老爹年龄太大了。我又问她，能不能帮老爹治病。但是，她说自己也没有办法治好老爹的病，还对我说了对不起。」 「我想，肯定是老巫婆觉得我最近表现不好，所以才骗我！她可是镇上最厉害的医生，什么病都会治，怎么可能治不好老爹的病呢？」 「好吧，我决定，只要老爹讲过一次的话，我全都要替老爹记下来！因为我可是最厉害的鼹鼠党的老大呀！」
E: "██/██/██ Weather: Still freezing Mood: Bad Normal" "Today, Alina's mom and dad came to see her. Alina was very happy and seeing her like this made me happy too." "I thought of mom and dad. I haven't seen them for a very long time! Even though daddy Fersman is very, very kind to me, I still miss my mom and dad!" "In the evening, daddy explained to me again the reason why mom and dad couldn't come back. But I actually remember anyway... Because daddy has told me so many times!" "I found that daddy is always forgetting things recently! I asked Natasha, and she said it's because daddy is getting too old now. Then I asked her if she can help fix daddy's sickness, but she said she can't, and even apologized." "I think the old witch is lying to me just because I've been a little bit naughty recently! She is the bestest doctor in our town, and can fix everything, so why can't she fix daddy?" "Fine. I've decided that I'll write down anything that daddy said! Because I'm the big bad boss of The Moles!"

C:
星际和平公司旗下「战略投资部」高级干部托帕，领导特殊债务纠察小组。
年纪轻轻便已成为「石心十人」之一，基石为「催讨黄玉」。
搭档次元扑满「账账」则能敏锐感知财富所在，即便是安保、催债、精算等工作也不在话下。
如今他们正一同巡行银河，追究各类影响公司业务开展的债务纠纷。
E:
Topaz, Senior Manager of the Strategic Investment Department in the Interastral Peace Corporation, and leader of the Special Debts Picket Team.
Already a member of the "Ten Stonehearts" at a young age, Topaz's Cornerstone is the "topaz of debt retrieval."
Her partner, the Warp Trotter "Numby," is also capable of acutely perceiving where riches are located. It can even perform jobs involving security, debt collection, and actuarial sciences.
Presently they are traversing the cosmos together, chasing down various debts and liabilities that negatively influence the IPC's commercial ventures.

C: 她以燃香为引，巧妙融合罗浮丹术与朱明「金鳞燃犀」之法，渐渐成为联盟无人不知、无人不晓的医师。 在接到联盟出任罗浮丹鼎司司鼎的委任时，她一时有些恍惚。不过抵达罗浮后，她失望地发现，罗浮丹鼎司非但并未好转，反而比她离开时内斗更甚。 「头一件事，利益错杂，裙带缠连；第二件，事无专执，推诿扯皮；第三件，奖罚不当，人心难平；第四件，轻贱研究，不重出诊；第五件，有权有势者大小通吃，有心上进者灰心丧气，长期以往，积弊丛生……」 笑脸迎人，应酬周旋之际，她已在心中为各人暗暗刻下画像，厘清自己面对的问题。 不过丹鼎司的问题非一日成就，也非一日能解。 无论是龙师的虚情假意，抑或丹鼎司医士的以伪谤真，与其他部门的扯皮，都使她感到困扰。她每日不得不大量使用熏香镇定心神。 「莫生气，莫生气，气出病来谁能替……」 她苦笑着翻阅医士不堪卒读的报告，不住地揉着自己的太阳穴。 外面涛声依旧。 她看着窗外潮起潮落的大海，想起云华当年大概就是这么度过一日又一日的。 「师父，面对人事浮沉，仍要困知勉行，真是一桩难事啊……」 那个当初被丹炉炸得满脸漆黑的小女孩，如今啊，已是百事缠身的大人了。
E: With her use of burning incense, she masterfully united the ways of Luofu alchemy and the teachings of the Zhuming's Piercing Gaze, to slowly become a healer known by every soul in the Alliance. When she received instruction to serve as Cauldron Master of the Luofu Alchemy Commission, she became a little preoccupied. However, upon arriving at the Luofu, she was disappointed to realize that not only had the Alchemy Commission not improved since she left, the internal conflict had in fact worsened. "The first issue is that people's interests are impure and nepotism is rife. Second, there is a lack of professional dedication and constant blame passing and squabbles. Third, an unjust rewards and punishment system has put people ill at ease. Fourth, research is dismissed as worthless and patient visits neglected. Fifth, those with power take all, those dedicated to improvement become discouraged and malpractice has been rampant for considerable time..." As she greeted others with a smile, she spent any time socializing secretly carving out an image in her heart of the problems she faced with each person. However, the problems within the Alchemy Commission were not created overnight, nor would they be solved as quickly. Be it the fake platitudes of the Preceptors, the constant smoke and mirrors of the Alchemy Commission healers or conflicts with other departments, her worries were endless. She would have to use huge quantities of incense in order to keep her mind steady. "Don't get mad, don't be hasty, if I get sick then who'll replace me..." She would smile through gritted teeth as she read through reports that made her despair and massaged her temples for comfort. The waves still sounded outside her window. As she watched the rising and falling of the ocean, she thought about how Yunhua must have spent her days like this back then. "Master, continuing to practice and learn in the face of the burdens of human affairs is no simple matter..." That young girl whose face was blackened by the exploding elixir crucible is now a grown woman, drowning in work and petty squabbles.

C: 在童年时代，身为「科学家」的母亲就给予了她最初的启蒙。 在倾心科学的家人们齐聚的小屋内，她的生活与爱密不可分——因此她很快察觉「爱」存在细小的差别，以及不同的气味。 外婆满头银发，爱听那「咿咿呀呀」的戏，父亲的皮靴很大，毛烘烘的。 母亲与父亲是爱着彼此的，但他们时常争执。 她是一个淡然的小女孩，常常犯错，常被原谅。 「阿尔莉丝姨妈比起长辈对我更亲，会给我买点心吃，她的爱是最好的。」 少女很快学会了倔强，对「爱」的理解跳脱出书中公式。 再大些时候，母亲便严苛要求她，一步、一步，一同行于巨大的冰川星球之上。 少女在途中喘息、驻足，仔细观察那些埋藏于冰川下的、充满魅力的奇妙「生命」——曾经是，生命。 每次科考回到屋里，都是「奖励」的时刻—— 将糕点咬一小口，香味便会紧贴上颚一闪：她的小小期待，总让母亲的研究中弥漫着香气。 以家乡，一个被「丰饶」赐福过的世界为起点，他们乘坐科考的飞艇，去往更多世界。 各种闪光弹，纱头巾、缎带和花边簇拥，在数据旋转升腾成的「生命」中，少女拥抱快乐。 「阿阮，吃完青团子要把手指洗干净，才能碰实验台喔。」
E: During her childhood, she received early exposure to science from her mother, who was a "scientist." Her life in a tiny house with her family of science enthusiasts was filled with love. As such, it wasn't long before she realized there were subtle differences in "love," each kind coming with different scents. Her grandmother with silver hair was a fan of traditional theater with its humming and chirping, while her father wore a pair of large, furry boots. Her parents loved each other, but they still argued from time to time. She was an impassive girl who made mistakes all the time, but was also forgiven all the time. "I was closer with Aunt Arlice compared to my other relatives, as she would buy me snacks. Her love was the best." Soon, the young girl learned to be stubborn. Her understanding of "love" broke away from the formulae taught in textbooks. As she grew older, her mother became strict with her. Together, they walked one step at a time on a vast glacial planet. The girl gasped and stopped on the way, carefully observing the fantastical and enchanting "lifeforms" buried beneath the glaciers - What used to be lifeforms, at least. Every time she arrived home after going on scientific expeditions, it was time for "rewards" — When she took a small bite of the cake, the mouthwatering aroma would immediately cling to the roof of her mouth. Her insignificant anticipation always gave her mother's research an inviting smell. Starting from their home, a planet blessed by Abundance, they boarded research aircraft and set off to more worlds. Surrounded by flash bombs, silk headscarves, ribbons, and embroidery, the girl embraced joy amongst "lifeforms" created by spiraling and ascending data. "A-Ruan, after eating Qingtuan, you must wash your fingers thoroughly before you can touch the lab bench."

C: 「…从锻刀者留下的残卷可知，出云曾一度来到破灭边缘。为求存续，他们以『神骸』锻刀，持刀者被奉为救国的英雄。学会对其中的『八百万神』很感兴趣，目前尚不清楚它们与哪条命途有关，而在日后的记述中，出云人对那些刀主的称呼也渐渐从『人』变成了『鬼』。 遗憾的是，这个世界已经从星图上消失了，历史的真相无处可寻，『记忆』也不复存在。武装考古学派抵达时，星系中只流淌着「神秘」的歌谣：无边的雨自黑日中如泪涌出，微茫的雨幕下，出云国的孑遗背对被她拯救又亲手抹去的故乡…她的前方，只有目不可视的阴影。」 ——「执笔者」奥本海默
E: "...Through the scrolls left behind by the blade forger, we have learned that Izumo was once on the brink of destruction. In order to survive, they forged blades from the remains of Kami, and those who wielded them were hailed as the saviors of their realm. The Guild is interested in the enigmatic Yaoyorozu no Kami mentioned in these scrolls, but the Path they are associated with remains shrouded in mystery. In later accounts, the people of Izumo ceased to refer to the wielders of the blades as 'heroes,' but rather as 'revenants.' Unfortunately, the world has long vanished from the astral charts. The truth of history eludes us, and the Remembrance no longer exists. When the Armed Archaeologists arrived, the galaxy resounded solely with the melody of the Enigmata: Dark Sun's tears, rain's boundless outpour. Beneath faint curtain, the survivor departs from her shore. Her homeland, once saved by her, now by her hands erased... Invisible shadows ahead, her vision encased." — Oppenheimer, the Recorder

C: 「亲爱的三月七： 三月，永夜已然落下帷幕。安心睡吧。 你关心的人们，我会替你记录他们的轨迹。 待你醒来的那一天，你会知晓它们是否值得被记住，又是否需要被遗忘。 碎作千身的少女，在你的帮助下才能安然踏上旅途。 即便如此，等待着她的依旧是相似的命运：她们向世人宣告逐火的神谕，而其中的大多数仍旧凋零在那血与火的纷争之中。 …… 歌声美妙的剑旗，与那燃冕的女王一同拉起弑神的大幕。 可那些欢庆胜利的醉宴，彼此的救赎，在神明的践踏下如同空中纷舞的泡沫一般消散。 …… 如果将这些岁月汇成一本关于逐火之旅的手账，那一定缀满了徒劳的词句，凋零的花朵。 但我想，倘若你看到了，你也会赌上自己的生命，为同伴永远『开拓』下去，与未知的远方无数次相遇。 就像你当时向我求援的那样，不是么？ 我会以『记忆』的力量，抚慰那些悲伤的岁月。 我也会保护你那还未抵达的伙伴，让他们免受窃忆者的伤害。 你的心中一直有着毫无保留的信任，信任你的伙伴会与英雄联手改写徒劳而悲伤的结局。 信任「开拓」会为过往踏足的每个世界都带来改变。 晚安，三月。 希望你醒来的那一天，我能送给你…描绘着美好结局的「未来」♭ 你的， 『长夜月』♭」 ——深藏心底的声音
E: "Dear March 7th, March, the curtain has fallen on the evernight. Rest easy now. I will track the paths of those you care about. When you wake up one day, you'll know which ones were worth remembering, and which ones should fade into oblivion. The shattered girl of a thousand forms could only safely take the journey with your help. Even so, a similar destiny awaited them: They proclaimed the prophecy of the Flame-Chase to the world, yet most of them withered away in the strife of blood and fire. ... The Gladius with its beautiful song, together with the flamecrowned Imperator, raised the curtain on the god-slaying act. Yet those victory celebrations and mutual salvations dispersed like bubbles dancing in the air under the trampling of the gods. ... If all these years were compiled into a journal of the Flame-Chase Journey, it would surely be adorned with futile words and withered flowers. But I believe that if you saw it too, you would also bet your life to keep Trailblazing forever for your companions, encountering the unknown frontier countless times. Just like when you called out to me for help back then, right? I will use the power of the Remembrance to pacify those sorrowful years. I will also protect your companions who have yet to arrive, shielding them from the harm of the Memosnatchers. You've always held unwavering trust in your heart. You trust that your companions would join forces with heroes to rewrite this futile and sorrowful ending. You trust that the Trailblaze would bring change to every world they've set foot in. Good night, March. When you wake up, I hope to give you... a 'future' painted with a beautiful ending. ♭ Yours truly, 'Evernight' ♭" — A voice deep within

C: 轮到卡芙卡行动时，会夺取其余敌方单位的绩效点，如果成功夺取绩效点，本次攻击会大幅强化。
E: Kafka absorbs Performance Points from other enemy units during her turn, and successfully doing so greatly enhances her current attack.

C: 每次成功对目标施加冻结或禁锢效果，使可可利亚的伤害提高。
E: Each successful Freeze or Imprisonment effect on the target increases Cocolia's DMG.

C: 砂金：屠场之舞
E: Aventurine: Danse Macabre

C: 空间站的外部危机似乎得到了控制，如果还有没去过的地方，也可以趁这个机会再去瞧瞧。\n搞定这一切后，就去向艾丝妲汇报情况吧。
E: The space station's external crisis seems to be under control. If there are places you haven't been to yet, now's the chance to go and take a look.\nOnce everything has been taken care of, go and report to Asta.

C: 列车搁浅在了一颗白色星球的外空间。根据姬子的说法，是「星核」带来的影响阻塞了列车的前进路线。\n想要继续旅程的话，就必须清除「星核」造成的轨道阻塞。\n由三位「年轻人」组成的探险小队已经集结完毕，你们都已经等不及开启这次「开拓之旅」了…至少三月七是这么想的。
E: The Express runs aground in the outer space of a white planet. According to Himeko, the effects of the Stellaron are what's obstructing the Express' path forward.\nIf you wish to continue the journey, you must clear out the obstruction caused by the Stellaron.\nAn expedition team of three youngsters has been put together and none of you can wait to set off on this trailblazing expedition... At least March 7th thinks so.

C: 那位戍卫官的言语犹在耳畔：坚定的「筑城者」们建立了这永屹之城；贝洛伯格虽受风雪侵凌，却永远温暖…\n他引用典籍的奇怪语调已经深深烙进了你的脑海…但愿这不会影响你享受高档酒店的床榻。\n话说回来，距离夜幕降临还有段时间，你不妨在这古老的城市中随意游览一番。
E: The Captain's words linger: The steadfast Architects built this Towering Citadel. Belobog remains forever warm in the face of unrelenting cold...\nHis tone was strange, as if he was quoting a historical record, and made a deep impression on you... Hopefully, this doesn't ruin your enjoyment of the fancy hotel's fluffy mattress.\nThere's still some time before nightfall. Why don't you take a tour around the ancient city in the meantime?

C: 在裂界迷宫中奔波许久，你们终于找到了所有装置，成功解锁机关大门。\n通往迷宫深处的道路再次变得畅通无阻——呃，大概——至少你是这样希望的。\n无论如何——前方到底还有什么样的阻碍在等待着你们，这种事情只有继续深入裂界才能知道了。
E: After running around in the Fragmentum maze for a long time, you've finally found all the devices and successfully unlocked the mechanism gate.\nThe path to the depths of the maze is wide open once again — erm, at least you would like to think so.\nAnyhow, there's no way to tell what obstacles remain in the path ahead. You'll find out when you venture deeper into the Fragmentum.

C:
随着你们不断深入，周遭的空气变得愈发冷寂，某种惨淡的金属锈味更是填满了你们的鼻腔。
你还感到盘踞在头脑中的低吟嘶啸逐渐清晰，同时伴随着剧烈晕眩。
种种迹象表明，你们已经抵近裂界迷宫的出口——但在那出口之外又是怎样的天地？
你不知道，你只明白一件事：若不继续前进，那么自己将永远无法知道这个问题的答案。
E:
The air becomes less alive the deeper you go. An odor of gloom and rust fills your noses.
You feel the lingering murmured whistling become clearer in your head and become extremely dizzy.
Judging by what you've seen so far, you're very close to the exit of the Fragmentum maze. The question is — what lies beyond?
You'll only find out if you press onward.

C: 在引路人青雀的带领下，你们抵达了仙舟负责演算与信息的太卜司。此间飞阁连云，悬圃冲霄，颇有神秘气氛。\n更神秘的是，太卜司门关紧锁，毫无待客迎门的意思，连自己人青雀也被拒之门外。
E: Led by the messenger, Qingque, you arrive at the Divination Commission, which is responsible for calculation and information management in Xianzhou. The eaves of this building build upon each other like rising mountain peaks and exude an aura of mystique.\nMore mysterious still is the fact that the Commission's doors are shut and show no signs of being prepared for guests, and even Qingque is shut out despite being a staff member.

C: 按照景元所想，欲得知星核猎手的真正意图，普通的审问手法毫无作用。唯有借太卜司中名为「穷观」的法阵，鉴往知来，演算真相。\n但此刻阵基停转，符箓熄灭。景元再度使出兵法中「来都来了」之计，请你们出手相助。
E: Jing Yuan postulates that ordinary interrogations will not be effective in learning the true motive of the Stellaron Hunters. Such a goal can only be achieved using the computational algorithm named Matrix of Prescience in the Divination Commission, which can examine the past and future and calculate the truth.\nHowever, the base terminals are currently out of commission and their talismans deactivated. Once again, Jing Yuan employs the stratagem of "Since You Are Here" to ask for your help.

C: 与卡芙卡一番交谈，你竟得知星核猎手们意图是「弑杀星神」。微尘般的凡人能伤及那有如天体般的神明吗？\n卡芙卡没有回答，她未卜先知般望向远处。枯朽数千年的神迹「建木」在遥远的洞天深处复苏重生，直欲穿破穹窿。星核猎手旋即离去，只余下不知所措的你。
E: You learn from your conversation with Kafka that the Stellaron Hunters aim to "slay Aeons." Can mortals as powerless as dust harm the gods, which appear as grand as celestial bodies?\nKafka does not answer and simply gazes into the distance, as if she had already predicted the current scourge. The divine construct, the Ambrosial Arbor, has been revived in the depths of a distant delve and threatens to pierce the sky after having withered millennia ago. The Stellaron Hunter then departs, leaving you alone in your confusion.

C: 另一边，联系上云骑的素裳将船停靠在了丹鼎司的行医市集，歧路多舛的三人终于靠岸。这儿曾是你熟悉故土的一角，旧日的回忆纷纷涌现，数不清的影子徘徊来去。不过，眼下朋友们音讯不明，你不打算继续在此停留。
E: On the other side of Luofu, Sushang parks the skiff at the Alchemy Commission's Healer's Market after making contact with the Cloud Knights. The three finally land after a tumultuous journey. This was once a part of your familiar home. Memories of the past swell up into your mind, and countless bygone shadows swivel before your eyes. However, your friends are currently missing. You have no plans to remain here.

C: 另一边，联系上云骑的素裳将船停靠在了丹鼎司的行医市集，歧路多舛的三人终于靠岸。这儿曾是你熟悉故土的一角，旧日的回忆纷纷涌现，数不清的影子徘徊来去。不过，眼下朋友们音讯不明，你不打算继续在此停留。
E: On the other side of Luofu, Sushang parks the skiff at the Alchemy Commission's Healer's Market after making contact with the Cloud Knights. The three finally land after a tumultuous journey. This was once a part of your familiar home. Memories of the past swell up into your mind, and countless bygone shadows swivel before your eyes. However, your friends are currently missing. You have no plans to remain here.

C: 令你感到意外的是，你的老朋友桑博也来到了匹诺康尼。流萤看起来对他不是很信任，但热情如故的深蓝男子还是想要让你们领教一下何为大人的世界。\n你为桑博成功取来了他想要的神秘材料，是时候领略他所谓的「真正的娱乐」了。
E: What surprises you most is that your old friend Sampo happens to be in Penacony, too. Firefly doesn't seem to trust him very much, but the ever-friendly and enthusiastic dark-blue gentleman wants to teach you all about the "adult side" of things.\nYou successfully collected the mysterious materials that Sampo needed. It is time to experience this thing that he calls: "true entertainment."

C: 令你感到意外的是，你的老朋友桑博也来到了匹诺康尼。流萤看起来对他不是很信任，但热情如故的深蓝男子还是想要让你们领教一下何为大人的世界。\n虽然他没说目的地是哪儿，但你确信这条路通往「梦境贩售店」。
E: What surprises you most is that your old friend Sampo happens to be in Penacony, too. Firefly doesn't seem to trust him very much, but the ever-friendly and enthusiastic dark-blue gentleman wants to teach you all about the "adult side" of things.\nThough he has not said where you are headed, you are confident that this route leads to the "Dreamscape Sales Store."

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n你们终于抵达了黑天鹅所说的区域。接下来，忆者为你们复现了出与流萤相关的记忆——试着从中梳理出凶案的真相吧。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nYou finally reach the area that Black Swan was talking about. From there, the Memokeeper reproduces the memories related to Firefly — Try to iron out the truth behind this murder.

C: 你们来到了一座雕像丛生的玄关大厅，发现这里根本没有前进的道路…换句话说，连门都没有。看来你们现在得想办法变出一扇门了——\n好在那位博学的教授总是有主意…他不会是读过剧本吧？
E: You two reach a foyer full of statues and realize there is no way to proceed further... In other words, there is not even a door in sight. Looks like you have to find a way to conjure up a door...\nFortunately, the learned professor always knows what to do... Could he have studied the script before?

C: 你们成功解开了隐夜鸫雕像的谜题。穿过狭长的走廊，映入眼帘的是一座古典奢华的大厅。\n穿过大厅，你们就可以直面那位名字古怪的橡木家主了。
E: You two have successfully solved the puzzle about the Nightingale Statue. After walking through a narrow and long hallway, you find yourself in a luxurious classical hall.\nYou two will get to meet the head of the Oak Family with the odd name after passing through the hall.

C: 另一边，黄泉——意思是你——和瓦尔特为了挖掘出家族正在隐瞒的真相，孤身潜入至朝露公馆。然而，你们发现本应壁垒森严的公馆里全然不见人影，仅有游荡的怪物四处巡逻。\n究竟发生什么事了？
E: Meanwhile, Acheron — that is to say, you — and Welt have infiltrated the Dewlight Pavilion to bring to light the truth hidden by The Family. To your surprise, the place is empty when it is supposed to be heavily guarded. Only some wandering monsters can be seen patrolling the place.\nWhat's going on?

C: 登上舞台\n不要害怕\n不要回头
E: Get onstage\nFear not\nNever look back

C: 为了封印星核，你们决定提前进入匹诺康尼大剧院，却苦于谐乐大典召开在即，剧院因排练需要暂时封锁。正当你以为万策尽矣时，机智的三月七却提出了一个让人意想不到的方案，令整件事有了转机：原来，在谐乐大典开始前，家族会开放给盛典预热的选秀会场「苏乐达™盛会海选」。只要拿下第一名，你们就能比普通观众更早进入大剧院。\n事不宜迟，你们立即赶往「热砂的时刻」参加选秀…途中，你反复琢磨着这件事带给你的教训：以后出门旅游一定要提前做攻略。
E: To seal the Stellaron, you decided that you would need to enter the Penacony Grand Theater in advance. Unfortunately, with the Charmony Festival soon at hand, the theater is temporarily closed down for rehearsals. Just when you thought your plans were thwarted, the wise March 7th proposed an unexpected plan that turned the situation on its head: It turns out that before the Charmony Festival begins, The Family will be opening up the theater to the pre-ceremony warm-up talent competition — the "SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions!" If you can take first place, you will be able to enter the Grand Theater before the regular audience members.\nThere is no time to lose. You hurry straight to the Moment of Scorchsand to participate in the competition... On the way there, you repeatedly mull over the lesson that this event has taught you: From now on, make sure you have a strategy firmly in place before traveling.

C: 可憎！龙•邪祟又在以师长之名残害忍徒，宣扬邪祟之说。身为与缭乱•忍侠搭档的开拓上忍，你怎能忍受此等恶行发生在眼前，难道你已合眸安眠了吗？正义的球棒如金刚杵般坚硬了！\n好了，现在可以动手了。
E: Atrocious! The dino fiendling is once again terrorizing ninjas, spreading malevolence under the guise of mentorship. As the Trailblaze advanced ninja, partnered with the Dazzling Ninja Hero, how can you stand by and watch such wickedness? Have you closed your eyes and entered the eternal sleep already? Your baseball bat of justice is now as firm as a vajra scepter!\nAlright, it's time to take action.

C: 欢喜！此刻，遮住你双目的雾霭将要被祛除，你马上就能窥探到真实的忍界了。多少年来，你只能看到冰冷的器械与并不潇洒的白衣学者，但你知道，在邪术背后的此番景色绝非如此寻常，霓虹四散的都市与披挂甲胄的忍者即将出现！\nAK-A-3，你懦弱到要让别人把你的眼睛蒙上了吗？真是可悲啊。
E: Rejoice! Within this moment, the fog that blinds you will soon lift, revealing the true ninja realm. For years, you've only seen cold machinery and even colder scholars in white, but you know the scene behind the sorcery is far from ordinary: a neon-lit city and armored ninjas are about to show up!\nAK-A-3, are you so timid that you let others blindfold you? How pitiful.

C: 放弃放弃，放弃放弃放弃。放弃，放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃，放弃放弃放弃放弃放。\n放弃，放弃，放弃。
E: Give up. Give up, give up. Give up, give up, give up, give up... give up, give... give up now.\nGive up. Give up. Give up.

C: 即将回到仙舟，但还未选好给故人的伴手礼——你决定使尽浑身解数，让返乡的停云小姐长长面子。\n与停云一同前往奥帝购物中心选购礼品。
E: You are about to return to the Xianzhou, but you still haven't decided on a souvenir for your old friends. You have decided to give it your all and get something that will make Miss Tingyun shine in the eyes of others.\nGo to Oti Mall with Tingyun to buy gifts.

C: 列车车厢受袭迫降，好在我们并无大碍。初步判断，这个世界有文明存在。我们决定提高警惕，探索这片完全未知的土地。
E: The coach was forced to make an emergency landing, but thankfully, we were both unharmed. Our initial assessment suggests that this world contains civilization. We resolve to remain vigilant as we explore this unfamiliar land.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 黑潮的造物在树庭四处游荡…这并不是个好消息，临此浩劫，树庭恐怕凶多吉少。向阿格莱雅报告后，{NICKNAME}他们继续向树庭深处前进调查。
E: Black tide creations roaming throughout the Grove... this doesn't bode well. In this calamity, the Grove's fate looks grim. After reporting to Aglaea, {NICKNAME}'s group continues deeper into the Grove to investigate.

C: 经历一场恶战，{NICKNAME}一行人带着那刻夏安全返回奥赫玛，准备向阿格莱雅复命。
E: Following intense combat, {NICKNAME}'s group escorts Anaxa back to Okhema to report to Aglaea.

C: 感恩戴德吧，星穹列车。幸好黑塔大人对「翁法罗斯」很感兴趣，她打算亲自去到那里实地考察。\n黑塔大人您能多和第四面镜我说说话吗？
E: Be grateful, Astral Express. Fortunately, Madam Herta is quite interested in Amphoreus and plans to conduct an on-the-ground investigation there.\nMadam Herta, could you speak with me, the Fourth Mirror, a little more?

C: 赛飞儿发短信邀请{NICKNAME}前往斯缇科西亚寻宝，或许能够成为一道不错的调剂。
E: Cipher sent a message inviting {NICKNAME} to go treasure hunting in Styxia — could be a welcome change of pace.

C: 在风堇的呼唤中，索拉比斯恢复了神智。既而，塞涅俄丝的两位随伴翼兽愿意为我们带路，前往艾格勒的所在处。
E: Responding to Hyacine's call, Solabis regained its sanity. Then, Seliose's two companion winged beasts offered to guide us to Aquila's location.

C: 圣城陷入永夜，混乱令人不安，而距火种尽数归还也仅剩一步，危机下，完成「再创世」恐怕是我们唯一的选择。取回刻法勒的火种后，我们将立刻赶往创世涡心。
E: Evernight has descended upon the holy city, bringing disturbing chaos in its wake. With just one final Coreflame to return, completing the "Era Nova" may be our only choice in this crisis. After retrieving Kephale's Coreflame, we will immediately head to the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C: 翁法罗斯的千万次轮回，连同那无缘黎明的盗火者一同，即将在此刻跨入终幕。真相呈现在{NICKNAME}面前，引领着{F#她}{M#他}跨入「岁月」的起点。
E: The millions cycles of Amphoreus, along with the Flame Reaver who was denied the dawn, are about to reach its final curtain. The truth now lies before {NICKNAME}, guiding {F#her}{M#him} toward the origin point of "Time."

C: 你还想要成为英雄吗？你只看到了他们光鲜亮丽的一面，却忽略了，英雄之路上，未能成为英雄的累累白骨。
E: Still want to be a hero? All you see is the spotlight. You forget the hero's path is paved with the bones of those who never made it.

C:
《钟表惊魂夜》
一二，被音符锁住梦境。
三四，恶狼最爱吃哭泣，
五六，左轮转动到眉心。
七八，钟表正滴答作响，
九十，恶灵马上要来袭。
E: A Haunting of Clocks One, two — notes trap your dreamscape. Three, four — wolves hunger for the tears' taste; Five, six — the revolver clicks between your brows. Seven, eight — the ticking clock won't wait; Nine, ten — the spirits are coming to your face.

C: 你们很强吗？强有什么用？匹诺康尼讲的不是打打杀杀，是人情世故。
E: You think you're tough? So what? Penacony isn't about fists and firepower. It's about people and connections.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n收集泰坦符文，完成密钥封装。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nCollect the Titan runes to complete the encryption key encapsulation.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…果然是假的！\n这里是用你的「记忆」构筑的假象，你必须和昔涟一起赶紧逃进其他的记忆里。\n星期日正在用他的能力入侵你的「梦境」来拯救你…没想到还会有这样的一天。
E: The Era Nova Ceremony has been completed. The journey in Amphoreus is over... As if!\nThis is all an illusion constructed from your "memory." You must now escape with Cyrene into other memories!\nSunday is using his powers to invade your "dreamscape" to save you... Never thought this day would come.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which sealed the "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Remembrance already warped the Grove. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.

C: 如今翁法罗斯被三重命途之一的「记忆」所裹挟，三月、{NICKNAME}…{F#她们}{M#他们}俩去向不明，能将他们带回的就只有我了。\n如今翁法罗斯迷雾重重，还有一位友人能为我拨云见日。
E: Now Amphoreus is ensnared by the Remembrance, one of the Three Paths, and March and {NICKNAME}... they are nowhere to be found. I'm the only one who can bring them back.\nAmphoreus is shrouded in mystery now, but I have a friend who can help me see through the fog.

C: 从一页永恒返回战场吧。让记忆与爱成为我们的弓矢，平息那无首巨匠的劫火，为银河的未来做出截然不同的证明——宇宙的答案绝非「毁灭」，在沉重的终幕背后，会亮起希望的起始。
E: Return to the battlefield from An Eternal Page. Let remembrances and love be our bow and arrow to quell the headless giant's karmic flames and prove a different path for the Cosmos's future. The answer to the universe will never be the Destruction. Hope's beginning shall shine forth behind the heavy curtain of the final act.

C: 「异星水魈」终于现身——不料却以你的面目出现。\n原来打从一开始，密信中所指共犯就是拉明娜。\n而她从你开启调查的那一刻起，就计划好了这出请君入瓮、狸猫换太子的戏码。
E: The Xenohydro finally shows up, looking exactly like you.\nIt turns out, Lamina is the traitor mentioned in the secret letter.\nFrom the moment you started the investigation, she planned to lure you here and let the Xenohydro take your place.

C: 年迈的以斯帖授权你前去回收记录着奇景秘闻的录像带。至于为什么是你？\n因为这位密卷科员虔信，秘密一向会主动挑选它们的见证者。
E: The elderly Esther authorizes you to retrieve the videotapes of wonders and secrets. But why you?\nThat's because this researcher from the Department of Insight believes that secrets choose their own witnesses.

C: 应物科的温世齐受「公司」委托，要盘点空间站的资产亏损。\n他拜托你拍摄月台区域的资产，拍下被裂界侵蚀的月台试试吧。
E: Wen Shiqi in the Department of Implement Arts has been tasked by the IPC with making a damage report of all the assets in the space station.\nHe asked you to snap some photos of assets around the railway platform. Take a picture of the platform corroded by Fragmentum.

C: 按照艾丝妲的计划，调查人员先行抵达了二楼，对于当前舱段的情况，他们似乎发现了一些线索。
E: According to Asta's plans, the investigator first reached floor two and seemed to have found some clues about the zone's current situation.

C: 基座舱段的气氛比你想象中喧闹得多，听说有位贵客即将到访，科员们都开始了繁忙的工作。从阿兰的只言片语中，你隐约猜到了来者的身份。
E: The atmosphere in the base zone seems much more boisterous than you would expect. Hearing of the imminent arrival of an honored guest, researchers all begin their busy work. From Arlan's words, you vaguely guess the identity of the visitor.

C: 漫长猩红的幻觉之夜，仍然还未结束。\n看来配角也有心，自认人生「龙套」的维利特，也会有自己的想法……
E: The long, scarlet night of hallucinations forges endlessly on.\nIt seems like even the minor characters harbor their own intentions. Velite, the self-proclaimed "extra," will have ideas of his own...

C: 艾丝妲不在基座舱段，黑塔又似乎受到了袭击，你决定先去黑塔办公室看看情况
E: Asta is not in the base zone, and Herta seems to have been attacked yet again. You decide to head back to Herta's office to find out what's up

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
前情太复杂。总之：布洛妮娅&贝洛伯格，危。
先去找人收集意见。上层区开始。
帕姆注：到底发生了什么，倒是把细节说清楚啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Story leading up to this is too complicated. Basically, Bronya & Belobog = in danger.
Need to find people to get some ideas first. Starting from the Overworld.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What exactly is happening! Write down the details first, at least!

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n差点和托帕大打出手。好在布洛妮娅来阻止了。她说要带我们去个地方。好奇。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nAlmost fought with Topaz. Thankfully, Bronya came to stop us. She said she'll take us to a place. Curious.

C: 你在裂界中发现了一个神态异常的小女孩，希莉儿。\n你再次帮助希莉儿解决了一个箱子谜题，得到了她由衷的赞许。\n再和她谈谈，问问她究竟为什么不愿离开这片裂界。
E: You find a strange little girl, Cyrille, in the Fragmentum.\nYou helped her solve another Armory Box puzzle, earning heartfelt praises from her.\nTalk to her again and ask why she doesn't want to leave the Fragmentum.

C: 尽管老师傅使出浑身解数，试图教会他的徒弟学会如何调度矿车，但后者似乎仍不得要领——或者说，不想得要领。\n场面一度陷入尴尬，而此时的你终于明白：「金牌助教」生来就是要在这种状况下出面解围…哪怕是被迫的。\n正所谓天道酬勤，命运会向每一位成功通过矿车测试的勇者送上奖励…虽然这次是老师傅转交的，但还是心怀感激地收下吧。
E: Sharing every trick in the book, the senior miner attempts to teach his apprentice the skill of dispatching mine carts. However, the apprentice does not seem to be grasping the concept — or maybe it's because he doesn't want to.\nThe situation turns very awkward, and you finally realize that the Ace Assistant is meant to find a solution in situations like this... even if you were forced to do so.\nHardwork will always be rewarded, and destiny will send its gifts to every champion that passes the mine cart exam... although it was passed on by the senior miner this time, you should still accept it with gratitude.

C: 你凭自己的聪明才智，很快便解决了矿车工老师傅布置的矿车难题。\n去问问他有何奖励吧——这种环节通常都会有奖励，不是吗？
E: With your ingenuity, you quickly solved the mine cart puzzle set up by the senior mine cart operator.\nGo ask him what the reward is — there is usually a reward for this kind of task, isn't there?

C: 你与克拉拉在机械墓场仔细搜索了一番，总算找到了可供使用的零部件。\n返回史瓦罗基地，看看这次的外壳能否让帕斯卡恢复正常吧。
E: Clara and you had a thorough search in the machine graveyard and finally found parts you can use.\nReturn to Svarog's Base and see if the shell can get Pascal back to normal.

C: 娜塔莎与她住在上层区的养父母重新建立了沟通，希望能藉由他们在医界的人脉为下层区的病患谋取资源。\n你与娜塔莎在行政区会合，但距离她和养母约好的见面时间尚有片刻之遥。\n娜塔莎决定去买一束花，作为与养父母久别重逢的见面礼。
E: Natasha has reconnected with her adoptive parents living in the Overworld, hoping that their network in the medical community could help the patients in the Underworld obtain more medical resources.\nYou meet Natasha in the Administrative District, but there is still some time left before meeting her adoptive mother.\nSince they haven't met each other for a long time, Natasha decides to buy a flower bouquet as a gift for her adoptive parents.

C: 为了获取药王秘传的信任，你不得不帮他们截获一份寄往神策府的重要情报。希望那位带着情报逃离药王秘传的「背叛者」一切平安。
E: In order to obtain the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus' trust, you have to intercept an important missive to be delivered to the Seat of Divine Foresight. Let's hope nothing bad happens to the missive-bearing traitor escaping the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 为了获取药王秘传的信任，你不得不帮他们截获一份寄往神策府的重要情报。希望那位带着情报逃离药王秘传的「背叛者」一切平安。
E: In order to obtain the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus' trust, you have to intercept an important missive to be delivered to the Seat of Divine Foresight. Let's hope nothing bad happens to the missive-bearing traitor escaping the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 黛青小姐停播，经纪人跑路，粉丝们面对突然的变动手足无措。既然找不到经纪人，那就和青雀去约定的地方，跟黛青小姐本人见上一面吧。
E: Ms. Daiqing stopped broadcasting, her manager ran away, and her fans were at a loss for the sudden change. Since you can't find the manager, go to the agreed-upon place with Qingque and meet Ms. Daiqing face to face.

C: 半夏隐瞒自己曾是「药王秘传」的身份，但是她确实没有伤害白露，你应该问清楚她究竟想做什么，才能放心白露与她同行。\n这两人达成了交易，实在可疑，你得问问这是什么交易。
E: Banxia hid the fact that she was a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus, but she did not hurt Bailu at all. You should ask her what her goal is before letting her travel with Bailu.\nThe two have made some kind of a deal. It's shady, you should find out what deal this is.

C: 随着旅途的深入，半夏的魔阴身症状也开始明显。到处找不见她的心上人，这附近总会有点儿什么线索吧。\n估计那人是遇上什么麻烦了，云骑军和药王秘传都不会放过他。
E: As the journey goes on, Banxia's Mara-struck symptoms begin to emerge. Her sweetheart is nowhere to be seen, maybe clues can be found nearby.\nMaybe that person got into some trouble, both the Cloud Knights and Disciples of Sanctus Medicus would never let him off the hook.

C: 根据名侦探三月七的推理，如果罗刹在这里用足足两个小时才完成了交易，那就说明这里一定凶险异常，到处都是怪物。\n嗯？这不是个推理故事吗？怎么塞了这么多场战斗？
E: According to Genius Detective March 7th's deduction, if Luocha spent two whole hours to complete the trade, it must mean it is super danger, with monsters all around.\nHmm? Isn't this a detective story? Why are there so many combat fillers?

C: 在铁卫禁区和希露瓦见面吧，她似乎能提供你和钟珊当前需要的东西——机械生命。
E: Meet with Serval in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. She seems to be able to provide what you and Zhongshan need right now — mechanical lifeforms.

C: 时光流逝，转眼演武仪典即将召开在即。在即将登上擂台的时刻到来前，年轻的剑士们眺望空中的斗舰，与远来之客抒发己见。但关注此刻的并不只有他们，迴星港中，另有不速之客图谋不轨……
E: Time goes by, and the moment of the Wardance has arrived once more. Right before the young swordmasters are about to step into the ring, they look up at the fighter jet in the sky and start expressing their opinions to the visitors from afar. But they are not the only ones focused on this moment, for in Stargazer Navalia, certain uninvited guests weave their schemes...

C: 高天之上，竞锋舰中，群狼环伺，猎手弯弓。罗浮仙舟的演武擂台上终于展开一场血之角逐……
E: Aboard the Skysplitter in the sky, a hunter draws their bow amid prowling wolves. The Xianzhou Luofu's Wardance arena finally plays host to a bloody contest...

C: 空无一物的战场中，新死的顽敌再度现身于眼前。老练的猎手将面对一场特殊的逐猎……而她，已成猎物。
E: On the empty battlefield, a tenacious and freshly-dead foe makes an appearance once more. The veteran hunter is primed to go on a special hunt... but this time, she is the prey.

C: 芙洛拉一直压抑着她对莱斯利•迪恩的情感，直到后者逝去前的一刻。\n现在，莱斯利获得了第二次机会，可以回应芙洛拉未能对他坦露的感情——他决定抓住。
E: Flora has been suppressing her feelings for Lesley Dean even when Lesley died.\nNow, Lesley gains a second chance to reciprocate the emotions Flora never revealed, and Lesley intends to seize this chance.

C: 柯柯娜消失了，试着触碰她留下的记忆，也许能追上她的脚步。
E: Cocona has disappeared. By touching the memories she left behind, you may be able to catch up to her again.

C: 螺丝咕姆与你一同展开了对查德威克真实经历的调查。\n猎犬家系再次挡在了你们的面前——得想办法说服他们。
E: Screwllum joins you in the investigation of Chadwick's past.\nHowever, the Bloodhound Family once again poses a hindrance. Find a way to convince them.

C: 罗莎与你一起到尾翼视察，提出更换尾翼涂装与为飞艇命名的事项，你心中浮现了几种方案……
E: You and Rosa inspect the airship's empennage. As she raises the business of changing the empennage paint and naming the airship, several ideas come to your mind...

C: 呜呜，呜呜，找不到路了呜……
E: Wub-boohoo, wub-boohoo... I can't find my way back...

C: 火种匣里存放着元老院的密卷，大多观点出自主观臆断。\n伊来内请求你打开下一个火种匣。「余火」会在其中吗？
E: The Coreflame Casket contains the Council of Elders' secret scrolls, most of which are based on subjective speculation.\nAlain asks you to open the next Coreflame Casket. Could the Embers be within?

C: 整个树庭倾覆之前，竟然没有一只无辜的小动物受到伤害…这一切的原因竟然是「贼灵」巴特鲁斯。\n它想炫耀一下自己的英雄事迹，你可以打听打听，听完有赏。
E: Before the Grove collapsed, miraculously, not a single innocent critter was harmed... and it was all thanks to the Spirithief Bartholos.\nThey're eager to brag about their heroic deed. Ask them about it, and you might get rewarded.

C: 帕姆对仙舟上的饮料十分感兴趣，你决定回到罗浮，替帕姆买一份地道的罗浮饮料。
E: Pom-Pom is very interested in beverages on the Xianzhou. You decide to return to the Luofu and get an authentic Luofu beverage for Pom-Pom.

C: 造物们对「管家」言听计从，但这似乎只是表象，说不定会有造物对它心存不满。或许我们能从中打探到什么……
E: While all the other creations appear to be obedient to the butler, there could be dissatisfied individuals among them. Perhaps you can learn something from them...

C: 利用谛听穿越警戒区，尽可能不要惊扰敌人。
E: Use the Diting to cross the guard zone and try not to alert any enemies.

C: 利用谛听穿越警戒区，尽可能不要惊扰敌人。
E: Use the Diting to cross the guard zone and try not to alert any enemies.

C: 根据梓桥的记录，这艘星槎应该丢失在授事厅了，去那里仔细找找看吧。
E: Ziqiao's records say this starskiff was lost in Conclave Hall. Go there to have a closer look.

C: 沿着站岗守卫的指引，你来到了抵抗黑潮的前线，却发现这里刚刚遭遇过怪物入侵。\n调查一下倒地的卫兵们是否还活着吧。
E: Following the stationed guards' directions, you arrive at the front line of the battle against black tide, only to find the area has just been overrun by monsters.\nCheck on the guards lying prone on the ground and see if any are still alive.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往机械聚落，收集「自动机兵•甲虫」的战斗数据，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to collect Automaton Beetle combat data at the Robot Settlement to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了才华横溢的希露瓦。代她们前往机械屋「永动」，了解希露瓦是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on the talented Serval. Head to the Neverwinter Workshop in their stead, and see whether Serval is interested in the position.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是铆钉镇中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from Rivet Town...

C: 金人巷应该有了新的进展，要回去看看吗？\n常回金人巷看看。
E: There should be new developments at Aurum Alley. Would you like to go back and check it out?\nVisit Aurum Alley regularly

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说霍三哥与商会建立合作关系。但霍三哥此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Mr. Huo to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Mr. Huo has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，联手推出了模拟宇宙的第一次大更新！天才们对做项目各有各的想法，塞了不少好东西进去。斯蒂芬做了些「觐见之骰」，来让这场测试更加有趣。据他所称，其中封存着不同命途的「力量」，这对你觐见星神有大用处。说真的…他是认真在研究星神，还是在做游戏？
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen have joined forces to bring about the Simulated Universe's first major update! The geniuses added a substantial influx of fun content from all their various ideas. Stephen created some Audience Dice to add a bit more spice to this test. According to him, the dice hold "powers" connected to different Paths, and is conducive to ensuring that you meet with the Aeons. Honestly, though, it's hard to tell if he's actually investigating the Aeons... or just trying to make a game.

C: 大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？\n就让这些倒霉蛋化作艺术的一部分吧。
E: The trial of the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is a form of art, right?\nSuppose you best incorporate your unfortunate adversaries into this artistic expression.

C: 胸腔激荡，脚步也变得轻快。你将与另一个人展开角逐，唯有强大且好运的那方能够继续前进。
E: With your chest surging and your footwork brisk, you and your foe begin a struggle for victory. Only the one who is powerful and fortunate may continue onward.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 来到金人巷中，你们向前来寻找白露的医助们打听情报，打算找到消失不见的龙女
E: Upon arriving at Aurum Alley, you inquire with the medical assistants who are here looking for Bailu, hoping to find the vanished Dragon Lady

C: 批评完粉丝，就算是大主播桂乃芬也知道这算是对是错。\n先回到绥园里看看，继续做你们该做的事。
E: After telling off the fans, even the big-name streamer Guinaifen know what is right or wrong.\nGo back to Fyxestroll Garden first and keep doing what you should be doing.

C: 你与捉鬼小队的成员再度在绥园聚首。如同上班打卡一般，翻翻「罗浮杂俎」瞧瞧有什么足够怪异的事情，再去探查一番，一天便这么过去了。
E: Once again, you reunite with your fellow ghost hunters at Fyxestroll Garden. Scanning through the posts on Ghostly Grove and conducting investigations have become routine tasks for you.

C: 空间站里似又有麻烦了，阿兰拜托你来帮忙。只不过这次的「肇事者」，模样实在令人生疑——这么可爱的小东西，真的会有什么危害吗？你有些摸不着头脑，但阿兰既然开口了，礼尚往来，总得帮一下……
E: There seems to be trouble again in the space station. Arlan is asking for your help. But this time, the "culprit" looks really suspicious. Could such a cute little thing really do any harm? You are a little confused, but since Arlan asked politely, guess it's best to help out...

C: 混乱的梦境卷走了美梦小镇赖以生存的物资。你必须深入梦中，将这些物资一一找回。
E: The chaotic Dreamscape has swept away the supplies Dreamville relies upon to survive. You have to enter the dream and recover all of them.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n继续去接待顾客吧。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nLet's continue serving the customers.

C: 铁皮人希望向你展示它理想中的酒吧，就去看看究竟是什么模样吧。\n见到了黑桃和司令，但它们似乎和平时有些不太一样……
E: Tin Man wants to show you its dream lounge. Go and take a look at the lounge.\nYou meet up with Spade and Mr. Bigwig. However, they seem a little different from usual...

C: 让我们搜查赃物，为匹诺康尼伸张正义！
E: Let's search for the stolen goods and bring justice to Penacony!

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n找到宝箱了，快去打开它吧！
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nYou've found a treasure chest. Open it!

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 卢卡的幻觉愈发严重，你决定带他去丹鼎司看看医生。\n没想到，你们在这里遇到了丹鼎司的灵砂司鼎，直接看上了司鼎大人的专家门诊。真是幸运。
E: Luka's hallucinations are getting worse. You decide to take him to the Alchemy Commission to see a healer.\nWho'd have thought that you'd run into the Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master, Lingsha? You are lucky to have the Cauldron Master do a specialist consultation!

C: 你与卢卡应邀参加了托帕举办的发布会。\n不知道托帕能否帮你们渡过这场舆论风波……
E: Luka and you attended Topaz's press conference at her invitation.\nWho knows whether she can help you to get through this PR emergency...

C: 世事无常，身为旁观者的你只能向前，见证旅途的尽头。
E: This world is transient. As an observer, you can only move forward and witness the end of the journey.

C: 完成「码放货物」简单模式II
E: Complete Inventory Arrangement Easy Mode II

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到垃圾桶组合的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。

The pool water has been contaminated — the first disaster foretold in the prophecy has occurred.\nIs the prophecy coming true, or is someone deliberately creating confusion? This will determine whether you truly transform into a baby seal. You must investigate carefully.

C: 嘻嘻，这事我也干过。
E: Hee-hee, I've done stuff like that before.

C: 关于它的原理…咳，算了——如果感兴趣的话，下次我找个时间给你细细解释。
E: As for the mechanism... Well, if you're interested, I'll explain it to you in detail when we have more time.

C: 拿一般的陆地列车打比方，这就像前进的铁轨突然断裂，底下是坍塌的万丈深渊……
E: Take an ordinary train as an example: It's like the tracks up ahead have suddenly snapped, and the way forward leads straight into a collapsing abyss...

C: 列车总得有人留守，不然帕姆会很寂寞的。
E: Someone has to stay on the train, or Pom-Pom will get lonely.

C: 瓦尔特是这么认为的？嗯…考虑到星轨遇到的空间阻塞，可能性确实很大。
E: He said so? Hmm... considering the spatial obstacles that the star rail has encountered, it's highly possible.

C: 哈哈，你已经很有开拓者的样子了。没错，总不能对身处危机的人置之不理吧。
E: Haha, I see you're already a full-fledged Trailblazer. You're right, we can't remain indifferent to those in crisis.

C: 咱们车上有一个失忆设定的就够了啊。
E: ...We don't need another amnesiac on this train...

C: 我没事，情况也了解了。
E: I'm fine, and yes, I'm up to speed.

C: 哈！这才哪到哪啊。要我说你是初来乍到，等你待久了，会发现列车上每个人都怪怪的……
E: Ha! Shocking? I guess you're still new — you'll find out how strange everyone is around here sooner or later...

C: 到家！列车停靠了这么久，姬子和杨叔估计都不耐烦了吧？
E: Home, sweet home! Mr. Yang and Himeko must be bored given how long our train had to stay here.

C: 是他…如果传说属实，那么他就是创造了星神的男人。
E: That's him... If the legends are true, then he was a man who created an Aeon.

C: 黑塔空间站不会以押金、抵扣金等任何名义收取科员费用。如遇自称工作人员的科员向您索要个人信息，请及时报告防卫科。
E: Herta Space Station does not charge researchers fees for deposits, credits, etc. If someone claiming to be a staff member asks for your personal information, please report it to the Security Department.

C: 没，电梯好像损坏了，按键都没反应。
E: Nah, I think the elevator's broken. I pressed all the buttons but nothing happened.

C: 好像…是给了我一张卡……
E: Oh, right, she did give me some sort of card...

C: 嗯，和我们来时的道路一样。
E: Yes, it's the same as when we came.

C: 你聊你的，别扯上我。
E: Please leave me out of this.

C: 其中有一些作为奇物被收容在空间站内，但几乎所有科员都会漠视它们的基本权益。
E: ...Some of which have been collected as rare items and housed in the space station. Most of the researchers disregard their basic rights.

C: 有什么飞了过去。
E: ...Something just flew past.

C: 多少钱？
E: What's your price?

C: 那还用说么？这一路过来，咱俩很合得来，还是同龄人。光这两点，就够不容易了。
E: Do I even need to say it? I think we're becoming fast friends... isn't that enough?

C: 再一眨眼，你就把那大家伙给打进杨叔的黑洞里，还救了我…我还没向你好好道谢……
E: In the blink of an eye, you knocked that big fella into Mr. Yang's black hole and saved me... I still haven't thanked you properly yet...

C: 你挺会照顾人的。
E: You're really good at taking care of others.

C: 丹恒微微颔首，他的视线转向别处。
E: Dan Heng gives a slight nod and shifts his gaze elsewhere.

C: 谢谢你。
E: Thank you.

C: 我能留在空间站吗？
E: Can I stay at the space station?

C: 唔，其实也只是让你体内的东西暂时安静下来……
E: Heh, all I did was calm that thing inside you down temporarily...

C: 下一站，会去哪里呢？
E: What's the next stop for the Express?

C: 它是资料室，星穹列车从初次发车到现在，全部的行车记录都存在这个房间里。
E: These are the Archives. It has the records of all the Astral Express's trips since its first journey.

C: （不过这么硬的床…真的可以好好休息吗？）
E: (But... can he really sleep on such a hard bed?)

C: 「了解」当地的人文生态，融入其中。
E: Understand the local culture and immerse ourselves within it.

C: 关于反物质军团…
E: About the Antimatter Legion...

C: 俱乐部动用了大量资源和关系来做这件事情…我们现在模拟出的虚假星神与本质具有联系，因此你可以理解为我们创造出了不具有力量的迷你神明。
E: The society has pulled a lot of strings and diverted a lot of resources to make this project happen... The false Aeons we have simulated are connected with real ones, so you can say we have basically created a bunch of powerless mini Aeons.

C: 唔，有可能吧。毕竟是那么重要的大人物，没准房间里埋伏着十几个刀斧手呢。
E: Hmm, maybe. She's an important person after all — maybe there were armed bodyguards lying in ambush.

C: 早点休息吧，为明天的谈判养足精神。
E: Let's get some rest, we need to save our energy for the discussions tomorrow.

C: 这大长队一动不动，到底还得等多久啊……
E: This queue isn't moving, how long are we gonna be here...

C: 这就跟生火做饭一个道理啊？如果房子是口烧菜的大锅，加热器就是锅外面的灶火。
E: Isn't it just like cooking food over an open flame? If the house is a pot, then the heater is the stove it rests on.

C: 这份工作很辛苦吧？
E: This must be a hard job.

C: 大家还有什么问题吗～
E: Any questions~?

C: 有没有觉得少了什么？
E: Aren't we missing something?

C: 我老弟把命令看得比什么都重要，就算你把布洛妮娅的信怼到脸上，他也不会动摇的。
E: For my brother, orders are more important than anything. Even if you stuck Bronya's letter to his forehead, he wouldn't be swayed.

C: 真的吗？好耶！有熟人带路，一下心里就有底了！
E: Really? Great! Phew, it's less scary if someone you know is leading the way!

C: 布洛妮娅，她真的会平安无事吗？
E: Is Bronya really safe?

C: 请你…请你收我做助手吧！
E: Please... please take me in as your assistant!

C: 好耶，我要坐前排！
E: Okay. I want a front-row seat!

C: 布洛妮娅大人的上任宣讲很快就要开始了。我正是受她之托，特地前来告知各位的。
E: Lady Bronya's inaugural address will begin soon. She asked me to pass on her invitation to you.

C: 三月，丹恒，还有{NICKNAME}——你们能赶上宣讲真是太好了。
E: March, Dan Heng, {NICKNAME}... it's wonderful you made it to the address.

C: 身体完全恢复了吗？
E: Are you fully recovered?

C: 走吧，我们再去行政区溜达一圈！我还想多拍几张纪念照呢。
E: Let's go for one more round in the Administrative District! I wanna take more photos!

C: 事实证明，星穹列车这伙人比我想得还要有趣！你很喜欢？当真？哈哈哈，真是杰作啊。
E: Turns out the Astral Express crew is more fun than I expected! You liked it? Really? Haha, told you so!

C: 好像梦到了桑博…
E: I dreamed about Sampo...

C: 离开雅利洛-Ⅵ，回到列车。
E: Leave Jarilo-VI and return to the Express.

C: 算了，这事你别管了。看来还得我自己下去…啊——
E: Ugh, forget it. Leave it to me. I'll go down myself...

C: 哎呀，原来是你们仨！快来快来，我跟克拉拉刚才还聊起你们了呢。
E: Ha, it's you three! Come on in! I was just talking to Clara about you.

C: 不愧是见过大世面的人，真大方！弄得我怪不好意思的……
E: Well, you're clearly better traveled than I am, and I know how generous you are... I feel embarrassed to ask now...

C: 嗐，这不是…尘埃落定了嘛。星核的问题也解决了，可可利亚她也……
E: Well, i—it's just... the dust has settled now. The Stellaron problem has been resolved, and Cocolia...

C: 倒也没写什么很私人的内容，你想看就看吧。
E: There's nothing personal in it — have a read if you like.

C: 剪报什么的才不是重点——我想告诉{NICKNAME}的是，我们朗道家人才辈出！
E: Ugh, the clippings aren't the point — what I'm trying to say to {NICKNAME} is that we have a lot of talent in the Landau family!

C: 我等下就要回军区了。{NICKNAME}，你要一起吗？
E: I'm heading back to the military zone later. {NICKNAME}, do you want to go with me?

C: 这是街边的路灯。
E: This is a street lamp.

C: 你看见牌子上写着：「『球牡丹』——年开一月，过时不候！」
E: You see a sign that says: "Ball Peony — one month-bloom, don't miss it!"

C: 红色的邮筒，筒口露出白信封的一角。这只信封很不幸地卡在邮筒当中。
E: A red mailbox with the corner of a white letter sticking out. This letter is unfortunately stuck.

C: 我懂，我懂！我这就去找人——大姐头，咱这位「客人」就劳烦您受累照顾了！
E: Alright, I get it! I'm setting off right now. I'll have to trouble you to look after them while I'm gone, ma'am.

C: 这是你的诊所？
E: This is your clinic?

C: 这里是什么人的地盘啊，居然允许小孩子们玩搏击……
E: Who's in charge here? How can they just let kids attack each other...?

C: 后来怎么了？
E: Then what?

C: 除了你以外。
E: Except you.

C: 史瓦罗？这名字听着耳熟……
E: Svarog? That name sounds familiar...

C: 就聊到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 哎，太失礼啦。
E: Hey, that's not very polite~

C: （毫无睡意，起来走走吧。）
E: (May as well go for a walk if I can't sleep.)

C: 是要去被侵蚀的城区里收集可用的物资吗？算我一个。
E: Go to a corroded town to collect some useful resources? I'm in.

C: …你靠手头上的物资还能撑多久？
E: ...How much longer can you last with your current supplies?

C: 是…{F#她}{M#他}体内的星核？
E: Because of... the Stellaron inside {F#her}{M#him}?

C: 那要你何用？
E: And why do we need you?

C: 是该好好睡一觉了…
E: I suppose it would be good to get some sleep...

C: 还有什么事之后再说吧，你快去找找虎克，她应该还没有跑远。
E: Let's talk later. Go and find Hook, she can't have gone too far...

C: 幸好史瓦罗那确实藏着对你们有用的信息——差使你们忙前忙后这么久，最后要是还一无所获，那我可真要愧疚一阵了。哈哈哈！
E: Fortunately, Svarog turned out to have some useful information for you. After all your hard work, I'd feel quite guilty if you left empty-handed. Hahaha!

C: 具体讲讲。
E: Care to elaborate?

C: 酣畅的战斗和刺激的冒险…很不错，我不讨厌。
E: Hearty combat and exciting adventures... Not bad, I certainly don't hate it.

C: 哼，像你这种过度自信的年轻人，我可见得太多了。
E: Hmph. I've seen a lot of overconfident young people like yourself.

C: 对了，我知道你去过裂界，那你肯定见过那种怪物吧？有着人的身形，穿着特别的盔甲……
E: By the way, I know you've been to the Fragmentum, so you must've seen those monsters, right? Shaped like a human, wearing special armor...

C: 以后你来拳馆，要是你看到「掘掘博士」也在里面，可以找他帮你清点下人员，安排个拳馆挑战赛什么的，就不用再排队买票了。
E: Next time you come around, if you see Dr. Dig here, get him to do a head count and squeeze you into a challenge round or something like that. That way, you won't need to line up for tickets.

C: 真有观众喜欢看？
E: Audience actually buy it?

C: …知道了，医生。
E: ...Yes doc.

C: 我今天也算是大发慈悲了——我告诉他，观众早就看腻了，你得去找个更厉害的怪物，再去搞一套跟之前不一样的盔甲来，观众才能有新鲜感。
E: Luckily for him, I was in a particularly merciful mood today. So I told him that the audience has been long sick of his old shtick. If he wants to win back the audience, he simply needs to find himself a much more powerful monster for a different set of armor.

C: 唔…让我想想……
E: Hmm... let me think about this...

C: 具体规则是什么？
E: What are the rules?

C: 现在，让我们将热烈的掌声献给两位斗士——我宣布，顶峰争霸战正式开始！
E: Now, give it up for the two warriors — the battle for the top begins, now!

C: {NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！这是何等压倒性的实力，何等华丽的胜利——在「异界拳魔」的面前，战栗吧，颤抖吧！
E: {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}! What an overwhelming power, what a magnificent victory — All kneel to the Limbo Monster. Tremble. Tremble!

C: 哈哈。我觉得，当面传达的消息能承载更重要的意义吧。
E: Haha. Sometimes face-to-face communication is more meaningful, don't you think?

C: 可不能用这副模样迎接宾客…菜品数量也得再扩充一波才行。不多说了，马上开工！
E: But there's no way I'm letting them set eyes on the old place looking like this... Oh, and we're gonna need to expand the menu. Oh dear. Action stations!

C: 那个穿盔甲的哥哥好帅！
E: Those men in armor are so cool!

C: 假如「地火」不愿与抛弃下层十余载的贵军合作…你们又会作如何反应？是要动用武力让我们屈服吗？
E: Since this offer comes from those who left us to our fate for more than a decade... how would you react if Wildfire refused? Hmm? Would you use force?

C: 你还需要准备一下吗？那等你准备好了就告诉我，我们一起出发。
E: Need to take stock? Just say the word — we'll head over together.

C: 总之，这次真的是辛苦你们了。只凭「地火」的力量，想平息这场骚动肯定会十分艰难。
E: All in all, I owe everyone a big thank you. It would've been much harder if Wildfire had operated alone.

C: 别怕——有老弟在身边，我们一路绝对安全。回见！
E: It's alright, I've got Gepard with me — we'll be safe. See you in a bit!

C: 「是我…」垂死的垃圾桶艰难地说，「是我养大了…你……」一阵疼痛摄住了它，那一瞬间，它意识到，自己体内的某个垃圾袋破了，绞痛令垂死的垃圾桶呜咽起来。垃圾桶满意地笑了。
E: "It's me..." the dying trashcan bade, "I was the one... who raised you..." A wave of sharp pain enveloped it. At that moment, it realized that a certain trash bag had burst. The shooting pain coaxed a whimper out of the dying trashcan while the other one snickered satisfactorily.

C: 据称，该分队在当地山脉开展爆破工程时，在剖开的山体中意外发现一容器样建筑。调查过后，该分队确信其中存在一虚数亚空间场，并确认了其功能。
E: The squad was conducting demolition missions on certain mountain ranges when they discovered a curious facility in the shape of a container. After investigation, the squad was convinced that there was a Sub-space field within the facility and confirmed its function.

C: 你是说，驭空就是幕后黑手！？
E: Are you saying that... Madam Yukong is the new Madam Cocolia!?

C: 打扰各位的会面，我是「罗浮」云骑将军：景元。
E: Apologies for interrupting your meeting. My name is Jing Yuan — I'm the general of the Cloud Knights here on the Luofu.

C: 我还有其他要事，不克久留，告辞了。
E: I have other matters to attend to. Goodbye for now.

C: 请您停步。将军有令，暂时封锁星槎海部分区域，以防危险发生。
E: Halt. Under order of the general and to mitigate further risk, Starskiff Haven is under partial lockdown.

C: 走，逛街能治愈一切胡思乱想。
E: Come on! Let's go take a stroll and clear your head.

C: 你好，我来申领物资。
E: Hello, I'm here to collect supplies.

C: 天东有若木，下置衔烛龙…有生之年，我一定能看到这番景象。
E: On the eastern horizon, the arbor stands tall, the candle dragon down below... One day, I'll see that view for myself.

C: 建木…建木重生了！
E: Ambro... The Ambrosial Arbor is reborn!

C: 你不像仙舟人，从哪儿来的？
E: You don't seem like you're from the Xianzhou. Where have you come from?

C: 有一个粉头发，咋咋呼呼的……
E: Then... how about an excitable girl with pink hair...?

C: 看码头的线路，终点是星槎海的中枢。嗯，到那儿我们就安全啦。
E: Judging by where it's docked, it must be heading for Central Starskiff Haven. Nice, we'll be safe there.

C: 咦？丹恒兄弟何出此言？能离开这儿就很好了，去哪里都行呀。
E: Oh? What makes you ask that, young master? I'm happy as long as I get to leave this place.

C: 有事请教…
E: I'd like to ask something...

C: 这不正是我们的日常吗？
E: That's just what we do every day.

C: 你们认识啊，刚才那位狐人小姐点了一份貘馍卷便离开了。
E: So you know each other! She ordered a tuskpir wrap and went on her way.

C: 可恶，这里完全过不去，得想办法截住她！
E: Ugh, there's no way through here, we need to think of a way to cut her off!

C: 丹士长见过太卜大人…您好像并不意外。
E: I have met you before in my capacity as chief alchemist, master diviner... You don't seem surprised.

C: 唉，想来太卜大人是怕打草惊蛇，才对我们秘而不宣吧。
E: *sigh* The master diviner must have kept it quiet to avoid alerting them.

C: 这一切发生的太突然了…但杨叔说得对，回过头看，停云小姐是有不少古怪的地方，尤其对「丰饶」的造物过于感兴趣了。
E: It all happened so suddenly... but looking back, I think Mr. Yang was right. Tingyun was behaving strangely — she was fascinated with the Abundance's creations.

C: 联盟决议，将建木封入了鳞渊境，并交由持明龙尊世代守望，意在借助持明龙裔的力量遏制建木。
E: The Alliance decided to seal the Arbor within Scalegorge Waterscape, entrust it to the high elders of the Vidyadhara, and rely on the power of Long's Scions to constrain it.

C: 就是说，谢谢素裳姑娘了。
E: Meaning thank you, Miss Sushang.

C: 这股澎湃的力量…您是…是龙尊大人回来了。
E: This surging power... It's you... You've returned, High Elder.

C: 妙计没有，只有赌一把。赌持明长老的半截褪鳞之术，赌丹恒还能拾回龙尊的记忆……
E: There is no master plan, only a bet... a bet on the senior Vidyadhara's incomplete exuviation charm, and on Dan Heng's ability to access the memories of the high elder...

C: 这便是所谓「叩祝三爪」中的一处，消解此地封印，便能向玄根再进一步。
E: This is one of the places mentioned in the riddle — one of the three talons. If we can break the seal here, we'll be a step closer to the roots of the Arbor.

C: 三月小姐，你最好不要乱碰这些持明。
E: Miss March, I would advise you to refrain from interfering with the Vidyadhara.

C: 可谁也料不到，他们的进攻会以某种更隐秘的方式进行。绝灭大君伪装潜入，策动阴谋，将星核交给药王秘传，引发叛乱，想诱使罗浮自灭。
E: Few could have foreseen the insidious tactics employed in the execution of their assaults. The Lord Ravager slithered in unnoticed, clandestinely plotting and machinating, and surreptitiously bestowed a Stellaron upon the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. This heinous act instigated an uprising aimed at luring the Luofu into a perilous trap of self-destruction.

C: 我正在琢磨该如何向驭空大人开口呢…也许她已经得知消息了吧。
E: How am I gonna break this to Madam Yukong...? Maybe she's already heard the news.

C: 不过，至少现在我还安全。
E: But at least for now, I'm safe.

C: 我们从她的物品里找到了这盒种子，我想，停云小姐一定很希望将它送到你的手中。
E: We found this box of seeds among her belongings. I'm sure Miss Tingyun would have liked for you to have it.

C: 将军…
E: General...

C: 所以咱们的下一站是？
E: What's our next stop?

C: 汪汪！呜汪！
E: Woof woof! Rr—ruff!

C: 罗浮仙舟赠送给列车团的盟谊之证，可喜可贺，真是可喜可贺啊！但其实你更希望收到一人一套长乐天的宅子作礼物。
E: A symbol of friendship bestowed by the Xianzhou Luofu. As valuable as the gift is, you were secretly hoping that they'd gave each of you a manor in Exalting Sanctum.

C: 但辛苦不是白费的——这酒店大堂也太壮观了吧！那密密麻麻的都是客房吗？得有多少人住在这儿啊。
E: Well, the hassle was worth it — just look at this grand hotel lobby! And those endless rows, they're all rooms, right? Just think of the number of guests staying here.

C: 也许见过。
E: Perhaps we have.

C: 应该没有。
E: Probably not.

C: 无论如何，我都愿意栖身其中。
E: I would, no matter the cost.

C: …哦，可以啊，幽默！看来我们这位博学的朋友是好好备过课了。
E: ...Hah, you're funny, I'll give you that! It appears our erudite friend has done his homework.

C: 那你信任我吗？
E: Then, do you trust me?

C: 所以匹诺康尼究竟是…
E: So Penacony is...

C: 我再为您查询一下，请稍等……
E: Yes ma'am, please give me a moment...

C: 关于那位公司代表…
E: About that IPC representative...

C: 嗯…买完东西之后，就换上美美的晚礼服，去匹诺康尼大剧院欣赏知更鸟小姐的演唱吧！
E: Hmm... After doing my shopping, I'll get all dolled up in an evening gown to attend Miss Robin's show at Penacony Grand Theater!

C: 欢迎光临「思绪长廊」！您可以将这里理解为入境通道，通向「黄金的时刻」。而我在这里为各位宾客提供指引。
E: Welcome to the Gallery of Thoughts! You can think of this as the entrance to the Golden Hour. I'm here to provide guidance to our guests.

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: 那会儿就有苏乐达了？
E: Did SoulGlad really exist in that era?

C: …不，你不是帕。
E: ...No, you are not.

C: 不过你知道吗？据说钟表小子的原型，就是那位大名鼎鼎的——「钟表匠」。
E: By the way, do you know that Clockie's design is said to be inspired by none other than the legendary Watchmaker?

C: ——别回头。我确定他的目标就是你，从我们和加拉赫先生告别起就没跟丢过。
E: Don't turn around. I'm certain that you're his target. He's been on our tail since we parted ways with Mr. Gallagher.

C: 这都什么玩意？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 碰一下！
E: Touch it!

C: 哦，这里还写着「进入门洞以开始冒险」——显然你得从那里钻进去开始你的挑战，亲爱的。
E: Oh, here it says, "Enter the door to start your adventure." You have to climb inside from there to start your challenge, pal.

C: 我本以为是那位优雅的忆者在你脑海中留下了什么，现在看来，这梦中和她一样特别的存在不在少数。
E: I thought your heightened perception was caused by something the elegant Memokeeper might have left in your mind. Now, it seems to me there are many more special beings like her in this dream.

C: 呵，小孔雀…你有对漂亮的眼珠啊。老家是茨冈尼亚的？
E: *sigh* Spare me. Beautiful eyes though — are you from Sigonia?

C: 要我说，比起梦里，你更适合待在窨井盖下…啊，那里就有一只，快去吧～
E: I say you belong to the space under the manhole cover, not in a dream. There's one right over there. Off you go!

C: 滴答，滴答！灰色的朋友！既然你能看到我，那你一定能帮我个忙！
E: Tick-tock, tick-tock! My gray friend, since you can see, then you must be able to help me!

C: 你怎么了？为什么这么伤心？
E: What's wrong sweetie? Why are you feeling so down?

C: 我也希望如此。
E: I hope so too.

C: 我无法给予承诺…
E: I can't make any promises.

C: 这…是梦吗…
E: Is this... a dream...

C: 还好哦，放心。
E: It's fine. Don't worry.

C: 感觉还好。
E: I feel fine.

C: 你看到姬子和三月七在一起，被家族拦住了去路。黑天鹅就在她们身侧，但家族并未注意到她。
E: You see Himeko and March 7th together, obstructed by The Family. Black Swan stands beside them, unnoticed by the The Family.

C: 黄泉小姐，我有个提议——不如我们分头寻找出路，等有所发现再会合吧？这样效率更高一些。
E: Miss Acheron, I have a suggestion: Why not split up and look for a way out, and meet up again when we find something? That would speed things up.

C: 星期日。
E: Sunday.

C: 真没看到？再好好想想。
E: You really didn't see anything? Think harder.

C: 砂金的话里，还有一点让我很在意。
E: Aventurine said something that concerns me...

C: 这群人…千奇百怪，捉摸不透，又喜欢独来独往。哎，也难怪会被怀疑啊。
E: They're eccentric, unpredictable, and fond of being alone. No wonder she's a suspect.

C: 尊贵的客人，可否出来一见？
E: Honored guest, could you come out for a second?

C: 但记忆的复现很顺利，她要来了…很快就要来了…这里没有别人，不那么优雅也可以…我得不遗余力……
E: Memory recovery is going well, but slowly. She'll be here soon, and time is short.... There's nobody else here, so there's no need to be delicate... In fact I think I'd better go all out....

C: 但我不能没有你，弟弟…不要再靠近那群{RUBY_B#剥皮刀}卡提卡{RUBY_E#}人了，好吗？
E: But I can't live without you, little brother... Promise me not to look for those {RUBY_B#Shellslasher}Katicans{RUBY_E#} again, okay?

C: 这就是个该死的玩笑，你一点也听不出来吗？
E: I was being sarcastic. Can't you tell?

C: 你真是世界上最烂的兵人。
E: You seriously are the worst soldier.

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 若成功，你便能融入谐乐，与万千家人同在；若失败，则将承受{RUBY_B#「同谐」的化身}「无限夫长」{RUBY_E#}的怒火，坠入万劫不复的深渊。所以我才特意强调了*暂时*二字。
E: Should you succeed, you will be able to coalesce into the Harmony and be with your Family. If you fail, you will suffer the wrath of the {RUBY_B#Embodiment of Harmony}Eternal Centurion{RUBY_E#} and fall into an abyss of doom.

C: 真是戒备森严…想必他们也在为案件发愁吧。
E: Such tight security... I bet they're stumped by the case as well.

C: 因为我…见不得美梦里有人受穷。
E: Well, you see... I can't bear to see anyone in this sweet dream suffering from poverty.

C: 愚者，现在我能完全确信，我从一开始就走在了正确的方向上，从未偏移。
E: Now I'm completely sure that I was on the right track from the beginning and never strayed, Fool.

C: 很可惜，如果你在期待一个深刻的回答，恐怕要失望了。
E: Well, if you're expecting a profound answer, I'm afraid I'll disappoint you.

C: 你的…眼睛？
E: Your... eyes?

C: 现在你也不用躲躲藏藏了，甚至还有心情嫌弃自己娇贵的行头被雨水打湿…到底是身份变了啊。
E: Now you don't have to hide. You probably won't even deign to get your pretty outfit wet in the rain... Your social capital has changed, after all.

C: 我们的影城之旅尚未结束，你的走马灯也在继续…而我不介意将这一过程拉得很长很长。
E: Our quaint journey through this amusement park still isn't over... and I wouldn't mind stretching this out at all.

C: 那些随行人员本可以成为你手上的鬼牌，发挥更大的用处。家族的污点要多少有多少，只需做出一些小小的牺牲…换成「欧泊」，早迎刃而解了。
E: In your hands, those who follow you could've become joker cards. They're far more useful that way. It's not like this is the only place The Family ever cut corners. You could've had tons of action if you weren't so all-or-nothing. All it takes is a meager sacrifice... I bet "Opal" would have resolved this without a fuss.

C: 下次拍照时，记得看镜头，表情会更自然些。
E: Look at the lens when you're taking a photo the next time — your expression will look more natural.

C: 如果没有这场雨，卡提卡人就不会行动，我们也没有机会周旋。这都是母神的恩赐，而你是{RUBY_B#受母神赐福的孩子}「卡卡瓦夏」{RUBY_E#}，你的好运会保佑姐姐成功。
E: Without this rain, the Katicans would never take action, and we would not have the chance to turn the tide. This is a gift from Gaiathra, and you are {RUBY_B#Child Blessed by Gaiathra}Kakavasha{RUBY_E#}, whose good fortune will bless your sister with success.

C: <size=36>女士们，先生们——</size>
E: <size=36>Ladies and gentlemen...</size>

C: 就像你说的一样，不是不愿，而是不能。那段漫长的故事…我也难以用三言两语向他人转述。
E: It's just like you said: An inability rather than an unwillingness. Plus it's a long story... not something that can be summed up in a few words.

C: 「虚无」…是么？
E: Nihility... is it?

C: 「财富、地位、权力…公司会给你想要和不想要的一切。」
E: "Wealth, status, power... the IPC will give you whatever you want, even what you don't want."

C: …我说的对吗，「神秘」的爪牙？
E: ...Tell me I'm wrong, minion of the Enigmata.

C: 但在那一刻到来前，人依旧能为自己选择去做些什么…我们都有这个权利，对吧？
E: But before that moment arrives, we can still choose what we do... We all have this right, don't we?

C: 很抱歉，直到现在才能把所知的一切都告诉你。
E: I'm really sorry for waiting until now to tell you everything.

C: 但可怕的是…根据我的测算，最近忆质涌流的速度开始变化了，并且前所未有地快——简直…简直就像是有什么东西在从大口那边吮吸一样！
E: But the scary part is... according to my calculations, the flow rate of memoria has recently changed, and it's faster than ever before — it's almost... almost as if something is sucking it in from the other side!

C: 我感觉到了，源头就在…「黄金的时刻」！那里有某种异常的存在在搅动忆域的海流。我必须给出更加直观的证明…我一定能说服大家……
E: I felt it, the source is in... the Golden Hour! There is a certain anomalous presence stirring the currents of the Memory Zone. I must uncover more concrete proof... I must convince everyone...

C: 和美梦不一样，在这里大家不把忆域迷因当作危险的怪物…就算真的有危险，也可以通过强制唤醒脱离梦境。
E: Unlike in the sweet dream, people here don't see Memory Zone Memes as dangerous monsters... and even if they pose a threat, people can easily escape by forcing a wake-up call.

C: 守墓人…？
E: Gravekeeper...?

C: 格莉莎女士，我只是教会了他们如何发声，但教会他们对生活怀抱希望的人，是您。
E: It was nothing, Grace. I merely taught them how to sing. It was you who brought hope into their lives.

C: 就这样，经过数千代、数万代的尝试，族群中的一只鸟儿终于学会了如何正确地挥动翅膀。它成功飞起，从此告别了大地。
E: After countless attempts by many generations, one of them finally figured out how to fly. It soared into the sky and never looked back at the ground again.

C: 走投无路，我只得借助「神秘」的力量躲入这片混沌的忆域，又耗费数年时间在梦中「虚构」出一只迷因，为我们所用——
E: At my wit's end, I had to use the power of the Enigmata and sought refuge in this chaotic Memory Zone. Over the years, I {RUBY_B#Fictionologize}fabricated{RUBY_E#} a meme within this dream for our use...

C: 自从收到星穹列车的回复，我就一直在关注你们的消息，包括各位为联结诸界付出的巨大努力。而现在，你们又安然无恙地走到了这里，已然证明了自己的实力。
E: I've been watching over you ever since I received the reply from the Astral Express, and I've seen the great effort you all put into linking different realms together across the cosmos. And now, after getting this far all in one piece, you have truly proven yourselves.

C: 在弥留之际，他嘱咐我一定要找到星穹列车，将那份邀请函寄到未来的无名客手中。为此他准备了一份礼物，一份真正的「遗产」…只属于「开拓」的后人。
E: On his deathbed, he told me to find the Astral Express and deliver an invitation to the future Nameless. He left behind a special gift, a true "legacy"... something that belongs only to the successors of the Trailblaze.

C: 「我作孩子时，话语像孩子，心思像孩子，意念像孩子。」
E: "When I appeared as a child, my speech, mindset, and soul reflected immaturity and innocence."

C: 如果强者的权势财富能掩盖罪行，谁能对他们予以裁决？
E: Who can judge the strong when their power hides their crimes?

C: 没事。我就在这等会便是。
E: Don't worry. I'll be waiting here.

C: 呵呵，能活着就是万幸了。梦不梦的无所谓，毕竟我没得选。
E: Heh, just being able to live at all is good enough for me. Whether it's in this Dreamscape or not, well, I don't really have much say in the matter.

C: 但现在似乎是要先确认我们的身份，才能联系我们的同伴。
E: And now it seems you need to confirm our identities before you can contact our companions.

C: …下次别再自称无名客了。
E: Just... just don't call yourself a Nameless next time.

C: …你想做什么？
E: ...What's your plan?

C: 人怎么越来越多了！感觉什么牛鬼蛇神都冒出来了，我们还是赶紧进去比赛吧！
E: People are pouring in! Kinda feels like all sorts of baddies are showing up. Let's get in there quickly and enter the competition!

C: 哈哈，真不愧是雷厉风行的开拓者！三月七小姐，你呢？
E: Haha, there's that swift and decisive Trailblazing spirit! How about you, Miss March?

C: 哈努兄弟说：「战斗，必须战斗！」
E: Hanu says: "Battle, we must do battle!"

C: 难道…我只是个废案吗？
E: Am I... just a failed experiment?

C: 好在侏儒兔机甲驾驶员、流浪的猫咪决斗家、银河忍者、四驱智械等三十二位落难者全都渡过难关，安然无恙…我便将大家一齐带领至此，与万千美丽的生灵同享谐乐。
E: Fortunately, the Mini Rabbit Mech Pilot, Stray Cat Duelist, Galactic Ninja, and Quad-drive Intellitron, along with thirty-two other souls in distress, all emerged from their predicaments safe and sound... I then led them all here to revel in the harmony with the countless other splendid beings.

C: 毫无疑问，如果将雏鸟留在庭院，它绝无可能坚持到春天。于是我提议带它回去，放在窗前的木架上，并拜托大人造个鸟笼。
E: It was clear that if we left the fledgling in the yard, it stood no chance of surviving until spring. So, I suggested we take it inside, place it on the shelf by the window, and asked the adults to fashion a cage for it.

C: 看起来他确实不打算囚禁我们。如果只是问答游戏，陪他过过招也无妨。
E: It looks like he really has no intention of imprisoning us. If it's just a quiz, I suppose it's fine to humor him.

C: 「为了让你深入了解此事。你知道知更鸟如今正身在何方么？」
E: "To help you grasp the full scope of this issue. Do you know where Robin is at this moment?"

C: 请问，这里是……
E: What is this place...?

C: 不，这里应该走左边……
E: No, we should turn left here...

C: 这的确是一种解读。但它背后应该还有一段更为漫长的故事。我想，一切的来龙去脉，迷惑难解之处，还是由他本人来解释吧……
E: That's one way to see it, but I believe there is a longer story behind all this. It's best for Misha himself to explain all the details...

C: 好了，各位。让我们来作出决定吧。
E: All right, everyone. Let's make a decision.

C: 你认为同样的事会发生在匹诺康尼？
E: Do you think the same thing will happen on Penacony?

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 「不妨就从这天地初开讲起吧——」
E: "Let us commence with the dawning of the world..."

C: 「这是最后一幕戏了。我已向诸位展现了匹诺康尼的过去与现在，并衷心希望你们能理解我究竟为何要改变现状。」
E: "This is the concluding act of this play. I have showcased the past and present of Penacony, hoping that my desire for change resonates within you."

C: 「我要么是自己的主人，要么去迎回旧主，断然没有服从于新主的道理！」
E: "Either I shall be my own master, or I shall return to my former master! I shall not submit to a new master under any circumstances!"

C: 「如若没有一位君王，又有谁能为万民负责？」
E: "Without a king, who shall bear responsibility for the people?"

C: 也许和上一幕一样，需要我们亲手「完成」剧本。
E: Perhaps we'll need to "complete" the story ourselves just like we did before.

C: 我要做的事只有一件，那就是创造一座没有星神，唯有「秩序」，能包容所有人尊严和幸福的，只属于我们人类的乐园。
E: My sole objective is to create a paradise free from Aeons, where the Order ensures the dignity and happiness of all humanity. A paradise exclusive to us human beings.

C: 「同谐」的化身？所以「谐乐大典」的真实目的…是要将其篡夺吗？
E: The embodiment of the Harmony? So, the true purpose of the Charmony Festival... is to usurp it?

C: 不过，好在{RUBY_B#忆域}梦境{RUBY_E#}也算是我的主场…所幸在「齐响诗班」崩溃前把各位全送出来了。
E: But luckily for them, the {RUBY_B#Memory Zone}Dreamscape{RUBY_E#} is my home turf. Thankfully, I managed to get everyone out before the Harmonious Choir collapsed.

C: 瞧，咱们的大功臣这不就来了么？
