E: Well would you look at that. Here comes the big hero.

C: 什么，在想我的事情？
E: Lemme guess, you were thinking about me... again?

C: 咳咳…这样人都到齐了帕。那我们现在开始航线会议吧！
E: Ahem... looks like everyone's present. Let the navigation meeting commence then!

C: 是要决定下一站去哪儿的会呗？怎么说，投票还是？
E: This a meeting to decide on our next stop? How we doin' this, by show of hands?

C: 你们都是从哪里来的？！
E: What in tarnation are you guys doing here?

C: 那你也不能用<unbreak>12</unbreak>岁的标准要求我这样一个精壮的游侠啊！
E: You can't use that <unbreak>12</unbreak>-years-of-age rule against a mighty Ranger like me!

C: 不过，我可以告诉你一件事，那就是我对你如此青睐有其更深层的原因。
E: But, I can tell you one thing: My favor towards you stems from a more profound reason.

C: 他是匹诺康尼战时杰出将领之一，象征最高荣誉的猎牙勋章唯一持有人，由哈努努亲自授勋。
E: During the war, he was one of Penacony's most accomplished generals and the sole winner of the Fanghunter Medal — an award conferred by Hanunue himself.

C: 所以，我们输了…
E: So, we lost...

C: 我得以清醒的原因和各位一样。在梦中，我经历了一些无论如何也不会发生在现实中的事……
E: I woke up for the same reason as all of you. In the dream, I experienced something that could never occur in reality...

C: 这里是{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}沉眠无相者{RUBY_E#}的万千表征之一，但同样，也是清醒之人告别「虚无」的出口。
E: This place is one of the thousands of manifestations belonging to {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}the sleeping and shapeless{RUBY_E#}, and it's also an exit out of the Nihility for the awake ones.

C: 因为那只像小鸟一样的星座，看起来有点暗了。那个…燕鹅嘤座。
E: Because the constellation that looks like a bird, the... Torrent Eagles... looks a bit dim lately.

C: 还有别的事要做。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 欸？这是什么？
E: Huh? What are these?

C: 谁叫对方是个贪得无厌的商人呢？只靠一颗不甜不淡的苹果是解决不了问题的——啊，这话好像也误伤到了我自己呢。
E: Now that we're dealing with a greedy merchant, a simple apple wouldn't make a difference. Well, I guess I included myself in that remark too.

C: 为此，我当然也愿意搭上「托帕石」来为你们作掩护…真是好大一盘棋啊。
E: That's why I'm willing to stake my "Topaz Stone" to cover for you... It's like one big elaborate game of chess.

C: 当然。期待你的献唱，我们庆典上有缘再见。
E: Naturally. I'm looking forward to your performance. See you at the Festival.

C: 但只要你放弃那个愚蠢的上市计划，公司就会承诺：绝不损害以你为首的家主们的利益。
E: However, if you agree to give up that half-baked plan to go public, the IPC will assure you that we'll never jeopardize the interests of the family heads under your leadership.

C: 典当…噢，您想找的应该是「慈玉女士」的房间吧？听说她的确正在提供一些…特别的服务。
E: Pawnshop... Ah, you must be talking about Lady Bonajade's place, right? I heard she offers... special services there.

C: 但我还是不知道你想让我看清什么。他们看上去都那么的…圆满。
E: But I'm not sure what you want me to see. They all seem to be living... fulfilled lives.

C: 以公司的情报和人脉网络，这轻而易举。但戴尔很快就会因为支付不起客房费用被赶出梦境，那之后能否摆脱穷困潦倒的生活…就看他个人的努力了。
E: It was a piece of cake for me, thanks to my IPC connections. However, Dell will soon find himself evicted from the Dreamscape because he can't afford his room. Whether he can bounce back from poverty... well, that depends on him.

C: 祝愿那串项链能让他们的感情永不破裂。
E: Let's just hope that necklace will keep their relationship from crumbling.

C: 十人有各自的来路，也有各自的归宿。而在这其中一段路上，我们受到「钻石」邀请，与他同行。
E: Each of us has our own past and destined ends. And on this journey, we have been invited by Diamond to join him.

C: 去吧，孩子，你不用立即给出答复。就像我说的，我最擅长的事，就是等待。
E: Take your time, child. You don't need to give me an immediate answer. Like I said, patience is one of my greatest strengths.

C: （真精神呀，还是和之前一样。）
E: (They are still a ball of fire as ever.)

C: 丹恒打虚卒……
E: Dan Heng and Voidranger jive...

C: 哼唧…哼唧！
E: Oink... oink!

C: 好在你们成功解决了这些难题，恭喜你们。谐乐大典开幕后，你们也该再次启程了吧？
E: It's a good thing that you guys managed to overcome all those difficult problems. Congratulations! After the Charmony Festival's opening, will you guys be leaving again?

C: 没有。她想要的也不是我的回答。
E: No. But what she wanted wasn't my answer either.

C: 知更鸟小姐！知更鸟小姐！家族万岁！谐乐万岁！
E: Miss Robin! Miss Robin! Marry me, Miss Robin! Glory to The Family! Glory to The Family!

C: ——干杯！
E: ...Cheers!

C: 大锤…？
E: The hammer...?

C: 你或许已经知道了，我生来没有做梦的机能，入梦的方式也是星核猎手的特殊手段。这让我能做到一般逐梦客做不到的事。
E: You may already know that I have no way of evoking dreams — I employ a Stellaron Hunter's special method in order to enter dreams instead. This allows me to perform feats that typical Dreamchasers can't.

C: 是啊，也许这就是让我很难释怀的地方吧……
E: Yeah, maybe that's the precise thing I can't let go of...

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land, Amphoreus.</color>

C: 校园生活，我来了！
E: Campus life, here I come!

C: 如果我没猜错，这位「冒名顶替」的来访者…多半是波提欧。
E: If my guess is correct, it's probably Boothill checking in under Pom-Pom's name.

C: 我不唱！
E: I'm not singing!

C: 放心，如果对结果有异议，学生随时可以申请更换学院。只是…大多数人也不会这么做。
E: Don't worry. If a student disagrees with the result, they can apply for a transfer to another academy. It's just that most people don't.

C: 够了！让你来当考官是出于代理校长的面子，少得寸进尺！根据校规……
E: Enough! You're only here as an examiner because of the acting dean! You can't dictate what we do! According to academy regulations...

C: 难不成是被大导演的气场震住了？
E: Maybe she was just in awe of the director's aura?

C: 大多数回答都很风趣，像一位镜头前的明星，还有赢得「盛会海选」的经历，最适合你的学院是——谐乐学院！
E: Most of your answers were humorous, like a celebrity in front of a camera. Combined with your experience in winning the Festivity Auditions, the best academy for you is... Charmony Academy!

C: 打听啊，倒也不坏。退一万步说，我就不能喜欢睡蕉小猴了吗？铁汉柔情，现在就流行这套。
E: Hmm, making inquiries, you say? Not a bad idea. And heck, why couldn't I be a fan of Slumbernana Monkey? Tough guys exploring their soft side are a thing these days.

C: 现代，能人，小猴
E: Human, Denisovan, Monkey.

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 虽然我觉得这样登场也有些刻意。但毕竟时间有限……
E: Though I too find this way of making my entrance rather excessively deliberate, we're not blessed with the luxury of time...

C: 犯不着，现在有新法子了。你这边呢，事儿办完了？
E: No need for that. We've got a new plan now. How did it go with her? Convinced?

C: 但…并不是这样。关于鸟儿与飞行，我仍未得出更好的答案。
E: But... that's not the case. I still haven't found a better answer regarding birds and flight.

C: 蕉师向学生们发放了一罐喷漆，但你完全试不出这个罐子的重量，就像是空的一样。
E: BananAdvisor hands out a can of spray paint to the students, but you can't feel the weight of the can at all, as if it were empty.

C: 是你们买的玩偶，造型还挺别致。
E: This is the toy you ordered. It looks rather unique.

C: 追啊！
E: Chase after it!
Bana...

C: 至于我等…眼下更重要的是折纸村一众忍徒的性命。他们手无缚猴之力，我等身为忍侠，若不救眼前人，何以救天下？
E: At this juncture, our priority is to rescue the ninja initiates of Paperfold Town. What Ninja Heroes would we be if left those defenseless initiates to the monkeys? If we don't rescue those before us, how can we hope to save the world?

C: 该如何在念白中彰显缭乱•忍道呢？
E: How should I incorporate and play up the Way of the Dazzling Ninja in my narration...?

C: 这不是上次的小*银河粗口*吗？又来找*银河粗口*了？我*银河粗口*！
E: Aren't you that *cosmic profanity* trash I pummeled last time? Back here looking for your *cosmic profanity* again? See how I *cosmic profanity* you!

C: 伎乐忍徒，务必要坚守自我啊。
E: Never forget who you truly are, Ninja Initiate Gigaku.

C: 还是打架适合我
E: Fighting suits me better.

C: 呃…我只是想开个玩笑，怎么你还开了个更大的？
E: Uh... I was just trying to make a joke, but you took it even further?

C: 我是能人级会员，编号<unbreak>244</unbreak>，三月七。
E: I'm Denisovan <unbreak>244</unbreak>, March 7th.

C: 可惜你是个梦里的人，看不见我熟悉的那片大地，它美得让你心甘情愿死在那儿。
E: It's a shame you're stuck in a dream, can't lay eyes on the land I love. It's so gorgeous, you'd be willin' to die right there.

C: （旁白+复用战败CG，无配音，待补充）
球棒•忍者，要来见证在下的往事了吗？在那充斥着血、泪、无情的过往面前，阁下可能会震颤失神，务必做好万全准备。
E: Baseball Bat Ninja, are you ready to dive into my past? Make all necessary preparations, for you may be jolted out of sorts when we encounter the bloody, tearful, and ruthless moments in my memory.

C: 浩瀚如海的银河•忍界，忍者多如飞鱼籽，而忍侠贵如金河豚。
E: Across the wide expanse of the Cosmic Ninja Realm, those who practice ninjutsu are as prevalent as flying fish roe, yet Ninja Heroes are as rare as precious golden pufferfish.

C: 恐怖，实属恐怖。凡人如标本般被陈列于透明水牢，遭受邪术折磨——这无疑是末法•之世的一个侧面。
E: Terrifying, absolutely terrifying. Mortals are displayed in transparent aquatic prisons like they're nothing but specimens as sorcery inflicts torture on them... This is undoubtedly a scene from the Mappou Age of the Dharma.

C: 三号，我要提升强度了。你可要撑住啊，实验室的未来就靠你了。
E: No. 3, I am about to increase the intensity. You better be able to handle it. The future of this laboratory is all in your hands.

C: <size=36>银河忍法帖•前尘•影事录</size>\n 终
E: <size=36>Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: Past Reverie</size>\nThe End

C: 香蕉、丛林…都去哪了……
E: Where have the... bananas and forest gone...

C: 这些都是阁下做的好事吧——邪祟•总长。
E: Fiendling Chief... You're behind all of this, aren't you?

C: 「你呢，迈德漠斯？你的杀意足以与命运相配么？！」
E: "What about you, Mydeimos? Can your murderous intent match up to what fate has in store for you!?"

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，请为我指引前路！
E: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, please guide my path!

C: 小白的声音…断掉了……
E: Snowy's voice... I can't hear him anymore...

C: 这是要做什么？
E: What's going on?

C: 事已至此，边走边看吧。就把黑潮当作一个突破口，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}既已陨落，受其压制的力量也必将开始反扑……
E: For now, let's just take things as they come. The black tide could be a good starting point. Since {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has fallen, those who were suppressed by them will no doubt begin to counterattack now.

C: 你是…呵，野狗的首领竟自己送上门了！
E: You are...? Oh, so the alpha brute has found his way here!

C: 随着魂息离去，黑暗蒙住了此人的双眼。
E: As the soul ebbed away, darkness veiled her eyes.

C: 遐蝶小姐，好久不见。唉，说实话，我也有些搞不清楚状况。
E: Oh, it's Miss Castorice! It's been a while! Well, honestly, I'm not quite sure myself.

C: 刚才，是你这位沉稳的同伴告诉我这名字背后的意涵。
E: Your companion here kindly explained the meaning behind the name to me earlier.

C: 让我想起一位粉色头发的故人。
E: She reminds me of an old friend with pink hair.

C: 你们这么熟了？
E: How are you two so close already?

C: 好！那以后就叫你——小小咪！
E: Yay! Then I'll call you... Little Memmy from now on!

C: 这个…是墨涅塔祭司手册里记载的箴言。
E: This is... a proverb that was recorded in the handbook of Mnestia's priests.

C: 这就是「黑潮」造物，生命遭到侵蚀形成的，扭曲而空虚的躯壳。
E: This is a creation of the black tide. Such creatures are formed when living beings are corrupted and turned into deformed, hollow husks of their former selves.

C: 只是？
E: But what?

C: 内忧外患呵。{RUBY_B#「黄金战争」}痛苦的残杀{RUBY_E#}虽已辍停，奥赫玛的宿敌却在我们眼下砥砺锋芒至今……
E: We're facing threats from both within and without Okhema. The {RUBY_B#Chrysos War}merciless carnage{RUBY_E#} may have ceased, but Okhema's nemeses continue to sharpen their blades even now...

C: 这门也没钥匙孔啊…
E: There's no keyhole in this door...

C: 你一脚向后推出，架好身子，将一肩沉下，另一边扛住石板。稳住身形后，你故技重施，将双掌搭在板下，随后猛一发力，意图将力量全部灌注于一肩两掌中——
E: You move one foot back, brace yourself, and lower one shoulder while supporting the slab with the other. Once steady, you repeat your technique, placing both palms beneath the slab. With a sudden surge of strength, you channel all your power into your shoulder and hands—

C: 啊呀，只道是吾为汝等排了忧、释了难，却得不着报应么？
E: Oh my, I'm helping you to eliminate your worries and obstacles, and yet I receive nothing in return?

C: 这句话我原样奉还。但我们并无敌意，一切只为了自己免遭潜在的恶意伤害。
E: That applies to you as well. However, we do not harbor any hostility. We merely want to avoid any potential harm to us.

C: 小卡，来认识一下我们的另一位同伴吧！
E: Cal, come and meet our other companion!

C: 趁还没熟透…人家先想想该怎么谢罪…呜呜……
E: Before I'm cooked... let me first think about how to apologize... *sniffle*

C: 我们，包夹它们吧！一起让这些不懂得怜香惜玉的家伙，尝尝人家滚烫的致命引力！
E: Let's surround them! It's time to give this bunch of ungentlemanly fools a taste of my fiery and fatal allure!

C: …开个玩笑！人家只是想感叹一下，{NICKNAME}和小蝶两人每次面对危机都能轻松化解呢。
E: ...Just kidding! I just wanted to marvel at how {NICKNAME} and Cas always manage to resolve crises so effortlessly.

C: 只要诸位以「金枝誓言」采撷眼前余火，献与神蝶，便能前去树冠的王座了。
E: To get to the throne at the treetop, gather the embers before you with the Golden Bough of Vows and present it to the divine butterfly.

C: 呵呵，看来诸位已采得余火了。
E: Hehe, it seems like you managed to gather the embers.

C: 呵呵…没什么。
E: Haha... It's nothing much.

C: 那缕残纱的主人…送来{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}死雾的北风。
E: The owner of the piece of cloth... The north wind that sent over the deathly fog of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.

C: 果然，「黑色」的「利剑」和「斗篷」……
E: As expected... the words "black," "sword," and "cloak"...

C: 好暖和…好舒服……
E: So warm... much comfort...

C: 还不是时候。悬锋的年轻人，听我口令：回到父母身边，从今日起，把全部时间用在饮食和锻炼上。想成为合格的悬锋勇士，这两件事决不能落下。
E: That time has not yet arrived, but... Young men of Kremnos, heed my command! Return to your parents at once. From hereon, you are to dedicate yourselves to rigorous training and a healthy diet. You must not neglect these two aspects if you are to become a brave warrior of Kremnos.

C: 海乙…你在说什么，家乡话？
E: Hai... What is that word? Is it your native tongue?

C: 你的发言仿佛没有脑子。
E: You speak as if you don't have a brain.

C: 阁下对我背负的…诅咒，应该已经有所了解。我生来便是死亡的影子，是其它有生之物避之不及的剧毒……
E: You must have an idea of the... curse I bear by now. I was born as the Shadow of Death, a poison shunned by all living beings...

C: …克拉特鲁斯！这是怎么回事？
E: ...Krateros! What's going on?

C: 我在听。
E: I'm listening.

C: 履行胜者的义务，报上名来，战士！我向你索求荣耀的死亡！
E: Fulfill your duty as the victor, warrior, and tell me your name! I seek an honorable death from you!

C: 而现在，命运的复仇找上你了！
E: And now, fate's reckoning is upon you!

C: （咦？这只娃娃，为什么在箱子里……）
E: (Huh? Why is this doll inside a chest...?)

C: 没错，八音盒。只要在合适的位置放上娃娃，触发机关，它就会转动，演奏出好听的乐曲……
E: That's right! It's a music box. If you place the dolls in the right spots, it will start rotating and play beautiful music...

C: 阿雅…！别总说这种吓人的话……
E: Agy...! Cut it out with the scary talk...

C: 可…毕竟<color=#dbc291ff>「前进」</color>是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}试炼注定的结果，*我们*从来没有退路可言。
E: But "advancing" is the destined end of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus'{RUBY_E#} trial. There's no retreat in our path.

C: 「即便离别注定，无谓赴死也绝非正途。」
E: "Even if separation is our fate, a futile death is not the solution."

C: 可真是让人好等……
E: You sure know how to keep a man waiting...

C: 然后，将盗火行者「封印」在岁月的迷宫。
E: Then, we'll "seal" the Flame Reaver in the Maze of Time.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>记得从背后刺入我的第十节胸椎，那是唯一能杀死我的弱点。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Remember to stab your sword into my back through my tenth thoracic vertebra. That's my weak spot, and the only way to kill me.</color>

C: 悬锋人引以为傲的城邦、信仰，还有所谓的「传统」——在它眼中，不过是一触即溃的蚁穴。
E: The city and the beliefs that Kremnoans hold so dearly, alongside the supposed tradition... are mere anthills that can be crushed with a single touch in the eyes of the Titan.

C: 所以，你也看见了么，迈德漠斯？
E: So, I assume you also glimpsed yours, Mydeimos?

C: …男孩子独自出门，要保护好自己。
E: ...Stay safe out there. A lone boy can get into a lot of trouble.

C: 但那不重要。痛苦可以治愈，伤痕却不能，也不应被磨灭。即便借助{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神力，过去也会在视线的死角留下蛛丝马迹。
E: But that matters not. Pain may be cured, but scars remain, and they should not be effaced. Even with the divine might of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, you cannot stop the past from leaving its marks in our blind spots.

C: 你永远都是我们的王。
E: You will forever be our king.

C: 昏光庭院尽力了，但也只能做到…勉强延续他的生命。
E: The Twilight Courtyard has done all we can. Even so, we've only managed to keep him from breathing his last.

C: 轻松些，蝶。人生总有离去，只不过*我们*的告别，来得不如常人那般暴烈。
E: Take it easy, Cas. Departure is a part of life. It's just that ours isn't as tumultuous as it is for ordinary folks.

C: 命运的宠儿…又怎会被命运夺去至亲？
E: Those chosen by fate would never have their family taken from them.

C: 圣女大人，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}宝库今天正在修缮……
E: Apologies, Lady Maiden, but the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} Vault is under maintenance today.

C: 即便如此，逐火仍是不断失却的旅途：在那一切当中，生命也不足为惜……
E: Yet, the Flame-Chase is a journey of constant loss, among which even life itself holds little value....

C: 我就讨厌这集。
E: That's the episode I hate the most.

C: 哈哈，一点也不意外。这个叫做「圣杯」的奇物确实很古怪。
E: Haha, not surprising at all. This so-called "Holy Grail" Curio is bizarre indeed.

C: 荣誉队员！如果成功获得「圣杯」，你想实现什么愿望呢？
E: So, honorary member! If you win the Holy Grail, what wish would you want granted?

C: 我不想赢，也不希望别人赢。
E: I don't want to win, and I don't want anyone else to win either.

C: 听起来有些暴力？担心它像泰科铵机动球竞赛那样断肢横飞、血花四溅？
E: Worried it sounds a bit violent? Afraid it might turn into another Taikiyan Roboball competition with limbs flying and blood spattering everywhere?

C: 试问，你就是我的从者吗？
E: Tell me, are you my Servant?

C: 别打了，我们去钓鱼吧。
E: Stop fighting! Let's go fishing instead.

C: 你是匹诺康尼的人吗？
E: Are you from Penacony?

C: 它被注册成了商标，而版权早已不在我的手中，抱歉，我的御主。
E: It was. But it's been trademarked. Copyrighted. Owned by someone else. I'm sorry, Master.

C: 真是了不得的见识，异界的从者，你的出现确实让我有些意外。但你们的到来是必要的，圣杯需要更高效的燃料，也就是你们——
E: Quite the impressive insight, Servant from another world. Your presence here was certainly a surprise to me, but you and your friends are needed. The Holy Grail needs more efficient fuel — and that means... you.

C: 奥帝，看来，你的商业头脑也跟这个世界一起腐烂了。
E: Oti, looks like your business acumen has rotted along with this world.

C: 撂挑子不干了。
E: I quit.

C: 别在意耳边的干扰，看看下一场会议的需求。《星震现象对科员艺术创作的影响》，参会人数2人，会议时间不限。
E: Ignore the distractions around you. Let's look at the next meeting's details: The Effects of Starquake Phenomena on the Artistic Expression of Researchers. Two attendees, no time constraints.

C: 百年后。
E: A century later.

C: 恒星坍缩观测。
E: Stellar Collapse Observation.

C: 丹恒？虽然中间有不少波折，但他还是回到了罗浮，毕竟，那里本来就是他的故乡。
E: Dan Heng? It wasn't an easy journey, but he's back on the Luofu now. After all, that's where he's from.

C: 一个蹩脚的工艺品罢了。却因为某人天真的愿望，最终在历史中留下的{RUBY_B#星星}记录{RUBY_E#}。
E: A shabby little trinket that left a {RUBY_B#star}trace{RUBY_E#} in history because of one person's silly wish.

C: 我该出发了！
E: I need to set off!

C: （好古怪的梦…该去做今天的工作了。）
E: (What a strange dream... I should get to work.)

C: 为什么…你们会有如此盲目的勇气？
E: Why... do you have such blind courage?

C: 终于，这一切都结束了……
E: It's finally over...

C: 英雄啊…就当是无端做了一场美梦吧。
E: A hero, huh? ...I'll chalk it up as a beautiful dream.

C: 一个商人，如果活到我这个岁数还在乎体面，那他也太失败了。
E: A merchant at my age who still cares about dignity would be an absolute failure.

C: 片刻过后，牛仔的朋友们也一无所知地来到此处
E: A moment later, the cowboy's friends arrived, equally clueless.

C: 这拙劣的服化道，还有乱七八糟的剧情——想想除了你也没别人了，葛瑞迪。
E: This terrible wardrobe, the nonsense plot... No one else could've cooked this up but you, Grady.

C: 就当是公益演出好了，让你们好好品味Caster力量的冰山一角。
E: Call it a charitable performance. Let me give you a taste of what Caster can really do.

C: 为了免费盒饭！
E: For free meals!

C: 呱？
E: Ribbit?

C: 你用我的把戏对付我！
E: You dare use my own powers against me, Grady?

C: 呼，呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...

C: 你的「气息遮断」，不过是因为「电影中的角色无法察觉到镜头外的拍摄者」而已。
E: Your Presence Concealment skill is simply a manifestation of the theatrical rule that characters in the story cannot see the cinematographer filming behind the lens.

C: 寂静，寂静得只能听见钟表的齿轮转动，那是恶灵喜悦的呼吸。
E: Quiet, so quiet, you can hear the ticking of clockwork gears, the breath of an evil spirit, trembling with glee.

C: 或者也可以回前几站看看，检查下星图和航路有没有出错，不知道泰科铵大球馆的洞填上了没。
E: Or we could also revisit our previous stops to make sure that the astral charts and navigation routes are all functioning fine? I wonder if the hole in the Taikiyan Stadium has been repaired.

C: 我们是不是在哪见过？
E: Have we met before?

C: 我了个…哪有人这么自夸的？
E: ...Holy moly! Can you get any more conceited?

C: 我想了解下里头的状况，你应该不会为难吧？
E: I wanna know what's going on in there. You'll tell me, won't you?

C: 哪句？
E: Said what?

C: 暂时没有。
E: I don't have anything we can use for now.

C: 嗷呜——
E: Awoooo!

C: 我只想讽刺几句，你还真记得？
E: That was sarcasm, in case you didn't realize. But whoa, you actually remember something like that?

C: 您说的客人，莫非就是这位女士？
E: By "passenger," do you mean this lady here?

C: 是梦境出了什么问题？
E: Did something happen in the Dreamscape?

C: 你可以卸下伪装了。
E: It's okay, you can reveal yourself now.

C: 没什么，小事一桩……
E: It's nothing. Just a trivial matter...

C: 请问您是谁？为何一直不愿现身？
E: Please, who are you? And why won't you show yourself?

C: 「你才能够穿破黑暗，来到我的身边。」
E: "Will you break through the darkness and arrive at my side."

C: 你…不要紧吧？
E: Are... Are you alright?

C: 等等——这说法是不是有点怪？明明停云小姐才是本尊，为什么要和冒牌货比较？
E: Wait — don't you find that question a bit weird? You're the real Tingyun. Why compare yourself to an imposter?

C: 欢迎，您想体验一个什么滋味的梦境？
E: Welcome! What kind of dreamscape would you like to experience today?

C: 回想起来，那会儿你总缠着我要上一次星槎看看，还把飞行士当作自己毕生的理想。可真正飞上高空后，却又惊慌失措，紧紧抓着旁人的衣角不放。
E: I remember you kept begging me to take you to the starskiff and even dreamed of becoming a pilot. But once you were airborne, you were so nervous that you clung to others for dear life.

C: 知更鸟女士，演出开场前，我能留下来和您一同看星星吗？
E: Miss Robin, may I stay here with you to gaze at the stars, before the show begins?

C: 相信以他们的毅力，只需要知更鸟女士一个微笑，就能重新来过吧。
E: I believe they all have the willpower to start anew, especially after receiving a smile from you, Miss Robin.

C: 希望如此。
E: I hope so.

C: 你可以这么认为，无名客从来不是一个人的称呼。对于这条道路，每个人也有不同的看法，只要条件允许，我们都会尽己所能。
E: You can think of it this way: The title of Nameless doesn't belong to any one person. Each individual will have their own view of what it means to walk this path, and will always try their best, no matter the situation.

C: 那你就去做啊，老日。你总说要把小鸟关在笼子里，结果你自己才是被囚禁的那个。
E: Then go for it, Sunny. You always talk about locking the bird in the cage, but you're the one who's trapped.

C: 那么这一次，我会将「调律」交予本心。
E: Then this time, my true heart will guide the tuning.

C: 你是个高尚的人。
E: You are a noble person.

C: 你会用这个词形容他，倒是在我的意料之外了。
E: Laid-back? That's... not exactly a word I associate with him.

C: 对我来说没有差别…
E: It doesn't feel any different to me...

C: 你不会让我失望的，对吗？
E: I trust you won't disappoint me?

C: 算了，准备总比不准备好，形式主义也有其必要。
E: Never mind. Having some preparation is better than none. Even formalities have their place.

C: 难怪忆庭的使者能揭开它的面纱啊。那，最后一重呢？
E: I see. Then it makes sense that a messenger of the Garden would be capable of unveiling Amphoreus for us. What about the final Path?

C: 降落用的车厢已经准备好了。两位「开拓」小先锋，准备好面对真正的未知了吗？
E: The landing car is ready. My dear trailblazing vanguards, are you all set to dive into the unknown?

C: 就不能远程把它们的参数调回来吗？
E: Can't you do a factory reset on them?

C: 打人不打脸，对人偶也是一个道理~
E: Never strike someone in the face — the same goes for puppets.

C: …有人在附近？小心点，拿起武器。
E: ...Someone's here? Ready your weapon and stay alert.

C: 好大一个球……
E: A giant sphere...

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: …不记得了吗，诺杜斯？
E: Don't you remember, Noldus?

C: 断枪还在身上吗？
E: Do you still have your broken spear?

C: 二位，若想退后，这是最后的机会了。
E: You two, if you wish to retreat, this is your final chance to do so.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}堕入疯狂后，它的堡垒便消失在了迷雾中，无人知晓其所在。但如今，它一反常态，主动向奥赫玛发起攻势……
E: After {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} succumbed to madness, their fortress disappeared into the fog, with no one being able to ascertain its location anymore. However, now that they have acted out of character and attacked Okhema of their own accord...

C: 那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。
E: I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate, this is but one instance.

C: 现在，你可以睁眼了，{NICKNAME}。
E: You can open your eyes now, {NICKNAME}.

C: 而今，黑潮席卷全世，大地沉入永夜，唯有奥赫玛在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑下，保有最后一丝光明。
E: Amphoreus has since fallen into eternal night, the black tide engulfing our world. Okhema is now the only city to still receive light, and we owe it to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection.

C: 太好了…听说两位身手不凡，和黄金裔一样神通广大，能请你们帮个忙，把这根石柱复原吗？
E: Thank goodness... I hear you're both exceptional warriors as masterful as the Chrysos Heirs. Could you help us restore this column here?

C: 哦？原来你一直是这么打算的啊…
E: Hmm? Were you expecting otherwise...?

C: 包后期吗？
E: Can you also apply some filters?

C: …还是交给三月吧。
E: ...Let's leave that to March.

C: 别被它骗了——这狮子最爱的，就是七嘴八舌的热度。
E: Don't be fooled by it. This lion loves engaging in gossip and rumors.

C: 好高级的洗脸盆。
E: What a premium sink.

C: 现在不需要替换配重物了，想想别的办法吧。
E: There's no need to replace the weights now. Try thinking of a different approach.

C: 想离开涡心的话，只要再重复一遍灵水盆前的仪式就好。
E: To leave the Vortex, simply repeat the same ritual in front of the spirit basin.

C: 返回星穹列车后，你们发现黑天鹅已经悄悄离开。三月七的病情加重了，没有人知道她的症状是因何导致的。
E: After returning to the Astral Express, you discover Black Swan has already left without telling anyone. March 7th's condition has gotten worse, but no one seems to know what the cause is.

C: 等我凯旋！
E: Wait for my triumphant return!

C: 我走另一条路，那里寄生了很多蛀虫。
E: I'll take the other path. It's crawling with parasites.

C: 吾师——回应我！我以王储的名义，命令你……
E: Teacher, answer me! As your crown prince, I command you—

C: 为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}天谴之矛{RUBY_E#}……
E: For the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}...

C: 我必须留下，不是为了奥赫玛的安危，而是要和自己的神明做个了结。
E: I must stay here, not for Okhema's safety, but to settle the score with my god.

C: 那时的压迫感…又回来了。你感受到了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: That oppressive feeling from earlier — it's back. Do you feel it, {NICKNAME}?

C: 走吧，我们去完成它的考验。
E: Let's go and complete their challenge.

C: 你要带我去哪里？
E: Where do you want to take me?

C: 我们需要收集悬锋城的记忆。
E: We must collect the memories of Kremnos.

C: 「你们以为自己赢了？傲慢…愚蠢……」
E: "You think that you've won? Arrogant... Foolish..."

C: 能将这张照片交给我们吗？我们…正在收集那个年代的线索。
E: Would you mind giving us the photo? We're... trying to piece together clues from that time.

C: 嘿嘿，您出手可真是大方！欢迎惠顾，下次再来！
E: Wahaha, you're quite the high-roller! Thank you, and please come again!

C: 「真的不用处理掉吗？这里的腐臭…已经令人难以忍受了。」
E: "Do we really just leave them like that? The putrid stench of decay here is almost too much to bear."

C: 过来，跟上！
E: Come, follow!

C: （天父{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，指引我…一切都还在掌控之中。）
E: ({RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, sky father, I seek your guidance... May your hand keep all things in order.)

C: 战斗本身无需理由。我只想粉碎愚蠢。
E: Fighting needs no reason. I seek only to crush foolishness.

C: …感觉什么变化都没有。
E: ...I don't think I felt anything at all.

C: 车厢报废，联络不上列车组，再加上对天外之界的禁令……
E: Our car's scrap, we've lost contact with the Crew, and everything beyond the sky is taboo here...

C: 倦意包裹了你…此时此刻，无论哪位翁法罗斯的神明都无法让你的目光从这张躺椅上移开。
E: Exhaustion envelops you... At this moment, no god of Amphoreus could pull your gaze away from this lounge chair.

C: 说起来，你到底是谁？
E: Wait, who are you really?

C: 嘻嘻，那我就是主角身边最好的伙伴！要多给我点镜头哦？
E: Then I'll be the protagonist's bestest sidekick, heehee! So give me more screen time, alright?

C: 她好像睡过去了…看来主持这场仪式的消耗不小。
E: Looks like she fell asleep. Presiding over this ritual must take quite a toll.

C: …哎，别卖关子了。快告诉我吧，你都看到了什么？
E: Ugh, don't keep me in suspense. Come on, tell me already. What did you see?

C: （无论如何，得给阿格莱雅一个答复……）
E: (Regardless, I must give Aglaea an answer...)

C: 有麻烦事，不是会读得更慢些吗？
E: Wouldn't all these preoccupations slow your pace?

C: 他公然蔑视人们的信仰，质疑逐火使命的正当性，我与他的立场必定水火难容。你求学时，肯定也听说过他的外号？
E: He openly dismisses people's faith, and questions the very justification of the Flame-Chase Journey. Our positions have been destined to be at odds. While you were studying there, I assume you must have heard of his nickname.

C: 有B计划吗？
E: Is there a plan B?

C: 听上去希望渺茫。
E: Seems like a shot in the dark.

C: 虽然不知道原因，但我可以为迷迷作证。先前在重渊，我听见那位泰坦的低吟，它的话语中满是伤痛和埋怨…但确实没有恶意。
E: I can't explain why, but I can vouch for Mem's words. When I was in the Abyss, I heard the Titan's groans — full of pain and grievances, yet without any ill will.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下…祝你和迷迷一切顺利。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... May everything go well for you and Mem.

C: 没错。哦——{NICKNAME}也回来了，正好。这件事，你们最好都知情。
E: That's right. Oh {NICKNAME}, you're back. Just in time. This is something that the both of you should probably know.

C: 泰坦的话语模糊不清，从迷雾之后传出的每个音节，其末梢似乎都覆上了一层寒霜——象征记忆的寒霜。
E: The Titan's words are indistinct. Each syllable emerging from the mist seem to be cloaked in frost — symbolizing memory.

C: 重要…的事…？
E: Something... important...?

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神性…在消散？试炼要结束了？
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s divinity... is dissipating? Is the trial coming to an end?

C: 是我有些心急了。请别担心，{NICKNAME}阁下，尽管目前还缺乏线索，但我会努力寻找{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的下落。带回它的火种，将那过早失去的生命…交还到你手上。
E: It was me, I was a little too hasty. Don't worry, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. Although we currently have no leads, I will do my best to search for the whereabouts of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, bring back their Coreflame, and personally return to you... the life that you have lost too soon.

C: 哼…从渎神者摇身一变，成为崇高神性的替身，我倒该为此感到荣幸了。
E: Hmph... Once deemed a blasphemer, now a surrogate for revered divinity. The honor should rightfully be mine, shouldn't it?

C: 吾可听得一清二楚喔。
E: Be aware, I can hear you perfectly well from here.

C: 汝还有家人哪，他们也在这奥赫玛城中？
E: So, there are other members in your family, eh? Are they also living in Okhema?

C: 刻法勒，创世亦是负世之神啊……
E: Kephale, the one who created the world, and the one who bears the world...

C: 若要厘清思绪，请自便。不过，切勿离开太远，以免…节外生枝。
E: If you need to organize your thoughts, please go ahead. But please don't go too far away, lest... complications arise.

C: 在场众人里又有谁能向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}誓约封证，您此次赴约前没有和那女人沆瀣一气，只为掩人耳目，助长她的暴行？
E: Is there anyone present who can swear by the sacred vow of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} and guarantee that you weren't in league with that woman before coming here? Are you just trying to pull the wool over our eyes and aid her in her savagery?

C: 要想扳倒阿格莱雅，元老院需要支持，而整个学院的分量显然足够强而有力。
E: The Council of Elders needs more backing if it wishes to topple Aglaea and it's evident that the academy wields considerable influence.

C: 告诉我吧，阿那克萨戈拉斯：如今你已身为盟友，倘若阿格莱雅来问我要人，我该怎么做呢？
E: So, tell me, Anaxagoras: Now that you're an ally of mine, if Aglaea were to demand that I hand you over, what should I do?

C: 我的「喀利斯」，不久前已被黑潮彻底毁蚀了。
E: The black tide destroyed every last inch of my Kalyx.

C: （我从未听过这号人物…他接过的是哪个泰坦的权柄？）
E: (I've never heard of this person... Which Titan's authority did he inherit?)

C: 实话说，我难以权衡其中利弊…可无论如何，在围绕火种展开谈判前，得有人把它带回来。
E: Honestly, it's difficult for me to assess the pros and cons in this decision... But someone must bring the Coreflame before we can begin negotiations over it.

C: 还是再出门逛逛好了。
E: Maybe I can go for another walk outside.

C: 不…我不想死…求求你了，求求你……
E: No, please... I don't want to die... Please, I'm begging you...

C: 啊…抱歉，我不擅长还价……
E: Ah... I'm sorry. Bargaining is really not my forte...

C: 看！这地方视野不错，对吧？每个人在做什么、要去哪里，全都一览无余，还不会被人发现。
E: Look! Isn't the view here just great? You can see what everyone is doing and where they're going, and they won't even know you're here.

C: 虽然令人不快……
E: I don't like this, however...

C: …就是这里了。
E: ...Here we are.

C: 怎么…又是活着的人？
E: Wait... More living people?

C: 使用秘技击败天谴先锋
E: Use your Technique to defeat Furiae Praetor

C: 感谢您，我的母亲……
E: Thank you, mother...

C: 头好晕…
E: I feel dizzy...

C: 多可笑啊…我的私心本为挽救生命，却为你，还有这个世界写下了比死亡更沉重的命运。
E: What irony. My selfish desire to save your life gave you and the world a fate far worse than death instead.

C: 请…不要忘记我。
E: Please... don't forget me.

C: 日复一日地照料鲜花，看它长成花海……
E: Where I've been taking care of these flowers day after day, until there is now a sea of them....

C: 「是呀，受苦受难的小家伙…你的大悲大恸，是我取乐的小手段。」
E: "Indeed, my downtrodden fellow... Your sorrow and joy are but means for me to amuse myself."

C: 我没法替你回答这个问题——
E: No, I don't.

C: 你们的眼里饱含忧虑，不仅忧虑黄金裔与元老院之间滋生的裂隙，更忧虑这座圣城将要步入的明天。
E: I see your fear and misgivings, your apprehension about the discord between the Chrysos Heirs and the Council of Elders... and your uneasiness about the future of the holy city.

C: 现在，轮到您了，阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下。
E: And now, it's your turn to vote, Lord Anaxagoras.

C: 所以，孩子，不必为我所承受的非议感到遗憾。别让那些噪音掣住你前进的步伐。
E: So, child, do not be troubled by the criticisms I have borne. Do not let those voices hinder you as you forge ahead.

C: 以{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之名：死刑执行前，受刑者应有权利听从「一致欢呼」，以便争取从轻发落及赦免的权利！
E: In the names of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, the accused must be allowed to hear the "people's voice" prior to the execution for a chance at a reduced sentence and possible pardon!

C: 不过，吾还是有个问题……
E: But I do still have one question.

C: 更有趣的是，她的潜意识里也出现了「翁法罗斯」这四个字。
E: What's even more interesting is that the word "Amphoreus" has appeared in her subconscious.

C: 就在众人返程途中，奥赫玛城内，悬锋老将因挟持缇宁，擅闯禁地被捕。在万敌斡旋下，缇宝等人同意袒露记忆，以便实现悬锋人与奥赫玛人的和解。
E: While everyone is on their way back, within the city of Okhema, Krateros is arrested for abducting Trinnon and trespassing on forbidden grounds. Under Mydei's mediation, Tribbie and her sisters agree to reveal their memories in order to facilitate reconciliation between the Kremnoans and Okhemans.

C: {NICKNAME}的现状…
E: {NICKNAME}'s plight...

C: 不然怎么会被称作「大表演家」呢？据说老师创立学派后的第一件事，就是当着所有人的面宣读自己的著作——
E: Why else would they call him "the Great Performer"? When Anaxa established his school of thought, the first thing he apparently did was read his own work to everyone.

C: 你好，翁法罗斯的奥列格。
E: Hello, Oleg of Amphoreus.

C: 下台！下台！
E: Get off the stage! Scram!

C: 别心急，阿格莱雅。我知道你有很多疑问，但继续用「公民的方式」交流，可以么？
E: Don't worry, Aglaea. While I know that you have many queries, could you continue to converse like how "the citizens normally do"?

C: 由此，我承诺，遐蝶阁下带回的火种，将由元老院亲自管理。
E: With that, I solemnly promise that the Coreflame Lady Castorice brings back will be personally managed by the Council of Elders.

C: 你去找那刻夏到底发生了什么？
E: What happened when you went to look for Anaxa?

C: 回忆中的你…怎么能是真正的你…？
E: How could my memories of you... ever compare to the actual you?

C: …我明白了。
E: ...I understand.

C: 塞涅俄丝触碰了火种，她获得了泰坦的视野。
E: Seliose touched the Coreflame and gained the vision of the Titan.

C: 当年的我可要更加不堪哪…坑蒙拐骗、胡作非为，就为了在这狗屁世道上活下来！要是我早早就认了命……
E: Back then, I was nothing but a scoundrel, a cheat, clawing and scrambling just to survive in this messed-up world. If I'd given up and played along...

C: 但我的本事可不止「跑得快」这一项——今天，就让你开开眼！
E: But speed isn't my only trick. Today, you're getting the full performance!

C: 看来是我高估了你的剑术哪！
E: I guess your sword skills aren't as impressive as I thought!

C: 丹宝，你身上还带着法吉娜的灵水，对吧？
E: Dannie, you're still carrying Phagousa's spirit water, aren't you?

C: 两位阁下，请告诉我…前方还有什么试炼等待我去完成？
E: Honored ones, please tell me... what trials lie ahead for me to complete?

C: 眼下，我们也只能以「旁观者」的视角，窥探这个世界。
E: For now, we can only observe this world as bystanders.

C: …你从未展现过对逐火之旅的兴趣。在我和同伴们为火种奔走、流血、牺牲之时，你也从未伸出过援手。
E: ...You've never expressed interest in the Flame-Chase Journey. When my companions and I ran, bled, and sacrificed for the Coreflames, you never so much as lifted a finger.

C: 我曾坚信，只要不断追逐火光，前路的迷雾就会散去，命运会展现它最真诚的样子。
E: I once believed that as long as I chased the flames relentlessly, the fog before me would clear, and fate would reveal its truest form.

C: 冷静！它的力量，咱们都见识过……
E: Wait! We both know what this thing can do...

C: 好赖话都让你说了。
E: So you're playing both good cop and bad cop.

C: 潇洒？你是指，消费？哈，我打捞宝藏可不是为了这个。
E: Live handsomely? You mean, spend all this money? Pfft. That's so not why I hunt for treasures.

C: 放心吧，我并非为了复仇而挥剑。尼卡多利的试炼，{NICKNAME}也亲历过。{F#她}{M#他}一定能明白，无法走出过去阴影的人，终究是软弱的。
E: Don't worry. I'm not wielding my sword for revenge. {NICKNAME}'s been through Nikador's trial and understands. Those who can't walk out of the shadows of their past are ultimately weak.

C: 那就直接问嘛，又不是什么见不得人的读物。
E: You could have just asked. There's nothing embarrassing about it.

C: 这些人，来者不善呢……
E: These folks are up to no good...

C: 哈，我光明正大和人打赌赢来的。怎么，你怀疑我不成？
E: Ha, I won them fair and square in a bet. What, do you doubt me?

C: 说话呀，裁缝女！给个准信，这些宝贝你收还是不收？
E: Speak up, seamstress! Give me a straight answer. Do you want these or not?

C: 嗯…这次没有什么特别的味道了，感觉里面没什么值钱的玩意。挖都挖出来了，还是打开看一眼吧。
E: Hmm... It doesn't smell like anything valuable this time. Since we've already dug it up, let's open it and see.

C: 我…说过？跟你？
E: Did I?

C: 就是…那个问题啊。刚刚挖出第二个宝箱以后，你特意问我的。
E: You know... that question. The one you specifically asked me, right after we dug up the second chest.

C: 喔…从你嘴巴里说出来，感觉好伤感啊？
E: Oh... hearing that from you makes it sound so sad.

C: 咱们这消闲日子过得多快活呀，何必非要趟这趟浑水呢…你说对吧？
E: Life's been pretty great lately. Why get into trouble now... Don't you think?

C: 对了，风堇姑娘…她作为医师宣告了阿格莱雅的死亡。你们或许也该和她聊聊。
E: Also, Miss Hyacine was the one who declared Aglaea dead. You might want to speak with her.

C: 去完成神谕中的逐火之旅吧。去点亮星辰，给人子带去希望吧。
E: Go complete the Flame-Chase Journey of the prophecy. Ignite the stars and inspire hope in the hearts of humanity.

C: 她…能听得见我们吗？
E: Can she still hear us?

C: 没有「金织」女士，圣城该如何延续……
E: How will the holy city continue without Lady Goldweaver...

C: 过去，是金色的丝线在为我们缝补裂痕。有人会将它比作监视的眼线，掌控的工具，但没人能够否认…是阿格莱雅将这座城市，乃至这个支离破碎的世界缝缀在了一起。
E: It was the gold thread that mended our rifts in the past. Some saw it as a means of surveillance, a tool of control, but no one can deny that it was Aglaea who held this city, and even this shattered world, together.

C: 请将这一刻借给我吧。我想征用各位几分钟的光阴，一起缅怀一位庇佑圣城千年的半神……
E: Allow me this moment. I want to borrow a few minutes of your time to commemorate a demigod who protected the holy city for a millennium...

C: 请别道歉…因为尽管如此，那些我们一起度过的时光…回想起来还是十分令我开心。
E: Please, no apologies... Despite everything, thinking back on the times we spent together makes me really happy.
Hehe...

C: 呵…也许我想要拯救的不是你，孩子……
E: Heh... maybe what I wanted to save wasn't you, child...

C: 再见，白厄。
E: Goodbye, Phainon.

C: 你擅长的只是掩饰谎言。可你的同情心，一直跃然脸上。
E: You might be skilled at covering up lies, but your compassion is all over your face, plain as day.

C: …哦？那你怎么没当时就把我叫出来，居然还等到现在？
E: ...Oh? And you didn't call me out on the spot? You waited all this time to tell me?

C: 记住咯，救世小子，这个世上有一条真理：「赛法利娅总会笑到最后」。没必要为一位半神操心，我会完成我该做的事，所以——
E: Don't forget, Deliverer. There's a fundamental truth in this world. "Cifera will always get the last laugh." No need to worry for a demigod. I'll do my job, so you —

C: 阿雅……
E: Agy...

C: 丹宝！你怎么在这里？
E: Dannie! What are you doing here?

C: 仔细聆听风堇与先祖的交谈。
E: Listen carefully to Hyacine talk with the ancestor.

C: 而且，小白可不是那种喜欢随便使唤别人的孩子。他会找到你，就说明这件事没有更合适的人选啦。
E: Besides, Snowy's not the kind to ask for help lightly. Since he came to you, it means you're the best person for the job.

C: 就是这里，我们到啦。
E: We're here. This is it.

C: 请牢牢抓住自己残存的意识，我会让你…以英魂的姿态再次苏醒。
E: Please keep holding on to what's left of your will. And I will... reawaken you as a heroic soul.

C: 结束了……
E: It's over...

C: 我需要弄清传说的原貌，为了先祖们的灵魂能彻底安息。
E: I must unveil the true nature of the legend, so that my ancestors' souls may rest in peace.

C: 那时的她心怀仁慈。哪怕言语激愤，心中却满载对人子的慈悲。
E: She was brimming with compassion at that time. Her words were bursting with anger, but her heart had nothing but mercy for the children of humanity.

C: …「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」
E: ..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."

C: 艾格勒，它离开了。
E: Aquila has left.

C: 如果我要面对的是被篡改的历史，一个传承千年的谎言…那么我愿意相信，那个编织谎言的人也一定有自己的理由跟苦衷。
E: If what I'm facing is a distorted history, a lie that's lasted for a thousand years... I have to believe the one who created it had their reasons and struggles.

C: 对不起，*我们*这次说的话有些沉重啦。但作为朋友，*我们*觉得有必要对你说出这些话…那样，你才能做出对自己负责的选择呀。
E: We are sorry if our words come across as heavy. However, as your friend, we feel it's important to voice these concerns. That way, you can make choices that are genuinely accountable to yourself.

C: 但如果身为医者的我都失去了乐观，病患们又如何能燃起生的希望呢？
E: But if even the healer loses hope, then how will the patients repossess their hope for life?

C: 算碑就在眼前了。
E: The tablet is right ahead.

C: 该展现训练成果了，白厄。
E: It's time to show off the fruits of your training, Phainon.

C: 不能坐视不理…速战速决吧！
E: We can't just stand by and watch... Let's end this quickly!

C: 糟了，城中的公民！
E: Oh no, the people in the city!

C: 设计这机关的人肯定想不到…有朝一日，拥有欧洛尼斯神力之人会亲手将它解开。
E: The person who designed this mechanism would never have guessed that... one day, someone with the divine power of Oronyx could unlock it with their own hands.

C: 伴随着赛飞儿的离去，「诡计」神力消散，因其谎言得以维续的奥赫玛千年黎明结束了。圣城遭到黑潮无情入侵，强大的盗火行者也步步紧逼。
E: Following Cipher's death, the divine power of Trickery dissipates, and the thousand-year dawn of Okhema that is sustained by her lie comes to an end. The holy city is met with the merciless invasion of the black tide, as the powerful Flame Reaver moves in ever closer.

C: 不行，别贸然接近！那家伙外溢的黑焰十分滚烫。虽然不知道发生了什么，但离开才是上策。
E: No, don't get too close! That thing's black flames are burning hot. I don't know what's happening, but leaving is the best option.

C: 我们在翁法罗斯的经历远超预想，如果只是为了补充燃料，目的肯定达成了。但你说得没错……
E: Our experience in Amphoreus has far exceeded expectations. If our goal was just to replenish fuel, then mission accomplished. But you're right...

C: 世界临近溃灭，{RUBY_B#缇里西庇俄丝}万径之践行人{RUBY_E#}也已拥抱各自的命运……
E: As our world nears its end, {RUBY_B#Tribios}the ones who walk the infinite paths{RUBY_E#} have embraced their destiny...

C: 上前来，英雄们——请将她的命运付诸实现吧。
E: Step forward, heroes — follow her path and see it through.

C: 至此，让我们所有人为灭亡预备……
E: The time has come for us all to face oblivion...

C: 呵呵，这下您终于要踏入「翁法罗斯」的真相了。
E: Now, we come to the real truth of Amphoreus.

C: 这和再创世有什么关系？
E: How does this connect to Era Nova?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>扮作贯穿白厄一生中最重要的伙伴，一位始终指引其前进、却不曾在翁法罗斯历史中留名的「无名英雄」，在最佳位置欣赏这段旅程。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Become his lifelong closest friend, witnessing his hero's journey from the best seat in the house, as the nameless hero whose unwavering guidance shaped Phainon's destiny, yet whose name was never recorded in Amphoreus's history.</color>
...Hmm?

C: 对了，不是说要看神谕牌吗？都好久没玩占卜游戏了，怎么今天突然想起来？
E: Speaking of which, what about those oracle cards? We haven't done divination in forever. Why the sudden interest?

C: 像某个人一样，捉不准出现的时机，是吧？
E: Just like a certain someone who has a habit of showing up unexpectedly, right?

C: 咳，总之，这也是从故事书里学来的，英雄不走寻常路嘛。
E: *ahem* Hey, I was just copying those storybook heroes. They never take the beaten path!

C: 好久没去房顶了，也许那里能有所发现？上去找一找吧。
E: Come to think of it, I haven't checked the roof in forever. Worth a shot, right?

C: 那就由你来开路了，伙伴。
E: Lead the way then, partner.

C: 组织？它们的纪律应该没那么森严…在我们来之前，大家连个像样的名字都没有呢。
E: An organization? Hardly. They're not that organized... They didn't even have proper names before we came along.

C: 「枝和叶为什么生长，风要向什么方向吹拂……」
E: "Why do leaves and branches grow, which way does the wind blow..."

C: 你问住我了…但我和昔涟两个人，什么也做不了啊。
E: That's... that's a good point. But what difference could Cyrene and I make?

C: 呀，没想到能得到如此多的回应……
E: Oh... Oh my... the cards are quite responsive today...

C: 「织者」牌哪，是牵连起「黄金之茧」的浪漫丝线，将众人的命运编织成一匹金灿灿的流丝，连通向一个最为光辉、烂漫的未来的牌面……
E: Behold, the "Weaver." It connects the romantic threads of the "Chrysalis of Gold," weaving all destinies into golden silk that flows toward the most brilliant, magnificent future...
Please... no...

C: 对于逐火之旅，每一位黄金裔都不可或缺。无论是你，还是那位悬锋的王子，都浮现在神谕描绘的图景里。
E: Every Chrysos Heir is indispensable to the Flame-Chase Journey. And you and the crown prince of Kremnos are both a part of the prophecy.

C: 呃…那也只能等输了再看。
E: Well... if we lose, we'll find out, won't we?

C: 思来想去，我能仰仗的也只有它了……
E: In the end, there's only one thing I can trust...

C: 可此时此刻，我心中的声音却在诉说……
E: But here and now, my heart says something else...

C: 昔涟？你怎么在这里…
E: Cyrene? But how...

C: 可以拜托你吗？
E: How about it? Can you help us?

C: 或许，会是您无比熟悉的场景。
E: Perhaps you'll find it... all too familiar.

C: 白厄！昔涟！
E: Phainon! Cyrene!

C: 所以，我们该启程啦，成为开启一切的人……
E: So, let's set out. We will be the ones to start everything...

C: 让它流淌起来吧。我该出发了。
E: Let it flow. It's time for me to go.

C: 人们遵守约定，让你接过了所有的火种。这一世，在缇里西庇俄丝之后，翁法罗斯没有一名半神诞生。
E: The people kept their promise and handed you all the Coreflames. In this world, after Tribios, no demigods were born in Amphoreus.

C: 我的悲伤从未消逝。恰恰相反，十二枚火种加诸此身，令我心中的火焰前所未有地暴烈……
E: Sorrow has been my constant companion. In fact, with twelve Coreflames upon me, the fire in my heart has never been more violent...

C: 但黑潮的阴影依旧笼罩，痛苦和绝望遍布在遥远的大地……
E: Yet the shadow of the black tide still loomed, and pain and despair spread across distant lands...

C: 惟有…助长火焰。方能烧熔…那绝望的未来。
E: Only by... feeding the flames... can we melt... that hopeless future.

C: 仿佛连深不见底的最初混沌，也能够烧却。
E: As if even the deepest abyss of primordial chaos could be burned away.

C: 成为照亮世界的烈火吧。
E: Become the raging fire that illuminates the world.

C: 你是…？
E: Who are you...?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」的孩子……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Child of Remembrance...</color>

C: 又见面了，三月。
E: Good to see you again, March.

C: 三月，你们启程后，我又用你留下的六相冰做了些实验。
E: March, I conducted some experiments with the Six-Phased Ice you left us.

C: 她在等待谁？
E: Who's she waiting for?

C: 听仔细了，小家伙——翁法罗斯内外的时间流速相去甚远，「毁灭」迫在眉睫，但你还有机会当一回救世主……
E: So listen closely, little one. The speed of time is different in Amphoreus compared to the outside. Destruction is just about to arrive, but you can still play Deliverer one last time...

C: {NICKNAME}…好奇心太重啦。
E: {NICKNAME}... You're too curious.

C: 但您需要知道，该如何正确地使用它。这关键的知识也是我与您谈判的筹码：毕竟，世间掌握此道的人屈指可数……
E: But you need to learn how to use it in the right way. That vital knowledge is also my bargaining chip in this negotiation between us, for there are few in this world who are truly capable of such a feat...

C: 阁下言语中的决绝，我已充分感知。
E: I now see the full scope of the determination in your words.

C: 疯了，真是疯了！除了伟大的塔兰顿，还有谁能拯救世人于水火之中——
E: Heretic! No one but the great Talanton can deliver this world from misery.

C: 告诉人们：大祭司长利欲熏心，妄图夺回凯撒赋予众人的公民权，因而落得了凄惨的下场。
E: Tell them that the high priest attempted to take away the rights granted to the people by the Imperator. Thus, he met his fate.

C: 两位天外的贵客，无需在意这些琐事，先随剑旗爵前去安顿吧。
E: Guests from beyond the sky, worry not about these trivial matters. Dux Gladiorum will take you somewhere to settle down for now.

C: 帕福斯的兄弟，你说这凯撒提前召开会议，又要干什么？我的家乡可经不起折腾了……
E: Good sir from Paphas, what do you think the Imperator is planning, calling this meeting so early? My homeland can't endure anymore...

C: 凯撒！你叫我们前来，只是为了践踏盟友的尊严么！
E: Imperator! Did you summon us here just to trample on the dignity of your allies!?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>您将驱使名为「铁墓」的巨兽，为宇宙带去伟大的战潮与征服——寰宇众生都将拜于座前，对您俯首称臣。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You will command the mighty beast known as "Irontomb," bringing waves of war and conquest to the universe. Beings across the cosmos will bow before you, offering their allegiance.</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>届时，翁法罗斯必能踏上遍布群星的征程。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus will embark on a journey across the stars.</color>

C: 不好，是凯撒的忠犬……
E: Oh no, it's the Imperator's loyal dog...

C: 止战的「燃冕者」？分明是个德不配位的暴君！
E: And "Flamecrowned" who ends wars? Clearly, a tyrant who doesn't deserve such a title!

C: 我只是代凯撒来提醒你，记得为<color=#dbc291ff>宴会</color>作准备。
E: I'm only here on the Imperator's behalf to remind you to prepare for the <color=#dbc291ff>banquet</color>.

C: 今天还真是漫长啊…差不多也到休息的时候啦。
E: It's been a long day... We should get some rest now.

C: 好啦好啦，会配合你的，给——请替我们转告凯撒：无论何时何地，她都可以信任{NICKNAME}。
E: Alright, alright. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us: She can trust {NICKNAME} anywhere, anytime.

C: 但凯撒要做的选择…{NICKNAME}从无僭越之意。我们只想把知道的一切坦诚相告，毫无保留。
E: But as to the decision the Imperator must make... {NICKNAME} has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.

C: 我现在充满灵感，轻轻松松啦。
E: I'm so full of inspiration right now! And I feel so light!

C: 我会采纳你的谏言，暂且退下吧，神礼官，回奥赫玛去。你也不想与那二人正面交锋，不是么？
E: I will heed your advice. Leave for now, Theoros, and go back to Okhema. You don't want to confront those two directly either, do you?

C: 这不是完全穿帮了吗？
E: So the whole thing's busted?

C: 从虚假的「再创世」说起。
E: Start with the fake "Era Nova."

C: 好啦，丹恒那么可靠，用不着咱俩操心，肯定是在什么地方完好无损地等待我们呢。
E: Never mind. Dan Heng's super reliable. We don't need to worry about him. He's probably waiting for us somewhere, all hale and hearty.

C: 快点，跑两步。我维持不了多久。
E: Hurry up. Put some speed into it! I can't keep this up for much longer.

C: 别担心，「救世主」可不能带着迷茫，对吧？现在…请跟着我，翻开「岁月」的长卷，看看大家为你留下的话语。
E: But don't worry. The Deliverer can't afford to be lost, no? Now... please follow me and turn the pages of Time and hear the words everyone left for you.

C: 为「救世主」准备最后的底牌，靠小蝶、我、海瑟音三个人就够啦。
E: It's just on Cas, Hysilens, and me to prepare the final trump card for the Deliverer.

C: 最后一棒…不知道你要等多久，才能交到{NICKNAME}手中呢？
E: The last baton... I wonder how long you'll have to wait before passing it on to {NICKNAME}?

C: ——只有先开启这个进程，我们才有机会借机施展拳脚。靠你了，「救世主」。
E: Only by initiating this progress first can we seize the opportunity to make our move. It's all up to you now, "Deliverer."

C: 你将亲手解开我的镣铐，促成洞穴的坍塌。
E: You'll be the one to unshackle me and bring the cave crashing down.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「洞穴中的囚徒是否能够识别投影和回声，而非将其错认为真正的世界？」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Can the prisoners in the cave learn to see the shadows and echoes for what they are, and stop mistaking them for reality?"</color>

C: 我的小鱼们，你们游动的身姿多么欢欣，让我不忍宣读王国的不幸……
E: My little fishlings... you swim with such joy. It pains me to speak of the kingdom's sorrow...

C: 心？
E: My heart?

C: 我多么希望，这场逐火的盛宴…永不散场。
E: How I dearly wish this feast of the Flame-Chase... would never end.

C: 没关系…能死在你身边，我很幸福……
E: It's okay... I'm glad... to die by your side...

C: 呵呵…早在两千年前，我便不再心怀侥幸，能以言辞化解冲突……
E: Heh... I gave up on using words to solve conflicts two thousand years ago...

C: 那时，我或许还沉浸在自缚的醉梦中。但我会履行这场接力的职责，捍卫封印神礼观众的枷锁。
E: By then, I may still be lost in my self-wrought slumber. But I'll uphold my part of this long relay and guard the shackles that seal the Theoros.

C: 相信我，这是最后一幕了。以决定银河命运的高潮作为此世的黄昏，多么恰当。
E: Trust me. This will be the final scene. The last dusk this world will ever see shall become the climax that decides the fate of the cosmos. What an appropriate end.

C: 正因如此，它才具备毁灭「智识」的潜力。而掌握星神系统改造知识的人……
E: That's why it has the potential to destroy Erudition. As for who would be able to control the Aeonic system to rewrite knowledge...

C: 我绝不认同你的观点。
E: I'll never agree with your views.

C: 一直瞒着{NICKNAME}，对不起呀…作为道歉，等到尘埃落定，我会把这一千年的故事原原本本地讲给你听。
E: I'm sorry for keeping this a secret from you all this time... I'll tell you the entire unedited story of this millennium as an apology after this is all over.

C: 所以，如果记忆中的风景模糊了，就伸手去触碰它。
E: So, if the view in your memory ever grows fuzzy, just reach out and touch it.

C: 这个世界和翁法罗斯很像，也被关在天幕下，直到无名客到来，才得以回归群星……
E: This world was sealed beneath its sky just like Amphoreus was, and they only managed to reconnect with the stars when the Nameless arrived...

C: 「有关她死亡的记述层出不穷。如今，我们唯一能确信：当骑士从涡心离去，凯撒口中仍在喃喃着她们过去的征服……」
E: "There are countless stories about her death. All we can be sure of is, when the knight left the Vortex, the Imperator was still mumbling about their past conquests together..."

C: 不复…存在？
E: No... more?

C: 而这个单纯的愿望，我一定会替她实现。
E: I'll definitely fulfil that small wish for her.

C: 三月。
E: March.

C: 多半是这座大墓深处的存在。细节…暂时还不明朗。
E: It's probably the entity deep within this tomb. The details... aren't clear yet.

C: 如果这个封闭的世界也在祂的视线中，不难想象，浮黎需要一种机制，在「智识」看不见的角落将海量的记忆保存下来。
E: If this sealed-off world is also within THEIR gaze, then it's not too big of a stretch to surmise that THEY need a mechanism to save these incredible amounts of memories, and store them somewhere out of the Erudition's sight.

C: 从地上的符文来看，先前的密钥是用在这里的。
E: Based on the runes on the floor, the encryption key from earlier should be used here.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>94.423%</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>94.423%</unbreak>...</color>

C: 再仔细看看吧，环顾四周。你们一定会好奇：最后的泰坦身在何方？
E: Take another moment to look around. Look closely. You must be curious as to where the final Titan is located, right?

C: 明白了么？列神之战早就开启了。
E: Do you understand now? The war among Aeons started long ago.

C: 天才们编写的密钥——现在已经失效了哦♭
E: The encryption key written by those geniuses is already invalid♭

C: 放心，用不了多长时间。只是一道简单的选择题，A或者B。
E: Don't worry. It won't take long. It's a simple multi-choice question. A? Or B?

C: 哪怕只是透过镜头，我也知道，发生在翁法罗斯的爱、恨、挣扎，跟活生生的人没有区别。
E: Even through a camera lens, I know that the love, hate, and struggles that happened in Amphoreus were the same as what real living people experience.

C: 那是当然：热夜之都、凯尔萨斯星、泰科铵…掰掰手指，这该是我的第六站啦。
E: You bet! Capital of Passion, Kalsas, Taikiyan... If I count on my hand, it looks like this is my sixth stop.

C: 就像「书法」。深藏于人心底的感动，只有靠这种看似吃力不讨好的方式才能唤醒。
E: It's just like "calligraphy." Those deep emotions buried in human hearts can only be awakened through such seemingly thankless actions.

C: 嗯，相信三月七和昔涟吧。
E: Yes. Let's trust March 7th and Cyrene.

C: 三月七，在你告别过去，从六相冰中诞生的时候……
E: March 7th... When you bid farewell to your past and are born from the Six-Phased Ice...

C: 下面播报一则快讯，「智识」实验场■■■■已从■■■■■纠缠中脱离。
E: A newsflash: The "Erudition" experimental ground ■■■■■■■■■ has separated from the ■■■■■ ■■■■■' entanglement.

C: 昔涟…？
E: Cyrene...?

C: 这便是我们相聚在此的理由。来吧，举杯吧，诸位。这一杯不是为我们彼此饯行……
E: That is also why we've gathered here. Come, raise your cups. This toast is not for bidding farewell to each other...

C: 愿意如此坦诚，你…放弃抵抗了么？
E: Since you're being so candid, does this mean... you've given up resisting?

C: 哪怕，那未来我已无法见证。
E: Even if it is a future I am not able to witness.

C: 其人疯狂，显而易见。
E: His madness is plain as day.

C: 嗷呜！那地方是出水口，要是能堵上的话……
E: Awoo! That's the water inlet. If we can block it...

C: 别那么感伤啊，这不像你。
E: Don't be so sentimental. That's not like you.

C: 遐蝶…？
E: Castorice...?

C: 「花海尽头，生者的魂灵将温暖汝之指尖。相拥之后，便是永恒的离别。」
E: "At the end of the sea of flowers, the souls of the living shall warm thy fingertips, and after an embrace, there shall be eternal separation."

C: 「这也是为何，我们不得不与过去的敌人——」
E: "That is why we had to form a temporary alliance—"

C: 我确实比你更懂得「面对过去」，第一位天才。
E: Yes, I indeed know how to "face the past" better than you do, First Genius.

C: 而侥幸逃脱的人，也沦陷在黑潮中，化作这般扭曲的模样。
E: Those who were lucky enough to escape her drowned in the black tide, becoming these twisted figures.

C: 看起来，你现在很轻松嘛。
E: You seem pretty relaxed.

C: 如此一来，世人不必再受唯一法则制约，而要做自己的「律法」。
E: Now, the people of this world will no longer be bound by a single rule, but will make their own "Laws."

C: 哎呀，「测不准」三个字，到底哪里不好懂了？
E: Come on, how hard is it to understand the word "uncertainty"?

C: 这场战役的重要性，足以和「诛罗讨伐战」相提并论。唯有得胜，方能驱散笼罩万千世界的「铁墓」阴影。
E: The significance of this battle rivals that of the campaign against Zulo. Only through victory can we disperse the shadow of Irontomb that looms over countless worlds.

C: 我们必须假设，这两件事同时成立。如此一来，「矛盾」就会指向——
E: So we have to assume that both are true. And if that's the case, then the "contradiction" leads us to—

C: 黑塔的大手，真是强而有力啊！继续。
E: Herta's Big Hand is what I call power! Keep it going.

C: …是啊。请相信我们，迷途的灵魂。
E: ...Yes. Please trust in us, wandering soul.

C: 「以你胸间翻涌的海浪，涤荡黑潮的罪恶吧，灰鱼儿。」
E: "Let the waves that surge within your heart cleanse the sins of the black tide, Gray Fry."

C: 还有…虽然已经见过面了，但亲眼看见她的「种子」开出花，还是很感慨呀。
E: And... even though we've met before, it's still moving to see her "seed" bloom like this.

C: 但最后，所有往事都将化作「记忆」，汇成讲述星空的寓言集。
E: But in the end, everything will turn into "memories," converging into a collection of fables about the stars.

C: 「迷迷」。
E: Mem.

C: 我不想看到任何人牺牲…
E: I don't want to see anyone sacrifice themselves...

C: 也许，还有其他办法…
E: Perhaps... There's still another way...

C: ▀█权势▄█天军▀▄准备好▀█抵挡我▀▄
E: █Strength▄█Cosmic armies▀▄Be ready to▀█Resist me▀▄

C: 值得封赏的祝福，律法必将完成征讨。
E: A blessing worthy of rewards. The Law will complete its campaign.

C: 不成调的小曲，是小妖精们的歌谣。
E: That rhymeless tune is the lullaby of little fairies.

C: 「这样一来，它就不再是『昔涟』一个人的回忆。」
E: "That way, it won't just be 'Cyrene's' memories alone."

C: 「一片…小小的{RUBY_B#一页永恒}『善见天』{RUBY_E#}。」
E: "A tiny... {RUBY_B#Eternal Page}Eden of Blessed Insight{RUBY_E#}."

C: 那就准备好，列车长要给你出发的口令了。
E: Then get ready. The conductor will be giving you the signal to depart.

C: 「它也会努力活着，努力…与『毁灭』抗争。」
E: "Life will still try its hardest to find a way... It will try its hardest to resist Destruction."

C: 我现在，是不是特别漂亮呢？
E: Don't I look really pretty right now?

C: 我会写下：「爱」是一朵清白的花，它悄无声息地长大，让每一位过路的人都心生憧憬。
E: I'll write that "love" is an innocent flower. It grows up silently, creating longing in every passerby.

C: 别害怕，{NICKNAME}。紧张的时候，就牵住我的手吧。
E: Don't be afraid, {NICKNAME}. Take my hand if you feel nervous.

C: 呼唤姬子和瓦尔特。
E: Call out to Himeko and Welt.

C: 谁知道呢？前脚咱们还在喊着爱和正义，跟铁墓的病毒搏斗……
E: Who knows? One moment we were shouting about love and justice, fighting Irontomb's virus...

C: 呵…对群星而言，很难评判那是福是祸呢。
E: Heh... It's hard to say if that'd be a blessing or a curse for the cosmos.

C: 难怪白厄会离席。
E: No wonder Phainon left the conversation.
Uh...

C: …HKS！别打岔。
E: ...HKS! Don't interrupt.

C: 算上你们在翁法罗斯渡过的年月，列车组的辈分怕是该重新排布了。
E: We might need to reshuffle the seniority rankings of the Express Crew if we count the years you spent in Amphoreus.

C: 身处「当下」的我们，没法弄清是谁成为了浮黎，但能确信祂一定会诞生。
E: Here in the present, we cannot know who will become Fuli, but one thing is certain: THEY will be born.

C: 如果是桃子，多三千万个都不介意哦？
E: As long as it's Peach, even thirty million wouldn't be too many.
Look...

C: 人们看见「爱」的结局，踏上逐火的征程。而逐火的人们，又让花儿在明天诞生。
E: When people see that ending of "love," they set out on the Flame-Chase Journey. And those who chase the flame, in turn, let the flower bloom anew tomorrow.

C: 无论翁法罗斯是因何而诞生，但此刻，它变得多么温柔…在我归去时，它想再次为我送上，我们相逢时的那段旋律。
E: No matter how Amphoreus came to be, right now it feels so gentle... As I return to where I came from, it wants to play for me once more that melody from when we first met.

C: 它长成名为「翁法罗斯」的大树，而「岁月」是它沐浴光的枝叶。
E: It grew into a great tree named Amphoreus, and "Time" became its branches and leaves, basking in the light.

C: 但那光是好的。明亮的。温暖的。幸福的。
E: But it was a good light. It was bright, warm... and happy.

C: 「电信号序列：PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>……」
E: "Electrical Signal Sequence: PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>..."

C: {RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#64}我{RUBY_E#}的天！熟人这么多？甚至还有位特邀嘉宾——最失败的天才，赞达尔！
E: Goodness gracious {RUBY_B#Genius Society#64}me{RUBY_E#}! So many familiar faces! We even have a special guest? It's that greatest failure of a genius, Zandar!

C: 世界的终幕，我会以剧中人「神礼观众」之名，将其见证。
E: I shall witness the end of the world in the role of "Theoros"... as a character within this play.

C: 你将开启「毁灭」的链式反应……
E: You will initiate the Destruction's chain reaction...

C: 游侠，别以为占个大义的名头就能对人指手画脚的。再说了，我看你也不是没有私心嘛。
E: Ranger, don't think waving some righteous flag gives you the right to throw sidelong jabs. And don't act like you've got no motives of your own.

C: 比如？
E: Like what?

C: 「{RUBY_B#万界之癌}星核{RUBY_E#}」在哪里？
E: Where's the {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellaron{RUBY_E#}?

C: 拉倒吧，也只有你们这种小年轻，会被那些虚张声势的头衔和发明给唬住。
E: Yeah, right. Only impressionable young kids like you would get intimidated by those pretentious titles and inventions.

C: 背叛师友不道德。
E: He betrayed his teacher and friend.

C: …我记恨他，那也都是…气话！哎！
E: When I said I hated him, I said it in the heat of the moment! Argh!

C: 我能做些什么？
E: Is there anything I can do?

C: 没听过这么奇怪的要求。
E: This is a strange request.

C: 去去去，你懂什么？！重要的是要有一个酷炫的名头。
E: Hey! What do you know!? It's important for an organization to have a cool name.

C: 后来嘛，我终于找到了那个跟我背影相似的科员，他趴在月台上，不远处躺着小囡。
E: Later, I found that researcher who looked similar to me. He was lying face down on the platform. My girl was not far away.

C: 我真的很不理解，为什么偏偏在我表白之后，莱斯莉就不理我了……
E: I really don't understand why Lesley stopped answering me after I confessed my love for her...

C: 收发频率变慢了。
E: Is there a delay in signal transmission?

C: 我确定。
E: Yes, I am.

C: 哦。那我拿去读取了，谢啦哥们儿！
E: Okay. I'll read it now. Thank you, bro!

C: 只是…他好歹是我的徒弟，要我亲手促成他的离开，心中还是有许多不舍。
E: Just that... he's my student. I can't stand being the cause of his departure.

C: …必须时刻保持十二分的警惕，才能将星火燎原之前将其熄灭…
E: ...We must stay vigilant at all times if we are to prevent any potential disasters from getting out of hand...

C: 这事包在我身上！
E: Leave it to me!

C: 有志于奇物回收工作的科员，请尽快到基座舱段的温明德队长手下的奇物再收容小队报道。
E: If you are interested in Curio recovery, please report to the Curio Collection Squad under Mr. Wen Mingde in the base zone as soon as possible.

C: 距离你我现在所处位置，出门<unbreak>45</unbreak>米，有一处重要的道路缺损。
E: <unbreak>45</unbreak> meters out the door from where we are now, there is a major road defect.

C: 我查探过，有怪物占领了缺损彼端的小型防卫库，普通科员恐怕无法解决。
E: I've checked, and the small ordnance depot on the other side of the defect is swarming with monsters. I'm afraid ordinary staff won't be able to deal with this.

C: 异星水魈？
E: Xenohydro?

C: 你也知道，自「黑塔」建站以来，围绕奇物收容就设立了<color=#dbc291ff>界种、法政、密卷、地概、应物</color>五个科室。
E: As you know, since the establishment of the Herta Space Station, five departments have been established to focus on the collection and study of Curios, including <color=#dbc291ff>Ecology, Geopolitics, Mysticism, Geography, and Implement Arts</color>.

C: {F#丫头}{M#小子}，斥力桥的配控装置就在我对面，你坐电梯下来重启下，让我过来，就没你事了。
E: {F#Lass}{M#Lad}, the control device of the repulsion bridge is right opposite me. Take the elevator and reset it to let me come over, and then you can get out of here.

C: 这算得上钓鱼执法吧！
E: "It's A Trap!"

C: 一个<color=#eb4d3dff>宇宙无线电</color>叫做「希拉」<color=#eb4d3dff>希求的正义</color>的<color=#eb4d3dff>一颗星球注定的亡兆</color>法政科员。
E: A <color=#eb4d3dff>space radio</color> called Sheila <color=#eb4d3dff>pursued justice</color> for <color=#eb4d3dff>a doomed planet</color> geopolitics researcher.

C: 跟我来。
E: Come with me.

C: 成功解决突发病例，我们继续吧——这次也是同样的情况吗？
E: Emergency resolved, now let's continue — same problem this time?

C: 依我看，只要不会影响正常的研究工作，那就不打紧。
E: The way I see it, it won't matter as long as it doesn't affect your research.

C: 希拉…重新上线。我们有些话要问你。
E: Sheila... reconnect. We have something to ask you.

C: 希拉，呼喊。
E: Sheila, shout.

C: 没办法…他的权限比我要高，仅次于阿兰科长等人，咱们还是先去外面等着吧。
E: There's nothing we can do... His authority is higher than mine, second only to the likes of Chief Arlan. Let's wait outside for now.

C: 没错，我所谓的实验，正是你们面前的这个与真人无异的年轻希拉。
E: That's right. The experiment I referred to is this perfect recreation of a young Sheila standing before you.

C: 虽然这个选择违背了我悼念亡妻的初衷，但是考虑到原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>失控的风险，我不得不承认这个选择颇富远见。
E: This would go against my original wish of mourning my deceased wife, but considering the risks that Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak> poses should she become out of control, I must admit that this is a safe choice.

C: ——别太自责，谁也不会料到这样的结局，这不是你的错。
E: No need to blame yourself. No one could have foreseen this outcome. It's not your fault.

C: …不知怎的，今天我突然想起了这则令人唏嘘的故事，说来与你一听。
E: ... For some reason, this tragic story just came to mind today. Thought I'd share it with you.

C: 在走之前，我先跟你讲讲终端机的使用规则吧。
E: Before you leave, let me tell you how to use the terminal.

C: 抱——呼呼——抱歉、抱歉！
E: Sorry — huff puff — I'm sorry!

C: 终端机没反应了。
E: The terminal did not respond.

C: 呃，又坏了？
E: What? Is it broken again?

C: 前方有个神秘的「大家伙」，收集信标数据的时候请多加小心。
E: There's a mysterious "big guy" up ahead. Please be careful while gathering data.

C: 已经得出足够的线索了。
E: We have enough clues.

E: So... the trial of the heart means knowing how to deal with an overbearing boss.

C: 职场压力…如何与强势上司相处……
E: Job pressure... how to manage your boss...

C: 就是这块天花板！
E: This ceiling tile!

C: 这个问题很难回答。
E: This question is difficult to answer.

C: 这事，就交给我和{NICKNAME}好了。
E: Just leave this to {NICKNAME} and me.

C: 谁说人类就不珍重情感了？
E: Who says humans don't cherish friendship?

C: 原来我是蝴蝶啊。
E: So, I'm actually a butterfly.

C: 那位骇客就在我面前…
E: That hacker is right in front of me...

C: 「嘿，我说你，怎么一直在盯着我看？」
E: "Hey, you, why are you staring at me?"

C: 我想，她当时确实骇入了黑塔的办公室，但并未在其中停留太久。
E: I believe that she was indeed able to hack into Herta's office, but she didn't stay there for very long.

C: 真无聊！
E: How boring!

C: （谨慎的沉默。）
E: (Cautious silence)

C: 既然你并不知晓「纯美」的存在，我只有用骑士的方式令其显现——
E: Since you do not understand the Beauty, I will have to show you in a way that only a knight can.

C: 噫！你、你别吓我呀！这背后肯定有科学的解释…对吧？
E: Hey! D—Don't scare me! I'm sure there's a scientific explanation for this, right?

C: 我我们…有可能会失败吗？
E: C—Could it fail?

C: 现在前进的方向有一点小偏差。让帕姆看看…列车长对航行的把控向来精准无误，如果发生一点小偏差就已经非常奇怪了帕。
E: We've seemingly gone off course... Strange, Pom-Pom's navigation is always precise.

C: 瓦尔特先生——请稍等片刻。
E: Mr. Yang, one moment, please.

C: 原来如此，辛克尔和■■■是这么看的么，这至少有头绪了不是吗？
E: I see. Is that what Hinkel and ■■■ think? At least that counts as a lead.

C: 怎、怎么办？他看着不像是装的。
E: Wh—What do we do? It sounds like he's telling the truth...

C: 和<color=#dbc291ff>科员失踪事件</color>有关？
E: About the <color=#dbc291ff>researchers' disappearances</color>?

C: 我想起来了，当时…当时……
E: I remember now. Back then... back then...

C: 有什么头绪？
E: What do you have in mind?

C: 我叫他，他也不理我，嘴里还念念有词，神神叨叨的。
E: He doesn't even answer me when I speak to him. H—He was talking to himself...

C: 虽然我不知道他究竟在找什么，但希望对你们有用……
E: I don't know exactly what he's searching for, but I hope it can help you...

C: 寄宿在其中的微弱意识消失了，冥火大公抛弃了这团火焰……
E: The small fragment of consciousness in there is gone. Duke Inferno has discarded this fire...

C: {NICKNAME}，你还记得我的「研究」吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, do you remember what my "research" is about?

C: 我想到有一种「生命形式」，足以令我承认其不可捉摸。那就是……
E: I thought of one "lifeform" that would truly lie beyond my reach, and that is...

C: 已授权给：「阮•梅」女士。黑塔女士：都行，她开心就好。嘶嘶。
E: Permissions status: Madam Ruan Mei, permissions granted. Madam Herta: Fine. As long as it keeps her happy. *buzz*.

C: 想了解#4 波尔卡•卡卡目。
E: I want to know about member #4, Polka Kakamond.

C: 听说阮•梅研究时……
E: I heard that when Ruan Mei is researching...

C: 好可怕……
E: Scary...

C: 好吧，我抽空去看看。
E: Alright, I'll go and check it out when I get time.

C: 还真是，没想到会在花店遇到你，你也是来买花的吧？
E: So it is! I never expected to bump into you in the florist's! You're here buying flowers, too?

C: 那我推荐您买上一束「侯爵夫人」——这是贝洛伯格最美丽、也是最难培育的一种花。
E: Then I would recommend a bouquet of "Marquise." They are the most beautiful flowers in Belobog, as well as the species most difficult to grow.

C: 你这方法靠谱么？
E: Is that really going to help?

C: 我…我也不知道…呜呜！他们一直追着我，一直追到了巷子口。我现在根本不敢出门，每每想起他们那样子我就……
E: I... I don't know... Waaa! They kept chasing me all the way to the end of the alleyway! I'm too scared to go outside now. Just thinking about their looks makes me go... go...

C: 小尤利安长大啦，可别再哭鼻子了。
E: You're all grown up now, Julian. No more crying like that, okay?

C: （不跟紧这家伙的话，恐怕会迷失在雪雾里吧……）
E: (If we don't keep up with this guy, we might get lost in the blizzard...)

C: 还是不了，我就留在列车上吧。
E: No, thanks — I'll be staying on the Express.

C: ——七百年不晚。
E: ...to pick up the tab.

C: 根据她的说法，筑城者和公司投资人商定的还款年限是…<unbreak>280</unbreak>年。但借款之后不到百年，雅利洛-Ⅵ和整个银河的联系就彻底切断了。
E: According to her account, the repayment period agreed upon by the Architects and the IPC investors was... <unbreak>280</unbreak> years. However, less than a century after the loan was taken out, the connection between Jarilo-VI and the rest of the galaxy was completely severed.

C: 该怎么说呢？整幅画面都传递着一种…悲伤。不是普通人遭遇不顺心时那种短暂的伤感…远比那种感觉更悠长，更厚重。
E: It portrays a certain kind of... sorrow, you know? Not your everyday kind of sadness — it runs much deeper than that.

C: 我有个八十亿信用点的项目。
E: I'm in charge of a project worth 8 billion credits, by the way.

C: 那帮家伙，嘴上说着什么「资产评估」…实际根本就是在骚扰下层区人正常生活！
E: These uninvited guests keep talking about "asset evaluation," whatever that means. All I know is they're seriously disrupting the lives of the Underworlders!

C: 嗯，一定得把准备做全。
E: Mm, make sure you've got everything you need.

C: …咦？账账跑哪去了？
E: Huh? Where'd Numby go?

C: 你是……
E: But... aren't you—?

C: ——等等，你刚才说，那些兵器一直都被藏在这里？也就是说…雅利洛-Ⅵ的筑城者和军团大战的时候，压根没用上这些兵器？
E: ...Wait a minute, you said these weapons have been hidden here from the very beginning? That means the Architects of Jarilo-VI never used them in their fight against the Legion.

C: …「了解」？这就完了？你不打算发表下自己的看法？
E: "Understood..." That's it? You don't have any thoughts on the matter?

C: 你们之间的交流如此融洽，我很高兴。托帕小姐，听你打招呼的语气，现在的状况你应该很清楚吧？
E: I'm pleased to see how well everyone's been getting along. Topaz, based on your greeting I presume you have a good grasp of the current situation?

C: …请我来？有意思。我还以为你已经下定决心要阻挠我开展工作了呢。
E: ...Help you? Hmm, that's interesting. I was under the impression you'd already decided to obstruct our operations here.

C: 对，大名鼎鼎的塔拉梵，七人董事会的一员！他那一票要押咱们身上了，明白吗，是咱们，不是市场开拓部，这回奥斯瓦尔多终于笑不出来咯！
E: That's right, the renowned Taravan — one of the seven board members! He's throwing his support behind us instead of the Marketing Development Department for once. Ha! Oswaldo won't be laughing anymore!

C: 对咯~我喜欢的就是这种反应。
E: That's right⁓ Now that's the kind of reaction I was hoping for.

C: 如果公司的方案真的能够立竿见影，付出这样的代价在我看来是值得的。
E: If the IPC is able to bring about immediate change, then I think that's a price well worth paying.

C: 将公司讨债一事和布洛妮娅面临的抉择转告给了邓恩……
E: You tell Dunn about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...

C: 也对哦，丹恒以前好像也说过？克拉拉虽然年纪还小，却总能把事情看得很透彻。
E: True. Dan Heng's always saying that Clara's really insightful for her age.

C: 我觉得她足够强大。
E: I think she can handle a little criticism.

C: 对耶，还没问希儿呢！
E: Right! We haven't asked Seele!

C: {NICKNAME}，你脸色不太好啊…出什么问题了吗？
E: A—Are you feeling alright, {NICKNAME}? You look a little uneasy.

C: 希望托帕的谈判能有好结果。
E: I hope Topaz's negotiations go smoothly.

C: 那黑衣人还塞钱给我…
E: That person in black even palmed me some money...

C: 凯尔，久等了。我们现在可以过去了吗？
E: Kyle, sorry for the delay. Are we clear to proceed?

C: 那边的铁卫，好酷哦！
E: Look — a Silvermane Guard! So cool!

C: 「公司」的士兵装备精良，和他们正面起冲突恐怕不太明智。你有什么办法吗，戍卫官？
E: The IPC soldiers are well-equipped — it wouldn't be wise to fight them head-on. Captain, what do you have in mind?

C: 真是一如既往地贴心呢，{NICKNAME}。
E: You're as considerate as always, {NICKNAME}.

C: 行吧，那我就听你一回，再去娜塔莎医生那儿复诊一次……
E: Okay, you win. It's off for another follow-up visit with Dr. Natasha, I suppose...

C: 那种人居然是娜塔莎的哥哥…
E: It's hard to believe he was your brother...

C: 瓦赫欠下层区的债还记在我的头上。我只能尽最大的努力帮助这里的每个人，直到我倒下为止。
E: The debt that Vache owes to the Underworld rests with me. All I can do is help everyone to the best of my ability... to the very end.

C: 别、别这么跟娜塔莎医生说话，太不礼貌了……
E: H—How dare you speak to Dr. Natasha like that! Where are your manners...

C: 揭幕战过后，下一赛季的比赛便会正式打响——相关事项目前仍在持续紧密筹备中，敬请期待！
E: After the season opener, the season's super league will officially begin! Related matters are still undergoing continuous, intensive preparation, so stay tuned!

C: 俱乐部的新星{NICKNAME}不负众望，终于再次踏上擂台！{M#他}{F#她}一路摧枯拉朽，来到赛前揭幕战的第四轮——又是何人将与{M#他}{F#她}对垒？
E: The club's new star, {NICKNAME}, isn't disappointing us — {M#he}{F#she} is stepping into the ring once more! {NICKNAME} had no trouble with the previous opponents on {M#his}{F#her} way up to the fourth cycle of the season-opening matches. And now, which tough challenger will be facing off against {M#him}{F#her}?

C: 现在是什么状况？
E: What's the situation?

C: 别在这里跟我打哑谜！我看你呀，就是没搞清楚状况。
E: Don't play games with me! I don't think you understand the situation.

C: 我明白，我会跟你回去，接受应有的处罚。
E: I understand. I'll go back with you and accept due punishment.

C: 得抓紧时间破解，追兵就在我们身后。
E: We need to solve it before we run out of time. The Guards are right on our heels.

C: 等一下！里面有银鬃铁卫，小心别惊动他们！
E: Wait! There are Silvermane Guards here. Careful not to alert them!

C: …迷路？
E: ...Lost?

C: 虽然我们来时没遇到什么敌人，但回头就不好说了。眼睛放亮点——我感觉这里今天的气氛有点不同寻常。
E: Thankfully, we didn't encounter any enemies coming here, but I can't promise it'll stay that way on our way back. Keep your eyes peeled. This place gives off a strange vibe today.

C: …你说是那就是。但它刚才好像自称「家用寻物仪」——这是说，它能帮我们找东西吗？
E: ...If you say so. But it just called itself a "Home-Use Object Finder." So, can it help us find things?

C: 养母喜欢的花是…
E: What was your mother's favorite flower...?

C: 怎么了，{NICKNAME}？不去挑花吗？
E: Oh, hey {NICKNAME}. I thought you went to choose some flowers?
Ah...

C: 不用担心我，可别小看了「地火」领袖的体质。
E: Hehe, no need. Don't you underestimate the leader of Wildfire.

C: 瓦赫医生总是神出鬼没的，我们小队只撞见过他一次。他好像…不太爱说话，每次都只是把药箱留在特定的位置，等巡逻队自行来取。
E: Doctor Vache is... elusive. My squad only met him once, and he didn't seem like the talkative type. He leaves the medicine at specific locations and our patrols go there to collect it.

C: 所以，他真的在雪原里取得了研究突破……
E: So he really did have a breakthrough in the Snow Plains...

C: …副作用？完全没感觉到。要说真有什么不方便的地方，那就是在药劲没过去之前回不了城……
E: ...Side effects? Not that I know of. If there were a problem, it'd be that we couldn't go back to the city until the effect had worn off...

C: 谢谢你们提供的信息。我们打算再深入雪原一些，寻找我哥哥的下落。
E: Thanks for the information. We're planning to head deeper into the Snow Plains to find my brother.

C: 你之前在贝洛伯格待了那么久，应该路过这里不少次吧？
E: You spent so much time in Belobog on your last visit — you must have passed by here before, right?

C: 还不清楚，不过我听说了一些传闻，说不定你们会感兴趣。
E: Not for certain, but I've heard some rumors that might be of interest to you.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，您想现在就开始了解博物馆运营的相关工作流程吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, would you like to begin with the museum's workflows?

C: 不过百密一疏，他们肯定没想到这些零件会跟机器人自身的系统互斥，造成骚乱。
E: But the best-laid plans of snow mice and men often go awry... they didn't realize the parts would interfere with the robots' systems and cause them to run amok.

C: 嗯嗯，我们去下一个区域看看吧。
E: Let's start looking in the next area.

C: 啊，克拉拉姐姐回来啦！
E: Hey, big sis Clara is back!

C: 我尚未理清事态的脉络，但如果这是{NICKNAME}的诉求——
E: I am unable to determine the logic behind this series of events, but if you insist...

C: 归还胶片
E: Return the microfilm.

C: 哎呀，我说这些干嘛，真是…那个，如果你想继续担任博物馆的兼职经理、负责历史区的日常经营，就去和艾丽斯小姐说一声吧？
E: Ahem, that's enough praise for now... Anyway, if you did want to continue working as a part-time manager and handle the daily operations of the History-Culture Hall, I recommend talking to Miss Eris.

C: 敢在银鬃铁卫的情报官面前耀武扬威，我看你们真是活腻了！
E: You've got a lot of nerve drawing your weapons in front of an Intelligence Officer of the Silvermane Guards!

C: 又有什么事吗，佩拉？
E: Is there something you wanted to talk about, Pela?

C: 还是说，你…唔…这什么破宾馆啊，房门上怎么连个猫眼都没有？
E: Or maybe you... Ugh, what kind of hotel is this, anyway? No peepholes on the doors?

C: （下个问题无论如何都得考虑清楚再做回答。）
E: (I better think through the next question carefully before answering.)

C: 你，解决了星核危机的英雄，大守护者敬重的战友宾朋…要是只因为眼前小小的一道宾馆房门就让犯人溜走了，岂不令人耻笑？
E: Wouldn't it be a shame if you, the hero of the Stellaron crisis, the supreme guardian's respected comrade-in-arms, let the prisoner slip away... just because of a hotel door?

C: 噢…好像拆成了<unbreak>20</unbreak>个。
E: Uhh... around <unbreak>20</unbreak>.

C: 猛地一下破门而入！
E: Break down the door with a bang!

C: 呵呵，多谢你的好意。
E: Hehe, I appreciate the gesture.

C: 当然没问题，我们走。
E: Of course. Let's go.

C: 谢谢你。那么就从姓名这栏开始入手吧……
E: Thank you. Then let's begin with the name column...

C: 对他们来说，吃饱、穿暖，还能和小伙伴们一起，这就是生活的全部。他们无从渴望更广阔的世界——因为在下层区的他们，根本不可能见过那样的世界。
E: For them, having food to eat, clothes on their backs, and friends to play with was all they needed in life. They've no way of longing for anything more — because they come from the Underworld. They've never known any other kind of world.

C: 薄雾什么？
E: Moosy-what?

C: 你也来做志愿者吗？
E: Are you here to be a volunteer too?

C: 嗯！那我们就开始吧。
E: Great! Let's do it.

C: 事情要朝奇怪的方向发展了…
E: This is getting weird...

C: …等等，{NICKNAME}队员——虎克怎么感觉你这句话不太对？
E: ...Hold on, {NICKNAME}. What you just said didn't sound right to me.

C: 下一题会是什么呢？！
E: What will the next question be?

C: 哎，正好你来了，要不来帮我看看这简历还能怎么修改吧？
E: You're here at the right time. Could you take a look at my resume to see if it needs any modifications?

C: 好了，这样就完美了。
E: There, it's perfect.

C: 希露瓦绘声绘色地描述了当时经历的种种……
E: Serval described what happened back there in detail...

C: 你们是在心灵感应吗？
E: Are you two communicating telepathically?

C: 筑城者们曾在「{RUBY_B#与反物质军团的战争}那场战争{RUBY_E#}」中创造了惊人的机械士兵，但大部分机械都在惨烈的战争中损坏，技术也没有保留下来。
E: During {RUBY_B#War Against the Antimatter Legion}the war{RUBY_E#}, the Architects created astonishing mechanical soldiers, but the fight was so terrible that most were damaged or destroyed. The technology was lost.

C: …不是想这些事情的时候，我现在应该专注在救治伤员的事上。
E: ...Now's not the time for those thoughts. I need to focus on treating the injured.

C: 把它带上吧，反正也不占地方。就算它真的坏了，这里四处都是垃圾箱。
E: Let's take it with us. It doesn't take up much room. And if it really is broken, there are trashcans everywhere.

C: 哔嘟！哔嘟！发现近似物件，请遵循「家用寻物仪安全使用指南」开始搜索指引。
E: Beep, beep, beep! Item found. Please commence search according to the Home-Use Object Finder Safety Manual.
Hmm...

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}别怕，你的伤势没那么严重。
E: Don't be afraid, {F#young lady}{M#young man}. Your injury isn't fatal.

C: 在裂界彻底侵蚀孤儿院之后，娜塔莎帮每个孩子都找好了收养家庭。那姑娘，真是厉害啊……
E: When the Fragmentum completely overtook the Orphanage, Natasha found adoptive families for every single child. She sure is one incredible lady...

C: 说，是不是你把老爹的探测器偷走了？
E: Spill it! Did you steal my daddy's detector?

C: 叔叔我呀，都告诉你了，小偷就是厨子！就算你问我一百遍，小偷就是厨子！
E: I already told you, it was the cook! Even if you asked me a hundred times, my answer would still be the cook!

C: 还向你求饶，不可能，你去找吧，你找到就明白了。
E: Pff, right, I'd beg you for mercy. Go ahead, you'll understand once you find the truth.

C: 要哭就到「地火」那去哭吧。
E: If you want to cry, go cry to Wildfire.

C: 听不懂人话？都说了，是我捡的。下层区的规矩，谁捡到就归谁，劝你别多管闲事！
E: What? Don't you understand the human language? Like I said, I found it on the ground. That's the rule in the Underworld. Finders keepers. So, mind your own business!

C: 哎哟，下层区的藏宝图都长这样儿的，绝对错不了，我怎么可能骗你呢？
E: Relax! All the treasure maps in the Underworld look just like this. No way I could be wrong. Just trust me on this!

C: 只要你能消气，一切都好说，嘿嘿。
E: As long as you are not angry with me, then I will do whatever you say. Hehe!

C: 我已经向奥列格先生保证，要尽力挽救每一位居民的生命——我必须说到做到。
E: I made a promise to Mr. Oleg to save as many people as possible. I have to see to it myself.

C: 还是先解决眼下的危机吧。刚才的矿民说，她兄弟也跑来这附近了…四处看看吧？
E: Let's focus on the business at hand. That miner we met said his brother came this way — we should look around.

C: 我们的名字？为什么……
E: Our names? What's happening here...

C: 没错。这里是通向坎特谷的必经之路。虽然两边有矮崖，但我先前已经为了通行方便清理过了，不必担心坍塌。
E: Yep. This is the path to Kandor Valley. There are low cliffs on both sides, but I cleared all the monsters here a while ago, so it should be safe and sound.

C: 什么？
E: Mm?

C: 它好像消失了…是逃走了吗？
E: It disappeared... Did it run away?

C: 啊…好香！我要开动了——！
E: Ah... It smells so good! I'm gonna dig in!

C: 哎呀，没事——交给我就好啦。
E: Come on, it's fine. Just leave it to me.

C: 佩拉看起来很开心。
E: You look really happy.

C: 然后，终于有一天…重要的时候到了。
E: Then, finally... the day of Pela's birth arrived.

C: 这些家伙可不是流浪者，它们不会——
E: These aren't like vagrants. They won't—

C: 太棒了，几乎完好无损！娜塔估计也想不到吧，她几年前存放的物资居然保存得这么好。
E: Great, and it's barely damaged! Nat wouldn't have expected her old supplies from years ago to have stayed in such good condition.

C: 我明明知道下层区在受苦，却什么忙都帮不上。曾经的家园变成了这副模样，我却还完全被蒙在鼓里……
E: The Underworld has been struggling, but I never tried to help. I didn't even know that it was my own home that had fallen into such a dire state...

C: （要找的只剩下止痛剂了——在附近找找吧。）
E: (The only thing left to find is painkillers. I'll see if there's any nearby.)

C: 他用弹珠打败了裂界怪物?
E: He defeated Fragmentum monsters with marbles?

C: 虎克也不知道他什么时候会回来，肯定不行啦！
E: I have no idea when he'll come back. So that definitely won't work!

C: （科鲁泽受了重伤？糟了…有不太好的预感……）
E: (Kluzer is seriously injured? Oh no... I have a bad feeling...)

C: （等等，旁边那个是……）
E: (Wait, the one next to him is...)

C: 看来…帕斯卡的自我意识，还没有恢复到日志中表现出的高度……
E: Pascal's consciousness does not appear to have returned to the level shown in the diary...

C: 不会，史瓦罗虽然霸道，但从不无故攻击人类。对无家可归的人来说，这地方反而安全。
E: No. Svarog may be ruthless, but he never attacks without reason. For those with no home, this is actually a safe place to be.

C: 这里的人，感觉都被机械管制着……
E: It feels like the people here are all under the supervision of robots...

C: 大家，请专心战斗吧。我就在你们身后。
E: All of you, stay focused. I'm right behind you.

C: 不对，希儿。
E: No, Seele.

C: 大守护者…她比你我都想得更深远。所有决定都是为了贝洛伯格的安宁……
E: The Supreme Guardian... sh—she sees further than you or I. All her decisions are for the security of Belobog...

C: 你们的支援很及时，多谢。
E: Your support came at the right moment. Thank you.

C: 嗐，承蒙夸奖！朋友之间就是得互相照应，以后才好谈生意嘛。
E: My pleasure! Friends should look out for each other. Good for business.

C: 用强硬的手段威胁。
E: Threaten them with hardball tactics.

C: 好耶，洞洞机已经准备好了！
E: Yay! Diggertron's all set and ready to go!

C: 算了吧，这人明显不感兴趣。
E: No need, he doesn't look interested.

C: 买不下来也能准备其他礼物。
E: Even if it isn't, you can still get another gift.

C: …那个，也不能确定是被「偷走」了吧…我们已经联系了卖家，还派出了人手去找，应该很快就能……
E: ...Well, we can't say for sure that it was "stolen..." We've contacted the seller and sent some people in search. We should soon be able to...

C: 七百五十冬城盾两次！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield going twice!

C: 太好了，虎克竟然真的拍下来了！
E: Woohoo!!! Hook actually won the bid!

C: 话说回来，你的生日聚会准备得怎么样了，虎克？邀请了这位{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}吗？
E: By the way, Hook, how are your birthday party plans coming along? Have you invited this {F#young lady}{M#young man}?

C: 就算有黑宝石的加成，能把玩偶卖到那个价格，你们背后肯定还是付出了不少努力吧？
E: Even with the erebus, you must've put in a lot of effort to get such a good price?

C: 我能说不吗？
E: Can I say no?

C: 其实…其实我已经把「菌菌」卖掉了！
E: I... I sold Junjun!

C: 克拉拉把你修好了呀？
E: Did Clara fix you?

C: 本次导航已完成。请注意侧后方来车、敌人及自动机兵。
E: Your trip has concluded. Please keep an eye out for vehicles approaching from the back or sides, as well as enemies and automatons.

C: 每个机器人…只要还有修好的可能，克拉拉就不能放着不管。所以…我想再努把力，试着把它们一并修好。
