E: I can't let any robot go to waste if it can be repaired. So... I'm going to try to fix them all.

C: 欢迎回来，克拉拉、{NICKNAME}。我对该个体的进一步解析工作已经完成。
E: Welcome back, Clara. I've completed my further analysis of this robot.

C: 克拉拉觉得…这种「情感」，很温暖。克拉拉会不自觉地被它吸引，并试着用自己的方式给予反馈……
E: I feel... a warmth from these emotions. I feel drawn to this quality, and try to respond back in my own way...

C: 为了降低用户学习成本，贝洛伯格所有自动机兵在设计之初都装载了语言模拟功能。它们会通过读取预设参数，模拟人类自然交流情景，生成合适的应答选项。
E: To make life easier for users, all of Belobog's automatons contain language simulation abilities. They generate appropriate responses by reading preset parameters and mimicking natural human conversations.

C: 但它会忘记你，克拉拉。它会一遍又一遍地忘记你，还有它此前习得的一切。一切记忆，一切情感。
E: But he will forget about you, Clara. He will repeatedly forget you, as well as all the emotions and memories he has previously accumulated.

C: 这…这话我没法接呀，希露瓦大姐头还是这么犀利……
E: Well you see, I... Bah, you haven't changed Serval. Still nailing us to the wall...

C: 这证好久没见过了啊…禁区基本没有外人。
E: I haven't seen one of those for a long time. Hmm... The restricted zone virtually never allows outsiders in.

C: 就是，已经没有撤退的余地啦。
E: Exactly, we've got nowhere left to retreat.

C: 听说，杰帕德派了工程师来做紧急检修？
E: I heard Gepard sent mechanics for an emergency repair?

C: 结果还是要开打嘛…
E: Looks like this is gonna end in a fight after all...

C: 这个错误就由我来纠正！
E: An error only I can rectify!

C: 他们没有说谎，我向你保证。
E: They're not lying, I promise you.

C: 希露瓦，那个什么邓恩，你认识？
E: Serval, this Dunn, do you know him?

C: …你知道吗？热心市民擅闯军事禁区可是犯法的。
E: Hey... But you do know that it's still illegal for a good citizen to enter the military restricted zone, right?

C: 我、我只是……
E: Well... I...

C: ——我拼死拼活努力到现在，到底有什么意义…？
E: I've been working so hard... but what's the point?

C: 不。虽然记忆恢复了一部分…但我还是哪儿也去不了。
E: No. Even though I've got some of my memories back... I still can't go anywhere.

C: 嗯，我认为这就是最合适的时机。
E: Yes, I think this could well be the best time.

C: 既然是丹恒的猜想，十有八九没跑儿啦。但就算我们提前猜到了，现在也没办法打道回府啊。
E: Dan Heng's speculations are usually right on the money. But even if we've guessed right, we can't go home now.

C: 这个敌人很不一样呢！要不是知道它是裂界的产物，还以为是在和人类战斗哩。
E: This enemy is completely different! If I didn't know it was a product of the Fragmentum, I'd think we were fighting a human!
It?

C: 换句话说，{NICKNAME}——你的初次「开拓」之旅，运气好到爆棚啦！
E: Or to put it another way, {NICKNAME}... this is one heck of a first Trailblazing expedition! You hit the jackpot!

C: 那我将陷入痛苦之中——布洛妮娅，难以抹消的痛苦！
E: ...Then I would descend into torment, Bronya — enduring torment!

C: …你已经失去最后一个离开这里的机会了。
E: ...You lost your final chance to leave this place.

C: 这座城市在哭喊…「存护」的力量在消褪。
E: The city is drowning in tears... The power of the Preservation is fading.

C: 我已经很久…很久没见到过陌生人了。
E: I haven't seen a... stranger in a long, long time.

C: （刚才的推销员说「查宝」本该送往「黑塔」空间站……）
E: (Didn't the salesperson say that Findie was supposed to be taken to the Herta Space Station...)

C: 准备好了，咱们就开始。
E: We can start once you're ready.

C: 绿色的客运型通过了5艘。
E: You saw five green passenger starskiffs going past.

C: 你发现，蓝色的客运型通过了3艘。
E: You saw three blue passenger starskiffs going past.

C: 天舶司就在旁边…
E: The Sky-Faring Commission is just right over there...

C: 尝试着联系。
E: Try to contact this number.

C: 天舶司？这件事还要惊动天舶司吗？没有事故，俺身体没事儿，没有事故！
E: The Sky-Faring Commission? Does this need to involve the Sky-Faring Commission? Nothing happened! I feel fine! There's no incident!

C: …事情我都听檀檀说过了，没想到你才做了半天的测速员，就遭遇交通事故了。
E: I've heard all about it from Tantan. I didn't expect you to have a traffic accident after only half a day as a speed tester.

C: 西口的机巧鸟
E: Cycrane at the west entrance

C: 你以为你口说无凭讲了半天，我就信吗，这是法治社会，证据呢？
E: I'll believe you when I see the evidence. Where is the rule of law? Do you have any evidence to prove that?

C: 贝尼尼学士若是知道了我的收获，一定会嫉妒的。
E: Scholar Bernini will be so jealous once he finds out about what I've learned here.

C: 哎，我的医书啊！我宝贵的医书！「鹤运速递」不赔我个百八十万，这事我定和他们没完！
E: Oh, my textbooks! My precious textbooks! If Heron Express doesn't pay me a million or two, they'll never hear the end of it from me!

C: 没错。
E: That's right.

C: （直接打开它的后盖）
E: (Open up its back flap)

C: 为了「爱」，人类俗套借口中最俗套的一个。我的芯不能理解这个概念。
E: For Love: One of the tritest of all human triteness. My chip has no way of understanding this concept.

C: 老夫还得谢谢你手下留情了。
E: I still have to thank you for going easy on me.

C: 慢着！我就看一眼，我不会害你的。
E: Hold on! Let me just have a glimpse. I won't hurt you.

C: 但谁叫咱被赋予的第一使命就是干这个。
E: I have no choice, as this is the primary task assigned to me.

C: 仄仄平平仄仄平…但是你完全没有对上字义，我还是必须亲自将你赶走！
E: This clause has no meaning at all. I must oust you myself!

C: 真是…他的朋友跟他也是一个德行，一上来净问些令人尴尬的问题。
E: Oh, my... You're just like Cong. He always asks me questions that make me uncomfortable from the get-go.

C: 短生种恋人们可以许诺「天长地久、海枯石烂」…但活得足够久，你只会感受到时间将情感从我的生活中渐渐剥离。
E: Short-life species couples easily make promises about eternal love... But once you live long enough, you will discover how life slowly deprives you of your feelings.

C: 明白了，我去看看小聪的情况。
E: I get your point. Let me check on Cong.

C: 情感是可以跨越种族的。
E: Relationships can exist across species.

C: 法律说该怎么办就怎么办。
E: The law would inform what needs to be done.

C: 我没有这个打算。
E: I have no such plans.

C: 但是你必须停止继续角色扮演。
E: But you have to stop this role-playing act.

C: 这样做会有什么意义吗？
E: Is there any point in doing that though?

C: 陶德的自动笔记随着他的触碰开始迅速录入信息。
E: Todd's auto-note starts taking down information rapidly upon his touch.

C: （陶德给的坐标显示那标识就在附近，可是这里也不见有。）
E: (The coordinates given by Todd show that the marking is nearby, but I can't find it here.)

C: 至于知识，我可不会忘记博识学会的对等回报原则。不过还得再晚一些时候，待我将最近的研究成果进行一次总结，我再来和你分享。
E: As for the knowledge, I'll never forget the Intelligentsia Guild's rule of reciprocity. I'll summarize my recent research and share the results with you.

C: 陶德深深叹了一口气。
E: Todd sighs deeply.

C: 啧，总有不肯死心的学会探子认定联盟的禁忌只是自私自利的谎言……
E: Tsk, there's always a Guild scout who reckons that the Alliance's taboos are just hypocritical lies and not for them...

C: 他在找与我同高的丹鼎司女性。
E: He was looking for an Alchemy Commission woman "about the same height" as me.

C: 哈，真甜啊。
E: Ha, it's so sweet.

C: 我从来没有过自己想做的事，只是日复一日地从事着医护工作。
E: I never had anything I wanted to do. I just got on with my nursing work, day in and day out.

C: 你们能带我再去…确认一下吗？
E: Could you take me there? ...Just to confirm?

C: 闭嘴！安静地让白露大人治疗你！
E: Just shut up and let Lady Bailu heal you!

C: 真的吗？我认识的一个大人物说，人生是由后悔组成的。
E: Really? A great person once told me that a person's life is made up of regrets.

C: 事关持明一族的兴衰去向，有心人自然要生起左右它的念头。丹枫如此，龙师们如此，培养龙女的丹鼎司，亦不外如是。
E: Matters that concern the rise and fall of the Vidyadhara will inevitably attract certain parties — those that would work circumstances to their advantage. Be it Dan Feng, the Preceptors, or the Alchemy Commission that trained the Dragon Lady...

C: 你好哇，{NICKNAME}，好久不见，怎么你也来啦。
E: Hello there, {NICKNAME}. Long time no see — what are you doing here?

C: 我们在路上遇到了刺客。
E: We met an assassin on the way over.

C: 幸好二位身手高强，一切平安无事。这些人试图谋刺丹恒大人…想来是为了保护小姐的龙尊正统。
E: Fortunately, the skills of Master Dan Heng and his friend were too much for them. There are those that wish to assassinate Master Dan Heng, Miss... presumably to preserve your legitimacy as High Elder.

C: 你说的这些，可从来没人告诉过我。看来长老们早就心知肚明，我胜任不了这个位置。
E: News to me. The elders must be well aware that I'm not qualified for this position.

C: 这次「族内审判」是你最后的机会了，趁现在交出「化龙妙法」，龙师们还可以帮你把秘密悄悄地留下。
E: The upcoming trial is your final chance. Hand over the secrets of the Transmutation Arcanum now, and the Preceptors can help you keep your secret.

C: 「化龙妙法」里似乎潜藏着让持明族摆脱轮回，继续繁衍的秘密。但具体的细节，我也不明白。
E: The Transmutation Arcanum seems to contain a secret that allows the Vidyadhara to escape the cycle of reincarnation and return to normal reproduction... but the mechanism eludes me.

C: 这当然是因为…我们已在渡口处遭到过一次袭击了呀？我、我心中慌乱，怕这些家伙再对各位下毒手？
E: Oh, it's because... We were already attacked at the ferry, no? I—I was just worried that those people would try and attack you again...

C: 化形术？可是我的尾巴能动，能放电，还会疼。
E: Shape-shifting? But my tail can move, discharge electricity, feel pain...

C: 您记得咱们上次捕获的次元扑满吗？经过仔细检查，这只次元扑满并没有过人之处——它应该无法独力模拟云吟术。
E: Do you remember the Warp Trotter we caught last time? After a thorough examination, the Warp Trotter did not exhibit any extraordinary characteristics. It shouldn't have been capable of imitating the cloudhymn magic by itself.

C: 倒没有那么危险，我只是想有一种推测——一只次元扑满做不到的事，也许很多只扑满就能做到。
E: Certainly not to the same extent, but I've thought of a possibility - What a single Warp Trotter cannot accomplish can probably be done through the joint effort of multiple Warp Trotters.

C: 抱歉，用毫无根据的臆测让你和小三月陪我一起胡闹…之后在仙舟上请你俩吃点好吃的吧。
E: I owe you two an apology — my speculations have gotten us into a delicate situation... I'll treat you to some Xianzhou delicacies later.

C: 我的「直觉」。
E: Gut feeling.

C: 一二三四
罗刹从一家小客栈中走出来。身上没有携带什么繁重的行李。
E: Luocha walked out of a small inn without any heavy luggage.

C: 哎呀，小说！艺术创作嘛，谁知道是不是真的！反正写得很像那么回事。
E: Eh, it's just a novel — who knows if something like that could happen in reality. I thought of it as soon as I saw this footage, though.

C: 嗯？是志怪小说短篇集诶，感觉很适合睡前看…虽然看完可能会不敢上卫生间。
E: Huh? A supernatural tales anthology! Sounds like a good bedtime read... Might stop me daring to run to the bathroom at night though...

C: 嗷嗷嗷！看你细皮嫩肉，竟敢擅闯这里，今天就是你的末日！
E: RAAAAWWWWWRRRRR! You look like a tasty morsel! Those who dare to enter here must face a delicious fate!

C: 刚才…妈妈的秘书，夕葵小姐给我发短信…说之前在搭救我时，妈妈有一个随身的挂饰遗落在了迴星港……
E: It's Mom's secretary, Miss Xikui... She just sent me a message — Mom lost one of her trinkets in Stargazer Navalia when she came to save me...

C: 这是飞行士会挂在星槎舱室里用来祈求飞行好运的小东西。
E: This is what pilots hang in their starskiff cockpits for good luck.

C: 这件圣物一直存放在驭空司舵随身携带的挂饰中，晴霓小姐暂时交给了我们。
E: This object has been stored inside Helm Master Yukong's personal trinket all along — Miss Qingni lent it to us.

C: 算你识相。
E: Don't let us catch you nosying around here again!

C: 行了，天色也不早了，有什么话，回家再说吧。
E: Alright, it's getting late. Let's talk once we're home.

C: 但是，我不该因为自己的恐惧，就替别人下决定…即使那个人是我的女儿。
E: ...But I should never have allowed my fears to compel me to make decisions for another person... even if that person is my daughter.

C: 云骑！列阵！准备接战！
E: Cloud Knights! Formation! Prepare to engage!

C: 不，我是来拒绝你的。
E: No, I'm here to refuse your request.

C: 我不会留下。
E: No, I'm leaving.

C: （真话）我不在乎你。
E: (Truth) I don't care about you.

C: 有一天，艾利欧把你交给我。他说，如果按照他洞见的可能性继续下去，你最终会改变我，我也会改变你。
E: One day, Elio handed you over to me. He said that if things continued to transpire according to the future possibility he foresaw, you would eventually change me, and I would change you.

C: 我和萨姆按照艾利欧的指示找到了他，把他带回去。按艾利欧的说法，他的剑术和不死身有重要的用途，我知道的就这么多了。
E: Elio ordered Sam and me to find Bladie and return with him. According to Elio, Bladie's swordplay and immortality have important uses. That's all I know.

C: （瘫痪一台金人并没有想象中那么难嘛。）
E: (Dismantling an aurumaton is not as hard as I think.)

C: 哎呀，面对被星核猎手迷惑的敌人，我也不能下死手……
E: Ugh, I can't use deadly force — they've been bewitched by the Stellaron Hunters...

C: （揭发卡芙卡。）
E: (Report Kafka.)

C: 恩公误会，小女子也没有办法呀。易地而处，你也总会提防一下吧～
E: You misunderstand. If you were in my shoes right now, wouldn't you want to keep your guard up~?

C: 他们才不是什么怪物！
E: They were no monsters!

C: 我在前面开路，辛苦二位也留神四周啦。
E: I'll lead the way, you two keep an eye on our surroundings.

C: 长相和性格，也没有必然联系吧。
E: Bold of you to assume my appearance betrays my nature.

C: 不为别的，你我也许久没有比试过了。
E: It is of no importance... but you and I haven't had a decent contest in ages.

C: 加把劲啊，大姐姐！
E: Come on, already!

C: 能不能麻烦本事高强的丹恒先生跟我走一遭，去把药取来。
E: Dan Heng, you mind coming with me to retrieve my medicine? I could use your skills.

C: 我还没想清楚我该如何面对这些事情。但我想会继续旅行。
E: I haven't decided how I should confront all this... but I think I will continue my travels.

C: 他还活着？
E: He's still alive?

C: 如果我所记不差，七百年前，我们五人便是在这儿立下承诺，无论间关迢迢，都要相聚在此共饮一杯。
E: If I remember correctly, the five of us made a promise here seven centuries ago. We promised that no matter what happened, we would gather here together and share a drink.

C: 那要不要加派几个人给侍卫大人当援手？
E: ...Then shall we dispatch a few knights for this "operation" of yours?

C: 带我去见他，小弟弟。
E: Take me to him, young man.

C: 你们是谁，在这儿做什么？
E: Who are you and what are you doing here?

C: 这…这怎么可能？
E: But... how is that possible?

C: 以你的实力，就算遇见了刃，也不过死路一条。
E: Even with your strength, if you were to cross paths with Blade, it would mean death for you.

C: 不接！！！
E: I refuse!!!

C: 只是仙舟全然不在乎短生种的福祉啊！他们固执地禁绝走向长生的光荣之路。
E: The Xianzhou doesn't care one bit about the well-being of short-life species! They stubbornly blockade the glorious path to immortality.

C: 而仙舟人，他们渴求「治愈」魔阴身的折磨——虽然我们认为那并非折磨，更像是某种进化的恩赐。
E: ...As for Xianzhou natives — they long to cure themselves of the torture of becoming mara-struck. Of course, we know that this "torture" is rather a kind of blessed evolution.

C: 好的…好的…那让我先做一下心理准备，这总可以吧？我以前也没干过这种事啊……
E: I... Fine, fine — but at least let me prepare. I've never done anything like this before...

C: 我倒是无所谓，这要问你的对手……
E: Very well, but you'll need to ask your opponent, too...

C: 你能理解吗？我的枪术越是精进，就越是觉得自己可悲。越接近顶峰，就越是能清楚地看到那层无法击碎的玻璃天花板！
E: You understand, right? The more I devoted myself to the spear, the more I lamented my condition. The closer I came to the peak, the clearer my limits became.

C: 混账！你考验半天，考验了个什么东西？这样明晃晃的一个卧底就让你放进来了！
E: ...Idiot! What kind of trials are you running? You let an agent infiltrate our ranks!?

C: 看到你平安无事，我就放心了。
E: I'm glad to see you've returned in one piece.

C: {NICKNAME}，你做得对。寿瘟祸祖就是这样，用「力量」和「生命」做诱饵，让无数像执信这样原本前途光明的人走上一条不归路。
E: {NICKNAME}, you did the right thing. I'm afraid this is how the Plagues Author operates — using notions of power and life to draw countless people like Zhixin away from bright futures... down a path of no return.

C: 总而言之，目前还没有人能像你一样深入核心，拿到这么多一手资料。
E: The point is, there hasn't been anyone like you who managed to delve into the group's core and obtain so much firsthand information.

C: 好的，下次再见。有空的时候记得帮我找那几位丹士问问药方的事，我现在脱不开身。
E: Very well, see you soon. Remember to look for those alchemists when you have time — ask them about the prescription. I can't leave my post right now.

C: 吾有个妹妹，汝让吾想起了她。
E: I have a younger sister. You remind me of her.

C: 有人抹去了三月的回忆…
E: Someone erased March's memory...

C: 阵法已经准备就绪了。三月小姐，你准备好了吗？
E: The Matrix has cleared diagnostics. Miss March, are you ready yet?

C: 如果回溯到了那个阻塞你回忆的关隘，穷观阵就会利用已经获得的信息进行推演，构建出你可能存在的过去。
E: If you reach a block in your memory, the Matrix will use the data gathered to derive a scenario, and construct a possible past for you.

C: 好生气啊！竟然站在这里睡着了！天底下怎么会有这种人啊！
E: Ugh, what's his deal? Who falls asleep standing up anyway!?

C: 这个我知道，这个是贝洛伯格的加热器！嗯…等一下，贝洛伯格的加热器为什么会出现在行医集市？
E: I know what this is! It's a Belobog heater! Umm... Wait a minute, what's a Belobog heater doing at the Healer's Market?

C: 不，还不能这么断言…只能说，很可能是一位星神封印了你的记忆，但祂未必是流光天君。
E: No, it's too early to draw such a conclusion... All I can say is that it was very likely an Aeon that sealed away your memories... but not necessarily Fuli.

C: 也许「信使」所说的「保护」，就是在暗示流光天君并非封印你记忆的罪魁祸首。祂插手只是为了保护你不被封印的记忆所伤害……
E: When the messenger spoke of "protection," perhaps she meant the following: The Glowswather wasn't the one who sealed away your memories. THEY are interfering to shield you from these very memories.

C: 所以，我也算是能理解她吧。
E: So, I can understand where she's coming from.

C: 她是担心咱们俩吃不下…
E: She's worried we won't be able to finish it all...

C: 所以，我一直对你的剑很感兴趣：重量分布是否均匀，用什么材质铸成，嵌入何种机巧，又以什么样的剑法运使……
E: So, I've always been curious about your sword — how the weight is distributed, what material it's made of, whether it contains any special ingenia, and what kind of sword techniques you use...

C: 演武仪典召开，罗浮上来了不少异邦外域的客人。像我身边这位，是来自遥远星辰卡勒瓦拉的客人，帕沃尔先生。
E: Yes, with the Wardance approaching, many guests from afar are pouring in. Mr. Paavo here is one of them. He's from the distant planet Kalevala.

C: 对吧对吧，还真得感谢三月七逃课，咱俩才有机会能凑上这场热闹。
E: I know, right? Thanks to March 7th skipping class, we get to join in on the fun.

C: *吸鼻子的声音*
E: *sniffle*

C: 不过我想，若将魔剑长留在此，也是对罗浮不好交代。权衡之下，不如将魔剑熔了，让我一人来承担。
E: But leaving that cursed sword here will also make things difficult for the Luofu. So all things considered, the best outcome is for me to melt that sword down and take all the blame.

C: 你很敏锐，你说那是难言之隐也没有错……
E: You're sharp. Yeah, you could say it's a sensitive topic...

C: 那些大英雄大豪杰里，多的是杀人盈野的刽子手。只因他们是历史的胜利者，便得到了英雄的美称。
E: Most of those so-called "great heroes" were heartless killers. They are only called heroes because they won.

C: 这样吧，明天我会找个时间和爷爷开诚布公地聊一聊。在他说出理由前，我暂时不会对孤云出手。
E: Well, I'll have an honest conversation with Grandpa tomorrow, and I won't take any action against Guyun until he gives me his reasons.

C: 云璃，千万小心。
E: Just be careful, Yunli.

C: 你答应在你绝望的时候，会将身体交给我的。
E: You promised that you'd give your body to me when you couldn't handle things anymore.

C: 现在，战斗结束了…你听见了吗？
E: Now, the war is finally over... Can you hear?

C: 谋杀…这个词对我们太陌生了。在家族的保护下，匹诺康尼不可能出现任何伤亡。
E: Murder... Such a foreign word to us. The people of Penacony could never come to any harm while under the watchful protection of The Family.

C: 为什么不能呢？
E: Why not?

C: 「入住酒店时，你就在偷看我。来到梦境后，我去哪，你就跟到哪：商业街的橱窗里，艾迪恩公园的水面下，甚至酒杯的倒影里，无处不在！」
E: "You stole a glance at me when you first entered the hotel. You followed me wherever I went inside the dreamscape: In the windows along the commercial street, in the pondwater reflections of the Aideen Park, even in the reflections of the wine glass... Everywhere!"

C: 那俩东西一直不肯说话，不知道二位能否撬开它们的嘴。
E: Those two have clammed up. I wonder if you two could help pry open their mouths.

C: 哟，寒腿叔叔，你怎么叛变了？
E: Mr. Cold Feet — Why did you do it?

C: 这、这不是怕二位没能察觉花火小姐的巧思，误以为她随便扔了个没用的线索……
E: Th—That's just in case you didn't realize the ingenuity of Miss Sparkle, and were worried about her throwing out a random useless clue...

C: 也可能只是这人的画技非同凡响。
E: Perhaps it's just that this person's drawing skills are extraordinary.

C: 黑天鹅小姐，桑博先生，你们终于来了！我是匹诺康尼的「名侦探」，旁边这位是我的「侦探助手」。
E: Miss Black Swan, Mr. Sampo: You're finally here! I am the famed detective of Penacony, and next to me here is my assistant detective.

C: 我赶忙抓起一旁的画布为花火大人止血，可…哎，可怜的花火大人，还是永远离开了我们！
E: Thinking quickly, I grabbed the artist's canvas to staunch Miss Sparkle's blood, but... Alas, poor Miss Sparkle. She's left us now, forever!

C: 当时在现场的，除了我俩和管家钟珊，还有厨师佐罗和司机阿佑…哎，黑天鹅小姐，你要做什么？
E: Besides us and Zhongshan the butler, Lefton the cook and Wright the driver were also at the scene of the crime... What would you like to do?

C: 过奖了。
E: It's an honor.

C: 如此境地，还要处理将军交来的星核猎手，可不是大祸临头？
E: And on top of all that, General, we still have to deal with the Stellaron Hunter you handed to us. If that's not an utter disaster, then I don't know what is.

C: 早知道，我就该留在那儿继续打牌……
E: I'm gonna ask more questions next time... I could be playing celestial jade right now.

C: 早知道，我就该留在那儿继续打牌……
E: I'm gonna ask more questions next time... I could be playing celestial jade right now.

C: 所谓「察宙合之势」，听说这座阵基是专用来调取「时间」相关的信息。
E: "Observes the potential of the temporal plane." They say this terminal is designed to retrieve information related to time.

C: 那就请太卜见证我的命运。
E: Then please, Master Diviner, witness my destiny.

C: 想从卡芙卡那里知道的事，现在就去问吧。
E: If there are questions you want Kafka to answer, now's the time.

C: 将军，这时候就别慢悠悠的了！「建木」那里……
E: General, we must retain all urgency! The Ambrosial Arbor...

C: 看出来了，您从头到尾还真是不拿我们当外人。
E: You've never really seen us as outsiders, huh.

C: 到底是将军，挺会差遣人。
E: Errands received, General.

C: 自帝弓司命出手斫断「建木」，它已枯死数千载之久。
E: Thousands of years have passed since the Reignbow Arbiter felled the Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 唉，恩公在「流云渡」的港口救我一命，我这回就当是报答诸位了。
E: *sigh* You did save my life at Cloudford... Consider this my returning the favor.

C: 枝叶开花了？大家小心。
E: They're flowering? Watch out — all of you.

C: 结果了？好大的桃子啊…有点想摘一个尝尝。
E: Huh? Peaches? I am kinda hungry...

C: 让我瞧瞧她的报告……
E: Let me see her report...

C: 一定要我去吗？
E: Why me?

C: 就是就是！
E: Yeah!

C: 而从那以后，这重获光明的片刻，反而变成了……永久灼痛我的记忆。
E: That brief window of sight that I regained has turned into a perpetual source of anguish — forever etched into my mind...

C: 你向青镞讲述了与丹枢之间发生的一切。
E: You recount everything that happened between you and Dan Shu to Qingzu.

C: 喜欢哪位神祇，讨厌哪位神祇，这都是你的自由。但是……
E: It's up to you to decide how you feel toward each deity, but...

C: 你是说食肉植物？那倒确实是「凶猛的植物」，但大部分都不怎么濒危呀。如果你去过翁瓦克就会知道，那儿的肉食性王冠花到处都是。
E: Do you mean a carnivorous plant? That's indeed a ferocious plant, but I don't think they are endangered species. If you've been to Vonwacq, you'll know it's full of carnivorous crown flowers.

C: 走吧，出发去贝洛伯格！
E: Let's set off to Belobog!

C: 军爷我冤枉啊…那真不是我的错，这都是冬妮娅和贝娜的错……
E: Sir, I'm innocent... It's all Tonya's and Benna's fault...

C: 他们走了也不会通知你啊。
E: I don't think they would notify you before leaving.

C: （不知不觉间，我又回来了？）
E: (What is going on? I looped back again?)

C: 灵、灵符，听我号令！
E: T—Talismans. On my command!

C: 也许只是一场虚惊？
E: Maybe it was just a false alarm?

C: 好…好奇。
E: ...Sure.

C: 要和我一起再探绥园吗？我保证这次咱们俩一定能挖出其中的真相。
E: Wanna explore Fyxestroll Garden with me? I KNOW we're gonna get to the truth this time.

C: 你想必听过…银河球棒侠。
E: You must have heard of... the Galactic Baseballer.

C: 老子就是岁阳，就是你以为的幽灵鬼怪，看明白了吗？看明白了就滚！
E: I'm a heliobus! We're not ghosts. Got it? Now scram!

C: 这{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}挺有眼力见。
E: Finally, someone with common sense.

C: 若用比喻来说，它们就像喜爱追逐热源的飞蛾。只不过这「热源」不是别的，而是有情生灵的思想。
E: Metaphorically speaking, they are like moths to a flame... but that flame is the thoughts of sentient beings.

C: 呜哇啊啊～怎、怎怎怎么了吗？
E: Wahhhh! Wh—Wh—What's happening?

C: 前面就有一个判官，你怕了！
E: There's a judge up ahead. What, are you scared?

C: 我要带那姑娘一起离开。
E: I'm getting her out of here, too.

C: 听听浮烟的计划。
E: Let's listen to Cirrus's plan.

C: 哎哟，真是个死脑筋。那么今天就只好吃亏一点，做一趟货到付款的买卖了。偃偶，要守信喔。
E: How conventional. Fine, I accept... but you better keep your promise, puppet.

C: 我会对那些冥差手下留情的。
E: I'll go easy on the spiritfarers.

C: {NICKNAME}！藿藿！谢天谢地，你们平安无事，真是太好啦！
E: {NICKNAME}! Huohuo! I'm so glad you're okay!

C: 对了，十王司联系了桂乃芬小姐的朋友素裳。我现在走不开，只好麻烦你去向素裳小姐解释解释，好让她放下心来。
E: Oh, the Ten-Lords Commission contacted Miss Guinaifen's friend — Miss Sushang. I can't leave my post, so... could you let Miss Sushang know what happened...? She'll be relieved.

C: 看看这双黑色的靴子。
E: I'd like to take a look at this pair of black boots.

C: 工作体面，收入丰厚，却总是被这样的问题困扰，真令人捉摸不透。
E: She has a decent job and great income, but is always plagued by such problems — it really baffles me.

C: 那种东西…我再也不需要了…再也……
E: That thing... I don't need it ever again... Never again...

C: 我…没想过那么远的事情。现在，我只是单纯喜欢唱歌而已。
E: I... haven't thought that far yet. For now, I just simply love to sing.

C: 时间不早，我先下班了。下个系统时的轮班安排，还有那份报表，就拜托你啦。
E: It's getting late. I'm clocking out. I'll leave the next system hour's shift schedule and that report to you. Thanks.

C: 还有，我这几天已经听到不止一个人反映，你恶意抢走他们的老客户，破坏了同事间的合作氛围。实话说，我对你相当失望……
E: Also, I've already received more than one complaint these past few days from other employees that you maliciously stole away their loyal customers and damaged our work culture. To be honest, I'm quite disappointed in you...

C: 要说撒谎，这整片梦境不就是一个家族建造出来的美丽谎言吗？醒醒吧，没人在乎你说的不是不是实话，只要能吸引人买单就够了。
E: Speaking of lies, isn't this entire Dreamscape a beautiful lie spun by The Family? Wake up. No one cares if what you say is true, as long as you can get people to foot the bill.

C: 对不起，我没有选择。
E: I'm sorry. I had no choice.

C: 柯柯娜直直地盯着眼前的植物，仿佛她的灵魂已经被埋进那片黑暗的土壤。
E: Cocona stares blankly at the plant before her, as if her soul had been buried in that blackened soil.

C: …都是瞬间涌现的自我感动罢了。你们不可能理解，那不是在帮我…不是……
E: ...They're all just trying to do something in the spur of the moment to feel good about themselves. None of you can understand. You're not helping me... No...

C: 「请闭上眼睛，再往前看」
E: "Close your eyes and look ahead."

C: 据说爆炸发生时，恰好有一艘「纯美骑士团」的飞船掠过「星云之末」号。一位高尚勇敢的骑士义无反顾地冲入了灾难现场，搜索残留的生命迹象。
E: I was told that when the explosion occurred, there was a spaceship named the Knights of Beauty that happened to be passing by Nebula's End. At that moment, a heroic knight boldly charged into the scene of the disaster without concern for his own safety and searched for signs of remaining life.

C: 有很多人为了体验「梦境乐园」不惜付出一切代价，哪怕闹得倾家荡产也要来到匹诺康尼……
E: Many people are willing to pay any price to experience the "Dreamscape." They go as far as to spend every penny to their name just to be in Penacony...

C: 所以我不想袖手旁观。我会出现在这里，并非出自我个人的意愿…何时「来」，我决定不了；何时「去」，我想自己做主。
E: So, I do not wish to sit idly by. It was not my personal will that I would appear in this place... Though I could not decide when I "came," I would like to make my own decision on when I "go."

C: 我们…我们还有很多电影没一起看过。
E: We... We still have so many films we haven't watched together.

C: …莱斯利先生？
E: ...Mr. Lesley?

C: 可是您已经一整天都……
E: But you haven't eaten anything all day...

C: …不，芙洛拉，我不会走的。
E: ...No. Flora, I will not go.

C: 请问吧。
E: Ask away.

C: 由于合同条款的限制，<color=#dbc291ff>确定聘用当前大副后，不可更换大副人选。</color>除非大副犯有严重过失，否则随意解雇将面临高额的赔偿费用。这请您注意。
E: According to the clause's restrictions imposed by the agreement, <color=#dbc291ff>once you employ the current first mate, you are prohibited from changing your selection.</color> Unless the first mate commits an act of gross misconduct, the unprofessional dismissal of your first mate will incur a massive compensation fee. Please take note of that.

C: …果然还是钟表小子。
E: ...I guess it still has to be Clockie.

C: …钟表小子。
E: ...Clockie.

C: 您好，我想办理入住！
E: Hello, I'd like to check in!

C: 您原本预订的是一间经济客房，现在我们可以免费为您升级为「豪华客房」、「高级客房」或者「白金客房」！
E: You booked an economy room to begin with, but we are now able to upgrade you to a Deluxe Suite, an Executive Suite, or a Platinum Suite — free of charge!

C: 宝了个贝的，你就不能——
E: Fork me, you can't just...

C: 你试图在两位公司高管针锋相对之时寻找时机插入自己的见解……
E: You try finding an opportunity to inject your own insight into this confrontation between two IPC senior executives...

C: 没想到退个房居然要折腾这么久…我得考虑收回之前的offer了。
E: Never thought checking out would take so long... I have to think about taking my previous offer off the table.

C: …啊，弗雷迪，没关系！这位{F#女士}{M#先生}是我的朋友。
E: ...Ah, Freddy, it's okay! This {F#lady}{M#gentleman} is my friend.

C: 幸好最后没有人受伤…抱歉，我当时的状态不好，招待不周，希望各位不要介意。
E: Thankfully, no one was hurt in the end... Sorry for my bad hospitality at that time because I was feeling under the weather. I hope you all don't mind.

C: …很显然，她完全没能理解你想要传达的意思。试试别的法子吧……
E: ...Obviously, you two have got your wires crossed. Let's try another way...

C: 唔…此、此乃我等修行路上的小小障碍，不要让这几个卑劣的恶徒阻拦了你们开悟的道路！
E: Um... Th—This is just a small hurdle on our path to cultivation. Don't let these despicable thugs impede your enlightenment!

C: 还不打算动起来啊？时间不多咯！
E: Still not moving? There isn't much time left for you!

C: 四下看看吧，朋友！给自己一点时间，给心灵开一扇窗，让信仰的光辉沁润你疲惫的灵魂……
E: Feel free to look around, my friend! Allow yourself some time, open the window to your heart, and let your weary soul bask in the light of faith...

C: 紧紧跟随不许多想…
E: Just follow the master tight, no excess thoughts allowed...

C: 一艘星槎静静地停靠过来，从舱门里走出来的正是你们熟悉的符玄太卜。
E: A starskiff silently pulls to a stop as the familiar figure of Master Diviner Fu Xuan emerges from the hatch.

C: 遗作？公输师傅啊啊我来晚了…
E: Legacy work? What happened to Master Gongshu?

C: 要是铖杰说「啊，我突然想起那份邀请函也很重要」，你要怎么办，我反正不会再回来了，这多累呀。
E: What would you do if Chengjie said, "Oh, I suddenly remembered. That invite is also important"? I wouldn't want to keep running back and forth. It's gonna be so tiring.

C: 星槎培育大体上可以分为四个阶段——萌芽阶段、雏形阶段、育成阶段、以及成型阶段。你现在看到的就是萌芽阶段。
E: There are four main stages in the growth of a starskiff: The germination phase, the embryonic phase, the nutritive phase, and the forming phase. What you're seeing right now is the germination phase.

C: 不过，很多非法改造星槎的人会借此钻空子，他们会把军用斗舰的玦轮装在民用星槎上…出事故的人也不在少数，毕竟那是不符合规格的做法，很危险。
E: But lots of illegal modders will exploit this, installing military-grade jade wheels onto civilian starskiffs... And many have paid the price with their lives. After all, it's all illegal and highly dangerous.

C: 从刚才起，我就一直在想，还有什么能够超越时间的桎梏？
E: From that moment on, I've been constantly wondering, is there anything that can transcend the confines of time?

C: 我就知道太卜大人把我支到工造司来肯定没有什么简单的工作。
E: I knew it was gonna be trouble when the master diviner assigned me to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 等星槎造成的那一天，你会觉得一切是有回报的！为了纪念咱俩的努力，我会在船身上刻下它的名字「莱恩师傅、铖杰与{NICKNAME}号」。
E: Your effort will pay off the day the starskiff is made! To commemorate our hard work, I'll engrave the name — "Ryan, Chengjie & {NICKNAME}" — on the ship.

C: 来，喝口这个压压惊。这是我答应给你的仙人快乐茶，每天一杯，干活不累。
E: Here you go, this is the Immortal's Delight that I promised you. One cup a day, all work is just play.

C: 是这个道理，我也知道。靠着喊口号，自我勉励，始终是有极限的，为什么其他工匠师傅能持之以恒地做下去呢？
E: I know. There's only so much that self-motivation can do. I wonder how other craftsmen manage to stick with their jobs so persistently.

C: 莱恩老师是短生种的天才，而我只是一个不成器的学徒，如果说谁做错了，那毫无疑问就是我做错了嘛。
E: While Master Ryan was a genius, I am just an incompetent apprentice. It's easy to see who's more likely to mess up.

C: 没错，拜托你了！
E: Bingo. Please take care of the jade abacus!

C: 又被你算到了？
E: Did you foresee our visit?

C: 「总有一天，我也要将我师傅的梦想之船造出来，轻轻将它推出去，让它在星槎海最繁荣的航道里飞行！」
E: "One day, I'll build my master's dream starskiff, push it out gently, and set it sailing in the busiest lane of Starskiff Haven!"

C: 我也会提供帮助的。
E: I'll help you out.

C: 唉，早知如此，不召唤他来…
E: If I'd known that, I wouldn't have summoned his master...

C: 原来他是这样的人…
E: Guess that kind of sums him up, huh...

C: …可能是因为刚从擂台上下来，兴奋劲还没过？不过卢卡做事一向风风火火，我早就习惯了。
E: ...Maybe he's on a victory high? Or maybe not. Either way, it's classic Luka.

C: 也许聚落里真有机器人高手。
E: Maybe there's a true robotics master in the settlement.

C: 被跟踪目标发现了，行动失败…再尝试一次吧。
E: You were discovered by the target... maybe give it another try.

C: 都说只要一不留神，小娃娃会突然长成熟人也认不出的样子来。彦卿，你是不是…长高了一点儿？
E: They say kids grow up really fast. Yanqing, are you a little bit taller than before?

C: 抱歉，连续几站的冒险让我养成了警惕的习惯，每个地方第一个出现迎接我们的人，都要当心。
E: Sorry, but after our previous adventures, I've become suspicious of whoever greets us first.

C: 嗯，曜青仙舟是联盟巡猎孽物的锋镝，常年在外征战四方。虽说同属联盟，但我对那里知道的也不算多。
E: Yeah, the Xianzhou Yaoqing is a major force in hunting down abominations and is always engaged in conflicts across the cosmos. Although it's a member of the Xianzhou Alliance, I don't know much about it.

C: 我们和你一起去。
E: We'll go with you.

C: 嗯，这才对。你可得小心了，我不像步离人那般好对付。
E: Well, that's more like it. Just be careful, because I'm not as easy to handle as the borisin.

C: 彦卿小朋友已经能为你分忧解难。反倒是云璃，始终是孩子心性，对剑以外的事情一概不感兴趣。老朽此番带云璃来参加演武仪典，也是想让这孩子见见世面。
E: Yanqing can understand your concerns. On the other hand, Yunli is still a naive girl who's only interested in swordplay. Honestly, I brought her here to participate in the Wardance because I want to broaden her horizons.

C: 这把剑怕是要不回来了！
E: I don't think you'll ever get your sword back!

C: 你也别这么想嘛！大人们的事本来就该大人们来操心。何况眼下你能为你家将军做些什么呢？
E: Come on! Don't think like that! Leave the adult matters to the adults. Even if you wanted to do something for the general, it's not like you can do anything.

C: 谢了，老兄。
E: Thanks, bro.

C: 这可是个好机会？我记得你提过自己想学什么剑招来着？
E: Isn't this a perfect chance for you? I remember you mentioning that you wanted to learn some sword moves.

C: 呃，好像是有这么回事。但这事情太突然了吧？
E: Yeah, I did say that, but this is all happening so quickly, don't you think?

C: 客气了，几句问话而已。
E: No worries. Answering a few questions is no big deal.

C: 椒丘。受曜青仙舟丹鼎司的派遣，他已是我的幕僚和随身医士。这些年他一直在想法子控制我的「病情」。这么多年过去了，我还活得好好的，他功不可没。
E: Jiaoqiu. He's been my retainer and personal healer, delegated by the Alchemy Commission from the Xianzhou Yaoqing. Over the years, he's dedicated himself to managing my "condition." It's thanks to him that I'm still in good health today.

C: 不着急！慢慢准备！
E: No rush! Take your time!

C: 罗浮剑术讲究剑走轻灵。
E: Luofu swordplay is all about being swift and agile in your movements.

C: 心诚意正，来啦！
E: With a true heart and focused mind — here I come!

C: 左青龙，右白虎，少吃碳水化合物！
E: Azure Dragon, White Tiger, eating less carbs!

C: 远远看来，倒也不算特别。
E: It doesn't look all that impressive from this distance.

C: 每天都能感觉自己在不断变强、变强、再变强一点…一次次将胜利握在手里，世界上没有比这更快乐的事情了。
E: Each day, I could feel myself getting stronger and stronger... and I racked up countless victories. It's the best feeling in the world.

C: 事情…似乎有点蹊跷。换个地方说话。
E: Something smells fishy... Let's talk somewhere else.

C: 末度大人已经准备妥当了…
E: Lord Mok Tok has already prepared everything...

C: 两位无名客的回答倒是颇为坦诚，就算其中有些难以解释的细节，但以我的直觉看来，倒也没什么不妥。
E: The two Nameless have been honest in their answers. Even though there are some tricky details, my intuition tells me there is nothing wrong.

C: 这里…还是和过去一样冷。
E: This place... it's still as cold as it used to be.

C: 一旦进入幽囚狱，可用之「兵」到处都是。
E: Once we were inside The Shackling Prison, we found "soldiers" available for us everywhere.

C: 什么鬼！
E: What the heck!?

C: 也许，曜青的使节可以为了活下来和我们做笔交易，用他的身份帮助我们离开仙舟。我说的对吗，椒丘先生？
E: Maybe this Yaoqing messenger can strike a deal in exchange for his life. He can use his status to help us escape from the Xianzhou. What do you think, Mr. Jiaoqiu?

C: 莫非要我代替彦卿守擂？
E: Are you suggesting that I take Yanqing's place as ringmaster?

C: 莫非怀炎将军打算亲自上阵？
E: Are you planning to take up the role of the ringmaster yourself, General Huaiyan?

C: 他们举止古怪。出于好奇，我们追踪了那几人，结果发现他们竟然是伪装成狐人的步离人！
E: They were acting strange, so out of curiosity, we decided to follow them. It turns out that they were actually borisin disguised as foxians!

C: 按照彦卿骁卫的报告，他在迴星港发现几个来历不明的狐人，一番追踪后察觉对方是由步离人伪装。这是其中一人的遗体。
E: According to Lieutenant Yanqing's report, he stumbled upon a few suspicious foxians at Stargazer Navalia. After following them, he discovered that they were actually borisin in disguise. This is one of the bodies.

C: 灵砂小姐对于这一处置有莫大的误解，容我慢慢道来。
E: It seems you have a major misunderstanding about this arrangement, Miss Lingsha. Allow me to explain it to you.

C: 而今丹鼎司的情况错综复杂，联盟将你派来挑起这桩苦差事，是省了我的心。难道我不应该谢你吗？
E: And now, with the complicated situation in the Alchemy Commission, the Alliance has spared me a lot of trouble by sending you to handle this challenging task. Shouldn't I be thanking you instead?

C: 那个叫貊泽的曜青使者说过，来劫狱的犯人共有两拨。除去步离人外，还有一群能隐藏行迹的魔阴身。他所指的应该就是这些人了。
E: The messenger named Moze did say that there were two groups of attackers. The other attackers, aside from the borisin, could hide their tracks. I believe he was referring to these people.

C: 可悲的狐人，数千年来，是我们允许你们苟活，是我们给了你们文明。但为了仙舟人承诺的自由，你们最终还是选择了背叛。
E: You pathetic foxians. For thousands of years, we were the ones who allowed you to live and who granted you civilization, but in the end, you chose to betray us for the "freedom" promised by the Xianzhou people.

C: 由于被步离人搜过身的缘故，你身无分文。
E: You were searched by the borisin, and now you have no money on you.

C: 不好意思，执事和执事官被调去援助演武仪典工作了，地衡司公廨暂不开放。
E: I'm sorry, but the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery is currently closed. All the officers and officials have been reassigned to assist in the Wardance.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>有步离人躲在这里。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>Borisin are hiding nearby.</color>

C: 你在这儿等我一会好嘛？我找个士兵过来。
E: Will you please wait here for a while? I'll find a soldier.

C: 我…一定会把她带回来的！
E: I... I will bring her back!

C: 这也是我暂时留着你的原因，我会向你展示步离人对仇敌的最大敬意：
E: That's why I'm keeping you alive for now. I want to show you how borisin truly respect their enemies.

C: （仔细观察对方的武器）
E: (Carefully observe their weapon)

C: 其实我是来知己知彼的……
E: I'm actually just here to learn about my opponents...

C: 走，让我们去选手大厅转转。
E: Come, let's take a look around the contestant hall.

C: 呼雷计划袭击罗浮仙舟上的闹市。
E: Hoolay is planning on attacking the bustling streets of the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 各位，听我命令。我会坐镇星槎海，疏散人群，应对所有可能到来的袭击。我会倾全力迎战，确保地面的安全。
E: Everyone, listen up. I will personally take charge of Starskiff Haven, evacuate the people, and prepare for any possible attacks. I will do my best to ensure that things are safe on the ground.

C: 是飞霄射出的「箭」，天知道这一回她是拿什么东西当作箭矢射到了这儿。
E: That was one of Feixiao's "arrows." Who knows what she used as an arrow to fire all the way over here.

C: 好不容易让她没有那么紧张了，现在就不去打扰她了。
E: It took enough time to calm her nerves, it's best I don't disturb her again now.

C: 谁会在这个时候登舰？位置在哪，我去检查一下。
E: Who would be boarding the ship at this time? Where are they? I'll go check it out.

C: 现在，尽情逃跑吧！
E: Now, run for your lives!

C: 刚才的震动…到底是什么情况？似乎整座舰船渐渐慢了下来？
E: That jolt just now... what's going on? It feels like the entire ship has started to slow down?

C: *咆哮*
E: *roar*

C: 可是…神从未回应我。
E: But... THEY ignored my prayers.

C: 灵砂拜见龙师长老，久疏问候。妾身这一次来，还带上了一位朋友，说起来他应当不算外人。
E: Greetings, my honored Preceptor. It's been a while since we last touched base. I've brought a friend with me today. I believe you're already familiar with each other.

C: 虽不意外，但我仍感痛心。
E: This is not unexpected, but it still brings me pain.

C: 你…你居然亲自来了？！
E: You... you actually came here in person!?

C: 你这人嘴巴太松了吧！
E: You really can't keep your mouth shut, can you?

C: 对了，那个眯眯眼的狐狸医士，还有那个戴兜帽的家伙……
E: What about that smiley fox healer and the guy with the hood...

C: 你家狗丢了？
E: Your dog's gone missing?

C: 你来了，朕的灰骑士。在我们的努力下，那两位年轻人总算是没有耽误事。
E: You've come, my Gray Knight. With our efforts, those two young men finally got their business settled.

C: 朕有一计…他们每次都在朕落单时袭击朕。过一会儿，朕假装落单，你偷偷跟在朕的身后，等那几个袭击者出现，一举抓住他们！
E: I have a plan... They usually wait till I'm alone to ambush me. In just a bit, I'll pretend to be alone, and you hide behind me. When those assailants appear, we'll arrest the lot of them!

C: 此处平时人烟稀少，朕在这里被他们袭击过。灰骑士，你先躲藏起来，朕如果遇袭，你就出来抓人。
E: This spot is usually quite deserted — I was ambushed by them here once. Gray Knight, look for a place to hide. If I'm ambushed, that's your cue to capture them.

C: 晓之以理动之以情，这些事那些大臣都做过，可都没办法说服他。直接去和他摆事实讲道理，大概也不会有什么用。
E: One must know the reason to move the heart. Those high officials have done this sort of stuff before, but none was able to move him. It probably wouldn't work either to verbally spar with him using facts and reason.

C: 陛下，就算你再怎么说，那也不是我做的！
E: Your Majesty, even if you say that, I did not do it!

C: 她并非生性残暴。
E: She was not born cruel.

C: 你为朕操劳了那么久，朕希望好好嘉奖你一番。
E: You've toiled so long for me. I hope to reward you lavishly.

C: 想和你聊聊。
E: I want to have a chat with you.

C: …嘀嗒！快过来，快过来！
E: ...Tick tock! Over here! Quickly!

C: 我很想和你多聊聊，孩子。但你不能在这里久留…猎犬家系从来不会警告同一个人两次。
E: I'd really love to talk to you more, but you can't stay here for long... The Bloodhound Family never gives second warnings.

C: 我…似乎想起来了一些事，某些东西开始向外涌现了。
E: My memory... seems to be coming back. Things are coming out in a surge.

C: 不必着急，黑塔。假设：查德威克已经在匹诺康尼的梦境中滞留了上万个系统时，那我们也不必为这短短数分钟的探讨感到紧张。
E: There's no rush, Herta. Assumption: If Chadwick has been stuck in Penacony for tens of thousands of system hours, I think we can afford a couple of minutes to discuss the issue.

C: 我的名字是螺丝咕姆，女士。请原谅我不请自来，也没有办理入住手续——您在家族的「永久贵宾名单」上应该能找到我的名字。
E: My name is Screwllum, Madam. Please forgive me for coming here uninvited and without checking in. You should be able to see my name on the "Permanent VIP List" of The Family.

C: 我很高兴你愿意陪我说话…但你不该来这儿。莫伊拉，还有其他那些猎犬，他们不会乐意看到你的。
E: I'm happy you're willing to talk to me, but you shouldn't come here. Moira, and the rest of the Bloodhounds for that matter, won't be pleased to see you.

C: ——我们不会被任何人记得。
E: ...No one will remember us.

C: 不管我躲到银河的哪个角落，公司都会找到我的…这是早晚的事。我不可能一直逃下去，但我还有别的方式反抗。
E: No matter where I hide, the IPC will find me. It's just a matter of time. I can't be on the run forever, so I need to fight back in some way.

C: 真是个奇迹。就靠着忆质里残留的那一丝丝自我，他居然能跟公司抗衡到现在…我当年果真没看错人。
E: This is such a miracle. It's hard to believe he has managed to resist the IPC until now with what little consciousness remaining in his memoria... I was right about him back then.

C: 当时听{NICKNAME}小鬼提到他的下落，我还以为终于有机会能接触到他的研究了…可惜，没想到最后事情竟会如此发展。
E: When {NICKNAME} told me about him, I thought I would finally have the chance to learn about his research... It's a pity that things turned out this way.

C: 如果螺丝咕姆不在身边，你觉得她有可能当场把你撕成碎片。
E: If Screwllum wasn't around, you guess she might just try to tear you apart right here and now.

C: 您应该重新看看那几个新方案。它们完全违背了建筑设计的准则！
E: You should look at those new plans again. They completely defy the principles of architectural design!

C: 不过…这孩子犯错了就喜欢躲起来，现在又藏去哪儿了呢？
E: But... this child likes hiding after making a mistake. Where could he have gone this time?

C: 但看来等的时间太长，他的心灵与记忆也有等不下去的一天……
E: However, the prolonged wait has taken its toll. His mind and memories can no longer endure the wait...

C: 无名客，我没有未来，我是「过去」。
E: Nameless, I have no future, I am the past.

C: 既然费歇尔完成了他的承诺，那按照约定，我也该…偶尔回去看看。
E: Since Fischer upheld his promise, then as agreed, I should... go back to see how things are once in a while.

C: 无论如何，现在外面的情况已经稳定下来了。奥尔拉也不用在梦境的缝隙里躲躲藏藏，可以回家了。
E: In any case, the situation outside has calmed down. Orla doesn't have to hide in the crevices of the Dreamscape. He can go home now.

C: 但我的身体已经没法再接受更多的变故了，费歇尔先生。我老了，也该退休了。
E: But my body cannot withstand much more mishap, Mr. Fischer. I'm old, and I should be retired.

C: 呵呵，没什么可抱歉的，这并不是你的错……
E: Heh-heh, there's nothing to be sorry for. It's not your fault...

C: 只是一个普通的老者。拉莱德大人，我看你气势十足，想必已是心怀事理。关于这些驮兽，在下有些问题想请教。
E: Just an ordinary geriatric. Lord Liluder, I reckon you must have knowledge of the matter, from your confident poise. I have a few questions regarding these pack beasts.

C: 但曾有贤者说过这样一句话：「舆论不能只用一边耳朵倾听。」不如也来听听我所掌握的信息吧。
E: There was once a sage who said this: "Public opinion cannot be heard with only one ear." How about listening to what I have gathered?

C: 咳，咳！
E: Ahem!

C: 那好。出发之前，小友还有什么想说的吗？
E: Well then, before we set out, is there anything our young friend wants to say?

C: 在向你展示过后，德墨忒尔将篮子放回了柜台后面，看来她也没强壮到能一直举着它们。
E: After parading them in front of you, Demetria sets the baskets back behind the counter. She is probably tired from having to carry them.

C: 我自己吃，不行吗？
E: I'm eating them myself. How about that?

C: 但那些需要帮助的人等不了，我也等不了——我是个老人，老人知道自己不剩多少时间，所以也没多少耐心。
E: But those who need help can't wait, and neither could I. I am an old man — I don't have the luxury of time nor patience.

C: 据苏克提瑞斯说，他闯入圣城仓库，是为了帮助一伙受伤的外邦人——我们已经派人去查证了。这可能会影响他的量刑。
E: According to Soctires, he trespassed on the holy city's warehouse, all to help a group of wounded outlanders. We have already dispatched people to investigate. This may affect his sentencing.

C: 或许支持某一方更好…
E: It might be better to support one or the other...

C: 你的意思是，奥赫玛人生来就是奥赫玛人？只要你睁开眼时不在墙内，这辈子就没机会加入圣城了？
E: You mean, an Okheman is determined the moment they are born? If, the first time you open your eyes, you aren't within city walls, you'll never have a chance to join the holy city?

C: 你敢说元老院冰冷如铁？
E: You dare insinuate that the Council of Elders is as cold as steel?

C: 公民们尽力保持着严肃，但还是能听见几丝笑声从他们憋红的冷脸下窜出——比起对你的认可，更像是看了一出滑稽戏。
E: The citizens make an effort to maintain their serious demeanor, but faint laughter still escapes their flushed, yet stern faces — more akin to watching a farce than approval of you.

C: 一桩案子而已，影响哪有你说的那么大。就因为给你的老师定罪，社会风气就要完蛋了？不听你的，圣城就要灭亡了？
E: It's just one case. How can the impact be as severe as you claim? Is the moral fabric of our society going to collapse just because your teacher is convicted? If we don't heed your advice, is the entire holy city going to collapse?

C: 随着最后一个音节落地，伊特罗元老伸出手，制止了帕拉滕的进一步发言。公民们回味着刚才的交锋，渐渐动了恻隐之心……
E: As the final syllable drops, Elder Etro stretches out his hand and halts Palaten's subsequent elaboration. The citizens recall the clash, and begin to feel compassion...

C: 苏克提瑞斯将免于监禁。作为替代，他会被派去难民庇护所务工，期间视作流放；除此以外，他还必须自费填补药物储备的空缺。
E: Soctires shall be exempt from imprisonment. As an alternative, he will be assigned to work at a refuge shelter, as a form of exile. Additionally, he will have to personally bear the cost of replenishing the medical supplies.

C: 对某些公民而言，这样的惩罚甚至比在监狱服刑还要可怕，无须担心有人效仿。
E: To some citizens, such punishment might be more daunting than spending time in prison, so there's no need to worry about others following suit.

C: 你们快到神殿里去，那边安全——跟我来。
E: You all hurry to the temple. It's safe there — follow me.

C: 球棒侠来也！
E: The baseballer is here!

C: 面对无法对抗的力量，受创的泰坦眷属转身逃离，遁入城外的永夜天帷。
E: Faced with an unstoppable power, the injured Titankin turns and flees, slipping into the Evernight Veil outside the city.

C: 等等，你身旁的是献给奥赫玛的战利品吗？
E: Wait, do you bring with you a spoil of war as an offering to Okhema?

C: 国服第一算碑玩家申请出战！
E: Calculation tablet national champion, ready for battle!

C: 比起受万人爱戴的元老，更合适的旅伴反倒是另一种人——未曾沐浴过爱的人，未曾理解过何为浪漫的人。
E: Rather than the elder that already enjoys the love of thousands, I am more suited to another type of traveling companion... One that has never felt love before, one that has never understood the true meaning of romance.

C: 据说，墨涅塔追求瑟希斯的爱而不得，最终抱憾而终。心生垂怜的塞纳托斯拾起那些为爱而逝的亡魂，投入浪漫的残茧，令其孕育出金蝶——也就是这些眷属。
E: Legend has it that Mnestia longed for the love of Cerces, but their love was unrequited. They died with a sense of deep regret. Feeling great pity, Thanatos cast those that had lost their lives to love into a cocoon of romance and allowed them to be reborn as golden butterflies... These were the resulting Titankin.

C: 这些年来，帕里斯教会了我作为人类的生活有多么安逸幸福。我随那大工匠学了锻造。我能为自己敲造银饰，能为帕里斯铸炼佩剑。
E: Over the years, Paris taught me the tranquility and happiness to be found in human life. I learned forging under the Grand Craftsman. I crafted silver jewelry for myself and a sword for Paris.

C: 但你最享受的是屠宰牲畜时的快意，你最喜欢的味道是那生肉散发的血腥味。
E: But you come alive the most in the moments when you're slaughtering livestock, and your favorite scent is that of raw blood on the chopping block.

C: 是那个泰坦眷属吧。
E: The Titankin, right?

C: 什么……
E: What...

C: 帕…里斯……
E: Pa... ris...

C: 那个人已经…
E: They are already...

C: 这算幸灾乐祸吗？
E: Is this what schadenfreude means?

C: 碎掉的话，我就会去{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}那里，是不是就没法去见欧洛尼斯了？
E: If I break, I will go to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. Does that mean I'll never be able to see Oronyx?

C: 你不要不识好歹。
E: Do what is good for you.

C: 诸位，恐惧的黑潮正在吞噬大地，疯王的长矛随时可能指向任何一座城邦。
E: Everyone, the terrifying black tide is devouring the lands, and the Mad King's lance will be pointed at any city at any time.

C: 可这又有什么法子？为了养家糊口，他们就指望着神殿给的那点报酬呢。
E: But what other solutions do they have? All they have are the hopes of the temple's meager rewards to feed their families.

C: 呕吐感，悬浮感，你的意识因连续的冲击而开始飘忽。
E: Nausea. Vertigo. Your senses start to drift and muddle from successive shocks.

C: 你锻造的武器会斩下怪物们的头颅，吟游诗人的歌谣里，永久传颂你的名姓。
E: The weapons you forge will behead monsters, and the ballads of bards will forever laud your name.

C: 瑟希斯的信徒，又或者艾格勒赐福的子民，把你的智慧用于创造、记录和辨析。
E: Cerces' disciple, or perhaps a subject graced by Aquila. Using your wisdom to create, record, and decipher.

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 唉…真想、真想快点长大呀！
E: *sigh*... I really, really wish I could grow up faster!

C: 还有这回事？
E: Wait, really?

C: 我这本是上卷。
E: This is just Volume 1.

C: 唉，你说这……
E: *sigh* This is so...

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: 对，将受损舰船运往庇尔波因特，让公司报销……
E: Right. Let's send the damaged ships to Pier Point and have the IPC foot the bill...

C: 回望来路，你讲述的翁法罗斯，在宇宙间深深扎下了根，静候发芽的那一天。
E: Looking back, the Amphoreus you spoke of has taken root deep across the universe, quietly awaiting the day it will sprout.

C: 离开塔拉萨时，我接到了三月的通讯，就顺道和她一起回来了。她在凯尔萨斯星遇到了点麻烦。
E: I received a message from March when I was leaving Thalassa, so I came back with her. She ran into some trouble on Kalsas.

C: 那是一个行将消亡，却英雄辈出的世界。在逐火的征程中，黄金裔前赴后继，凡人们也众志成城。这是一首颂唱人性的赞歌，一段英雄之旅。
E: It was a world on the brink of extinction, yet teeming with heroes. In the Flame-Chase Journey, the Chrysos Heirs marched on one after another, while mortals stood united. This is an ode celebrating humanity, a hero's journey.

C: 诶，是你啊？空间站里经常有人夸你，没想到真人比他们说的更{F#漂亮}{M#帅气}嘛！
E: Oh, is that you? People are always talking you up on the space station, but I never thought you'd be even more {F#beautiful}{M#handsome} in person!

C: （将科员的建议转告给她）
E: (Tell her the researchers' suggestions)

C: 听说你有事找我？
E: I heard you are looking for me?

C: 诶呀！你说话不要这么有攻击性哦！
E: Hey! That was very aggressive. Cut it out!

C: 我有些事想打听…
E: I want to ask about...

C: 都说了，我们俩不信这个。
E: We've already said that we don't believe in that.

C: 听说你又有事找我…
E: I heard you are looking for me again?

C: 带有光学感应功能的？之前好像流行过一段时间。
E: The ones with optical sensing capabilities? Those were in fashion for a while.

C: 在我年轻的时候，也流行过这种撞色搭配，没想到现在又流行起来了。
E: This kind of contrast was fashionable when I was young. I didn't think it'd be back in fashion now.

C: 拍照？
E: Photos?

C: 不行，绝无可能！那莱姆士汀家尽出些爱挥霍的纨绔子弟，我老爸早就警告过我，不能跟他们沾上关系！
E: No way! The Limesteins are dandies who are always reckless with money. My father warned me long ago not to get involved with them!

C: 也许他只是想安慰我，可字里行间，我看到的却是一位远比我更具才华的作家。
E: Maybe he's just trying to cheer me up. But from his words, I see a writer much more talented than myself.

C: 也许「信鸽」是某位斗士的名字。毕竟都有人叫「冷面小青龙」了，还有什么不可能的呢？
E: Maybe "pigeon" is the name of a warrior, which isn't that strange. After all, there's even somebody called "Cold Dragon Young."

C: 我不去，那帮官僚都认识我了。我现在跑过去还不够受羞辱的呢！哎，羞辱科学家，是官僚系统朽坏的直接征兆，可恶！可悲！
E: Those cronies would do nothing but make fun of me. It's all because of their corruption that I'm in this debacle to begin with. How shameful!

C: 请听题…我去，这题面也太长了点吧？您还是自己看吧……
E: Question one... Gosh, this is certainly very long. I think it's better if you just take a look for yourself...

C: 哎，很可惜，答错了。看来也没有必要继续问下去了。
E: Ah, how unfortunate, that's incorrect. It seems like there's no need for us to continue.

C: 那当然，我们教育部推出应用题的大原则就是扎根生活、接地气。
E: Of course, the general principles of our Ministry of Education's application questions are grounded in real life.

C: 我就知道是那个家伙！
E: I knew it was that guy!

C: 嗐，算了算了…看来你也只能到此为止了啊！
E: Ah, forget about it... Looks like this is as far as you come, then!

C: 你这么聪明，只要稍加训练，一定就可以答出这些题目，将论文交到我手上了吧。
E: You're so smart. With a little training, you'll definitely be able to answer these questions and then turn in that paper to me.

C: 他们怎么说？
E: What'd they say?

C: 我看看…等等，不对啊——这道题的答案怎么也是「选项3」？这是什么破题库啊？！
E: Let me see... Wait, that's not right. How come the answer is still "option three"? What does our quiz pool look like?

C: 最近还顺利吗…
E: Everything going well?

C: 听到你这么说，我心里竟然一沉……
E: Now that you've said that, I'm even more concerned...

C: 哪来那么多为什么——我就是想喝个茶，逃避一下工作，不行吗？「会社」不就是做这个的？
E: There is no why — I just want to have some tea and get away from work. Isn't that enough of a reason? Isn't that what the Society does?

C: 而且，如果大家都死了…我发誓要保护的人们都已经不在了…那我守着这条街又是为了什么？
E: And if everyone is dead... If the people I swore to protect are all gone... Then why am I still protecting this street?

C: 哎，行吧。虽然我不太懂你说的那什么「裂界」到底是啥，但我好像也稍微理解了……
E: Yeah, alright. I don't really get what's this Fragmentum thing you talk about, but I think I understand...

C: 不多时，那嘶哑的啜泣声便同男子的身躯一同消散了。
E: After a while, the hoarse sobbing dissipates together with the man's form.

C: 所以…你来找我有什么事吗？如果不是太紧急的事，还请麻烦你整理成书面形式交给我的副手，就说是提交给理查德•巴拉金的……
E: So... What's the matter? If it is not too urgent, please submit a written report to my deputy and say it's for Richard Balakin.

C: 只是…你的设计图纸中提及的材料似乎很难获取。但如果真能造出来，铁卫全军都会记住你的名字的！哈哈哈……
E: It's just... the materials mentioned in your blueprints seem to be hard to come by. But if you do manage to make it, then all of the Guards will remember your name! Ahahaha...

C: 只是…我…坚持不了了…回不去了……
E: I'll never know... I can't... go back now...

C: 你以自己认知中最合乎礼仪的敬礼姿势向她致敬。仿佛是对你敬意的回应，她那裂界构成的脆弱身躯顷刻间纷飞四散，归于尘土。
E: You salute him in the most ceremonial way you know. As if in response to you, his body, made by the Fragmentum, shatters and returns to dust in an instant.

C: 一些生存指南小贴士。
E: Give some survival tips.

C: 你总结了一份荒野求生的知识和技巧，教会了一个人如何免受恶劣天气和野生动物的侵害。其中最重要的是，落难人也不可以破坏植被和野生动物栖息地！
E: You compile a list of knowledge and tips for surviving in the wilderness, teaching them to protect themselves from harsh weather and wild animals. Most importantly, you warn the castaway against destroying the habitat of the flora and fauna on the island!

C: 这么积功攒德之事，{F#女士}{M#先生}不妨与我一同啊！
E: {F#Miss}{M#Sir}, will you not join me on this virtuous mission?

C: 你找我是有什么事吗？
E: Did you want something?

C: 随着文明的进步，精致的浮雕总是会取代质朴的岩画。为什么人们就不喜欢在凯旋门上多画点小动物呢？
E: With the advance of civilization, exquisite reliefs would replace primitive rock drawings. Why don't people like drawings of small animals over their triumphal arch?

C: 在奥赫玛，无论是人们还是城市本身，都仿佛已经习惯了将自己沉浸于慵懒与闲适之中。
E: In Okhema, be it her people or the city herself, it is as if all have become accustomed to the immersion of indolence and leisure.

C: 「『黄金裔』系列暂无现货，新款双耳罐绝赞发售中。」
E: "'Chrysos Heir' products have temporarily been sold out. Our latest amphoras are now on sale."

C: 希望不会有某种存在突然出现，向你们追索破坏文化遗产的赔偿——毕竟这里看起来就像是公司的市场开拓部广告里会出现的地方。
E: You hope a certain presence doesn't suddenly pop out and demand compensation for ruining cultural relics. After all, this looks like the sort of place that would appear in an IPC Marketing Development Department ad.

C: 倒塌的柱子，在你的帮助下重新担负起顶天立地的重责，却没有人问它究竟是否愿意。
E: With your help, the fallen pillar is once again able to take on the duty to carry the sky — but nobody bothers to ask whether it's willing.

C: 飞鸟衔来理性之种，眠于沃土之间；煌煌日光予之滋养，圣城始有花园。
E: A bird flew here and planted a seed of reason in the fertile soil. Nurtured by the blazing sun, the holy city saw its first garden grow.

C: 诸神注目的剧场
E: The Theater Beneath the Gods' Watch

C: 黄金裔大人，您在为此责怪我吗？
E: Lady Chrysos Heir, are you blaming me for this?

C: 王，若您意犹未尽…便以王之名，取我头颅吧——但这与此次胜负无关。战斗已经结束，我不愿徒增无谓的鲜血。
E: My king, if you are not yet satisfied... Then take my head as the king... However, this has nothing to do with victory or defeat. The battle is over, and I just simply do not wish to shed meaningless blood.

C: 呵，歌耳戈，你就如此相信迈德漠斯能从朕手里夺走王冠么？
E: Hah. Gorgo, are you so certain that Mydeimos will be able to take the crown from my hands?

C: 「水车无法汲取已经流去的水」——如今空无一人的树庭令人想起这句逝去王者的谚语。你突然产生了灵性的一问：再创世的图景真的符合热力学第二定律吗？
E: "The waterwheel cannot draw water that has already flowed away." The now-deserted Grove evokes this adage from a bygone king. You suddenly ponder a profound question: Does the vision of Era Nova truly align with the Second Law of Thermodynamics?

C: 那刻夏，我以前和你辩论的时候或许不曾提起：我很早就志愿为树庭奉献自己的一生。
E: Anaxa, I may have not mentioned this in my previous debates with you, but I vowed to dedicate my life to the Grove long ago.

C: 呵，危急时刻，就别管那么多了，尽可能减缓黑潮入侵的速度才是要紧事。
E: Hah, such things are not important in a moment of crisis. What matters most is that we slow the invasion of the black tide as much as possible.

C: 想不到危急关头，还得用那刻夏那家伙的歪门邪道。其他学者向来敬神，可从没研究过这种邪术。
E: I never thought that when our backs were against the wall we would be forced to use that Anaxa's wicked ways. Other scholars held such reverence for the Gods that they never researched such evil technology.

C: 喂！全世之座刻法勒，我{F#大姐}{M#大哥}问你话呢？
E: Hey! Kephale, Throne of Worlds, you heard {F#her}{M#him}!

C: 异乡的勇士，莫非对自身没信心吗？在本狮看来，你完全担得起世上所有的美名吼！
E: The warrior from outlands, are you perhaps lacking in confidence? To me, you're worthy of every noble title in the world!

C: 这种简单的问题，竟然能难倒富有智慧的勇士吗？答案远在天边，近在眼前——就是正在和你说话的这头狮子吼吼！
E: Such a simple question, and yet it can confound a Warrior of wisdom like yourself? The answer is far away, and yet right before your eyes — it's the lion speaking to you now!

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>露台的围栏上</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>on the balcony railing</color>...

C: 我的身体倍儿棒！
E: I'm in top shape!

C: Σ(:３っ「我不问了，我头就尖怎么着？诶，我就尖尖的，怎么着？」)∋
E: Σ(:３っ "Forget it! Yes, my head is pointy, so what! Yeah, I got a pointy pointy head!" )∋

C: 怎么看，都有面！
E: It looks great from all angles!

C: 忽然之间，某道灵光予以你启迪，你看见那些纹路竟然组合出——{NICKNAME}。
E: Suddenly, a spark of revelation strikes — you see the patterns rearrange into the name {NICKNAME}.

C: 哟，胆大包天的贼灵巴特鲁斯，你怎么发抖了？
E: Well, well, daring Spirithief Bartholos, why are you shaking?

C: 是啊。但事到如今，我不会多言。复述，教典第三十七章，第四行。
E: Yes, but I won't say much more at this point. Now, recite the <unbreak>37</unbreak>th chapter of the scriptures. Fourth line.

C: 呀，灰宝！今天阳光特别不错，谢谢刻法勒，你也是来晒太阳的吧。
E: Ah, Grayie! What a gorgeous sunny day, thank Kephale. You're here to soak up some sun too, aren't you?

C: 隔着百步之距时，金线就已预知贵客的到来。{NICKNAME}阁下，想在此休息会儿吗？
E: The golden thread had already foreseen your arrival when you were a hundred steps away, dear guest. Esteemed {NICKNAME}, have you come to rest?

C: 艾格勒示现在启目集上的话语已经彻底扭曲了……
E: What Aquila said in the enlightenment has been completely distorted...

C: 为什么要在这种危机关头打开书匣？你知道有人会在临死前格式化电脑磁盘，或许出于同一个道理。
E: Why open the book case at such a critical moment? You know some people choose to format their computer disks before death, perhaps for the same reason.

C: 然而，由于这位母亲一直捏着英雄的脚踝，导致脚踝部位没有被冥河水浸泡到，从而留下了唯一「弱点」。
E: However, because the mother held him by his ankle, that spot remained untouched by the river, leaving a single weak point.

C: 以前常被人说「没有膝盖」，现在大不了就是「没有脚踝」嘛，物理意义的那种。
E: People always said I had no knees and can't jump. Now, worst case? I have no ankles. Physically speaking, of course.

C: 我要前往的地方，是人们口中的哀伤之地。
E: The place I'll be going to is what humans call the land of sorrows.

C: 捕猎、杀戮，鱼儿游入血海…起舞、奏唱，换来喧闹的奖赏……
E: Hunting, killing, the fish swims into a sea of blood... dancing, singing, all for a noisy reward...

C: 逐火的旅途…
E: The Flame-Chase journey...

C: 无需多言，在若虫的字典里，没有「臣服」二字。
E: Enough. In a nymph's dictionary, the word "submit" does not exist.

C: 关于你…
E: About you...

C: 失去肉身是什么感觉？
E: What does it feel like to lose your physical body?

C: 再等等。
E: One second.

C: 这都多亏了您——听说了您在前线的英勇事迹之后，我觉得自己绝对不能再停滞不前…是时候做出改变了。
E: It's all thanks to you — after hearing about your heroic deeds on the front lines, I've resolved to get myself out of this rut... It's time for a change.

C: （救救…救救……）
E: (Help... Help...)

C: （这里有陌生的气息，咱们过去看看吧。）
E: (There's a strange air about here. We should take a look.)

C: （这里是监控室，可能只是拿在身上路过的…也可能是在这里暂存过？）
E: (This is the monitoring room. It could be carried by someone who was passing by... or it could have been stored here?)

C: 哼哼，<color=#dbc291ff>炒饭被它标记过</color>，那味道…你随便找个人闻闻就知道是它，绝对抵赖不掉！
E: Hmph, <color=#dbc291ff>the fried rice is marked by it</color>, and that scent... Anyone who smells it can identify it. There is no denying it!

C: 安静！
E: Quiet!

C: 我很抱歉，从物种的复杂程度上说，的确如此……
E: I'm sorry, from the complexity of the species, it should be...

C: （奇物被吃掉了，这么大的事…我得回去向小姐汇报了。）
E: (The Curio has been eaten, and this is big news... I have to report this to Miss Asta.)

C: 读书，好累…
E: Reading can be such a drag...

C: 人家才刚出生不久，当然不会啦！就算以后…总该有「永远不变」的人吧？
E: I've only just been born, so of course I don't have one! As even later on... there must be people who stay "unchanged forever," right?

C: 等故事结束，才能知道。
E: We'll only know when the story's over.

C: 这么说，大家的故事难道要结束了吗？虽然过去也一直想看新的故事，但现在的心情，却不太一样了呢…
E: So, is everyone's story coming to an end? I always wanted to see a new story, but now, my feelings are a little different...

C: 是你只遇到两次。
E: Well, you only caught me twice.

C: 怎么有怪物？
E: What's with the monsters?

C: 干活！干活！
E: Work! Work!

C: 可是我这人爱忘事儿，一说出来就不记得了，要是有人帮我记下来就好了……
E: I always forget things. It would be great if someone could write them down for me...

C: 很好，接下来还有一个阵法要布设，走吧。
E: Great. There's another matrix to set up. Let's get moving.

C: 便是被人捉到了马脚，又有谁敢说要拿你是问？
E: Even if someone busted you, who would dare interrogate you?

C: 你自己？
E: You?

C: 有没有难一点的？
E: Got anything harder?

C: 我再准备下。
E: I need a moment to get ready.

C: 玉兆该修了。
E: Your jade abacus might be broken.

C: 放马过来吧。
E: Bring it on.

C: 这…怎么可能？这几盘棋凝聚了我三百年的棋力，竟然被你轻松化解了？
E: I—Impossible! Everything I've learned over three hundred years of chess playing, I've put into these puzzles, yet you solved them so easily!

C: 为什么要做「Remake」？
E: Why a "Remake"?

C: 刚才的就好。
E: Just the previous one will do.

C: 无需惊慌，贵客，这座人台是我的「衣匠」。我将一部分神性赐给了它，使其能够如活物般行动。
E: No need to panic, my distinguished guest. This mannequin is my "Garmentmaker." I have granted it a portion of my divinity so that it can take action like a living being.

C: 二人曾经的眷属们也自发加入了这场苦旅，它们便是创生若虫。其中美丽且脆弱的属于墨涅塔，勇武且刚强的属于瑟希斯。
E: The former followers of the two also voluntarily joined this arduous journey, and they are the Creation Nymphs. The beautiful and fragile belong to Mnestia, while the brave and strong belong to Cerces.

C: 你练级回来了？那便回答我吧——在烈阳熄灭的地方，曾经万人瞩目的会场上，如今有多少火焰仍在燃烧？
E: You're back from your training? Answer me this then — in the place extinguished of the fiery sun, on the stage once watched by thousands, how many flames still burn bright?

C: 顿时七八个祭司把我团团围住，对我又是咒骂又是洒蜜酿，还用大地兽鬃毛做成的笤帚往我脸上直扑。我好不容易才抽身。
E: In an instant, seven or eight priests surrounded me, cursing me and covering me in ambrosia. They even struck me with brushes made from dromas fur! I was lucky to make it out of there...

C: 话说回来，「熔岩」究竟受塞纳托斯掌控，还是归法吉娜女士管辖呢……
E: Speaking of which, is lava governed by Thanatos, or Lady Phagousa...

C: 要窃取它们不用钥匙，也无需撬棍，有时只用几句甜言蜜语，一番动人辞令，就能让人深信不疑。
E: Neither keys nor crowbars are needed to steal them. Sometimes all it takes is a glib word, a heartfelt gesture, to have them swoon for your earnestness.

C: 来点日常妙招？
E: Got any sayings for life hacks?

C: 扎格列斯老祖在被奥赫玛元老们设计陷害时如此评价道。
E: Ancestor Zagreus espoused these words when ensnared in a trap set by the Okheman Elders.

C: 我急了吗？您可别胡说。要是有其他想聊的，我乐意奉陪；但要是再对这事喋喋不休，可别怪我要和你比划比划！
E: Am I? Nonsense. I am more than happy to acquiesce if you wish to speak on other things. But if you keep persisting on this matter, don't blame me for what happens next!

C: 诶，别生气嘛，这里没有埋伏，而我也没有你想的那么小气。巴特鲁斯只是想起了一则那位老祖的故事……
E: Easy there, no need to be upset. There are no traps here, and I'm far more generous than I seem. I simply recalled a story about that great ancestor...

C: 要骄傲、要自满、要自我意识爆棚——只有这样才能欺骗一切、偷走一切、掠夺一切！桀桀桀桀……
E: Be proud, be confident, let your ego run wild — that's how you deceive all, steal all, and plunder everything! Hehehe...

C: 酒不醉人人自醉！老巴特鲁斯没什么别的爱好，就好这口…桀桀桀。
E: It's not the wine that intoxicates — it's people themselves! Old Bartholos here has no other pastimes, just a fondness for this... Hehehe.

C: 你有脚？
E: Wait, you have feet?

C: 缘分似潮，有风乃起。命路已断，此功玉成。桀桀。
E: Destiny flows like tides, rising with the winds. The path of fate is broken, this work now complete. Hehe.

C: 扎格列斯老祖在上，这种目标咱没法用诡计去骗啊！呜呜呜，老巴特鲁斯，我要回到你的身体里，再也不出来了……
E: Ancestor Zagreus help me, I can't trick someone like you! Waaah, old Bartholos, I want to return to your body and never leave again...

C: 「过去的事情，就让它留在过去」？桀桀桀桀，那如果「过去」和「未来」竟然是同一件事，你又要怎么取舍呢？
E: "Let the past stay in the past"? Hehehe. But what if the past and the future turn out to be the same thing? Then what'll you choose?

C: 哦对对对，正式介绍一下，这位第欧根娜小姐就是传信石版上的「提灯找人」老师，成功翻译出<unbreak>20</unbreak>段《黄金替罪羊的呓语》的天才少女学者！
E: Oh right, let me formally introduce this young lady — Miss Diogena, the "Light-Hunter" mentioned on the teleslate. She's a brilliant scholar who translated 20 passages in Golden Scapegoat's Mutterings!

C: 万万没想到，竟然有人对「瑟希斯之心」动过手脚。这么说吧——「瑟希斯之心」为我们计算出的结果，是一片空白。
E: Unbelievable... Someone has tampered with the "Heart of Cerces." Let me put it this way — what it calculated for us was... nothing.

C: 你白白让我跑腿！
E: You've had me running errands for nothing!

C: 趁热打铁，我们再做一次练习，这次就来测算——「真正的辅祭身在何处？」
E: Let's try another practice. This time, let's trace — "Where is the true acolyte?"

C: 推演完成了，拿去吧，这是拓有结论的石板。
E: The extrapolation is complete. Here, take it — this slate bears the conclusion.

C: 你被旋转的铁球砸晕了——
E: You got knocked out by a spinning iron ball—

C: 好了，去帮助下一个人吧。
E: Alright. Let's find the next person who needs help.

C: 可惜，只有凯妮斯女士和她的那帮「清洗者」心腹，才清楚每个火种匣里究竟是什么。
E: Unfortunately, only Lady Caenis and her inner circle of "Cleaners" know what's inside each Coreflame Casket.

C: 我还能开更多火种匣！
E: I can open more Coreflame Caskets!

C: 但不知为何，祂在群星间消失无踪，就像从未存在过一般——只留下了孑遗子嗣。
E: But for some reason, the Aeon disappeared among the stars without a trace — almost as if THEY had never existed... leaving only THEIR descendants.

C: 那是什么…
E: What was that?

C: 你告诫自己要清醒……你思考应尽的使命：开口与祂对话。
E: You tell yourself to stay sober and complete the mission: Speak to THEM.

C: 「巡猎」？
E: The Hunt?

C: 你口述就行。
E: Just say them out loud to me.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「居然没看见…」</color>你听见黑塔仿佛咬牙切齿地嘟囔，<color=#dbc291ff>「小小年纪，一点都不知道观察生活……」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You didn't see it..."</color> You can hear Herta muttering angrily with gritted teeth. <color=#dbc291ff>"You are so young, yet you have no idea how to be observant..."</color>

C: 你刚想把话接下去，却感到周围的气温骤低——你感到自己被一种古老的威严震慑，手脚突然被不可视的、如游丝般的细线吊起，仿佛有人在将你当作木偶操弄。
E: As you are about to speak, you feel a sudden dip in your surrounding temperature and the intimidation of an ancient authority. All of a sudden, your limbs are suspended by invisible strings, as though someone is manipulating you like a puppet.

C: 大片大片的蝗虫又跟了上来！它们的翅膀嗡得你神经血管疼痛…你狠狠用门把它们拦在外面！得给自己找点安慰剂…你想起你把一些宝贝揣在怀里——一块怀表！你掏出来摸它，刺激自己现实的感官！
E: A vast swarm of locusts is once again pursuing you! Their buzzing wings produce such a cacophony that it causes you a headache... You slam the door and barricade them outside! You must find some solace... so you take out your treasured pocket watch and tenderly fondle it to stimulate your senses!

C: 可惜支付信用点也无法让门外的虫潮消失；耳边传来木板断裂的巨响——现在你得面对现实了。
E: Sadly, no matter how many credits you offer, the Swarm outside shows no sign of ebbing. You hear a loud crash as the barricades give way... Now, you have to face the brutal reality.

C: 他的桌子上放着一些小型*斐斯杰拉德虫*…它们是狠戾的、擅于隐形的刺客…其中一些似乎在不同光线下才能彰显出自身的形态。
E: On his table, there are tiny *Fisgerald Bugs*... ruthless and elusive assassins... Some of them only reveal their true form under certain lighting conditions.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 「他不想让人知道自己是个小鬼。」黑塔摆了摆手，「还是个天才小鬼！别怕，斯蒂芬，社恐是病，你迟早得治。」
E: "He doesn't want anyone to know he's just a brat." Herta waves her hand dismissively. "And a Genius brat at that! Don't worry, Stephen. Social anxiety is an illness. You'll have to treat it sooner or later."

C: 还有你不了解的无机生命？
E: Are there any inorganic lifeforms that you do not know of?

C: 「我想祂应当会对阿基维利的现身有所反应。」阮•梅顿了一下，接着补充道，「当然，{NICKNAME}还要收集秘闻应付公司。」
E: "I reckon THEY should have a reaction to Akivili's appearance." Ruan Mei pauses momentarily, then adds, "Of course, {NICKNAME} still has to collect classified intel to deal with the IPC."

C: 你的想法戛然而止，一段*认知*走向结束，而另一段*认知*随之出现，每一段*认知*都处在祂的牵制下，在祂严丝合缝的计算中浮出水面。新的*认知*加强了你抛弃旧*认知*的经验，接着又强化了寻求更多*认知*的惯性——你的头脑沦落为一种工具——不，它升华成一种工具！
E: Your thoughts jolt to a halt, a path of cognition reaching its end, and another path of cognition begins anew. Each cognition path lies within THEIR grip, surfacing above the water within THEIR exact calculations. The new cognition reinforces the experiences of your abandoned cognition, which in turn enhances the nature of seeking out even more cognition. Your mind has been reduced to a tool — no, it has evolved into one!

C: 黑塔话音未落，短暂的降温又被过载的「认知」压了下去。你脑海里的画面不受控制…你忍不住对它们说「嘘」…但那些画面越来越具象，甚至拥有了形象与生命。
E: Before Herta can finish, the brief drop in temperature is overtaken by the overload of cognition. The images in your mind are uncontrollable... You reflexively try to shush them... but the images are getting more and more realistic, seemingly coming to life.

C: 你看到了那个瞬间：天才俱乐部#27帝皇鲁珀特从沉睡中复苏了！它醒来时，机械帝国的「黎明」再度降临——无数机械从灰烬中破土而出。它们的*意志*喷涌，*灵魂*怒号——即便它们无从知晓那意志与灵魂是否属于自己…但，无机之物的*自己*又是什么？
E: At that moment, you see: The #27 member of the Genius Society, Rubert the Emperor, rise from slumber. When it wakes, the dawn of the Machine Empire descends once more. Countless machines rise from the ashes. Their *wills* erupt, *souls* roaring. Even if they have no way of knowing whether the wills and souls belong to them... but, what is *self* to inorganic beings?

C: 你顺着楼梯一路往上。回环往复的阶梯上有着「神秘」星星点点的痕迹，你细细揣摩，这些斑驳的痕迹汇聚成一句话：「有一个伙伴会为你而死，而你会被一个人杀死。」
E: You ascend the staircase, and along the looping, repetitive steps, you notice scattered, mysterious star-like marks. You contemplate them, and these mottled marks come together to form a sentence: "There is one who will die for you and one to whom you will perish."

C: 不久之后，学会证明了这些记忆所属的瞬间，公司的一些部门正在对无机生命地带进行表面扶植、实为殖民的建设。
E: Shortly after, the guild proved the instants to which these memories belonged. Some divisions started carrying constructions in inorganic life zones. Colonization Under the facade of development.

C: 因为很帅气。
E: Because it's cool.

C: 唯有他们，才能真心欣赏你的作品，为这些无用的钢铁造物发出由衷的感叹。
E: Only they can truly appreciate your work, offering heartfelt exclamations about these useless steel creations.

C: 天亮了。
E: Sun's coming up.

C: 一条漆黑的道路出现在你的面前，就像是在黯淡的世界中割裂出的伤疤。你踉踉跄跄地攀登上去，枯萎的肢体发出断裂的噪音。几乎是出于本能地，你沿着道路前行，锐利的毛刺穿过你的身体，可你早已失去了痛觉，或许连身体也已失去，以至连梦与现实都再无法分清。
E: A dark road appears before you, like a scar carved into the dim world. You stagger up, withered limbs creaking and cracking. You move along the road almost out of instinct as sharp thorns pierce into you, but you have long forgotten any sense of pain — perhaps even your entire body, so that you cannot even tell the difference between dreams and reality.

C: 连联觉信标都没法适应的库拉人怎么也想不到，自己的山洞外面会挤满那么多天上来的丑家伙。
E: The Kora people, who cannot even adapt to a Synesthesia Beacon, could never have imagined so many ugly jokers from the sky descending upon their caves.

C: 渗透进亚空间场的胶体向内坍缩，将彗星蝉弹射向前方的世界。许多搭便车的生物就是通过这种方式，成功向沿途的星球播撒出生命的种子。
E: The goo that pervades the subspace field implodes, launching the comet cicadas out off into the world. This is how many creatures hitch a ride and end up successfully spreading the seeds of their life out to planets.

C: 像一条丝线。
E: Like a thread.

C: 不要太微观。羸弱的种群不堪一击，一场洪水，一群天敌，甚至是一次感染，都足以将它们拖入毁灭的结局。
E: You must not be too microscopic in detail. Frail races cannot withstand any blows. A flood, a natural enemy, or even an infection would be enough to lead them to their complete destruction.

C: 孩子们纷纷加入讨论，在他们的口中，你们脚下的星球变幻着各种形状。最后所有孩子达成一个共识——反正星球不是圆的。
E: The children descend into debate and the planet below your feet transforms into endless shapes as they state their cases. Finally, the children reach an agreement... Whatever shape they are, planets are not round.

C: 对不起，我也是被逼的。
E: I'm sorry. They forced me.

C: 它以每十三分钟一次的频率出现，无论把实验室迁移到哪儿，普尔郎星云，赫尔多林，甚至黑洞的边缘，强度和频率都不曾改变。
E: It appears at a frequency of once every thirteen minutes. No matter where the laboratory is relocated to — the Purlang Nebula, Heldorin, or even at the edge of a black hole, neither the strength nor frequency has shown any variation.

C: 它们此刻却是愤怒着，为自己的无能嚎叫，希冀撕裂未能中止的每道呼吸。
E: But they rage on this very moment, howling at their own ineptitude, clamoring to shred every breath that they were unable to terminate.

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我是无机体。
E: Determining "intra-cognition" - I am inorganic.

C: 为了真理和尊严，突破隔离线！
E: For truth and dignity, break through the blockade!

C: 无法走出圆圈的失败者。
E: A failure who could not escape the Circle of Knowledge.

C: 星空之上，有一颗星星熄灭，有一颗星星亮起。万机之王默默注视着一切，如是演算，日复一日，从不诉诸言语。
E: Above the skies, as one star extinguishes, another ignites. The Monarch of Myriad Machines silently watches over all, silently extrapolating day after day, without ever uttering a word.

C: 「倘若用思维实验将宇宙关进圆圈，就会成为罪人。那为宇宙锚定『时刻』，把所有智慧都关进『智识』的祂，又要如何审判？」她并非在询问，只是自说自话。
E: "If one would be considered a sinner to use a thought experiment to confine the universe in a circle, then how are we to judge THEM, who anchors 'Instants' onto the universe and locks all wisdom into 'Erudition'?" She is not inquiring. She merely talks to herself.

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 「这么多奇物冒出来，总有些你用不着的垃圾。」黑塔叉腰，「感恩戴德吧，这次你可以选择回收一些奇物，跟我换些祝福。」
E: "With this many Curios popping out, there will always be trash you can't use." Herta put her hands on her hips. "Be thankful. You can choose to recycle some Curios this time and swap for Blessings with me."

C: 「虚构史学家，只创造历史。我创造新伦蒂尼恩王国的过去，联席总理完全没有察觉他们的王国建立在一段虚假的、从未发生过的历史上。」他说。
E: "History Fictionologists only create history. I have created the history of the kingdom of New Londinium, and the Prime Minister of the Commonwealth does not even realize that their kingdom is based on a fake history that has never taken place." He answers.

C: 你获得了一些宇宙碎片和祝福。
E: You have obtained some Cosmic Fragments and Blessings.

C: 第一个虫泡轻轻破裂，生命迎来绽开时刻。
E: The first egg sac softly ruptures, and new life blooms.

C: 「差价就是学费，人人都逃不了交学费。贸易的第一条准则，就是低买高卖。学会这条，你以后都不会吃亏。」他满不在意。
E: "The price difference is the fees you have to pay for the lesson, and no one can be the exception. The rule of thumb in business is to buy low and sell high. Master it, and you will never suffer a loss in the future," he says indifferently.

C: 在汽车旅馆的公共洗浴间，你又一次遇到了里奥——它的头上长出一只白色*天使*圆环，身体由乳白色胶液构成，小小的触手上捧着一本书，它向你微笑。
E: In the common bathroom of the motel, you run into Leo again. He has a white angel halo on his head, and his body is made up of white gel. Holding a book with his tiny tentacles, he smiles at you.

C: 警告！你的行为触发了销售终端的「电击」！
E: Warning! Your actions have triggered electric shock from the sales terminal!

C: 「据说，只要一个人的金属纯度超过百分之百，就能超脱羸弱的肉体，成为无机生命。」店长越说越起劲，四只义眼在眼眶里疯狂旋转。
E: "Legend has it that as soon as a person's metal purity exceeds <unbreak>100</unbreak> percent, they will be able to transcend their feeble body and become an inorganic being!" The shopkeeper grows more and more enthusiastic as they speak, their four prosthetic eyes spinning wildly in their sockets.

C: 「星际和平公司在千余个琥珀纪中扮演着重要的角色，但要我说，他们只是这张画上的污点。」画家发出轻蔑的笑声。
E: "Though the IPC has played an important role for over a thousand Amber Eras, in my eyes, they are no more than a blemish on this painting." The painter loosed a mocking scoff.

C: 密保问题回答错误，验证失败。如果您是首次开户的储户，请移步到人工服务台，在工作人员的协助下完成开户工作。
E: Security question answered incorrectly. Verification failed. If you are opening an account for the first time, please move to the manual service counter to complete this operation with the assistance of our staff.

C: 遇事不决，直接选最熟悉的。
E: When in doubt, order whatever looks the most familiar.

C: 远处猎食者的啸叫惊走了苍猿，毛乎乎的触感还停留在手心——下次去摸湮厄鹰好了。
E: A carnivore's roar from afar scares away the ape, but the fluffy sensation at your fingertips still lingers — you should try touching a Torment Eagle in the future.

C: 你坐在水晶海洋的堤坝上，硕大的羽鲸穿过物质世界的边缘，纵身跃起，又迅速落回璀璨的晶体结构中。
E: You sit by the dam of the crystal sea. A massive feathered whale traverses the material world's border, leaping out of the surface, then swiftly crashing back into the scintillating crystal structure.

C: 你听到一个消息，那艘飞船的减速设备好像坏掉了。
E: You hear a rumor that the deceleration equipment on the spaceship might be faulty.

C: 愚人船一个急转弯，在胃液上打出不完美的水漂。你转头看向掌舵的愚者，这一颠一颤似乎让酒精在他的大脑里开起了派对，他狂笑着，将船驶向古板食人鲨的领域。
E: The Ship of Fools takes a sharp turn and skids imperfectly over the stomach acid. You turn your head to look at the Fool at the helm. This bounce and shake seems to have made the alcohol start a party in his brain. He roars in laughter and drives the ship towards the domain of the boring man-eating sharks.

C: 你还要继续下潜吗？
E: Do you want to continue diving?

C: 你还要继续下潜吗？
E: Do you want to continue diving?

C: 人群的欢呼比你的喜悦更早到达。他们称赞你的豪运，仿佛那就是你的美德。
E: The people's cheers reach you before your own joy does. They laud your great fortune, as if it were your very own virtue.

C: 你缓步向上攀登，不敢往下窥探，一种没来由的预感告诉你，一旦踏错一步，便会坠入万丈深渊。
E: You make the ascent cautiously, not daring to look down. An inexplicable sense of foreboding tells you that one wrong step, and you'll be devoured by the endless abyss below.

C: 你深吸一口气，卯足全力划动船桨，无视掉溅入船里的鱼腥味，让船笔直地撞进暗礁。
E: You take a deep breath, mustering all your strength in your rowing, ignoring the fishy stench that has splattered onto the boat, steering it straight for the submerged reef.

C: 可千万要小心愚弄众神之神，自它诞生起，世间便再无安宁。
E: Caution against The God Who Fooled Gods. Since their emergence, the world has known no peace.

C: 泰坦疯狂的真相。
E: The insane truths of the Titans.

C: 从稚嫩到年迈。
E: From youth to old age.

C: 冥河的潮汐，令航船腐朽，血肉成灰，禁绝现世的生命。它追随死亡而来，漫上战场与荒原，直到引渡去所有的死者，才退回塞纳托斯的国度。
E: The tides of the River of Souls corrode ships, turn flesh to ash, and forbid mortal life. They follow death, flooding battlefields and wastelands, receding only after all the deceased are ferried back to the realm of Thanatos.

C: 那是最初的支柱，大地之泰坦的呼吸。一缕因炎热而升起，另一缕则因寒冷而凝聚，在天空成形前，下坠成雨滴。
E: It is the breath of the first pillar, the Earth Titan. One stream rises with the heat, while another condenses with the cold. Before the sky was formed, it fell as raindrops.

C: 当天空开始黯淡，又是谁为生命留下指引？
E: When the skies start to dim, who else provides guidance for life?

C: 你被一名身穿长袍的修士拦下，她手持一顶颇具分量的黄铜天平，想必是塔兰顿的信徒。
E: A robed friar stops you. She carries a weighty brass scale — likely a follower of Talanton.

C: 大胆！金血也是可以拿出来研究的吗？不过…这个课题好像还挺有意思的。
E: Outrageous! Researching golden blood — is that even ethical? But... you have to admit, the subject is rather fascinating.

C: 这预言的颗粒度还挺细。
E: The granularity of this prophecy is quite detailed.

C: 毕竟曾经吃过亏。
E: Once bitten, twice shy.

C: 碧绿的橄榄，似常青的爱意。
E: Dark green olives, symbolizing evergreen love.

C: 他守住了自己的信仰。
E: He kept his faith.

C: 艾格勒感受着身边的一切，它睁开第一双眼睛，可昏暗的世界让它无法看清；它睁开第二双眼睛，但黑暗仍然笼罩着万物。
E: Aquila sensed everything around them. They opened their first pair of eyes, but the dim world prevented them from seeing clearly. Then they opened their second pair of eyes, but darkness still enveloped everything.

C: 全知全能的刻法勒就此降生。
E: Thus, the omniscient and omnipotent Kephale was born.

C: 古老的歌谣口口相传，讲述那遥远的过去，巨人刻法勒的行进。
E: Ancient songs passed down through generations tell of that distant past — the march of the giant Kephale.

C: 以彼之矛……
E: Use thy spear...

C: 我应该是在做梦…
E: I must be dreaming...

C: 正在启动体检系统，请用户保持呼吸通畅，放松心情切勿紧张焦虑。
E: Initiating medical examination system. Please breathe clearly and freely. Relax your mind and do not become nervous or anxious.

C: 不用骗我了。
E: There's no need for pity.

C: 派送中…派送中…派送成功，「空间站商务套餐」已发放，祝您用餐愉快。
E: Delivery in progress... Delivery in progress... Delivery successful. "Space Station Business Meal" has been delivered. Enjoy your meal.

C: 大家肯来这么危险的地方开会，已经给足你们科室面子了！
E: The fact that everyone's still willing to meet up in such a dangerous place is a glowing endorsement for your department!

C: 结果呢？你拿出来的那套方案压根不适用于我们科室！你压根就没考虑过我们的难处！
E: So? Your solution is in no way appropriate for our department! You've never even given a single thought to our concerns!

C: 我留下纸条，祈求星神投影现身，果然把你给「召唤」来了。
E: The note I left is a prayer for the Aeons to project and materialize and, as expected, you were summoned.

C: 我就偷个懒，怎么会不断有人冒出来？还有这个…马桶？！又是这个玩意！
E: I just want to slack off for a while, but why are all these people popping out of nowhere? And this... toilet!? Not this again!

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 你只有翅膀露出来了。
E: I can only see your wings stick out.

C: 不好不坏。
E: Just okay.

C: （真是奇怪的男人…不知道以后还会不会在这里遇到他。）
E: (What a strange man... I wonder if I'll run into him again.)

C: 你、你们一定要小心喀！
E: Y—You have to be careful!

C: ——赞美琥珀王！你从来没干过类似的活，但这一击的力度简直完美如梦境…也许你天生就是干这行的料。
E: Praise the Amber Lord! You have never done anything like this, but you used the absolutely perfect amount of strength... Maybe you have found your life calling.

C: 居然宣布退役了…
E: I can't believe he announced his retirement...

C: 我自有渠道。
E: I've got my connections.

C: 你怎么看，兄弟？
E: What do you say, bro?

C: 或许你该把它直接交给歌蒂——为了彰显你尊贵住客的身份。
E: Perhaps you should give it straight to Gertie — To demonstrate your status as a valued guest.

C: （还是找找更合适的藏身处吧……）
E: (Maybe I should look for a better hiding spot...)

C: 秘密？好吧……
E: A secret? OK...

C: 但无论是与不是，你都获得了一笔意外之财——你就当是替铁卫收了罚款吧。
E: Right or wrong, you did receive some unexpected cash. Let's just say you've accepted the fine on behalf of the guards.

C: 原来你知道啊？
E: So you knew already?

C: 咦，我心爱的希露瓦大人在哪里？
E: Huh? Where is my beloved Lady Serval?

C: 哦…那可真遗憾。
E: Oh... What a shame.

C: <size=36>我们都能拥有希露瓦大人新的玉照！</size>
E: <size=36>We all can have a new picture of Lady Serval!</size>

C: 喀喀——你知道么，建筑的设计会影响访客的心态。而面前这道沟壑影响了我的心态……
E: Crrk crrk — Did you know that a building's design can affect the mood of its visitors? And this gorge before me is impacting my mood...

C: 听好了喀，这是一段被掩盖起来的故事，只有最智慧的人才能知晓答案——「浪漫」与「理性」两位泰坦是何关系？
