E: Listen up, and I'll tell you a story about a cover-up that only the wisest people know about: What is the relationship between the Titans of Romance and Reason?

C: …虎克已经无语了！
E: ...I'm too shocked to talk!

C: 它坐落在广场上，低调，隐蔽，藏在其中绝对出人意料——只要你肯捏着鼻子。
E: It's located in the plaza. It's low key and hidden. No one would expect someone to hide in there. All you need to do is hold your nose.

C: …虎克已经无语了！
E: ...I'm too shocked to talk!

C: 哎呀呀，看你失望的表情，难道是在找什么别的东西吗？阳光下才没有隐藏的宝箱呢嘤~
E: Aw, why the long face? Looking for something else? There are no hidden chests under the sun, chirp~

C: 「Mi」…好像听到了什么声音，是乐声？
E: "Mi"... I think I hear something... is that music?

C: 千万不要想不开呀。
E: Don't think yourself into a corner.

C: 能够变形的金属生命体干的！
E: It was the work of a metal life form that could transform!

C: 但是让爷就这样灰溜溜地回去，那可不行。
E: That said, making me head back in such a glum mood is not OK.

C: 你注意到这只不满的机巧鸟有些懊恼，它对于自己打赌失败早有预期，但是等到你准确的回答的一瞬，它就像一支从高处跌落的花瓶——放弃了。
E: You notice that this resentful cycrane is a little frustrated. It knew that it was going to lose the bet, but when you answered correctly, it looked unimaginably dejected.

C: （追求速战速决，但伴有声响）
E: (Make a fast move with noise)

C: 只要你还有足够的时间，你就能在恶龙的看管下，不作声响地将财富悄悄带离。保持耐心，时间依然是你的朋友。
E: If you had enough time, you could slowly take away all the surrounding treasure even under the dragon's nose. Be patient, time is still your friend.

C: 是吗？我曾经也以为你们填的收货地址是准确的呀。
E: Oh, did I? I used to think the shipping addresses you organics filled in were accurate too.

C: 独处的千年里，我终于领悟了一目十行的波动速读法。就拿这条光带传输的内容试试喀！
E: A thousand years of solitude... and at last, I've mastered the art of quantum speed reading. Let's put it to the test with this data stream!

C: 我也有翅膀，怎么不算翼兽呢。而你，会是我的主人吗？
E: I have wings too, so why wouldn't I count as a winged beast? And you... would you be my master?

C: 是喔，忙到脚打后脑勺呢。这就是天舶司的日常啊。商会贸易清单又该重新整理了……
E: Yeah, I was so busy, I almost kicked myself in the face. All in a day's work at the Sky-Faring Commission! Time for the guilds' list to be updated once again...

C: 策略性要溢出屏幕了…
E: There's so much strategy I think I'm gonna explode...

C: 为了奖励，我可以忍！
E: I'll endure anything just to land that prize!

C: 嘎乌握库惹！（{F#她}{M#他}晕过去了！）
E: Ghee phainphed! ("{F#She}{M#He} fainted!")

C: 老板我知道你尽力了…所以，我决定向你送上安慰奖，以兹鼓励！
E: I can tell you've given it absolutely everything you've got... So I've made a decision — to award you a consolation prize as encouragement!

C: 你们不会是去索赔去了吧？
E: Did you go and make a claim for a refund?

C: 该死！你在做什么？你不怕我阳雷的吗？
E: Damnations! What are you doing? Aren't you afraid of my Daythunder?

C: 但不知为什么，它们最终却对人类大开杀戒。所以后来的日子里，先祖们对所有金人施加了符箓，这些家伙就变得又钝又笨，抽个不停。
E: However, for some reason, they eventually turned against humans and went on a killing spree. So our ancestors put talismans on all the aurumatons in the ensuing years, making them dull, clumsy, and constantly twitching.

C: 这不会左脚绊右脚吗？
E: Wouldn't it be like having two left feet?

C: 嘿，我寻思我就是太卜司的，我怎么不知道还有这事呢！他这信口胡诌，不是教坏小孩嘛！
E: Meh, I'm from the Divination Commission myself, why didn't I know about this? The nonsense he spouts is going to lead the kid down a wrong path!

C: （将匠人的下落告诉他）
E: (Tell him the location of the craftsman)

C: 来吃点甜甜圈吧，梦里不会有负担！
E: Come try a donut, and ease those dreamy burdens of yours!

C: 当水洼里的科学家追溯历史，抬头仰望，是否会感慨这源于失修水管的奇迹。
E: When the scientists of this small puddle come to trace their history and look up to the heavens, would they be moved by the miracle that originated from a single broken water pipe?

C: 在原初梦境，从高处坠落可能没有美梦中那么好运，请注意安全。
E: Inside the Primordial Dreamscape, you may not be as fortunate when falling from a great height as you would be in a dream. Be cautious.

C: 但我们的钱从哪儿来？存款迟早会花光的。
E: But where will we get money? Our savings will run out eventually...

C: 天才的一杆球…
E: An ingenious shot...

C: 因忆质流失产生的类黑洞结构，贪婪地吮吸着这个已然凋敝的世界。
E: A black-hole-esque structure spawned from the loss of memoria is ravenously feasting on an already-destitute world.

C: 算了，这次就先不玩了。
E: Never mind. I'll play it next time.

C: 你时刻铭记着自己现在的身份——小小哈努兄弟，所向披靡勇猛无敌——你试图探索一切未知的区域。
E: Bearing in mind your current identity at all times — Brother Hanu Story! Undauntable, untouchable, and unbeatable! — you attempt to explore all the uncharted territories.

C: 今天要不去凉点的池子？
E: How about a cooler pool today?

C: 我要启程去那里了。
E: I'll be departing for there soon.

C: 元老院立下的承诺呢？
E: What about the promise the Council of Elders made?

C: 别变成大地兽就行。
E: As long as I don't turn into a dromas, I'm good.

C: 没有秘酿瓶大，嘿嘿。
E: Not as big as the ambrosia bottle, hehe.

C: 哎…算了，给伙伴们发个短信请假吧。看来这次放生我是去不了了。不过没关系……
E: Tsk, forget it... I'll message my friends and tell them I can't make the life-release ceremony. I'm sure it'll be fine...

C: 列车长就是我们的头儿！
E: You are our leader, conductor!

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，麻烦你去车厢里转转，看看是不是我想多了帕！
E: {NICKNAME}, could you please take a look around the carriage and see if Pom-Pom's going crazy or not!

C: 奇怪，车上也没有养小动物。
E: Strange, there're no small animals aboard the Express.

C: 嗯，一位王子，他其实是巨龙变成的？听起来有点奇怪…算了，你继续吧。
E: Okay, a prince who's transformed from a dragon... It sounds kinda weird... whatever, go on.

C: 停停停！你在做什么！怎么可以穿着鞋子躺在这里呢！帕姆每天打扫起来可是很辛苦的！
E: Stop, stop, stop! How can you lie down here with your slippers on like that!? Pom-Pom breaks their back cleaning up around here every day!

C: 但从我的专业知识与过往经验来判断，要在长途旅行中照料宠物，这可是件麻烦事。
E: But based on my professional expertise and previous experiences, taking care of pets during a long trip is a real hassle.

C: 真…真的吗？可是帕吃药诶……诶……
E: R—Really? But I have a problem taking medicine... Hmm...

C: 这…这就是舞动的感觉吧！好…好头晕。
E: I... I reckon this is what a disco looks like! My... my head is spinning.

C: 今天就试到这里吧…
E: Let's call it a day...

C: 嘿嘿，毕竟我可是列车长！诶不对…总感觉你说的话怪怪的。
E: Hee-hee, don't forget I'm the conductor! Wait a minute... Your comment sounds odd to me.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客可能还不了解帕！为了保证星穹列车的正常运转，需要准备的物资五花八门……
E: You may not know this, but various materials are needed in order to ensure the normal operation of the Astral Express...

C: 怎么说呢，以前是有发售的，不过数量不多，贝洛伯格就这么大，平时有巡演就够了。
E: How should I put it... We used to sell our albums, though the quantity was not that large. Belobog is not that big, so usually a tour is enough.

C: 诚挚向你推荐上层区的…
E: I would recommend the Overworld's...

C: 三月乘客啊，是最令帕姆头疼的乘客，她总想用帕姆的耳朵绑辫子戴蝴蝶结，真是可怕……
E: Out of all the passengers on the Express, March 7th causes the most headaches for me. She always wants to tie my ears into bows...

C: 晚了！哈！哈！哈！
E: Too late! Bwahaha!

C: （在这里能听到扑满的声音，应该就在这附近了…）
E: (I can hear the Trotter again. It must be somewhere close by...)

C: 还算顺利，这应该就是最后一只扑满了。
E: Things are looking good. This must be the last of those Trotters.

C: 「四大天王」之一
E: First of the Formidable Four

C: 哈，小小{NICKNAME}，就让我戴维来会会你！
E: It's time for you, {NICKNAME}, to take on me, David!

C: 在你决定出什么之前，希望你能把这个问题仔细考虑清楚。
E: Before you decide, think it through.

C: 可恶！我怎么会输……
E: No! How did I lose?

C: 哈，刚才你不是很嚣张吗？怎么，这就被打服了？
E: Not so tough now, are you?

C: 噢，老实说，你的回答十分让人出乎意料。
E: Well, to be honest, your answer was quite unexpected.

C: 「嘭」的一声打开柜门——
E: Bang! The closet's door slams open.

C: 可惜当时情况紧急，画得实在太仓促，否则我还能再打磨一下……
E: It's a shame that things were so urgent. I had to paint this one in a hurry — otherwise I would've polished it a lot more...

C: 你看向南方。那是一片巨大的盆地，整个区块被繁多的森林、湖泊和湿地点缀。
E: You look to the south and see a giant basin, where the whole region is decorated by many forests, lakes, and wetlands.

C: 结束探索。
E: End exploration.

C: 试试计算机图形学原理…？
E: Try utilizing principles of computer graphics...?

C: 您好，{NICKNAME}。我正在收集可用于「情感互动」的数据集。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. I am gathering datasets that can be used for emotional interactivity.

C: 你把搏击俱乐部老板的笔记放回了箱子，然后轻轻地将它合上，将机械密码锁归位。
E: You put the gym owner's notes back into the box, gently close it, and lock the combination lock.

C: 这是一柄云骑军制式的阵刀，刀脊上不时流过森冷的青光，锋锐逼人，吹毛断发。
E: This is a Cloud Knight's standard-issue Devastator Glaive. There's a cold glint on the spine of the blade sometimes. You get the feeling that it could cut steel like butter.

C: 罐子会说话？
E: A talking vase?

C: 可我的罐中世界正需要它。那些「人间烟火」肆意生长，弥漫在罐中的每个角落，却认识不到谁才是这「自在樊笼」真正的主人。
E: But it's just what I need in this world inside my vase. That "hustle and bustle of humankind" is growing rampantly, filling every spot in this vase — but it doesn't recognize who is the real owner of this Cage of Freedom.

C: 你真的不会咬我吧…
E: Promise you're really not gonna bite me...?

C: 行了，不要再负隅顽抗了，你们已经无路可逃！
E: Stop resisting! You guys have no way to escape!

C: 鹤运物流希望能委托你去到这些货物丢失的地方，操纵机巧鸟来寻找这些丢失的货物。
E: Heron Express hopes to entrust you to go to places where goods have gone missing and find them by controlling cycranes.

C: 您是一位化外民吧，见多识广，肯定听说过不少故事。
E: You're an Outworlder, right — you know lots about lots of different things, yeah? You must've heard a lot of stories out there.

C: 请你礼尚往来。
E: Please could you reciprocate in kind?

C: 快上，这*仙舟粗口*想跑！
E: Quick, this *Xianzhou profanity* wants to run!

C: 路过的好心人，能不能请你帮我取一下衣服…去星槎海找「广云袖」的予衿小姐，和她说是「那位老师」的请托，她就能明白！
E: O, generous stranger, could you please help me get some clothes to wear... If you could find a Miss Yujin at Cloudbreadth Sleeves over in the Starskiff Haven and tell her "that teacher" needs help, she'll know what I mean!

C: 主要分为两种形式，一种为「社会招收」，一种为「内部推荐」。
E: There're two main ways actually: One is called "social recruitment," and the other way is by "internal recommendation."

C: 造型单调？要是在方块上增加「花纹」，说不定就能打破这种单调感……
E: The shape is too plain? If we add in some decorative patterning, that would maybe shake up things...

C: 那你觉得该怎么办呢？
E: So what should we do, then?

C: 是不是还戴着面具？
E: Does he still wear a mask?

C: 不要装傻，你会不知道我在说什…等等，你…你真没骗我？
E: Don't play dumb. As if you don't know what I'm talking abo... Hang on, do you... Do you really not know?

C: 你看这人怎么回事？
E: What's up with this guy?

C: 梦境鼓励师是什么？
E: What is a Dreamscape Motivator?

C: 就先到这里吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 所以你欺负广告牌干嘛？
E: So why are you bullying the billboard, then?

C: 不过也好，现在负面情绪都被*物理*消灭了，老先生也就没有什么问题啦。
E: But that's fine. Now that the negative emotions have all been "physically" cleared away, the old chap won't have any more problems.

C: 哈哈，你知道吗，我虽然是个导演，这一生最辉煌的时刻却并不在颁奖台上。
E: Haha, you know what? I may be a director, but the most glorious moment in all my life was never up there on that awards stage.

C: 这一工作实在太繁琐，太漫长…究竟是怎样坚定的意志在支撑他们做完这一切？我不知道，但他们的成果无疑铸就了母星文明的丰碑。
E: This work looks truly tedious and boring... What kind of firm resolve supported their completion? I don't know, but their achievements have no doubt left a monument for their home planet and civilization.

C: 有种波澜壮阔的美。
E: There's a kind of majestic beauty to it.

C: 有一次，我开着飞船在宇宙中闲逛，阴差阳错地来到了一个不存在于星图上的地方：一片遍布小行星的太空垃圾场。
E: One time, I was piloting a spaceship and roaming the stars, when I accidentally came to a place that wasn't on the astral charts: A space junkyard filled with asteroids.

C: 你…还好吗？
E: Are you... okay?

C: 但我已经过了那个阶段。现在的我早就没有心力和别人同行，也没法分享旅途的喜悦与挑战了。
E: But I'm just not too keen on it now. Now, I'm just too tired to travel with others, and I can no longer feel the joy and enjoy the challenges along the journey.

C: 送你个小礼物，作为被我一路跟踪的酬劳吧。拿好~
E: Here's your reward for letting me follow you all the way here. Please take it.

C: 再见，朋友。
E: See you, my friend.

C: 我答应了家族，要让这座城市的规模超越「黄金的时刻」——他们当时都觉得我在吹牛——但凭借我们团队搭建起来的全自动筑梦流程，达到这个数字压根不算难事。
E: I promised The Family to build this new city on a scale exceeding the Golden Hour, and they thought I was full of hot air. However, it is completely possible with the use of our automated construction program.

C: 听上去轮到我干活了。
E: Sounds like my job.

C: 听你这话，经验丰富啊？
E: Oh, speaking from experience, huh?

C: …但是凭着这样发明，我将在匹诺康尼内部彻底杜绝一切侵权行为。等着瞧吧，历史会证明，「长效专利捍卫一纸通」的问世是象征宇宙文明跃进的一大步！
E: ...But with this invention, I'll wipe out all infringement in Penacony. Trust me, history will look back on this Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier as a milestone in universal civilization!

C: 你就是个财迷，知道吗？
E: You're all about the money, aren't you?

C: 凡事都要阻挠我，装什么清高！发明家想靠自己的专利挣钱有错吗？啊？！
E: Why does he keep trying to mess with me, acting all high and mighty!? What's the big deal if an inventor wants to cash in on their patents, huh?

C: 这点事你自己不能干吗？
E: Can't you do it yourself?

C: 答应我一件事，拍照前一定要征得她本人的同意！我不想被当成一个…呃…偏执狂。
E: But promise me one thing. Do ask her permission before taking the photo! I don't want to come off as... uh... pervert.

C: 嫉妒心过强的女人，她不能接受我在天梯总榜上居然比她的排名还高——何其狭隘！
E: Turns out she couldn't handle the fact that I was ranked higher than her on the leaderboard! Talk about being narrow-minded!

C: 这样呀…没事，你愿意帮我这个忙，我就已经很感谢了。
E: There's no need to feel bad... It's kind enough of you to offer your help.

C: 你…呵呵，我明白了，看来我的赔礼白准备了。
E: You... Fine, I get it. Seems like my effort to make amends has gone down the drain.

C: 芙尔拉女士，就是您让我变成这样的！在我想要自由歌唱的时候，您说我是痴心妄想。如今我选择脚踏实地，您却又说我胆小，让我大胆追逐理想。
E: Madam Forla, it was you who made me this way! Back when I yearned to sing freely, you said I was being unrealistic. Now that I've chosen to become more grounded, you're telling me I'm too timid and should instead chase my dream bravely.

C: 呵…您的评价还真是直接，和我的经纪人一样。
E: Heh heh... Your review is quite direct, just like my manager's.

C: 我每天都在演唱违心的谎言，要不是刚刚一时兴起，可能都快把真正的「纯美之歌」忘掉了！
E: Every day, I reluctantly sing lies. If it were not for a spur-of-the-moment decision just now, I would have forgotten about the real Song of Beauty!

C: ——压在我身上的是无与伦比的痛苦，比母星的毁灭与纯美女神的消殒还要恐怖。
E: ...I experienced unimaginable pain, more agonizing than the destruction of my home planet or the demise of the Beauty.

C: 什么时候能忘掉呢？
E: When can I ever forget about it?

C: 那次失误不仅葬送了我的前途，还剥夺了一个孩子的生命。
E: Because of that mistake, I lost my job, and a little girl was killed.

C: 不如喝水。
E: Nothing beats plain water.

C: 我的球棒可不只是好看而已。
E: My baseball bat is more than just an eye candy!

C: 在「黄金的时刻」待久了才发现，这里还真是满地奇葩啊——贬义的那种。
E: After spending some time in the Golden Hour, I realize this place is full of freaks.

C: 人常道双眼是心灵之窗，彼时我不懂得这句话真正的含义；而今历遍坎坷曲折，此刻的我正凝视着匹诺康尼，妄想目光能穿透她奢靡又虚荣的表象……
E: Our eyes are often said to be the window to our souls. Back then, I wasn't able to grasp the true meaning of this phrase. But now, having gone through some ups and downs, I find myself staring at Penacony, hoping that my gaze can penetrate its extravagant and vain façade...

C: 哎…我这人做事，向来讲究个你情我愿。你既然执意如此，我也不好强求。
E: Well... I never force people into doing things they don't like. Since you insist on saying no, I won't push you.

C: 看见垃圾，回收垃圾。保护环境，从我做起。今天，你有拾起脚边的垃圾吗？
E: I see trash, I pick up trash. Everyone plays a part in protecting the environment. Have you picked up the trash on the ground today?

C: 曾经困扰我的问题…现在成了我手里的武器。
E: The horrors that once used to trouble me... have now become my weapons.

C: 介意和我走一趟吗？
E: Would you mind taking a stroll with me?

C: 该告诉我这到底是怎么回事了。
E: Time to tell me what exactly is going on.

C: 好事？当然，自从来了匹诺康尼，我的心灵已经许久没有感受到这样的舒畅。
E: Good news? Sure. Since coming to Penacony, my soul has rarely felt so at ease.

C: 而现在，孩子，或许我也需要你的善意。
E: And right now, kid, I might just need a little of your kindness.

C: 买个玩具怎么跟做贼似的？
E: Why do you sound like a crook when we're just dealing toys?

C: 你偷偷看了眼，精致的包装里都是很普通的玩具，你无法理解它们为何如此畅销。或许这就是奥科萨娜所说的，「善意」的回报吧。
E: Taking a peek into the immaculate bag, you see it's filled with ordinary toys. You cannot understand how they're selling so well. Perhaps this is what Oksana might call a return of "goodwill."

C: 你！学人说话好玩吗！不想说就算了，我也懒得知道。不过…这么看来你确实有些本事……
E: You! You think it's funny to imitate me! Who cares if you don't want to tell me. I didn't even want to know anyway. But... it appears you've got some moves on you after all...

C: 先别急着拒绝，你也不想之后一直得费心费神防备着我，对吧？
E: Don't be in a rush to refuse — you don't want to have to keep watching your back from now on, do you?

C: 行吧，我这人说话算话，以后不会再对你做什么，你可以安心了。
E: Fine. I'll uphold my end of the wager: I won't pursue you again, and you can count on that.

C: 你还想怎么对付我？
E: What else do you intend to do to me?

C: 我回到学校之后，马上组织学校领导开展了一场反思大会，得出了一个结论——之所以模因病毒会趁虚而入，就是因为这届学生太散漫了！
E: Upon returning to the university, I immediately gathered the heads of the school and conducted a meeting of retrospection. Ultimately, we came to a conclusion: The memetic virus was able to slip into the campus because the current cohort of students is too undisciplined!

C: <size=28>因此我决定，拟定<unbreak>88</unbreak>条新校规，好好整治一下这股歪风邪气！</size>

C: 很好，你的主人翁精神让我欣慰。要是每个学生都像你这么有担当，匹诺康尼肯定比现在还优秀好几倍。
E: Thank you, I'm heartened by your sense of commitment. If every student was as responsible as you are, Penacony would be a much more splendid place than it is now.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 要么当赚黑心钱的老板，要么给赚黑心钱的老板打工。只有最偏远的蛮荒星球才能躲过金钱的浸染…这就是宇宙的真相。
E: It's either you become a boss who rakes in dirty money, or you work for a boss like that. The corruption of wealth can only be avoided by fleeing to the remotest of barren planets... This is but a universal truth.

C: 校长？呃，有股不祥的预感。
E: The dean? Um... I've got a bad feeling about this.

C: 工作太难找了？
E: Because it's too difficult to find a job?

C: 什么是宇宙化思维？
E: What is cosmic thinking?

E: Nothing, I was just thinking...

C: 你这样开玩笑不太礼貌吧。
E: That's not very nice.

C: 啾啾，我只是悄悄地听，保证不影响他们的。啾，故事有时候就像风，随处都可捕捉啾，小鸟闻风而动是我们的天性啾！
E: Tweet tweet. I'm just quietly listening. They won't even know I'm here. A story is like the wind sometimes. It can rise in any corner of the world, and I'll follow it wherever it blows! That's the nature of us birds, tweet!

E: If you're the captain, what does that make me?

C: 谢谢你，黑塔女士。
E: Thank you, Madam Herta.

C: 哇哦，这...同道中人？
E: Wow, you... you agree with me?

E: Not yet.

C: 唉，还是动作快些吧。时间不等人啊......
E: Ahh, you should really get a move on. Time waits for no man, you know...

C: 好吧，决定权在你。
E: Very well. You have the right to decide.

C: 原来没加工的梦泡是不能吃的，真是遗憾啾。
E: It's a pity that we can't eat unrefined dream bubbles.

C: 对哦，如果有化妆品的话，说不定就可以变成漂亮的粉色了啾。回去问问黄金公子吧。
E: Oh right, if I had cosmetics, I might be able to turn into pretty pink, tweet. Time to head back to ask Young Master Gold.

C: 啾，啾啾？啾！
E: Tweet, tweet tweet? Tweet!

E: Look, there's lots fish flying in the sky above the hotel. That was his idea, tweet! I ran around all the ponds in Dreamville catching up those fish... But they really do look beautiful flying up there above the hotel, tweet~

C: 让我想想…对了，有个孩子不喜欢动地方，于是总窝在<color=#dbc291ff>「大树」附近</color>睡懒觉啾…或许它就呆在客人您的眼皮底下呢？
E: Let's see... Oh yes, there's a child who doesn't like to shift spots, so it's always nested <color=#dbc291ff>near the Great Tree</color> for a nap, tweet... Maybe it's sleeping right under your nose?

C: 真是可怜的两脚兽啾…再见了啾~
E: What a pitiful two-legged beast... Goodbye, tweet!

E: Hi-yah! Let me think: The little one guarding the hall idolizes Professor Owl, going as far as to build a huge statue. It might be guarding the <color=#dbc291ff>statue</color> right now, tweet tweet!

C: 是个金灿灿的家伙
E: It's a golden guy.

C: 厉害呀客人，已经带回来这么多帮手了啾~
E: Wonderful! You've brought back so many helpers already, tweet!

C: 唔…真无聊！还不如捉弄石头老板好玩啾。
E: Eugh... How boring! Even teasing Boss Stone is way more fun, tweet.

C: 哈努兄弟啾。
E: Brother Hanu, tweet.

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: 怎样？有没有迷上我啾？一般人可没机会看到这样的表演啾。
E: How about it? Fallen for my charm yet, tweet? Most won't even get a chance to witness such a performance, tweet.

C: 算了，不和你解释，小鸟要去找下一个倒霉蛋啾。
E: Just forget it, I'm done explaining to you. I'm off to look for another unlucky fool, tweet.

E: Tweet, I was going to get you to come too, but I don't think you can fly, tweet.

C: 我还没说谢谢呢...
E: I didn't say thank you yet...

C: 哼哼…看来，世上也是有能抵挡住在下魅力的人啾。
E: Heh-heh... Looks like there are those who can withstand my charm, tweet.

C: 我不会跳。
E: I don't know how to dance.

C: 好大的黑洞，害怕啾。
E: What a huge black hole. I'm scared, tweet.

E: Tweet tweet, we'll get scolded by Professor Owl if we receive bad reviews. I'm going to help the other newcomers, bye-bye, tweet!

C: 我曾经耻笑钻戒…耻笑钻戒所承诺的永远啾…
E: I used to mock diamond rings... Mocking the eternity a diamond ring promises, tweet...

E: Speech requires logical consistency and precise words. This is something I learned in debate class, tweet.

C: 有保护措施吗？
E: Are there any safety measures?

C: 格拉…克斯…啾？
E: Glaux... tweet?

C: 暗中关注我的粉丝？
E: A fan that follows me from the shadows?

C: 咪咪也是四十多年的老谛听了，容易出故障，嘴里一直嘀咕着「人类真蠢啊…」，我也是第一次听见咪咪张口说人话。
E: I mean... Mimi's a forty-year-old Diting by this point. Glitches and bugs aren't uncommon in it. It kept muttering "Humans are so stupid..." That's the first time I've ever heard it speak using a human tongue!

C: 醒过来的人大多述说着不曾发生在他们身上的经历，这些经历还全然不同。
E: Those who woke up later would tell stories about experiences they had never actually had, and their stories varied from one another.

C: （翻开看看）
E: (Open it and take a look.)

C: 这是你应得的报酬，收下吧。以后可能还会有事情拜托你，到时候还请多多帮助了。
E: Here's your hard-earned payment. I might need your help again in the future. See you then.

C: 死人在跟我说话？
E: Am I speaking with the dead?

C: 弹奏结束后，游人散去，琴师才有机会将这化外民搀扶起来，询问他流泪的原因。
E: After the guqin song stopped and the crowds scattered, the musician got the chance to reach out to the outworlder and ask why he had been crying.

C: 好啊！那咱们现在就算是师徒了～
E: Great! Now we become master and apprentice!

C: 看起来，这是《合巹记》的唱本。要读读看吗？
E: This looks like it's the book for Wedding Wine. Do you want to read it?

C: 鸳鸯帐暖饱饥肠。
E: In lotus tent, our passions shall transpire.

C: 可怜我他日又守空房。
E: Come tomorrow, you're out of sight.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>可怜我来日又守空房。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Come tomorrow, you'll take your flight.</color>

C: 我怎么就和朋友走散了呢……
E: How did I get separated from my friends...?

C: 你要是喜欢的话，那就最好了。
E: If that's what you want, then it's for the best.

C: 这次我会变成不一样的东西…你就站在这里，不要走动。
E: I will transform into something else this time... You stand here and don't move!

C: 你打开了眼前的宝箱——里面什么也没有。你从没遇见过这样「任性」的宝箱。
E: You open the chest before you — but find nothing inside. You have never seen such a "defiant" chest.

C: 这可是我刚提的新车啊！斯坦威迅龙，全梦境限量<unbreak>12</unbreak>台！他欠我的用什么还？！
E: This is a new car that I just picked up! One of only <unbreak>12</unbreak> Steinway Raptors throughout the whole Dreamscape! Do you really think he could pay THIS back!?

C: 你们…我没想过会在匹诺康尼见到你们，何况是在这里。你们…你们过得还好吗？
E: You two... I never thought that I would see you in Penacony, least of all here. Have... Have you been well?

C: …你真的没有作弊？
E: ...Are you sure you didn't cheat?

C: 啊，奥洛是我的老朋友，前段时间也在匹诺康尼。怎么了，你见过他吗？
E: Yeah, Oro was my old friend, he was in Penacony recently. Why, did you meet him?

C: 反正我是在<color=#dbc291ff>筑梦边境</color>看到他了，后面还跟着好几个猎犬家系的人。
E: Anyway, I saw him at the <color=#dbc291ff>Dream's Edge</color>, followed by some Bloodhounds.

C: 为了替他们寻得妥善的回收场地，不至于落得遭人拆解倒卖的下场，我不得不四处筹措资金，最终欠下巨款，被迫签订了永久的依附合约。
E: I had to search all around and raise funds so that I could find a suitable recycling site for them, so they would not be broken down and resold. In the end, I racked up such a massive debt that I was compelled to sign a contract of subservience for perpetuity.

C: 对不起，我没那么多钱。
E: Sorry, I don't have that much money.

C: 对不起，我不能再给您添更多麻烦了。
E: Sorry, I cannot cause you any more trouble.

C: 但您也看到了，现在我的身边围绕着三种酒。我能隐约感觉到，它们都希望能和我拉近关系，成为我的伴侣。
E: But as you can see, there are three types of wine around me. I can sense their intention to get to know me and be my partner.

C: 不许你们打它的主意…绝对不许……
E: I can't allow you to take advantage of it... None of you...

C: 不过它们视力很差，我们只需要远远地绕过去就可以了。
E: One thing though, those monsters have poor eyesight. We just need to go around them from a distance.

C: 这里肯定存在另一台电视，那个就是出口…咱们去对面找找看吧。
E: There must be another television here, which would be the exit... Let's check out the other side and see.

C: 我要退钱！
E: I want a refund!

C: 说得好！百年三万六千日， 一日须倾三百杯！
E: That's right! A hundred years is just over thirty-six thousand days, and one must empty three hundred cups in a day!

C: 有你这般评价，我愿一生一世做大家的小红。
E: Hearing such a touching assessment, I want to be your little Red forever!

C: 昨晚噪音很大。
E: They said there was loud music playing last night.

C: 不等你有所反应，角落里立刻蹦出来几个人将你团团围住。
E: Before you have a chance to react, a group of people jump out from around the corner and surround you.

C: 摊开手。
E: Spread 'em out.

E: Hold on, let me groom myself a little... As the future SoulGlad Superstar, I must learn to face even insults with a sense of ceremony.

C: 什么东西不能洗马桶？怎么不说用反物质炸弹洗呢？干净得连马桶都不剩。
E: What can't be used to clean a toilet? Why not use an anti-matter grenade? That'll get it so clean there won't even be a toilet left!

C: 我很遗憾。
E: I'm really sorry.

C: 唉。
E: *sigh*

C: 咳咳——不知何时，你发现身后忽然多出了几个高大的身影。
E: Ahem, you're not sure when, but at some point you notice several tall figures suddenly standing behind you.

C: 让我好好瞧瞧——嗯…不错、不错，看看这面相、这气质，准是个英明神武明察秋毫神机妙算武……
E: Let's have a look-see... Mm, not bad. This face, this poise, you must be a brilliantly deified avatar of divine erudition with godly perspicacity...

C: 等等！你们这些办事的狱卒，不要拿这样的小事去为难判官，所以说啊，你们的业务水平真的不太行。
E: Wait a minute! As prison guards, you shouldn't trouble the judges with such trivial matters. Like I say, your work standard isn't up to par.

C: 飘摇世间，又何来落脚之处？
E: It's hard for a wanderer to find rest in this world.

C: *沉重的喘息*
E: *heavy gasp*

C: 没错，但是梦境里你可以体验大厨的经历！
E: You're right, but you can also undergo the master chef experience in the Dreamscape!

C: 海边真舒服啊，这时候来一瓶苏乐达就更舒服了。

C: 这里有丰富的资源，有异化造物，甚至有某些世界旧文明遗产…全是珍贵的财富。也有狱友说，这集装箱里是紊乱的空间、怪物、以及灾难。
E: This place has plenty of resources, including mutant creations and even cultural relics from ancient civilizations... You can say everything in here is a treasure. I even heard from other inmates that within these containers lie things like monsters, turbulent spaces, and even calamities.

C: 冥差真的能让我带过来吗？
E: Will the spiritfarers really give me the memo?

E: (Hand the memo covered in letters to Shiratori)

C: 别嗯了！
E: Stop grunting!

C: 密钥是：「A」为嗯呢，「B」为呢嗯嗯嗯，「C」为呢嗯呢嗯，「D」为呢嗯嗯…「S」为嗯嗯嗯…「W」为嗯呢呢……
E: The encryption key goes like this: "A" corresponds to "Ehn-nah," "B" corresponds to "Nah-ehn-ehn-ehn," "C" corresponds to "Nah-ehn-nah-ehn," "D" corresponds to "Nah-ehn-ehn"... "S" corresponds to "Ehn-ehn-ehn"... "W" corresponds to "Ehn-nah-nah," ...

C: 我们先听听仁科老师什么需求…
E: I'd like to hear what Master Renke wants from me, first...

C: 嗨呀，谁没事看这个呀？
E: Sheesh, who would care about watching that?

C: 随便吧，我累了。
E: Whatever, I'm tired.

C: 看不起谁呢？
E: Are you looking down on me?

C: 药王爷在上，这都什么乱七八糟的……
E: Great Lord of Sanctus Medicus, I can't handle this mess...

C: 你好，{NICKNAME}同学，这间教室本日的课程安排为：财富学院的「经济学基本原理」、筑梦学院的「建筑素描基础」、谐乐学院的「作曲理论入门」。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. Today's lesson schedule for this classroom is as such: Fortune Academy's "Basic Financial Principles," Dreamweaver Academy's "Architectural Sketching Basics," and Charmony Academy's "Composition Theory for Beginners."

C: 哼…一个两个，不听课就别来上课。难不成真以为只要全勤，期末成绩就能好看？
E: Ugh... You lot might as well not come to class if you won't listen. You really think your grades will look nicer just because you have full attendance?

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 稍微睡一会儿吧。
E: A little while.

C: 晚安，星穹列车。
E: Goodnight, Astral Express.

C: 别紧张，你想起了新结识的黄金裔朋友们，不妨寻求一下外援，问问他们的想法？
E: Calm down. You recall your new Chrysos Heirs friends. How about asking for their help?

C: 虽然很疼，疼的想找可爱的外援们哭诉。但你想到她们笃定的语气，还是决定放弃传达失败的讯息。
E: It hurts. It hurts so much that you want to go cry at your cute aides. But when you think of their assured tone, you decide to abandon any intent of conveying your failure.

C: 唔！
E: Ugh!

C: （无视它）
E: (Ignore it)

C: …以我所见过的事情来说，是「仇恨」吧。
E: ...From what I have experienced, it is "hatred."

C: 没错，是动摇的信念。
E: That's right. It's wavering will.

C: 求人不如求己！
E: Titans help those who help themselves!

C: 墙上有一尊石头雕成的狮子脑袋，大张着嘴巴。
E: There is a sculpture of a lion's head on the wall, its maw wide open.

C: 在你途经的某些世界里，狮子牙齿会被摸得发亮，路过的人很难忍住把手放进去的冲动。所以，你打算——
E: In some of the worlds you traversed, the lion's teeth are usually rubbed smooth by touching hands. Passersby can't help but feel an urge to thrust their hands in its mouth. You decide to...

C: 都说了，不要再假扮旁白了！
E: I told you, stop pretending to be the narrator!

C: 我，呼呼，{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的眷属，看过很多，活了很久，害怕黑夜，害怕湿气，害怕会熄灭。
E: *crackle* I, {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios'{RUBY_E#} Kin, have been the witness to plenty and been burning forever. I fear darkness, fret over dampness, and dread being extinguished.

C: …必须承认，战斗的技巧也是一种智慧。你用智慧征服了我，而我将会离去……
E: I must acknowledge that combat prowess is also a form of wisdom. You have bested me with your great wisdom, and I shall depart...

C: 啧，没品味的东西……
E: Tsk, talk about bad taste...

C: 哦，胜利的宣言，多么美妙！我现在开始相信你也是哈努兄弟的忠实粉丝了。
E: Oh, what a wonderful declaration of victory! I'm starting to be convinced that you're a true Hanu fan.

C: 我们之所以把它一千信用点卖给你，是因为你拿着球棒、面露杀气，看着像个「毁灭」派系大神——宝刀配英雄，你一定能妥善利用它。
E: The reason we're willing to sell it to you for so little is because you're holding a bat, and that murderous expression on your face makes you look like some harbinger of Destruction. A hero needs a favored weapon, and you will surely use it well.

C: 不比你现在好？
E: Isn't it better than your situation now?

C: 路过的好心人，你瞧瞧我的模样，你觉得我是啥？
E: Kind passerby, could you look at me and tell me what you think I am?

C: 寻求帮助是一种解决方案，但并不能一劳永逸…况且我也不是随时都有空。
E: Seeking help is a solution, but it's not a permanent one... Also, I'm not always free.

C: 试着与对方沟通。
E: Try talking to it.

C: …螺丝，我上一次这么佩服你，还是一起建造模拟宇宙的时候。
E: Oh Screwy, the last time I was impressed was when we built the Simulated Universe together.

C: 下竿之后，总是免不了漫长的等待呀。
E: Once the line's cast, there's nothing to do but wait...

C: {NICKNAME}会感同身受吗？光是站在这里，就有种将要踏上奇幻冒险的预感。
E: Do you feel it too, {NICKNAME}? Just standing here makes it feel like a magical adventure's about to begin.

C: 好像在许多故事里，大海扮演的角色都很可怕呢。不是世界的尽头，就是灾难的象征。
E: It seems that in many stories, the sea plays a terrifying role, signifying the end of the world or symbolizing disasters.

C: 不过，人家连贼星的尾巴都没见过。真想知道，比天空更遥远的地方会有什么呀。
E: But I've never even seen the shadow of the Thief Star. I really wonder what's beyond the sky.

C: 嗯。不知不觉，已经发生这么多事了呀……
E: Yeah. Before we know it, so much has happened...

C: 在那「永远」之中，一定有着应当永志不忘的故事，可现在怎么追忆都找不到了。
E: In that "eternity," there must be stories that should never be forgotten, but now no matter how I try to recall them, I can't find them.

C: （钻进木马的肚子里）
E: (Climb inside the wooden horse's stomach)

C: …是不是最近在竞技场里呆太久了，我怎么好像听到有人在求救？
E: ...I feel like I've been spending too much time in the arena lately. I feel like I can hear someone... calling for help?

C: 你曾藏身其中的木马，现在已经失去了意义。或许你可以尝试去追踪那位独身潜入悬锋城的战士，毕竟…你为他指明了道路。
E: The wooden horse that you were hidden inside has now lost all meaning. Perhaps you can try and track down the lone warrior that had infiltrated Castrum Kremnos. You did give him directions, after all...

C: 但大祭司认为外观改造并无必要，反而给神驹安上了车轮，实在令人费解。神驹能随意前往世界各处，怎会需要这种代步工具？可笑！
E: Yet the High Priest rejected the appearance changes and opted to add wheels instead — how perplexing! What use are wheels to a divine foal that can travel anywhere at will? Preposterous!

C: 是的，尚有余裕的昔日，你用微不足道的代价换回的一丝柴薪，如今将把微渺的火光接续。
E: Yes, in the days when time was still abundant, the small bundle of firewood you once obtained at a trivial cost will now carry on the faint glimmer of the flame.

C: 呼呼…呼呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...

C: 你呼唤活火，吉奥里亚的眷从，却并无回应。
E: You call upon the Living Flame, the attendants of Georios, but there is no response.

C: 辛克尔
E: Hinkel

C: 不认识也没有关系，年轻人的口味，我还是想尝一尝的。
E: It doesn't matter. I would like to try what young people eat these days.

C: 对于复兴建设，你有没有什么想法？
E: What's your take on the recovery construction?

C: 我记得艾丝妲站长已经安排了相关部门在进行专门的复兴与安全区开辟吧？
E: I remember Lead Researcher Asta has organized the relevant departments to work on the recovery and establishment of safe zones, right?

C: 毕竟，总不能一直惦记着莱斯莉，对吧？
E: After all, I shouldn't keep thinking about Lesley, should I?

C: 有没有什么难以忘怀的故事？
E: Any unforgettable stories?

C: 是有什么事情要问我吗？艾丝妲小姐吩咐过了，我会尽力配合你和列车组工作的。
E: Ask me anything. I'll do my best to help as per Lady Asta's request.

C: 怎么了，是遇到什么麻烦了吗？
E: Did you encounter some problems?

C: 也许阮•梅早就注意到你了。
E: Maybe Ruan Mei has noticed you for a long time.

C: 我就知道…我是失败品…你们也是失败品，这里就是垃圾回收站，我们注定要被扔进垃圾桶里！喵！
E: I knew it... I'm a failure, and so are all of you. This is the recycling station, and we're destined to be dumped! Meow!

C: 当然，大家的恩情我也不会忘，到时候我也会替聪明的小家伙在阮•梅女士面前美言几句的。
E: Of course, I'm not an ungrateful rat. I'll put in a good word for the smart ones with Miss Ruan Mei.

C: 小家伙一开始还听得津津有味，可没过多久，便被你娓娓道来的惊险故事吓得抱住了头，缩在你脚边瑟瑟发抖。
E: The little guy enjoys the story at first but is soon left aghast by your thrilling tales. It clutches its head and cowers next to your feet, trembling in fear.

C: 只要我的改变足够明显，阮•梅一定会被我的付出所打动的！
E: As long as my changes are significant enough, Ruan Mei will definitely be moved by my effort!

C: 究竟发生了什么，让明辨是非、处变不惊的奥赫玛人停住脚步，把道路围了个水泄不通？
E: What exactly happened to make the discerning and composed people of Okhema stop in their tracks and form such a huge crowd that blocks the road?

C: 辛苦了，{NICKNAME}，谢谢你。这是报酬，请收好。
E: Great work, {NICKNAME}. Thank you so much. Here's your reward, there you go.

C: 对了，上次我说的，一起离开奥赫玛的事，你考虑好了吗？
E: That's right — have you given any thought to what I mentioned last time... about leaving Okhema?

C: 又麻烦你了，我们一会儿见。
E: So sorry to bother you once again. We'll see you later.

C: 呼——终于可以光明正大地戴上你送我的鹰血红项链啦！不用再躲躲藏藏的感觉真好。
E: Whew... I can finally wear the eagleblood necklace that you gave me out in public! It feels so good not having to hide things anymore.

C: 女孩楚楚可怜地看着你，一副「卖不掉故事今天就要饿肚子」的模样。
E: The girl looks at you with puppy dog eyes that seem to say "I'll starve if I don't sell any news stories today."

C: 哎呀，年轻人。要来看看今天新采的水果吗？
E: Hey there, youngster. Wanna see today's fresh fruit?

C: 一个孩子…哦，你是说希瑞雅！那丫头，总是偷吃客人剩下的饭，我印象可深了。
E: A child... Oh, you must mean Serena! That girl is always stealing leftovers off the table. She makes quite an impression.

C: 掏出炎枪。
E: Pull out the flaming lance.

C: 准备？什么样的准备？
E: Get ready? What do you mean by that?

C: 长大以后，我也去当个卫兵吧……
E: When I grow up, I'm gonna be a guard...

C: 他有遮蔽气息的能力？
E: Does he have the ability to conceal his presence?

C: 这也太可怕了…如果真是这样，或许奥赫玛的防守，其实也形同虚设？
E: That's horrifying... If that's the case, are Okhema's defenses just for show?

C: 我来看看你的情况。
E: Just checking how you're doing.

C: …冥顽不灵。也罢，咱俩的辩论从来都没能分个高低。这最后一次，我让你赢。
E: ...You stubborn old fool. Have it your way. We were never able to decide a victor in our debates. Let's count this final one as your victory.

C: 有什么事就直说吧。
E: What is it?

C: 哼，等着吧！之前的我你们科室爱理不理，发表完这篇奇物报告的我，你们全都高攀不起！
E: Hmmm, just you wait! You bureaucrats never used to give a hoot about me, but once I've published this Curio research, you'll all be trying to hire me!

C: 首先是实验用具，你们记得……
E: First of all, the lab apparatus. You remember...

C: 听说你们科在找东西？
E: Hey, I heard your department is looking for some things?

C: 除了故障区域都没问题。
E: Yes, this place is all good except for the faulty areas.

C: 我好像也听说过。
E: I think I've heard of that too.

C: 好吧，谁让我也宣誓了呢。
E: Well, I did swear an oath, so... fair enough.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}不记得我了吗…我叫希瑞雅，之前偷拿过你的钱袋。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you don't remember me? I'm Serena, and I once stole your pouch of coins.

C: 我想当一日刻法勒，能安排吗？
E: I wanna be Kephale for a day. Think you can make it happen?

C: 在某个安静的幕匿时，我对着窗外的刻法勒神体祈祷，突然听到了它的回应。
E: One quiet Curtain-Fall Hour, as I prayed to the statue of Kephale outside the window... I heard them respond.

C: 其他守卫把这枚石制的扩声器交给了我。这是在父亲的身上发现的，是他的号角、他的乐器……
E: The other guards handed me this stone voice amplifier. They found it on my father... it was his horn, his instrument...

C: 抱歉，柯库翁阁下。我认可你在竞技场上的成就，但竞技和战斗不是一回事。我不希望任何人白白送死。
E: Sorry, Lord Glykon. I acknowledge your achievements in the arena, but competition and real combat are not the same thing. I don't want anyone to throw their life away needlessly.

C: 神殿中的怪物都被扫荡干净，克利克搀扶着刻牢刻走下了楼梯。
E: The monsters in the temple were all wiped out, and Kilik helped Kelok down the stairs.

C: 就这么顶着刀锋和箭矢，他们冲进中庭，摔倒在地。
E: Facing blades and arrows, they charge into the courtyard and collapse to the ground.

C: 看不到我，看不到我……
E: I'm invisible... I'm invisible...

C: 选择卷一
E: Select Volume 1

C: 再来一次！
E: One more time!

C: 嗯…不知道您有没有开瓶尝过它的味道，实不相瞒……
E: Well... have you tried it yet? To be honest...

C: 海蛞蝓叫你上工啦——
E: This sea slug needs you to start working again!

C: 换个思路吧，接下来，老身会尝试将其「复现」，即重新创造一个祭台。只是，我需要进一步了解它的原理才行。
E: Let's try something else. I'll try to "recreate" the flavor by building a new altar. But before that, I need to figure out how it actually works.

C: 或许是你曾回溯过它一次的关系，记忆之声如约而至。
E: Their memory speaks to you like greeting an old friend, probably because you've rewound them once already.

C: 这篇论文或许和列车有关…到时候还要请你们接受我的采访，多多提供一手资料。
E: My thesis might just be related to the Express... I hope you'll agree to be interviewed later — I need first-hand information.

C: 如果累了，直接躺在座位上看也行——不论从什么角度看，宇宙总是那么迷人。
E: And if you're feeling a little tired, lie down on the seats instead. The universe is fascinating from every angle.

C: 车窗边简直是最佳观星点，唔，老实说我都有点羡慕了。
E: There's no better place for looking out into the stars than the Express. I envy you guys.

C: 车窗边简直是最佳观星点，唔，老实说我都有点羡慕了。
E: There's no better place for looking out into the stars than the Express. I envy you guys.

C: 贝洛伯格的天空……
E: The sky of Belobog...

C: 嗯，大家都在为更广阔的风景而努力……
E: Mm, everyone's working hard for the bigger picture...

C: ——想象是一切存在的源泉，孩子只需要想象便能理解列车，不需要任何解释。
E: ...Imagination is the source of all existence. Children need only their imagination to understand the Express.

C: 列车，真的在天上飞呢……
E: The Express really does fly up in the sky...

C: 好吧，我承认有那么几秒钟，我产生过这样的想法。
E: Alright, I admit that for a few seconds there, the thought may have crossed my mind.

C: 跟我来就好。
E: Come with me.

C: 打个比方，就像深夜的贝洛伯格，空旷，宁静，却始终亲切。
E: It's like Belobog in the dead of the night: Empty, quiet, but always kind.

C: 姬子小姐与瓦尔特先生告诉我，原来宇宙中远不止克里珀一位「星神」——就连那在七百年前入侵贝洛伯格的异星敌寇，也是某位「星神」的令使。
E: Himeko and Mr. Yang told me that Qlipoth is far from the only Aeon in the universe. For example, the enemies that invaded Belobog <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago were Emanators of another Aeon.

C: 不久前，姬子小姐给我展示了她的收藏。其中有一个叫「卫星」的东西，我很感兴趣。
E: Not long ago, Himeko showed me her collection. There was something called a "satellite" — I was very intrigued.

C: {NICKNAME}，谢谢你邀请我来这里参观列车，放松神经。
E: Thanks for inviting me to the Express, {NICKNAME} — it's been nice to have a break.

C: 你是怎么知道的？
E: How did you know?

C: 还是说，你们在去别人家做客前，难道会和对方先讲一声？
E: Do you always tell people ahead of time before you pay them a visit?

C: 放心，来拜访的时候，我都会主动和你打招呼的。
E: No need to worry — I will always take the initiative to greet you when I come to visit.

C: 我一定常来。
E: Well, then I'll definitely come by more often...

C: 明明是你邀请我的，还要这样平白无故吓人，真是的……
E: It was you who invited me. Why you gotta scare me like that? Honestly...

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: 你一直在做星神相关的研究？
E: You've always been researching Aeons?

C: 我的天，你是第一个站在我的立场为我考虑的人。{NICKNAME}，你真是我的人生挚友！要知道，大家伙儿都觉得我死不足惜，更别提允许我重新做人了！
E: My goodness, you are the first to see things from my perspective. {NICKNAME}, you are indeed my bosom friend! See, everyone else thinks I can't redeem myself even with death, let alone allow me to start over!

C: 和你聊了聊，感觉心里舒服痛快多了。之前我说话老是忍不住去端着架子，说些空话。现在能和你这样推心置腹地说说话，感觉倒是十分难得。
E: I feel a lot better after speaking to you. I used to always put up airs and talk big, but now that I can speak candidly with you, it's actually a rather rare experience.

C: 之后我就要着手准备项目研究的前期工作了，希望有机会可以再和你聊聊天。
E: I'm going to start preparing for the preliminary work of the research project now. Hope we get the chance to chat again in the future.

C: 彦卿原本以为，帕姆老师和将军以前养的朔雪一样，既是可爱的吉祥物也是家人…但刚刚我才察觉到，帕姆老师身上，有一种强者才有的气息……
E: At first, I thought Pom-Pom was like the pet the general used to keep — Snowmoon. Y'know, a cute mascot who's also a member of the family...? Anyway, I soon realized that wasn't the case — Pom-Pom has a strong presence on the Express.

C: 其他人知道洛奇的事吗?
E: Does anyone else know about this?

C: 然后，我们又聊了很多其他星球的自然地理——虽然只是我一直在单方面地听他讲…但那些知识都非常有趣。
E: Then we talked about the geography of lots of other planets. Well, he talked and I listened... but it was very interesting.

C: 你们旅行了这么久，肯定去过比它大得多的地方吧？
E: You've been traveling for so long. Surely you've been to places way bigger than this?

C: 这列车上的餐食，分量实在太小了！下层区条件最差的时候，也不见小吃摊老板这么抠抠搜搜的啊。
E: Uh... The portion sizes on the Express are too small! Things were pretty scarce in the Underworld, but the food stall owners were never this stingy.

C: 咦？你们平时不训练吗？
E: Huh? Don't you train?

C: 师傅和希儿都嫌我话痨，不知道丹恒小哥是不是也这么想？
E: My master and Seele both think that I talk too much. I wonder if Dan Heng thinks the same.

C: 你们这列车上的风景竟还不错。本座久居这太卜司中，囿于洞天中虚假的星空，竟有些忘记了真实世界的壮丽。
E: The sights from this Express of yours are surprisingly pleasant. I've lived within the Divination Commission under the delve's artificial sky for so long that I'd somewhat forgotten the magnificence of the real world.

C: 与姬子闲谈了半日…
E: I chatted with Himeko for hours...

C: 真理往往在兼看兼听之中，若是只能看到自己眼前的东西，那便是播穅眯目，难见大江大河了。
E: Truth often lies in seeing and listening to other perspectives. When one sees only what is in front of them, they are blind to the bigger picture.

C: 好喝吗？
E: Does it taste good?

C: 不过它好像还没吃饱…我还是带它去餐车吧。走了，账账~
E: Still looks kinda hungry, though... I'm just gonna take them to the dining carriage. Let's go, Numby!

C: 呃…它是饿了，不是渴了~
E: Uhh... Numby's hungry, not thirsty.

C: 这是，「咖啡」……
E: This is... coffee...?

C: 我只是希望——假如像星核那样的灾难还要再重来一次——到了那个关头，我们能做好应对的准备。
E: I just hope that if a disaster such as the Stellaron crisis were to happen again, we'd all be prepared for it.

C: …夸你两句怎么还喘上了？哈哈哈，开个玩笑，这种回答才像你嘛。
E: *sigh* You really like a compliment, don't you... Haha, just kidding — that's exactly what I thought you'd say.

C: …呃，你那是什么眼神？别小看我，我也是会翻资料的！
E: ...Hey, what's with that look? I know how to do research too, okay!?

C: 我们是伙伴，应该的！
E: Of course. We're companions!

C: 现在才想这个，已经来不及了…
E: It's too late to doubt yourself.

C: 列车组的人真好。
E: The Express Crew are so nice.

C: 你来啦，刚才我和尾巴大爷正在说，列车上的人很热情，甚至给尾巴准备了「茶点」。
E: Oh, you're here! Mr. Tail and I were just talking about how warm and welcoming the people on the Express are. You guys even prepared some snacks for him.

C: 这怎么好意思…
E: You shouldn't have...

C: 嗯…一种透明玻璃片，透明到几乎不可见。
E: I imagine a slice of clarity, ethereal in its transparency.

C: 一个切片可以由美丽的尘埃、气体和粒子构成，它会如同绛紫色烟雾一样叆叇不绝…绕在指尖。
E: Picture a sliver made up of beautiful dust, gases, and tiny specks, twirling around your finger like a captivating plum-colored mist.

C: 谢谢你…这样清凉的触感，令疼痛也被抚平了几分。
E: The cool touch has alleviated some of the discomfort. It feels a bit better now.

C: 你是哪一种？
E: Which are you?

C: 真希望有一天，列车停靠站台的时候，我也能站在车门边，迎接永不停下脚步的「无名客」们。
E: I really hope that one day I can stand by the door and welcome the ever-wandering "Nameless" onto the Express.

C: 我相信三月七小姐的眼光。其实，我刚才找她一起挑选过，但她现在似乎比我还纠结……
E: I do trust Miss March 7th's taste. Actually, I just tried picking out a few designs with her, but she now seems more conflicted than I am...

C: 智库还挺有意思的嘛~
E: This data bank is quite interesting.

C: 快来快来！我给你带了一点亮晶晶的小东西，打开盒子看看吧！
E: Come quick! I've brought you a shiny little thing. Open up the box and take a look!

C: 咦？我看不见，在哪里？
E: Huh? I can't see them. Where are they?

C: 值得一提的是：我和「老铁」早已成为了能够互相回应彼此意志的伙伴。
E: The only thing worth saying is: Old Mettle and I have long since become partners who can read and respond to each other's will.

C: 为啥只有我俩？！
E: Why just us two!?

C: 我知道的你也知道……
E: You know what I know...

C: 我刚刚听了「洞悉者」大人的讲座，它好厉害哇！
E: I just heard the "Insighter" giving a lecture. It was incredible!

C: 不要的东西可以塞给我哦！
E: You can leave anything you don't want with me!

C: 我怎么会讨厌华莱士？我可喜欢他了，问题是——如果你跟一个人是朋友，就只能赚他一次钱；做客户，能赚无数次。
E: Why would I hate Wallace? I actually like him. The thing is, you can only make money from a friend once. But with a client, you can make as many times as you want.

C: 你回来啦？宜居城郊板块，新的商机新的风口，要不要？
E: You're back? We have all kinds of new suburban commercial prospects. Interested?

C: 不是我自夸，这里的灯光、温度都是我精心设计过的，会犯困倒也正常。
E: Not to brag or anything, but the lighting and temperature here are carefully calibrated by Pom-Pom, so it's normal to get sleepy.

C: 唔…除了毛发灰白以外，看上去倒也还是个正常的人类。
E: Well... Besides the hair, you appear to be normal.

C: 市政厅没派你去下层区吗？
E: Didn't the Town Hall send you to the Underworld?

C: 何不试试白描手法？
E: Then why don't you try a more straightforward style of writing?

C: 还有什么可说的？一桩大便宜就在你的眼前！我上面有人，懂吗？我的内部消息向我透露，这批房子的价格在两年内稳涨不跌。
E: What else can be said? The price is unbeatable! I have friends in high places. You get my drift? My sources have told me that the price of this property will only go up in the next two years.

C: 而你呢？你是个聪明的投资者，赶在开盘前投资进场，过几年就能高价卖出大赚一笔。
E: You, my friend, look like a shrewd investor. Buy it before it's listed and you'll be raking in money in a few years' time.

C: 知道。
E: I do.

C: 不要自暴自弃啊。
E: Don't be so harsh on yourself.

C: 你现在还有在写书吗？
E: Are you still writing books?

C: 听说历史上曾有贵族夫人为此花倾家荡产，这花因此得名「侯爵夫人」了。时至今日，它依然深受上流社会的喜爱。
E: Rumor has it that a noblewoman spent her entire family's fortune on one of these flowers. This was why it was given the name "Marquise." To this day, it is beloved by high society.

C: 没有哦～之前有过几次合作，也称得上是配合无间呢。
E: I don't think so. We teamed up a few times and it always went well.

C: 你吼那么大声干嘛？
E: Why are you yelling?

C: 总之，部队里的氛围太压抑了，现在我只想出来透透气。
E: Anyway, it was so depressing in the army, so I came out to get some fresh air.

C: 真的…感激不尽！
E: I'm... so grateful!

C: 最近吗？听希露瓦小姐说上下层区可能要重新开放了，我正打算回家一趟呢。
E: Serval told me that the Over and Underworlds are opening up again. I'm thinking of heading back home.

C: 再后来，我为了接触接触贝洛伯格的前沿科技，就一人打包行李来到上层区打拼——只是，没想到大守护者的一纸封锁令让我回不了家了……
E: Later, I packed my bags and came here by myself to learn about Belobog's cutting-edge technology. Little did I know, I would be stuck here because of the Supreme Guardian's order...

C: 那你发表点高见呗？
E: Care to enlighten me?

C: 年轻人，过来瞧瞧吧！只要两分钟，就能避免你在未来蒙受损失！
E: Young person, look over here! Just two minutes of your time can save you from future losses!

C: 没想到他反而一脸严肃地问我「你是不是一直盯着打印机看」——
E: Instead, he asked me with a straight face, "Were you staring at the printer?"

C: …这不是自然而然的事吗？那骗子一本正经地跟我理论，又把我给说服了……
E: Doesn't that sound reasonable? So I was tricked again by his apparent sincerity...

C: 抓到之后呢？
E: What will happen after the task force catches him?

C: 感觉你很烦躁啊。
E: You seem upset.

C: 原来进货是为了给自己读啊…
E: So, you've been getting new stock to give yourself things to read...

C: 你问这么多干吗？看你也不像流浪者，难道你是「地火」的人？不对，看你这身衣服不像是下层的风格…莫非你是从上层区来的？
E: Why are you asking so many questions? You don't look like a vagrant. Are you part of the Wildfire? No, you don't dress like you're from the Underworld... Are you from the Overworld?

C: 只是路过，有事先走了。
E: I'm just passing by. I've got somewhere else to be.

C: 对啊，我每天一般只吃一顿饭，这第一顿不就是叫「早饭」吗？
E: Mm-hmm. I usually just have one meal per day. Isn't the first meal of the day called "breakfast"?

C: 你一天都没吃饭？
E: You haven't eaten all day?

C: 我按布洛妮娅姐姐说的，拿着那个奖章换了钱，这才把老爹的债务都还清了。
E: Bronya told me to exchange it for money and that's how I paid off all papa's debts.

C: 那、那个…借、借一步说话！
E: Hey... can I talk to you for a second?

C: 「地火」？
E: Wildfire?

C: 一次帮助可抵两次求助——我们鼓励大家相互支援，一起享受休闲时光。
E: Helping others once grants you two requests for help. We encourage everyone to support each other so that everyone can enjoy some leisure time.

C: 「鼠肉冻」？
E: Rat Jelly?

C: 「地火」只是在银鬃铁卫撤走之后，下层区人自发筹建的维和组织而已。一定要和我们饭店扯上关系的话…我想大概是「客人」吧。
E: Wildfire is just a peacekeeping organization started by people in the Underworld after the withdrawal of the Silvermane Guards. If there is a relationship between us... I would probably say they are our guests.

C: 你别说，我还认识朗道家的人呢。
E: I do know the Landau family.

C: …被你看出来了啊。的确，我脑子里一直在复盘这整件事……
E: ...You can see right through me. Yep, my mind has been going over this whole thing non-stop...

C: …嗯，就这么决定了。从今天起，我要多跟那些外派的公司员工交流，看看能不能从他们身上学到些有用的技能。
E: ...Alright, I've decided. From today forth, I will communicate more with those external IPC workers and see if I can learn any useful skills from them.

C: 平时生意怎么样？
E: How's business normally?

C: 只要你们这趟裂界之行有所收获，我们的努力就算是没白费啦。
E: It's worth our time as long as you're making valuable gains from your trips to the Fragmentum.

C: 我懂，我懂…杰帕德长官也不让我们过多过问，这个话题就此打住吧。
E: Got it, got it... Captain Gepard doesn't like us asking too much either, so let's park this topic for now.

C: 那就等你有心情了再聊吧。
E: Let's carry on later.

C: 你能想到的、银鬃铁卫需要承担的一切职责。
E: Anything you can think of, the Silvermane Guards are responsible for.

C: 谦虚也是一种美德——再加上你的勇气与慷慨…如果像你这样的人能为我们铁卫效力，那将是整个贝洛伯格莫大的荣誉。
E: Humility is a virtue. And with your courage and kindness... if we had someone like you among our ranks, it would be Belobog's utmost honor.

C: 贝洛伯格的夜，谎言灭不了火焰
E: Another Belobog night, a fire the lies can't abide, yeah

C: 关系…不算好，但也不坏。
E: Well... we don't always see eye to eye, but we're not standing eyeball to eyeball, either.

C: 嗯，我是键盘手。
E: Yeah, I'm the keyboard player.

C: 你和朗道家族的关系？
E: What's your relationship with the Landau family?

C: 只要花上一丢丢信用点，你的手机就能脱胎换骨，操作系统将比银河中的星轨更加丝滑……
E: For just a tiny amount of credits, your phone will gain a new lease on life and its operating system will function smoother than the Star Rail that lines the cosmos...

C: 你说不说？
E: Just spill the beans!

C: {NICKNAME}，很高兴再见到你。要是你能马不停蹄去做自己的事，我就更高兴了。
E: Glad to meet you again, {NICKNAME}. I'd be even happier if you could move on from here and onto your business.

C: ...不过，关于比赛的胜负，我跟佩拉打了个赌。
E: ...But here's the thing: I made a bet with Pela about the outcome of the tournament.

C: 你喜欢这份工作吗？
E: Do you enjoy your job?

C: 哼唧！
E: OINK!

C: 橙色和蓝色是互补色哦。
E: That's because orange and blue are complementary colors.

C: 给年轻演员点机会也好。
E: It's good to give the younger actors a chance.

C: 咖啡什么时候重新供应呢……
E: When will coffee be back on the menu...

C: 哇哦……
E: Wow...

C: 这也是没办法的事啊……
E: That's just the way it is...

C: 我去过能源转换设施了……
E: I've been to the energy conversion station before...

C: 不可能吧？我听说他早就交代在裂界里了。
E: No way? I thought he met his maker in the Fragmentum.

C: 要不一起去看看？
E: Wanna go and take a look?

C: 清蒸水晶蝎子…再来一碟……
E: Steamed crystal scorpion... I'll have another serving, thanks...

C: 放工了…上哪儿逛逛呢？
E: Work time's over... Where should I go, then?

C: 速食风干，洞螈肉脯！
E: Air-dried Olm meat slice!

C: …你怎么还倒回去了？
E: ...Why did you start jumping back?

C: 前方是裂界前线。
E: An edge to the Fragmentum lies up ahead.

C: ~雄伟壮丽的雅利洛~
E: O, Jarilo, mighty and grand~

C: 欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。找我这个老头子有什么事吗？
E: Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum, {F#young miss}{M#young man}. Is there anything an old man like me can help you with?

C: 这是贝洛伯格大学下设的学院之一，专门向大学生们提供艺术教育，并为我们这座城市培养更多的艺术人才。
E: It is one of the colleges under the University of Belobog. It specializes in providing art education to its students, so that we can nurture more artistic talents for our city.

C: 请带我进去吧。
E: Please take me in.

C: 我、我只是个贝洛伯格艺术学院的学生而已啦…馆长于尔丹先生是我的导师，我跟着先生来这里开展实习……
E: I... I'm just a student of the Belobog College of Art... Curator Uldan is my mentor, and I'm here to do my internship under him...

C: 哈哈哈，这不是大英雄{NICKNAME}嘛！没想到能在这儿又遇到你啊！我架不住那几个铁卫小伙子软磨硬泡，非要我来做什么导览员，嗐！
E: Ahahaha, well if it isn't our hero, {NICKNAME}? I didn't think I'd see you here! Those Silvermane kiddos were so persistent, so I had to come and be some tour guide, ugh!

C: 我本以为希露瓦大人一定会来参观博物馆，就报名做了志愿导览员…可到现在我都没见过希露瓦大人！难道她不会来了吗……
E: I was thinking, she will definitely visit the museum, so I signed up to be a volunteer tour guide... But I still haven't seen her until now! Is she not coming?

C: 我见老板您是第一次来，请允许我介绍一下自己——前太卜司天才卜者，现鉴爻轩小掌柜，若月是也。
E: Since it's your first time here, allow me to introduce myself. I am the genius diviner, formerly of the Divination Commission, now a humble shopkeeper of the Looking Bronze. My name is Ruoyue.

C: 好啊，您尽管问。只要不涉及商业机密，咱肯定知无不言。
E: Go ahead. I'll tell you everything I know, as long as they're not business secrets.

C: 刚到仙舟的游客经常发出这种感慨。
E: Ah yes, tourists often make this remark.

C: 再见，有空再聊。
E: So long. Catch you again later.

C: 你是不是也觉得蘑菇不该收集阳光？
E: Do you also think mushrooms shouldn't sunbathe?

C: 可你是一朵蘑菇…
E: But you're a mushroom...

C: 嘿嘿，明面上当然是不允许我们搞这些活动的，但私底下，赤衣大人和我们约法三章，只要听话、守规矩，就默许我们搞一点「小买卖」。
E: Heh heh! Of course they can't openly allow us to conduct business, but Madam Chiyi made a private deal with us. As long as we follow the rules and obey instructions, she'll turn a blind eye to our "little venture."

C: 彰显地衡司工作的宣传物料。
E: Promo materials showcasing the work of the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 但那几位判官还是很讲道理的，人家和我说了，只要我能像镜流大人一样立下「十三奇功」，就能给我安排特殊待遇，每周离开幽囚狱，撂地摆摊一天！
E: However, the judges were quite reasonable. They told me that if I could complete "<unbreak>13</unbreak> Outstanding Accolades" like Madam Jingliu, they would grant me special arrangements and allow me to leave The Shackling Prison once every week to set up shop outside!

C: 地衡司虽然允许游商入市，但又规定商贩应在他们规划的位置经营，不得越界。至于划给我的那个位置嘛……
E: Despite the Realm-Keeping Commission allowing traveling traders like us, they regulate us to specified places and don't let us venture beyond. And as for the place they assigned me...

C: 只要你愿意购买我的宝饵堂长生保健产品，你就能和我们仙舟人一样不老不死…用过的人都说好，你要不要来了解一下？
E: You just have to make a purchase of longevity supplements from NutriTreasures, and you can live forever just like us Xianzhou people... Everyone who uses this loves it. What do you say? Want to learn more?

C: 现在没有吗？
E: You don't have any at the moment?

C: 听起来很厉害。
E: Sounds pretty incredible.

C: 我把这名字一换便能故技重施…可不就是可持续发展嘛！
E: By changing my name, I could run the same hustle all over again... And keep on spinning my side-hustle!

C: {NICKNAME}大人，又见面了！不知卑职能如何帮到您？
E: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, we meet again! How am I able to assist you today?

C: 姐，生物科技这个过不了，抚恤金这个…将军点头了，我也没问题，商业贸易那个你们再等等，你们还没跟商团协商过，对吧？
E: Sis, biotech didn't pass, and as for the pension... The general agreed, and I'm fine with it, too. Hit pause on trading for now. You guys haven't negotiated with the trade delegations yet, have you?

C: 好啊，聊啊，顺便你再帮我劝几句。我这小弟根本就不听老姐这边的需求。
E: Great, let's chat. You can also help me persuade this guy. My little brother never listens to his older sister's needs.

C: 是挺好的，不过已经影响到我的正常工作了，实在没有什么可以说的。
E: We do, but it does impact how I do my job. That's all.

C: 档案放一起，不怕被一锅端么？
E: All these files together... are you not worried about them being wiped out in an accident?

C: 总而言之，一个人只要进了幽囚狱，就再也没有任何隐私可言。
E: In summation, as soon as someone enters The Shackling Prison, they have no more secrets left to hide.

C: 我相信每一位地衡司执事的专业素养，尤其是咱们长乐天公廨，噗——
E: I believe in the professionalism of every officer at the Realm-Keeping Commission, especially here in the Exalting Sanctum Chancery. Pfft—

C: 其实大毫大人以前还在云骑军的时候，是我的救命恩人。我仰慕他，也加入了云骑军，拿出十二分的努力表现，才加入了他所在的精英小队。
E: Actually, when Official Dahao was still a Cloud Knight, he saved my life. My admiration of him led me to join the Cloud Knights myself. I worked myself to the bone and eventually, I joined his elite squad.

C: 您这是哪儿的话！这小小薄礼，可实在难以传达我对您的感激与崇敬啊……
E: What are you talking about! It's just a small gift to convey my gratitude and admiration...

C: 不过嘛…让他们俩打一打倒也是好事。每次他们俩陷入这种竞争，两人的报价都会一降再降。
E: Nevertheless... It's great that there's competition between the two. Every time the two of them get into this kind of trade war, their prices drop like crazy.

C: 入乡随俗嘛，换作我的家乡，用「决斗」解决分歧才是正确的礼仪。
E: Gotta follow the local customs, right? Back in my hometown, it's proper etiquette to settle disputes with a "duel."

C: 不过「带着棺木」听着就很神秘，我以前看过星际和平影视里的一个作品——孤独的枪手总是拖着副棺材漫步在泥泞的荒野上，从匪帮手里救下了一位姑娘。
E: But this "merchant with a coffin" you're asking about sounds very mysterious. I once saw a show on IPM with this solo gunslinger dragging along a coffin as he stalks the muddy wilderness, saving a girl from bandits' clutches.

C: 有些事情想问你。
E: There's something I'd like to ask you.

C: 确实挺可爱的。
E: She is actually pretty cute.

C: 对了，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，看你有些面生，也不像是咱们仙舟人，你是来参观的还是来找人的？
E: Oh yes, {F#young lady}{M#young man}, you don't look like you're from Xianzhou. Have you come to visit, or to see someone?

C: 嗯好…哦对了，差点忘了，你要是来参观穷观阵的，你远远地看一眼就好，未经太卜大人许可，外人可是不得靠近的。
E: Fine... Oh yes, I almost forget. If you come and visit the Matrix of Prescience, please view it from a distance. Outsiders are forbidden from approaching it without permission from the master diviner.

C: 好了，没什么事的话以后再聊吧，我手里还有一大堆活儿没做完呢。
E: Okay, if there's nothing else, then let's talk again later. I've still got a mountain of work to get through.

C: 没！有！再说一遍，没有内幕消息。
E: Nope! To re-iterate, I don't have any inside intel.

C: 可惜时机不巧，我现在正在公务执勤，您看这街道上人来人往，鳞渊境不知道还有多少暗流涌动，就藏在这风平浪静之下。
E: It's a shame that it's a bad time. I'm on duty right now. Just look at all these people going about their business peacefully. Who knows how many dark undercurrents still ripple beneath Scalegorge Waterscape, hidden just under the calm surface.

C: 你好像在一直盯着外面看？
E: Why do you always seem to be peering outside?

C: 能聊聊天吗？
E: Can we chat for a bit?

C: 还有些人会给来生留下一封信，祝自己的来生一帆风顺，不要再误入前尘往事之类的。期许本身是好的，但用处嘛…不能说有效，只能说百无一用。
E: Some people even leave a letter behind for their future self, wishing them all the best and imploring them not to commit the same mistakes they did. The intention is good, but as for its usefulness... It is practically useless.

C: 这次就这样吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 我基本上算是在这丹鼎司长起来的。我小时候，周围的大人们就说，这丹鼎司是要衰败了。
E: I kind of grew up in the Alchemy Commission. When I was little, the adults around me kept saying that the commission was going to decline.

C: 您这问得我都不敢答了…怎么说呢，毕竟确实很多信徒都是丹鼎司人士，和其中一些…我还挺熟的……
E: I don't dare to answer such a question... After all, many of the disciples also worked at the Alchemy Commission. So, I'm quite close with some of them...

C: 「而是提供人们做出更明智决策的基础」，我明白，我只是…有些遗憾。
E: "It's to provide a basis for people to make a wiser decision." I understand, but... I just feel somewhat sorry for it.

C: 没错，挺好理解的，对吧？这些落后时代的老家伙，开着落后时代的破店，卖着落后时代的破烂，有任何必要吗？
E: Yeah, that's exactly what I said. Those old geezers are stuck in the past, running outdated stores and selling useless junk. I mean, what's even the point?

C: 放生真的有用吗？
E: Does "releasing" really work?

C: 这金人巷果真名不虚传，就连这空气里，满满的都是柴米油盐酱醋茶的味道。
E: As expected from Aurum Alley. Even its air is full of the scents of ordinary life.

C: 有点儿事想问你…
E: There is something I'd like to ask...

C: 把别人的生物本能定义为「犯罪」，然后进行一场煞有介事的审判…你们人类真的很蠢哦！
E: You define another lifeform's natural instincts as "crimes," then host a show trial about it... You humans are pretty silly!

C: 我虽然不如老师那般饱学，但毕竟也是正式授衔的学士，你以后要是有什么感兴趣的问题，可以随时来和我聊聊。
E: While I'm nowhere near as erudite as Master, I'm an authorized scholar in any case. If you have any questions, please feel free to discuss them with me.

C: 不过总体来说，还是挺好的。最近认识了几个域外来的客人，谈吐和学养都不错。
E: Overall, things are positive. The Outworld customers that I've befriended lately are all decent and well-mannered.

C: 这很正常啦～幽囚狱本质上是个熟人社会嘛，消息传播很快的。
E: That's to be expected. Everyone knows everyone in The Shackling Prison, so word travels fast around here.

C: 到那时候，在这幽囚狱中继续进行以前的研究，也不是不可能…嘿嘿嘿～
E: When that happens, I may even be able to pick up where I left off and continue my research here at the Shackling Prison, hehehe.

C: 你看见一个灵动的身影，在仙舟某处别院中呼朋引伴，与众人齐乐乐融融地玩着帝垣琼玉。
E: You are seeing a swift figure happily playing Celestial Jade with friends in a house somewhere on the Xianzhou.

C: 懂了，你们是电子宠物。
E: I see. You're a virtual pet.

C: 嘿～家人！你来找我玩啦？哼哼，像你这种风云人物，还能百忙之中来找我玩，真不容易～
E: Hi dear~! You came to play with me? Heh heh! A great hero like you, finding time to play with me can't be easy!

C: 好呀，想聊什么话题，小桂子奉陪到底～
E: Alright, what did you want to talk about? Let's get it all out~

C: …{NICKNAME}还是不要知道的为好。
E: ...It's best that you do not know, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你怎么还在幽囚狱？
E: Why are you still at the Shackling Prison?

C: 因为人的意识如果留存在一个她不熟悉的身体中，便会一直感到烧灼，如烈火焚身，跳入冰窟亦不得宽解。
E: It is because when a person's consciousness dwells in a body they are unfamiliar with, they experience a burning sensation so overwhelming that even hiding within an ice cave would provide scant respite.

C: 想打听一下十王司总部在哪？
E: I wanted to ask where the Ten-Lords Commission HQ is?

C: {NICKNAME}大人，您不会刚好听见我在自言自语了吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, you didn't hear me talking to myself just now, did you?

C: 只要我叫你的名字，藏月瓠的程序就会开始辨认您的声纹，只要您答应了，它就会解除功率限制，将您也吸入到葫芦里。
E: If I call your name, the Lunaumbra Gourd's system will begin to recognize your voice print. If you respond, the gourd will disengage its power limiters and draw you inside.

C: 哪里哪里，多亏了{NICKNAME}大人的福，现在心情好多了。
E: Don't be silly, you've really lifted my spirits, {NICKNAME}.

C: 而且这是新款，目前也没有任何折扣的，您这边确定可以接受吗？
E: And this is a new item, so we don't have any discounts available. Are you fine with this?

C: 你是什么？
E: What are you?

C: 在青镞大人的好言相劝之下，他勉强接受了咱们设计师量体裁衣。结果一边量衣一边制版的时候，将军大人还闭上眼睛睡着了。
E: Persuaded by Madam Qingzu, he reluctantly let our tailors measure him. But while we were fussing over him, the general closed his eyes and fell asleep...

C: 想听一些典当的趣事。
E: I wish to hear some amusing stories about this profession.

C: 曲木达直终必弯，夸谈戏言求真难。假作真时真亦假，听我说书得交钱。
E: Curved wood must be bent again to reach straightness, and finding truth from exaggerations and lies takes knack. When the real is fake, the fake is also real, and you need to toss a coin to hear my spiel.

C: 我认识一些靠卖艺维生的曲艺人，戏台子早就没了，想唱戏也没地方…一门艺术就这样消亡了，我还挺舍不得的。
E: I know of artistes who rely on their performance for a living. The theater is a thing of the past, and there's nowhere to sing opera... An art form meeting its demise just like that... a true pity.

C: 「这里就是牢狱最深处？」这铁皮囚犯声音更加低沉地再问了一遍。这一问不打紧，一位在阴影之中饮茶的青年注意到了这名囚犯。
E: "Is this the lowest depths of the prison?" This iron-skinned prisoner asked again, his voice lowered another notch. With this question, a youth sipping tea in the shadows had noticed this prisoner.

C: 哼哼，说出来吓死你。站在你面前的可是特级星槎驾驶员、保险定损甲级专家、乙级护卫舰维修师、特级厨师、星际和平公司C级销售员、甲级玉兆修理工——旭霞！
E: Heheh, you'll be shivering in your boots when I announce my accolades. Standing before you is an S-ranked starskiff pilot, A-ranked damage assessment expert, B-ranked ship mechanic, S-Ranked chef, C-ranked IPC sales associate, and A-ranked jade abacus fixer: Xuxia!

C: 哎，小仙只是追求过一阵子新鲜刺激的生活，何至于沦落至此啊……
E: *sigh* As a celestial, all I wish for is a refreshing, exciting life. How did it end up this way...

C: 你肯定是没有护照偷渡了吧！
E: I bet you absconded without a passport!

C: 我潜入步离人在山间筑的巢城，然后给装上了一个发信器。
E: I stole into the borisin's mountain city and installed a signal emitter there.

C: 说起来，「不夜侯」的西衍先生赏识我们，所以我们有时候也能在茶馆里说上几段，钱赚得不多，主要是赚个经验。
E: Speaking of which, Mr. Xiyan over at the Sleepless Earl is a fan of ours, so we sometimes perform a few skits at the teahouse. We don't earn much money, but the experience is priceless.

C: 有缘再会。
E: Until we meet again.

C: 但那家伙毕竟是妖怪。力大无穷，站起来足有三四个人高，铜铃般的眼睛，火灼灼的，一身铜皮铁骨。大家伙儿就算一齐上，也不过是白饶了许多性命。
E: But he was a demon after all. He was inhumanly strong, taller than several adults, with eyes big as bronze bells that flickered like fire, and really tough skin. Even if everyone attacked him at the same time, people would still get killed by him.

C: 持明一族寿数有限，每过几百年，就会重新化为龙卵，再从卵中重生。不过，重生之后就不会再记得上一世的记忆了。
E: The Vidyadhara has a fixed lifespan, and every few hundred years we revert to an egg so that we can be reborn. However, after the rebirth, none of our memories from the previous life is retained.

C: 关于驭空大人…
E: About Madam Yukong...

C: 我劝过你，你还有美好的人生，不值得为此丧命。
E: As I've told you before, you should embrace your life instead of throwing it away so carelessly.

C: 直到有一天，回头看的时候，世界上已经只剩下了两种人，一种是我，一种是弱者。
E: It wasn't until one day when I looked back on my life that I realized that I can now sort people of this world into two categories: Myself, and the weak.

C: 这是什么新型诈骗方式？
E: What new scam are you running?

C: 我们下次再聊吧。
E: Let's talk again sometime.

C: 不打扰你啦。
E: I should stop bothering you now.

C: 奖品太多啦。比如再来一瓶、知更鸟小姐演唱会门票、匹诺康尼豪华旅游套餐，甚至还有苏乐达一年免费畅饮权！
E: There are so many! One More Bottle, Miss Robin's concert tickets, Penacony luxury travel packages, and even a year's free supply of SoulGlad!

C: 想找你聊聊。
E: Can we chat?

C: 最近司辰宫访客好多…
E: There're lots of visitors at the Palace of Astrum these days...

C: 配合戒严，共克时艰。
E: Abide by the curfew, and overcome tough times together.

C: 新星槎该叫什么名呢？
E: What should we call the new starskiff models?

C: 哟，我正在考虑报道的事呢。怎么，需要一些舆论服务？
E: Why, hello! I was just thinking about my next article. So, are you looking for help with influencing public opinion?

C: 好啊，慢走，回头记得关注我在《曜青体育》上的专栏。
E: Sure. See you around, and don't forget to follow my column in Yaoqing Sports!

C: 别听他胡说，仙舟司部可是出了名的清廉……
E: Don't listen to his nonsense. The Xianzhou government is famously anti-corrupt...

C: 你误会了，我不缺乏满足感，我是为了罗浮万民的满足感。
E: You're mistaken, I do not lack satisfaction, I do it for the satisfaction of the Luofu's citizens.

C: 根本没有我！
E: Not me!

C: 当季首选鳞渊春。
E: Nothing beats Whale-Tide Spring this time of year.

C: 论文？
E: Thesis?

C: 帮我向彦卿大人要个签名吧…
E: Can you help me get Master Yanqing's autograph?

C: 是你，我很满意。
E: It's you. I'm very happy.

C: 你好可怕。
E: You're scary.

C: 我是不会对你使出全力的。
E: I'll never unleash my full might on you.

C: 难道不是因为你无法晋级？
E: It's not because you can't get ahead to the next level?

C: 前世的「我」，那可是位武学大家。在「我」即将蜕生前，便将自己平生所学记录在册，其中也包含了呼吸吐纳，御气和拳脚的功夫。
E: The previous "me" was a master martial artist. Before "I" was reborn, I would record all I learned in a journal, including the skill of exhalation, Qi suppression and unarmed combat moves.

C: 有什么值得注意的新人？
E: Any newcomers I should pay attention to?

C: 我该走了，给我算一卦吧。
E: Please do a divination for me before I go.

C: 我该走了，给我算一卦吧。
E: Please do a divination for me before I go.

C: 我一紧张就肚子疼…
E: My stomach hurts whenever I get nervous...

C: 这个有年龄分级…
E: It's age-restricted...

C: 工作性质不同吧…
E: We work different jobs...

C: 我们会安全吗？急死我了。
E: Will we be safe? My anxiety is through the roof.

C: 织机绝对没出错啊，「三又四分之三」，这就是太卜司明日重病就医的人数。
E: The loom of the universe weaves only the truth. "Three and three-quarters," this is the number of the seriously ill who'll be treated tomorrow by the Divination Commission.

C: 你误会我了，伙计。
E: You've got me wrong, my friend.

C: 仙舟罗浮最实惠低价团。
E: This is the most affordable tour on the Luofu.

C: 你是什么时候发现的呢？
E: When did you find out about that?

C: 你是不是瞧不起别人？
E: Are you looking down on me?

C: 密探好酷，你怎么知道的？
E: That's so cool. How did you know about that?

C: 这里和以前不一样了……
E: This place isn't the same as it used to be...

C: 哎…哎！说了你也不懂。
E: *sigh* You won't get it even if I tell you.

C: 笑，笑容，温暖的笑容…塞涅俄丝大人，这可是最关键的哦。
E: Smiles, laughter... A warm smile is most important, Lady Seliose.

C: 没错，排在我们前面的有缇宋、缇宇、缇官、缇赛、缇宫、缇宙、缇容……
E: That's right, ahead of us there's Trissha, Triyew, Tricome, Trissy, Trigone, Tricorne, Trilawney...

C: 或许…下次我们再见面的时候，已经有了一些可以与阁下分享的诗句了。
E: Perhaps... when we meet again, I'll have some verses to share with you.

C: 唔…事情是这样。缇安想要火箭，飞得更高更远！
E: Well... here's what happened. Trianne wanted a rocket to soar higher and farther!

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈，不错，很不错！
E: Hahahahaha, good, very good!

C: 无从读起，困惑了吧？
E: Don't know where to start? Confusing, isn't it?

C: 请务必好好珍藏——不如，就摆在你的床头吧？
E: Make sure to treasure it well. How about displaying it by your bedside?

C: 宴饮的请求我已应承，现在，你们也不该再推搪我对弈一局的邀请了吧？
E: I've accepted your proposal for a drink, surely you two will quit stalling on my invitation for a chess game, right?

C: 我可是一位大艺术家。
E: I'm a famous performer.

C: 你不懂，这叫台下互动。
E: You don't understand. This is called crowd work.

C: 我跟你不一样，我是搞诈骗的。
E: Unlike you, I scam others.

C: 那能隔空点穴把人定住么？
E: Then, what about stunning people in space by telekinetically jabbing their meridian points?

C: 请确保身上无金属物品，通过安检门。
E: Please ensure that you're not carrying any metallic objects, then pass through the security gate.

C: 好姐姐，那艘星槎好漂亮。
E: Big sis, that starskiff is so pretty.

C: 形虎拳法，健身防身。
E: Tiger Fists for fitness!

C: 欢迎您抵达竞锋舰。
E: Welcome aboard the Skysplitter.

C: 别忘了，深渊也在凝视你。
E: Alright, don't forget that the abyss stares back at you.

C: 你反复确认，自己绝对没来过这里，可周身的环境总给你一种回家的感觉。
E: You repeatedly confirm that you've definitely never been here before, but your surroundings make you feel as if you've returned home.

C: 具体来说是什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 在全幽囚狱戏份最多的片场之一，石门非常荣幸地错过了所有的出镜机会，所以，它打算用静坐表示自己的抗议，虽然并没人在意。
E: One of the sets in the Shackling Prison where much of the drama occurs. The stone door is very privileged to have missed all the chances to appear thus far. Therefore, it has decided to sit in silent protest, although no one will notice.

C: 材质：纸本水墨，不明液体
E: Materials: Ink and paper, unknown liquid

C: 长草的研究员。
E: The researcher growing grass.

C: 《桩•师傅》系列雕塑
E: Dummy Master statue series

C: 我是～电子改造人！
E: I am~ A man-made cyborg!

C: 可是舰船的失速却愈演愈烈，你开始感觉到重力不在你的脚下——
E: But the ship's deceleration is intensifying. You begin to feel gravity slipping away from under your feet...

C: 当然可以，船长。请您输入语音秘钥！
E: Of course, captain. Please enter your voice password.

C: 为了待会去小卖部整点油炸土豆条。
E: To go to the General Store later and get some fries.

C: 是我，{NICKNAME}。
E: It's me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 继续听下去也只是头昏脑涨，在你不知不觉间，家长已经带着孩子离开了。
E: Listening to them anymore will only get your head spinning even harder. Before you realize it, the parent has already left with his child.

C: 应援物走团建预算么？
E: Will cheering props be included in the team-building budget?

C: 现代与传统的碰撞！
E: Clash between modernity and tradition!

C: 换卢卡登上巅峰！
E: In exchange for Luka to reach the top!

C: 要以卢卡为榜样！
E: Luka is our role model!

C: 会有人在这池水中洗澡吗？如果有，那也太没素质了。
E: Would anyone bathe in the pool? People who do so are uncivilized.

C: 「步离人具有部分犬类的解剖学特征。能征善战，擅以生物科技制造武器、铠甲甚至飞船，奴役并改造其他智慧种族在诸多星球间进行劫掠。」
E: "Borisin have some anatomical features of canines. Besides being valiant fighters, they excel at making weapons, armor, and even spaceships using biological technologies. They enslave and modify other intelligent races to attack and plunder other planets."

C: 「在联盟对抗丰饶孽物的征程中，博识学会曾于星历<unbreak>5749</unbreak>年派遣博学士军团加入第二次丰饶民战争，协助击退了围困玉阙仙舟的丰饶令使『倏忽』。」
E: "During the resistance of the alliance against the Abominations of Abundance, the guild once dispatched a troop consisting of the Learned to join the 2nd of the Abundance Wars in <unbreak>5749</unbreak> SC. The troop helped in defeating Shuhu, an Abundance Emanator that besieged the Yuque."

C: 我是乐队的粉丝！
E: I'm a fan of the band!

C: 要不我俩官宣得了！
E: Why don't we just make an official announcement?

C: 无论如何，这或许意味着你得时时揣着它了——前提是它确实是一颗炸弹。
E: In any case, this means that you'll probably have to carry it around with you everywhere — that is, if it's really an actual bomb.

C: 留给真爱吧！
E: Leave it to true love!

C: 棱角分明的新鲜水果，显然摊主对自家水果有严格的面数要求。
E: Fresh fruit with distinct edges. It is obvious the stand owner has strict requirements for the number of sides for the fruits sold.

C: 一束娇艳欲滴的蓝色玫瑰。它的花瓣比波月古海更蓝，仿佛盗取了整个鳞渊境的蓝色，凝结成了一束鲜花。
E: A single bouquet of delicate blue roses in bloom. Its petals are a deeper blue than the Lunarescent Depths, as if all the blue of the Scalegorge Waterscape has been stolen and condensed into this one single bouquet.

C: 你接受了地衡司的感谢，但拒绝了酬劳。身为仙舟人民的老朋友，这种事只是举手之劳而已。
E: You accept the Realm-Keeping Commission's gratitude but decline their rewards. As an old friend of the Xianzhou people, this just comes naturally to you.

C: 默默走开！
E: I'm out of here!

C: 「货运飞行士凤云，沉默寡言，不善交际。曾为斗舰飞行士，从军时未立寸功，退役后默默无闻。」
E: "Cargo pilot Fengyun was a taciturn and unsociable man. Once a fighter pilot, he retired from the army without merit and fell into obscurity."

C: 如果一个现象只能在人的主观体验中发生，那不就是心理作用吗？你才不信这些「学者」的胡说八道，他们无非是为了骗些研究经费罢了。
E: If a phenomenon only works under the influence of the human subconscious, doesn't that make it no more than a psychological placebo effect? You refuse to believe these so-called scholars. They're just trying to scam grant agencies for money.

C: 都是迷信，我没什么兴趣。
E: It's all superstition. I'm not interested.

C: 当然是做人好。
E: Human, of course.

C: 不，我不是那个意思…您说的对，「一切献给琥珀王」。
E: No, that's not what I mean... You're right: "All for the Amber Lord."

C: 飞碟堡，匹诺康尼颇负盛名的美食之一。据说某些酒馆里正在举办「不用手吃飞碟堡」的比赛。
E: Floatdisc Burger, one of Penacony's most famous delicacies. Rumor has it that some taverns are hosting a "Hands-free Floatdisc Burger Eating Contest."

C: 在匹诺康尼，不管要去哪里，都可以手捧一桶爆米花以作消遣。
E: No matter where you go in Penacony, you can hold a bucket of popcorn as a pastime.

C: 为普通人提供服务的苏乐达俱乐部。相比于饮料本身，「邂逅」才是这里更珍贵的商品。
E: A SoulGlad club that provides services for ordinary people. Even more than the beverage itself, "encounters" are a much more precious commodity here.

C: 你盯着成堆的电视，感觉无数只眼睛也在同时盯着你。
E: You stare at the pile of televisions, and feel like there are countless eyes staring at you at the same time.

C: 「您正在呼叫的是，『绿洲的时刻』。愿您在日光公园的午后尽享安恬。」
E: "You are calling the Moment of Oasis. Please enjoy a peaceful afternoon at Sunshine Park."

C: 「广告位招租，价高者优先。」
E: "Billboard space for rent. Highest bidders first."

C: 这确实是个不容易发现的地方。向你介绍这里的人一定非常珍视你们的关系、才会把这幅美景与你分享。
E: It's not an easy place to find. The person who introduced it to you truly values your friendship by sharing this view.

C: 「嘿，你知道吗！」古怪的屏幕兴致勃勃地叫住了路过的你，「从现在起，我『免费』啦！」
E: "Hey, did you know!" The odd screen excitedly stops you as you pass, "From now on, I'm free!"

C: 即便猎犬失去了踪影，那道令人不安的品红色视线依旧缠绕着你。
E: Even after the Hound has disappeared, the lingering sanguine sight continues to unsettle you.

C: 因为各路机缘巧合，「家族」得以接手梦想之地。我们付出了巨大的努力，终于扭转了匹诺康尼在星间的恶劣的口碑，建成了你眼前的盛会之星。
E: Thanks to a string of coincidences, The Family was able to take over this land of dreams. We spared no effort and finally turned around Penacony's bad reputation in the universe, then transformed it into the Planet of Festivities that you now see.

C: 我没兴趣。
E: Not interested.

C: 关于理财产品…
E: About your financial products...

C: 您的意思是，那个电影里的，钟表小人…在现实里真的存在？
E: You mean, the character Mr. Pocket Watch from the movie... exists in reality?

C: 你都写过什么小说？
E: What sort of novels have you written?

C: 这…这故事简直比小说还要精彩、还要宏大！
E: This... This story is simply far more thrilling and awesome than a mere novel!

C: 可惜，你终究不是皮皮西人。按照规定，我不能让你入场。
E: But unfortunately, you are not a Pepeshi, and I'm not allowed to let you pass.

C: …哈？我没听错吧？…你敢把这句话对着匹诺康尼的所有皮皮西人都说一遍吗？
E: ...Huh? Did I hear that right? ...I dare you to say that again in front of all the Pepeshi people in Penacony to hear.

C: 某个绝对不该出现于此的东西。它的存在是如此刺眼，就像汽水瓶口的弹珠，衬衫领上的口红印，以至于你无法忽视。
E: Something that has absolutely no business being here. Its presence is so offensive — like marbles in a soda bottle, or lipstick on a shirt collar — that it's impossible to ignore.

C: 拍拍它的额头。
E: Pat it on the head.

C: 摸摸它的肚子。
E: Rub its belly.

C: 看什么看！没见过和你不一样的生物吗？！
E: What are you looking at? Have you never seen a creature that's different from you before!?

C: 你怎么看待那些新闻？
E: What do you think of the news?

C: 对职业的热忱消散后，维塔利的脑子里就只剩下了生意经。
E: Now that the passion for his career has melted away, Vitali's mind is only filled with business ideas.

C: …再见。
E: ...Bye.

C: 和芸芸众生被缺陷填满的生命一样，我的画作里也尽是瑕疵。我的生命本不完整，自然也不可能交出完整的画作。
E: Like how lives are filled with imperfections, my paintings are filled with flaws. My life isn't complete, so naturally, I can never create a complete artwork.

C: 上一秒嘴里还是甜言蜜语，下一秒转头就拉起别人的手——广告牌看得一清二楚！假的，全都是假的！！
E: One minute you're whispering sweet nothings and the next, you're holding someone else's hand... This billboard sees everything clearly! It's fake! It's all fake!!!

C: 我的师父，他真是位伟大的工匠。您觉得呢？
E: My master was truly a great craftsman. Don't you think?

C: 我出身商贾之家…我们老钱家啊，世世代代都在和钱打交道。
E: I come from a merchant family... We've been dealing with money for generations.

C: 或者还有什么你看得上眼的，只管说就是。别看我这一套行头朴素，但在正经事上我可从来不吝啬。
E: Or there might be something else you fancy, just let me know. I may look like a commoner, but I'm never stingy where it matters.

C: 既拥挤不堪，高峰时段还经常找不到座位。前些日子的新闻，不知道您有没有听说，有好几位皮皮西宾客，在过路口的时候差点被球笼给撞了。
E: They're crowded to the point where you can't even find a seat during peak hours. I don't know if you've heard the recent news, but a few Pepeshi guests were also almost run down by one of these Spheroids while crossing the road.

C: 让我来教教你，我是动漫高手。
E: Let me teach you. I am an anime expert.

C: 家族会为您提供最正规、最安全的入梦服务。入梦期间，护理师会负责照看您留在现实中的身体。
E: Please feel assured. The Family offers the most secure authorized service, along with a flawless dreaming experience. During your dive, a nurse will attend to your physical body in reality.

C: 机动球？那是什么…
E: Roboball? What is that...?

C: 你真的是个皮皮西吗？
E: Are you really a Pepeshi?

C: 送你了！
E: You can have it!

C: 这些{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}请您收下吧。您的贡献一定会给其他宾客带来无限的快乐！
E: Please accept these {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}. Your contribution will undoubtedly bring immense joy to other guests!

C: 溜号同桌、打架王和班长这三个性格迥异的人居然是好朋友，换做任何人都难以想象。有一天放学之后，他们三个围到了你的课桌前——
E: To everyone's surprise, these three individuals with such contrasting personalities are actually close friends. One day, after school, the three of them gather around your desk...

C: 贵宾，请您见谅。
E: Please bear with me, my esteemed guest.

C: 清凉爽口。
E: It has a refreshing taste.

C: 啊，我已经迫不及待要与你展开一段如此美妙的旅程了！
E: Oh, I can't wait to begin a journey as magnificent as that with you!

C: 本型号独轮飞车使用特制接口，请您购买适配的充电插头进行操作。
E: This vehicle uses a special connector. Please purchase a suitable charging plug for charging.

C: 本型号独轮飞车采用开放式车厢设计，您可在蹬踩过程中轻松欣赏沿途风景，绝不会乏味。感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快。
E: This vehicle has an open carriage design that allows you to admire the scenery along the way while pedaling. Your journey will never be dull. Thank you for your cooperation.

C: 你原本以为必须要念点什么咒语才行，不过现在看来，只需要站在它面前就够了。
E: You thought you needed to recite some spell to make the machine work, but now it seems like you only have to stand in front of it.

C: 我见过其他小鸟了。
E: I've met the other birdies.

C: 小鸟抖了抖翅膀，转身飞走了。
E: The bird flaps its wings and flies off.

C: 灰色的朋友，你们的旅途应该也快要迎来下一站了吧？我还有守护美梦小镇的任务在身，就不和你们一起上路了——
E: Gray-haired friend, your journey is approaching its next stop too, no? I still need to protect Dreamville, so I won't be going with you...

C: 嘶…某些逐梦客，真是让人气到牙痒痒！
E: Hmph... Some Dreamchasers are just so annoying!

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 稍微动一点点心思，就能轻易骗过星际和平公司最强大的安保系统。哪怕你是无家可归的流浪汉，只要身份信息检测通过，同样可以坐进他们的贵宾室！
E: With just a small amount of effort, you can easily fool the Interastral Peace Corporation's most powerful security systems. Even a homeless person can get into the IPC's VIP lounge as long as they pass the ID verification!

C: 我难道真的不知道什么「只要在匹诺康尼工作满<unbreak>30</unbreak>年，就可以拿到永久居留权」这种瞎话是他们唬我玩的吗？
E: You think I don't know that all this "as long as you work in Penacony for <unbreak>30</unbreak> years you can get a permanent residency" stuff is all lies?

C: 一座巨大的沙盘，以固定比例真实还原了「黄金的时刻」街巷风貌。
E: A giant sandpit that has realistically replicated the streets and alleys of "Golden Hour" on a smaller scale.

C: 圆桌不似长桌，没有主次和对立关系，极有可能是「同谐」命途的星神候补。
E: Unlike a long table, round tables have no sense of priority or opposition, it is very likely that they are an Aeonic candidate for the Path of Harmony.

C: 哎，现编的笑话果然不够味。要不这样，干脆聘请我来你们酒吧做驻场脱口秀演员吧！
E: Ah, jokes are never funny when you make them up on the spot... I know, why don't you hire me as a resident stand-up comedian in your lounge?

C: 我的人生目标，就是和你维持现状。
E: My dream in this life, is to be like this with you, forever.

C: 我可以告诉你当时的事，但你必须回答一个问题。
E: I can tell you what happened back then, but you need to answer me a question.

C: 这是我摸鱼时候研究出来的小技巧，可以通过体感来控制灯光。你看，顺时针挥手是渐暗，逆时针是渐亮……
E: This is a little trick I came up with while I was slacking off to control the lights by using hand motions. You see, waving clockwise dims the lights, while counterclockwise brings them up...

C: 休息五分钟——该喝水的喝水，该加油的加油。
E: Take five — rehydrate and refuel if you need it.

C: 红哨小姐连续发出一阵短促、欢快的哨音，片场的空气中充斥着热爱的香气。
E: Miss Red Whistle lets out a series of short, cheery whistles. A sweet smell of enthusiasm fills the film set.

C: 所以我现在就躺平咯。在这地方和大伙聊聊天，唠唠家族的闲话，也挺舒服的。
E: So, I'm out of the game now. I'm pretty cozy just chatting with people around here and gossiping about The Family.

C: 好像是张通缉令…
E: I think it was a wanted poster...

C: 说真的，{M#哥们}{F#姐们}，这几天我在想…我干脆要不就住在这儿，不回去了。
E: If I'm honest, {M#mister}{F#miss}, I've been thinking the past few days... Maybe I should just live here and not bother going back?

C: 好吧，下不为例。
E: Fine, just this once.

C: 科琳皱起了眉，表情却并不夸张。
E: Colleen's face folds into a gentle frown.

C: 听说博识学会向来以传播知识为使命，也许我应该联系他们。感谢你的意见，年轻人。
E: I hear that the mission of the Intelligentsia Guild has always been to spread knowledge. Maybe I should contact them? Thank you for your thoughts, youngster.

C: 多么希望是这样啊，可惜我学习的知识让我难以相信这点…但梦境本就是混杂着「神秘」的忆域，或许真的是她本人！
