E: How much I wish that were the case. Unfortunately, my knowledge makes it hard for me to believe that... However, Dreamscapes are originally Memory Zones with Enigmata mixed in. Maybe that was really her!

C: 呃…我懂！谁不想要一位钟表小子一样的朋友啊！
E: Eh... I get it! Who doesn't want a friend like Clockie?

C: 太遗憾了，下次让我给你推荐几集经典的钟表小子动画吧！你一定会爱上这个可爱的角色的！
E: What a pity! Let me recommend to you some of his classic cartoons next time! I'm sure you'll love this adorable character!

C: 哎呀，别担心，这些都不是什么秘密，而且大家也早就走出了曾经的阴影。那么现在说回小号先生……
E: *Oooh* Don't worry. These aren't secrets at all and everyone has left their dark pasts well behind them. So then, getting back to Mr. Trumpet...

C: 给我讲讲折纸小鸟的故事…
E: Tell me the story of the origami birds...

C: 嗯？看来你已经找到所有小鸟了。
E: Hmm? Looks like you found all the birds.

C: 等我把你们抓回来，一定要狠狠地操练你们一顿啾！
E: Wait till I catch all of you, I'll make you all train till you beg for mercy, tweet!

C: 人家现在遇到了好大的困难，客官您一定要帮帮人家啾。
E: Now that I'm in big trouble, you must help me out, tweet.

C: 哈哈哈，我们就是需要像你一样高觉悟的员工！
E: Hahaha, we need more insightful workers just like you!

C: 拜托，命运，让我发挥完余热之后再熄灭吧……
E: I would plead with destiny to allow me to shine bright with whatever I have left before I am extinguished...

C: 基尔克沉默了，他之前的热情奔放荡然无存。即使他的外壳无法看出表情，你也能在与你完全不同的钢铁生命之上，感受到一种让你为之共鸣的悲伤。
E: Kirk goes silent, his prior passionate enthusiasm evidently absent. Even if his chassis betrays no change in emotion, you can feel a sense of sorrow that resonates with you from that life wrapped in steel that is a stark contrast to your fleshy self.

C: 在我看来那才是驾驶航船的意义所在，无论是星间，又或者是忆域深处的暗流…那才是我应该去的地方，而不是在这十二个时刻当中打转。
E: As far as I'm concerned, that is the true meaning of sailing a ship. Regardless of whether I'm journeying among the stars, or traveling through the undercurrents of the Memory Zone Depths... those are the places where I should be heading toward, not wasting my time visiting the twelve moments again and again in an endless cycle.

C: 您或许也听说过那些以星穹为尺度丈量世界的无名客？他们行于星间，展开自己的冒险……
E: You have perhaps heard of the Nameless, who measure the world in terms of stars? They traverse the cosmos and embark on their own adventures...

C: 蛋挞
E: Egg Tart

C: 尽管已经是很模糊的记忆了，但在很久很久之前，我或许还会因为见到形状奇特的贝壳而雀跃不已……
E: The memory is hazy now but a long, long time ago, I would have been excited to find a curiously shaped shell.

C: 很令人惊讶的构造吧？据说诞生于某个处于极夜的星球，几乎只能拥有十五分钟的寿命。
E: Astonishing, isn't it? They come from a planet of eternal night and only have a lifespan of about <unbreak>15</unbreak> minutes.

C: 又被退回了？他们到底有没有认真看完啊……
E: Rejected again? Did they even read the whole thing?

C: 不过，另外两样，又何尝不是美食？
E: But what about the other two? You don't think they're gourmet?

C: 现在想想…我真是太傻了。因为抽到这种大奖的概率太小太小，我总觉得在旅途结束后必须得到些什么才行…结果因为患得患失，本来之不易的旅行反倒变成负担。
E: Now that I think about it, I've been too naive. The slim chances of snagging the grand prize made me feel that I should squeeze every drop out of the vacation... But my obsession has turned this hard-won trip into a mental burden instead.

C: 但不是也有人那样说过吗——「我们是为了采摘苹果而进入果园，但最终我们得到的，是林中一日，斑驳的光线和时间。」
E: As someone once put it: "We set out to the orchard for apples, but we return with a day filled with nature, speckled sunshine, and cherished moments."

C: 好了，不逗你了，我们回头再聊。姐姐我要去参加下一场派对了，看我这身限量版…哼哼，不把其他住客迷死！
E: Haha, enough teasing. Catch you later! I've got another party to hit. Heh, all the other guests are totally going to go gaga over my limited-edition gown!

C: …功劳越来越少，苦劳越来越多咯。所以比起公司的项目，我现在更在意的是副业…哎，艾丽卡花钱大手大脚的，真不知道在退休前能不能靠她那个公司捞够钱……
E: I'm putting in more effort but getting recognized for a lot less. That's why I'm more focused on my other job now. It's just that Erica's a big spender, so I'm not sure if I can make enough with her company before I retire.

C: 啾！多亏了客官，大家才能安全团聚，人家一定会报答您的啾！
E: Tweet! Everyone was only reunited safely thanks to you. I will definitely repay you, tweet!

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*？
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*?

C: 哦这个呀…因为以前招的临时工比较多，人员流动性大，为了方便和其他同事交接，在这个岗位上的通通被称为「零食工」。
E: Oh. We had a large bunch of temps in the past and employee turnover rate was high. Everyone who worked in this position was known as Snack Vendor to facilitate the handing over procedures.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 到了那个时候，我要告诉我的小孩：「看，妈妈在历史书上还留下过几笔呢！」
E: By that time, I'll tell my children, "Look, you can even find traces of mom in the history books!"

C: 好的，船长您请便。
E: I see. Please enjoy your walk, captain.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 你是螺丝咕姆的侍从？
E: Are you Screwllum's attendant?

C: 可那规整的领结啊，总让我喘不上气，爵士那股优雅和上流的味，也少了些自我表达的契机。
E: However, I always felt like the neat necktie was suffocating me, and that the elegance and sophistication of jazz did not give me much opportunity for self-expression.

C: 货币…人脉…对无价之物而言，又有什么意义呢？
E: Wealth and networks... How do they compare to things that are truly invaluable?

C: 还好你有自知之明。
E: At least you have some self-awareness.

C: 你喜欢那位「哈鲁」？
E: You like that Haru girl, don't you?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 皮皮西是一个德智体美全面发展的种族，我们并不只有脑子好。
E: The Pepeshi people are developed in morality, intelligence, physicality, and beauty! We are more than just clever.

C: 比如老是来烦我的那家伙，要不是因为惹到他，恐怕他绝对不会和我有任何交集。
E: It's like that guy who is always bothering me. If I hadn't angered him, I fear he never would have bothered interacting with me at all.

C: 学院的资深教授，上课讲的内容却漏洞百出，你说好不好笑？
E: He's an experienced academy professor, yet his teachings were full of holes. Isn't that ridiculous?

C: …有点离谱。
E: ...That's outrageous.

C: 既然这么喜欢跟我交流，不如下学期来选修我的课程吧？我打算讲「翁瓦克的民俗与文化」，一点都不难，还有挺多课外实践。
E: As you enjoy talking to me so much, how about taking my elective next semester? I plan to teach the customs and culture of Vonwacq. It's super easy and there will be loads of extracurricular activities.

C: 那位教授…纯粹的知识无法为他带来任何喜悦，只是他用以营生的工具、博得名利的踏板。
E: That professor... Pure knowledge brings him no joy. It is just a tool for him to make a living, a springboard for fame.

C: 那我就直说了——朋友，你听过「折纸大学七大不可思议」吗？
E: I'll get straight to the point... My friend, have you heard of The Seven Wonders of Paperfold University?

C: 传说梦境中有散播「死亡」的可怖怪兽，一旦被它掳走，人们在现实中的 躯体就会成为一具空壳。
E: Rumor has it that there is a terrifying monster in the Dreamscape that spreads "death." If someone is taken away by it, their bodies in the real world will be left as empty shells.

C: 不过虽然那人是这么说的，我总觉得事情不会这么简单。你想啊，能轻而易举地斩断天空…这可不是普通游侠能做到的……
E: Although that's what they told me, I don't think it's that simple. Think about it. Cutting the sky in half with ease... That's not something a simple Ranger could do, is it...?

C: …唔…小点声，不要再爬来爬去的了…磁带摩擦的声音太吵…听不清广播了……
E: ...Ahh... Quiet, stop crawling around... The sound of the tape is too loud... I can't hear the broadcast clearly...

C: 谁说只有八个了？除去小猴，还有个新收录的怪谈叫「锈墨电台」…喂，你那是什么表情？四大天王有五个，七大不可思议有九个，这不是常识吗？
E: There are not just eight, you know! It's not just the monkey, there's even the newly recorded ghost story of the Rusty Ink Radio Station, too! ...Hey, what's with that look on your face? There are five people in the Formidable Four, right? It's only normal that there would be nine of the Seven Wonders, right?

C: 嗯，我就是大家口中「那个跑龙套的」，但我觉得无所谓呀，凡事总要有第一步的，慢慢来嘛。
E: Yeah, I'm the definition of a "walk-on extra." I don't mind though. Everyone has to start somewhere. What's the hurry?

C: 强行将学生推到不合适，或是不感兴趣的位置上，这样的做法虽然公平，但真的是最优解吗？我想，学院代表也需要思考这个问题。
E: Forcing students into positions they are unsuited or uninterested in may be in the spirit of fairness, but is it really the best solution? I think the academy representative should also think this over.

C: 嗯，我知道。可惜到最后，我都没能亲口向她道歉。
E: Yes, I know. It's a pity that, even in the end, I didn't get a chance to personally apologize to her.

C: 但…在房间里看到那把吉他的时候，心里还是会不平静。当时那么用力地在舞台上呼喊过，这样重要的回忆…没法轻易忘记。
E: But... when I see that guitar in the room, my heart can't stay calm. That time when I yelled my lungs out on the stage, this important memory... is not so easily forgotten.

C: 和谐乐学院的关系还好吗？
E: How's your relationship with Charmony Academy?

C: 在其中，排名第一的是那位财富学院代表，而我居然在第二位。真是不可思议。
E: Inside, the top-ranked teacher is that Fortune Academy representative, and I am surprisingly just below him. It was simply astonishing.

C: 悲伤：遭到学员误解，或许是所有教师的宿命。
E: Sorrow: Being misunderstood by students is perhaps just the wretched life of all teachers.

C: 他现在还在早霞工厂打工，但我之前不是在校庆上赚了一笔嘛。这就是启动资金，之后的生活费我尽力自己赚，也算是给他减轻了点负担。
E: He is still working at the Dawn Factory, but I did make some money during the school anniversary. I'll take that as my initial capital, and I'll try and make ends meet on my own in the future. Hopefully that will lessen his burden a bit.

C: 还有一直帮助我的老师和关照我的同学们，他们一直很担心我，也很喜欢吃我的甜品。如果我放弃学业，是不是就辜负了他们呢，他们会认为我做错了吗……
E: And my teachers who helped me, my classmates who cared for me... they've always been worried about me and love my desserts. If I drop out, wouldn't I be disappointing them? Will they think that I'm making a mistake...

C: 而我所知晓的世界，往往…也只是一些巡演举办的地方，我并未深入了解过。
E: And the world I know often... only consists of places where music tours are held. I've never explored them in depth.

C: 关于搭车同行…
E: About the hitchhiking...

C: 欢笑的人偶十分困惑——我们八个不是同一套动作吗？怎么词儿都各说各的？
E: The laughing puppet is confused: Didn't the eight of us perform the same set of actions? Why do we each have different lines?

C: 第四次谐乐大典期间的陈年苏乐达，你在每一场外交宴会都能看到它的身影。
E: A classic SoulGlad produced during the fourth Charmony Festival. You can see its presence gracing every single diplomatic banquet.

C: …{F#她}{M#他}就是船长？
E: ...{F#She's}{M#He's} the captain?

C: 回过神来，眼前只有数道白雾般弥散的光束——没错，是传说中的达利原效应。
E: When I came to my senses, all I saw were several beams of light dispersing like white mist. Yes, it was the legendary Dall Effect.

C: 不给。
E: Nope.

C: 那个人看着好面熟。
E: That person seems really familiar.

C: 我的那些同学…
E: My classmates...

C: 不愧是大名鼎鼎的班尼！
E: This is indeed a masterpiece by the great Benny!

C: 反正正常人干不出这事…
E: Seriously, no sane person would do this...

C: 这个真没有。
E: Sorry, but we actually don't.

C: 要不下去游一圈？
E: How about we go for a swim?

C: 我觉得这件事吧…
E: Well, in my opinion...

C: 据说这里有个酒吧…
E: They say there's a bar around here somewhere...

C: 里面全是惊梦剧团！
E: And it's full of the Dreamjolt Troupe!

C: 带头的那个人找到了！
E: I found the one leading them!

C: 如果传说中的「伊德莉拉」也是这般模样，我一定至死不渝地信仰「纯美」……
E: If this is what the legendary "Idrila" is like, I would follow the Beauty to my death!

C: 怎么还不能走啊，我还有演出呢。
E: Why can't we leave yet? I have a show to make happen.

C: 背叛「同谐」之人，定会受到严厉的审判！
E: Those who betray the Harmony must be judged severely!

C: 亲爱的，下届海选，咱们一起去…
E: Darling, let's go to the next audition together...

C: 那个什么典礼我也不想去了，我想再眯一会儿……
E: I don't feel like going to that whatsit ceremony. Lemme nap a little longer...

C: 呼呼——
E: *snore* *snore*...

C: 你注意影响…
E: Be careful of consequences...

C: 果然运气这玩意…
E: Luck is a fickle mistress...

C: 想吃什么，今天我请客。
E: What're you peckish for? I'm buying today.

C: 克劳克影城的设计图手稿，筑梦学院杰出学员的代表作之一。作为最早期的设计版本，和现在有些区别很正常。
E: Clock Studios Theme Park's design manual is one of the representative works of the Dreamweaver Academy's exemplary students. As an early design manuscript, it is only normal that the current version differs from it somewhat.

C: 已经死去的生物，被定格在最美丽的一瞬——如今的梦中存在死亡，却不存在真正的蝴蝶。
E: Dead lifeforms are frozen in the moment of ultimate beauty — death is present in the current dream, but real butterflies do not exist.

C: 听着不太…道德？
E: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

C: 嘿！我早过了喝牛奶的年纪，没劲的玩意还是留给老家伙吧。
E: Hey! I'm long past the age to be drinking milk. Leave that boring milk to the old and stuffy.

C: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
E: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

C: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
E: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

C: 造物引擎等身手办回暖纪念首发款，1/<unbreak>1000</unbreak>比例。
E: First edition of the life-size Engine of Creation figure celebrating the return of warmth, available at 1/<unbreak>1000</unbreak> scale.

C: 名利双收还不好？
E: Isn't it amazing to achieve both fame and fortune?

C: 我已经想到是谁了。
E: I think I can already guess who that is.

C: 至于平时嘛…哈哈，要是你有那种看上去就特别严肃、总喜欢板着脸的朋友，倒是可以让对方试试。
E: For everyday wear... Well, if you know someone who's always serious and stern, maybe you could recommend it to them.

C: 我方才对您说过，这道菜的食用顺序会影响口感。那么承蒙惠顾，<unbreak>1000</unbreak>利衡币。
E: As I said, the order in which you savor the ingredients can really change the taste. Thank you for your patronage. It's <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> Balance Coins.

C: 苹果。
E: Apple, please.

C: 吉奥里亚创造我，我不该奢求更多。但我还是难受，想哭。但我是吉奥里亚的子民，哭不出来。
E: Georios made me, and I shouldn't ask for more, but it still feels bad. I want to cry. But I'm a child of Georios, and I mustn't cry.

C: 对黄金裔们的评价？
E: What do you think of the Chrysos Heirs?

C: 哎呀…自己评价自己，总觉得有些怪怪的。大家都说缇宝最为乖巧，可在*我们*看来，缇安和缇宁也都很乖呀。
E: Um... You want to hear Tribbie's comment on Tribbie, huh? Kind of an odd request but sure. Everyone says that Tribbie is the most well-behaved of us. But, we think that Trianne and Trinnon are well-behaved, too.

C: 曾经发生过这样一件好笑的事情：缇宁在图书馆读到一个叫人难过的故事，忍不住掉起眼泪。
E: There's a funny story. Trinnon once read a sad story in the library and couldn't help but let out a few sobs.

C: 我很乐意…但我平时很少与人打交道，有些不善交流…希望阁下不要介意。
E: I would love to... although I very rarely converse with others. I am not gifted with communication... Please do not be offended, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

C: 我没什么想聊的了。
E: Thanks for talking with me.

C: 此人还没有开口，你已经闻到了他身上的一股奇妙香味——感觉像是没药和乳香混合起来的效果。
E: Before he even opens his mouth, you already catch a wonderful scent coming off him — like a combination of frankincense and myrrh.

C: 家乡的老人倒是有种讲法，说什么香料有遏制黑潮的功用，还有什么我们那边的沙地里其实潜伏着一种比鲸鱼还大的虫子，连泰坦都能吃掉，但对特定的香料就百依百顺……
E: The old folks back home, they all reckon that spices have the power to fight off the black tide — and that there's a bug that's bigger than a whale lurking beneath the sands over there that could swallow a Titan, but will become docile and subservient in the face of certain spices...

C: 不打扰你看风景了。
E: I won't disturb you from enjoying the view.

C: 你怎么摆出这副表情？你是怕它们到处攻击人吗？你放心，它们只是古怪了点。
E: Why are you looking at me like that? Are you afraid they're going to lunge out and attack everyone? Don't worry — they're just a little kooky, that's all.

C: 腼腆的新兵离开了。
E: The shy recruit leaves.

C: 保命？我要光荣战死！
E: Protect myself? I want to die in honor!

C: 对，终有一天，我会在战场上对抗悬锋城之敌。届时我必须说出一段令人印象深刻的出场词，不然就会让伙友的身份蒙羞……
E: Yes. One day, I will take to the field and battle Castrum Kremnos' enemies. When the day comes, my opening lines must leave the deepest impression, or I will disgrace the vanguards...

C: 我明白了，先问到这。
E: Got it, no more questions from me.

C: 没错。在享乐之神法吉娜的地盘，唯有豪饮与纵情被视为对它的尊敬，而这份虔诚你不一定承受得住。
E: That is correct. While you bask in Phagousa's domain, only indulgence and revelry are considered acts of respect to them, and you may be unable to bear the weight of this devotion.

C: 空间中只有迷雾，不时传来水波与木头碰撞的声音，咿咿呀呀。尽头有盏昏暗的灯，你的小船向它驶去……
E: There is only fog in the space, with the occasional sounds of water lapping against wood, softly creaking. A dim lamp barely lights the end of the passage, your little boat drawn towards it...

C: 是啊，你瞧——哎，山之民兄弟，今天天气不错嘿？
E: Yeah, check this out — hey man, Mountain Dweller bro! The weather's pretty good today, isn't it?

C: 嗯。
E: Yeah.

C: 我的刻法勒啊！你是从哪蹦出来的？天神，天神降临了！
E: By Kephale! Where did you jump out from? A god! A god has descended!

C: 孩子，我这装置的升级先不提，这数据告诉我，你可能是一位黄金裔……
E: Kid, let's put aside the upgrade of this device for now, but the data tells me that you might be a Chrysos Heir...

C: 我欣赏你的乐观。
E: I admire your optimism.

C: 有空聊聊吗？
E: Got a moment to chat?

C: 当然，我又不是树庭的老古董，就知道故作姿态。我最喜欢和大家聊天了，灵感总是不经意地从日常闲聊中钻进我的脑子里。
E: Of course, I'm not some pretentious old fart from the Grove. I love talking to everyone. Inspiration always creeps in during the most surprising situations, like banter.

C: 我的研究？哦，那可太宏大了！我主要研究泰坦思维与翁法罗斯世界法则的关系。你知道吗，整个奥赫玛，不，整个翁法罗斯都是泰坦思想的具现！
E: My research? Oh, it's so all-encompassing! I mainly study the relationship between Titanic thoughts and the natural laws of Amphoreus. Did you know that the whole of Okhema, nay, the whole of Amphoreus, is a manifestation of the Titanic thoughts?

C: 什么呀，我这是树庭授权的正当生意，每到机缘月还要向元老院交税的。
E: What kind of question is that? This is officially authorized by the Grove, and I pay my taxes to the Council of Elders every Month of Fortune.

C: 别在意…嗝，我喝得太快了。庆典上的鲜血蜜酿果然甘美非凡。虽然只是石榴汁，但在庆典上喝总会激发出不一样的味道。
E: Don't mind me... *hic* I just drank too quickly. The sanguine honey brew at the celebration is sweet as nectar itself. It may just be pomegranate juice, but it surely evokes a different flavor when drank at a feast.

C: 我会好好吃饭。
E: I'll have proper meals.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 哼，神秘商品——门扉后的怪兽。你似乎购买了很了不得的东西啊。
E: Hmph, a mystery item — the monster behind the gate. You seem to have bought something rather amazing.

C: ——嗷呜！…嗷？嗷呜呜呜…呜！
E: ...Awoo! ...Aw? Awoowoo woo... Woo!

C: 见到你，奇美拉似乎很开心，但现在的你根本听不懂它究竟想表达些什么，只能简单陪它玩了会，直到它的精力耗尽。
E: Your chimera seems happy enough to see you, but you cannot understand what it's trying to say right now. All you can do is play a while with it until it is completely sapped of energy.

C: 数据已经更新到最新版本啦，欢迎回来，{NICKNAME}！有什么可以帮你的吗？
E: Data has been updated to the latest version, welcome back, {NICKNAME}! Is there anything I can help you with?

C: 顺便小声说下，根据空间站管理条例，我这边没拿到他人的声源授权，所以不能直接模仿他们的声音哦，所有内容将由本助理为你朗读！
E: Just a heads-up, space station regulations prevent me from mimicking other people's voices without authorization, so I'll be reading all messages in my own voice.

C: 那里是很危险。
E: It is dangerous, truly.

C: 没事呀～小女子正好可以继续练歌了～
E: No worries, I was just about to continue practicing my singing.

C: 这波月古海清净了不少…
E: The Lunarescent Depths have become significantly more tranquil.

C: 无需客气，这本就是我职责所在。不过…在此之前，请先向我展示你对命运泰坦的虔诚之心。
E: There is no need for gratitude. This is precisely my duty. However... before I can begin, I require you to demonstrate your spirit of piety to the Fate Titans.

C: 我来雅城当县长。
E: I have come to Janusopolis to serve as a magistrate.

C: 塞纳托斯已攥上你的脚踝…务要循着幻影渡河，寻回城邦的未来……
E: The cold grasp of Thanatos has grasped your ankle... You must follow the phantom across the river if you are to find a future for your city.

C: 你是神殿的厨娘？
E: Are you the temple's chef?

C: 你每天在这里忙些什么？
E: What do you usually do here each day?

C: 原来你是个大善人？
E: So you consider yourself a righteous man?

C: 不打扰你了，再会啦。
E: I won't bother you anymore, farewell.

C: 嗷呜——那我就继续躺平了。有事情再叫我嗷呜。
E: Awooo — then I'll just rest here. Come back to me if you need anything, awoo.

C: …不好意思，您的家乡是怎样的呢？
E: ...I'm sorry, but what was your homeland like?

C: 这些市民对一切都充满抱怨，大家的唯一共识，是只有{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}会公平地对待他们。
E: These citizens complain about everything, yet they all agree on one thing: Only {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, treats them all fairly.

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Care to chat?

C: 打扰了，我只是随便看看。
E: Sorry to intrude. I'm just watching.

C: 嗯…黑潮肆虐，所有人都在寻找一个容身之所，而奥赫玛，或许就是大家最后的希望了。
E: Hmm... The black tide ravages everything, and people are searching for shelter. Okhema, perhaps, is the last hope for all of us.

C: 见你两手满满，他把硬币直接塞进了你的口袋。
E: Since both of your hands are occupied, he stuffs the coins into your pockets instead.

C: 嗯…有位织者渴望光明。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>某处的壁炉上</color>，向火光步步靠近呢。
E: Hmm... A weaver longs for light. The golden thread brings news that it is approaching the flames on <color=#dbc291ff>a fireplace somewhere</color>.

C: 即使我也不得不承认，你确实是位尽职的英雄。愿你行于坦途之上。
E: Even I must admit, you are indeed a dutiful hero. May your path be smooth.

C: 嗯…我忘了。或许<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>能让我想起来……
E: Hmm... I forgot. Maybe a <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shard</color> will help me remember...

C: 我想起来了…有位织者曾是王室护卫，它如今仍在戍守<color=#dbc291ff>大殿的侧厅</color>，贵客得先通过它的考验才行。
E: I remember now... A weaver was once a royal guard. It is still guarding the <color=#dbc291ff>side chamber of the main hall</color>. You must first pass its test.

C: 你还能算命吗？
E: So you can hear prophecies?

C: …那不就还是得相信「再创世」嘛，哈哈哈哈。干嘛自己折磨自己，你说是吧。
E: So we still end up believing in Era Nova, haha. So why torture yourself, right?

C: 你怎么在这里？
E: Why are you here?

C: 后来，客人们都撤离了。浴场内只剩下歇斯底里的家伙…还有我这种眷恋着池水温暖的怪人。
E: Later, all the guests evacuated. The only ones left in the bathhouse were the hysterical ones... and odd people like me, who just couldn't part with the warmth of the water.

C: 「绝对的完美」、「永恒的幸福」…这些虚假的概念就像劣质的大地兽玩偶，只能为走投无路的人们提供些许聊胜于无的慰藉。
E: "Absolute perfection", "Eternal bliss"... Empty concepts like shoddy dromas plushies — comforting only the desperate.

C: 我必须申明，灵魂是形式，躯体不过是承载灵魂的质料。假若灵魂并不存在，那么我现在在同什么对话？你的感觉、思维又寄宿于何处，你的行动又由何而起？
E: I must declare that the soul is but a form, and the body is merely its material vessel. If souls don't exist, what converses with me now? Where do your senses dwell, your thoughts reside, your actions originate?

C: 不可分割的微粒构成了我们的世界，也组成了我们的躯体。它们的运动、排列和组合并非无限，而是有迹可循的。
E: Indivisible particles compose our world and bodies. Their movements, order and combinations follow patterns, not infinite possibilities.

C: 驻守城门的卫队长…不幸在黑潮中罹难，完成了天父交给他的使命。现在，这里由我指挥。
E: The captain of the city gate... fell to the black tide, fulfilling his duty to the sky father. I've taken command of our forces here now.

C: 我脑子会不停蹦出「世界毁灭吧」的念头，结果想着想着，天就真黑了……
E: My mind kept thinking, "The world should end," and before I knew it, the sky turned dark...

C: 发生什么了，贵客？
E: What happened, esteemed guest?

C: 想秃头也想不出迷！
E: No matter how hard I try, I can't figure it out, memi!

C: 光记住没用，要做到才行。
E: Remembering it isn't enough. You gotta do it.

C: 呵呵，是呀。看到那些茁壮生长的麦子，金灿灿的…任谁都会开心哪。
E: Hehe, it surely is. Seeing the wheat grow tall and golden... it just makes me smile, you know?

C: 对了，你喜欢蝴蝶吗？莉维娅认识好多漂亮的蝴蝶哦，也知道它们住在哪里。
E: Do you like butterflies? I know lots of beautiful ones! I even know where they live.

C: 你也想参加舞会吗？
E: You wanna join the dance too?

C: 想当年我到处闯荡时，看见过漫山遍野的麦田，每一株麦穗都有妖精的手掌那么大。
E: Back when I wandered far and wide, I saw wheat fields blanketing the hills — every ear of grain as big as a fairy's hand.

C: 好呀。人家会一直在这里。{NICKNAME}需要的时候，就来找我吧。
E: That's okay. I'll be waiting right here. Look for me whenever you need me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 直到整个城邦沦陷，布利萨军只剩我一个仍在拼死搏杀…在我力竭之时，凯撒大人率军路过，出手将我救下。
E: When the city fell, I was the only one left of the Bulsa forces... And as I found myself spent beyond measure, the Great Imperator led her army and came to my relief.

C: 但在两尊泰坦的庇佑下，树庭的大部分贤人都闭目塞听，在名为知识的枷锁中自我陶醉……
E: Yet under the Titans' protection, most Sages of the Grove remained willfully blind, shackled by self-indulgent "knowledge"...

C: 墙的那边…
E: The other side of that wall...

C: 是手艺不一样吗？
E: Is it the technique?

C: 都说了——先热水、再温水、最后才是冷水！你怎么就死活不开窍呢！
E: I told you: Hot first, then warm, and then finally cold! How can you not get that?

C: 你看看，你看看…多不应该啊。没关系，我正要教你们怎么杜绝这种情况。
E: See? See? That is what I'm talking about. Don't worry. I can just teach you how to protect yourselves from fraud for good.

C: 我没考，有天我路过这里，闲的没事丢了块土给它们，有一只居然说我穿的太蠢，气得我差点跟它们打起来。
E: Never done it. I was walking by here one day, bored out of my skull, and chucked a lump of dirt at them. One of them said I dressed like a clown and I blew my stack. We almost came to blows there and then.

C: 听说云石天宫最近在实验新的浴盐，但我忘了具体是哪个池子…要不咱们每个都试试吧！
E: I heard the Marmoreal Palace has been experimenting with new bath salts recently, but I forgot which bath it is... Why not try them all to find out?

C: 可不是吗，我听说已经有摊主气不过去找卫兵举报了，也不知道什么时候能给处理了……
E: I'd say so myself. I've heard that some stall owners were so upset that they reported it to the guards already. I hope they'll handle this soon...

C: 不。我按神谕和祭司的意志度过了许多年，但往后的路，我想自己决定。
E: No. I've followed the will of the prophecy and the priests for many years, but for the future, I want to make my own decisions.

C: 当然可以。是什么？
E: Of course. What is it?

C: 很抱歉，我这儿出了点意外，暂时抽不出空帮你办理入学手续咕。
E: My apologies, I'm in a bit of trouble here — I won't be able to help you handle your admission process right now.

C: 关于你自己…
E: About yourself...

C: 咕咕！折纸树林是老鸟最骄傲的作品咕！
E: Hoot hoot! Paperfold Woods is this old bird's proudest creation, hoot!

C: 你能听懂珍稀物种说话吗
E: Can you understand their language?

C: 哈，应物科乃是黑塔的重要科室之一，包揽了站内所有资产的流入流出、盘查与清点。
E: Ha! An important department within the space station, Implement Arts is. We oversee the incoming and outgoing of all our assets, including inventory checks and counts.

C: 啊，这一切真的是太可怕了！我不知道要过多久，才能彻底遗忘！
E: Ahhh, this is really terrible! I don't know how long it will take before I can get this out of my head!

C: 更重要的是，正是因为这场入侵，我才能收获满满啊……
E: More importantly, I gained a lot from this invasion...

C: 既然知道就别跟我搭话。打扰一个想打瞌睡的人，比打扰一个正在熟睡的人，是更加恶劣的行为。
E: I'm glad you noticed. Stop talking to me then. Disturbing a person who is trying to sleep is even worse than waking up someone who's already asleep.

C: 伯纳德你认识吧？就是地概科那个倔老头，一看就不好惹， 眉毛比眼睛都有精神的那个。
E: You know Bernard, don't you? The stubborn old guy from the Department of Cosmic Geography who doesn't look very approachable. His eyebrows are fiercer than his eyes.

C: 有没有什么我可以帮到你的？
E: Is there anything I can help with?

C: 我跟随了荒笛大人太久，现在突然让我自己决定方向，我不知道该去哪里了……
E: I've followed Lord Terravox for so long. Now that I suddenly have to decide my own path, I don't know where to go...

C: 若是人族，此子断不可留！
E: If they're human, this child must not be let live!

C: 裂分之枝神颜盖世！裂分之枝智慧无双！
E: The Bough of Rift's divine beauty is unmatched! The Bough of Rift's wisdom is unparalleled!

C: 呼…真是辛苦我了。
E: Phew... I really outdid myself this time.

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 嗯…有位织者缓慢爬行。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>启蒙王座前的草地上</color>，进行艰难的挑战呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's crawling slowly. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on the <color=#dbc291ff>grass in front of the Luminary Throne</color>, going through quite a challenge.

C: 您想想，要是比赛的时候，整个观众席都是知道了您的光荣事迹、慕名而来的崇拜者，这得多热闹！
E: Just imagine: During the match, the whole audience would be filled with admirers who've heard about your glorious achievements and came to see you in person. What a spectacle that would be!

C: 得了吧，这就是刻板印象——人家那叫「专注于人类体能和心理现象的研究和实践」。
E: Oh come on, that's just a stereotype — they call it "research and practice focused on human physical and psychological phenomena."

C: 哈哈，无论如何，至少我们尽到了职责。是时候用场庆功宴来犒赏自己了！
E: Haha, at least we did our duty. Time to treat ourselves to a celebration feast!

C: 感谢命运的眷顾！能亲眼见证这新世界，老夫的人生也算圆满了呐！
E: Thank the blessings of fate! To witness this new world with my own eyes, my life is truly complete!

C: 多听，就会了。
E: Just keep listening, you'll get it.

C: 嗷呜，和你这样的工作冠军没什么好说的。就是糖衣炮弹，想让我们掉以轻心！
E: Awoo, there's no point arguing with a workaholic like you. It's just a sugar-coated trap trying to let our guard down!

C: 呜嗡。（偷偷告诉{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我之前偷溜去悬锋城，交到了一个朋友——它叫黄金狮首。）
E: Grumph. (Psst, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I'll tell you a secret. I sneaked out to Castrum Kremnos earlier and made a new friend! It's called Chryseus Leo.)

C: 回聊回聊。
E: We'll talk later!

C: 哈哈，是吗？太好啦！！
E: Haha, really? That's fantastic!!!

C: 正巧哈托努斯在铸造它时，曾打造过一批仿件，这把就给你留作纪念吧，伙伴。
E: As luck would have it, Chartonus made a batch of replicas while forging it. I'll let you keep this one as a memento, partner.

C: 好恐怖！光是想想那刻夏老师提笔写这行字的画面，我就要把自己送进昏光庭院了。
E: How horrifying! Just picturing Professor Anaxa writing this note is enough to make me check myself into the Twilight Courtyard!

C: 现在的我偶尔也在想，对弈之外，说不定我也可以培养些新的爱好，比如……
E: Now I occasionally find myself thinking that, outside of chess, perhaps I could pick up a new hobby, like...

C: 还以为能蒙混过关呢，凯撒大人真是心细如发，是下棋带来的思维训练吗？能缜密地发现每处不对劲的细节。
E: Ah, I thought I'd gotten away with it~ Nothing gets past the Great Imperator. Is meticulously seeing through every illogical detail a takeaway from chess practice?

C: 那我便期待你将故事再次带回的一天了。
E: Then I'll look forward to the day when you bring the story back again.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，如果有空，也和我一起去花园看看吧。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, if you have time, would you like to join me for a stroll in the garden?

C: 大地兽之王也爱吃红土？
E: Even the Dromas King likes redsoil too?

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 另外，我可以帮你汲取「颂言石板」中的力量，转化成更具效用的「时光硕果」。就当是对你先前付出的回报吧。
E: Also, I can help you extract the power from the "Hymn Tablet" and convert it into a more useful "Fruit of Time." Consider it a reward for your previous efforts.

C: 如你所愿，史诗的道标已然显现。
E: As you wished, the saga's benchmark has revealed itself.

C: 呵呵，别紧张，阁下——此刻于您眼前显现的，不过是系统底层的一串维护代码。
E: Heh heh, there's no need to be nervous. What you see before you is merely a string of maintenance code from the system's backend.

C: 要说的话，我如今的敌人就是纳努克、星核与反物质军团吧。
E: If I have to say, my current enemies are Nanook, the Stellaron, and the Antimatter Legion.

C: 但星神诞生之后，古兽就消失了。传说「贪饕」奥博洛斯是最后一只留存于世的古兽，不知是真是假。
E: However, Leviathans disappeared when the Aeons were born. Legend has it that Oroboros the Voracity was the last remaining Leviathan, but no one knows if that's true.

C: {NICKNAME}，怎么，又躲回列车偷懒了嘛？
E: What's up, {NICKNAME}? Back on the Express slacking off, huh?

C: 喔，差点都给忘了…那么，长话短说，该从哪里开始讲起呢？
E: Oh, I almost forgot about that... Then, to make a long story short, where should I begin?

C: 那是…列车？
E: The... Astral Express?

C: 哎，好想带着应急食物去魔法与剑的世界里大冒险啊……
E: Oh, how I wish I could go on an epic adventure in a fantasy world of magic and swords, with my very own emergency food!

C: （这里就是《冒险鼹鼠队》目录上提到的地点。）
E: (This is the place mentioned in the table of contents in The Adventurous Moles.)

C: 嗯？你来得挺早嘛。不过我还在想新的谜题，你之后再过来看看吧。
E: Hmm? You're early. I'm still working on a new puzzle, so you'll have to come back later.

C: 我有些问题想问…
E: I still have some more questions...

C: 他爹本来和我一起在矿里做工，后来跟那群流浪者去裂界里拾荒碰运气…结果人再没回来过。
E: His father was working with me in the mines before. But he decided to try his luck scavenging in the Fragmentum with a group of vagrants... He never came back.

C: 没什么事了。
E: Nothing else.

C: 滴答！每天都要端着苏乐达对着公馆里的家伙溜须拍马，我受不了啦！
E: Tick-tock! Every day I have to run around the pavilion sucking up to everyone, I can't take this anymore!

C: 病毒、细菌，全都来吧！我们开个派对！哦，不对，你没被邀请。但是，如果你生病了，记得找我哦，我有最*特别*的疗法！
E: Virus and germs gather! Let's have a party! Oh, but you're not invited. However, if you fall sick, remember to look for me, I'll provide you with my unique treatment method!

C: 变魔术什么的我不会啊，就不能换其他人来吗？救命…我刚刚是不是抖了一下，怎么所有人都在盯着我看…还是说我把表针穿反了？
E: I don't know any magic tricks, so can't someone else take over? Help... Did I just shiver? Why is everyone staring at me... Could it be that I put on my clock hands in reverse?

C: 所有事情都压在我这里，有时候我真希望我只是个普通的钟表，不用操心这么多。我的本职是什么来着？
E: Everything is weighing down on me. Sometimes, I wish that I were just a normal clock so I wouldn't have to worry so much. What was my original duty anyway?

C: 这就让我有些难办了…如果是那种半吊子的垃圾软件，我只要花半天时间做些简单测试，随便凑出一份两千来字的报告就能交差了。
E: That makes things a bit hard for me... If it was some tacky half-baked software, then I'd only need to spend an afternoon running some simple tests for a two-page report before handing it over.

C: 但这可是正儿八经的实战模拟工具…只靠我自己根本玩不转。下周就要交报告了，可我到现在为止一点进展都没有…所以我才抱着侥幸心理向您求助。
E: But this is a genuine combat simulator... I can't master it on my own. My report is due next week, but I've made no progress at all... So I'm really hoping you can help in any way at all.

C: 哦，这样啊…看你的打扮，我还以为你不是空间站的人。
E: Oh, so... Judging by your style, I thought you were not from around here.

C: 我本来已经做好了没法交差的准备，可没想到，在筛查过程中，我竟然发现了一些入侵者留下的蛛丝马迹。
E: I was planning on submitting my helpless report, but never expected to find some clues left behind by the intruders during the investigation.

C: 「加油，祝你好运。」
E: "Good luck, I'm rooting for you."

C: 我想问你点事…
E: There is something I want to ask you...

C: 好歹是平安解决了。这样一来，我们也算是和天才黑客交过手的人了……
E: Anyway, everything turned out alright. In this regard, I guess we're people who've taken on a genius hacker, right...

C: 您的艺术见解真是鞭辟入里！有了您的建议，这幅画作一定要比博物馆里的地髓矿石还耀眼！
E: You're really insightful about art! With this kind of suggestion, this painting will be more dazzling than the geomarrow ores in the museum!

C: …算了，那不重要！鄙人名叫雷比尼，现在正为补充博物馆展品绞尽脑汁写生中！
E: ...Ah, forget it. Probably nothing! My name's Rebini, and I'm currently racking my brains about what to draw as an exhibit for the Belobog History and Culture Museum!

C: …啧！怎么又是那个老家伙。
E: ...Tsk! That old man again.

C: 你来得正好，{NICKNAME}。我刚刚清点了一遍展品储藏室，意外发现了这张藏宝图。
E: Just in the nick of time, {NICKNAME}. I've just gone over all the exhibits in the storage room, and stumbled across this treasure map.

C: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}。我对你应邀赴约表示由衷的感谢。
E: We meet again, {NICKNAME}. Thank you for agreeing to this meeting on such short notice.

C: 重点描述「执政初期」吧。
E: Focus on her early administration.

C: 非常合适。
E: Very much so.

C: 非常合适。
E: Very much so.

C: 我想再重新考虑一下。
E: I would like to reconsider.

C: 看看其他人的…
E: Check out the resumes of others...

C: 虽说是古董，但它相较于如今的产品在技术上并不落后——冬城的消费者对于不思进取的产商们似乎非常宽容。
E: Although it is an antique, it is not technologically backward compared to today's products — the Everwinter City consumers seem to be very tolerant of unoriginal manufacturers.

C: 这件武器被命名为「阿丽萨•兰德的骑枪」，与你手中的那柄别无二致。
E: This weapon was named Alisa Rand's Lance, the very same one you hold in your hands.

C: 博物馆的员工将展品放在了正确的位置……
E: The museum staff have placed the exhibit in the correct position...

C: 岁阳不止附身在驭空大人身上。
E: Madam Yukong isn't the only one who is possessed.

C: 我是路人。
E: I'm just passing by.

C: （照片里的人应该就在附近……）
E: (The person in the photo must be nearby...)

C: 我就喜欢凑热闹。
E: Sounds exciting.

C: 那你说大声一点呀，就说「金人巷商会对不起这里的商铺，把码头的事情搞砸了，金人巷商会的人全都是废物！」
E: Then say it out loud so everyone can hear: Aurum Alley Merchant Guild apologizes to every vendor here for defaulting on the lease and leaving us to pick up the mess!

C: 这倒是没错，但是我也实在瞧不过那家伙的气焰嘛！
E: Maybe... but you can't give in to bullies!

C: 请一定得试试。
E: You'd be more than welcome.

C: 那为什么这个什么蛤蟆会摆在这里？
E: Then why was the toad here in the first place?

C: 鹤运物流上有记录显示，这箱快递就是「阿丰」寄出去的，你怎么说？
E: Records from Heron Express show that this container was sent by a person named "A-Feng." What do you have to say about that?

C: 过去不能和现在直接对比。那时的环境和现在完全不……
E: You can't draw simple parallels between then and now using absolute numbers. The trading volume you mentioned may not look impressive today, but it was huge relative to...

C: 曾经的金人巷选择了「我的坚持」，它才会创造如今无法企及的商业奇迹。
E: The old Aurum Alley achieved a commercial miracle that has not yet been replicated. It did so by following my way of doing things.

C: 这次没有当众道歉的环节吗？
E: I was looking forward to another public apology.

C: 喂！我们还没打算输给你啊。
E: Hey! Not so fast, it's still anyone's game.

C: 金人巷购物券？
E: Shopping coupons?

C: 原则就是「只要有白露大人就够了」。
E: As long as Bailu is in the pictures, we should be fine.

C: 三、二、一…这个时候是不是应该说点什么？
E: Three, two, one... What's the word again?

C: 要不是你和斯科特打赌…
E: All thanks to your bet with Skott...

C: 要是遇到什么其他困难，记得随时叫上我，我就先忙去啦～
E: Let me know if you run into trouble again, I'll be there. Talk to you later!

C: 什么药材，符合仙舟法律吗？
E: What medicine? Is it legal per Xianzhou law?

C: 你为什么知道我有货呢？
E: How do you know I have the goods?

C: 轻松愉快。
E: Easy-peasy.

C: …我真的得去休息了，头晕晕，好像要看到什么幻觉了…你要是准备好了告诉我一声。
E: I should get some rest. The world spins... Guess it won't take long before hallucination kicks in. Let me know when you are ready.

C: 一份脆皮仔猪，再来点古藤百草饮，中杯。
E: One crispy suckling pig. One medium cup of herbal tea.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: <color=#dbc291ff>（这句话好像不太对劲……）</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>(I sense a hole in his logic...)</color>

C: 大师，接下来有什么打算？
E: Maestro, what are your plans from here?

C: 商业顾问来了，我们开始工作吧。
E: The business consultant is here. Let's get to work.

C: 谢谢你，我这就过去！
E: Thank you. I'll be off then!

C: 全部带走！
E: Catch them all!

C: 几招下去，你竟恍惚间觉得自己并非在这窄小的搏击俱乐部中与沙袋较劲，而是在广阔的战场上与敌人死斗。
E: After several moves, you start to vaguely feel as though you weren't merely boxing a punchbag in the Fight Club, but rather were fighting an enemy to the death on a vast battlefield.

C: 老板从古籍文献中找到了一本关于古代斗技的书，于是萌生了开办「斗技表演赛」，推广旧文化的念头。
E: The boss found this ancient manual of ancient training techniques, so he came up with this idea of a Martial Exhibition to promote ancient culture.

C: 之后还有多少研究？
E: How much research is there afterward?

C: 开工开工！上一次你的助手工作完成得很好～这一次也要加油哦！
E: Time to get to work! Your assistance was great the last time~ Hope you can keep it up for this mission as well!

C: 世玲的实验工作非常顺利～基本已经过半啦！尤其是上次针对外宇宙之炎的报告，小组长说世玲的结论那是相当的大胆！
E: My experimental work is going very smoothly~ Already more than halfway through! For that last report on Blaze Out of Space, the team leader said my conclusion was quite bold!

C: 还没下班就开始说梦话？
E: Already sleep-talking even before getting off work?

C: 看吧看吧！我没骗你吧！哈哈！这就是我雷金的科学时代！
E: See! What did I tell ya? Haha! The Scientific Age of Regin is upon us!

C: 哎哟！谁踢我！
E: Ouch! Who's kicking me?

C: （打开柜子）
E: (Open the cabinet)

C: 好耶好耶！
E: Hooray yahoo!

C: 可是…可是我们还没有……
E: But... but we don't have...

C: 虽然没有找到异常现象，但也不算收获全无——或许下一次听闻贝洛伯格的街头传说，就是恐吓看板的怪人呢？
E: You didn't find the anomaly, but it's not completely fruitless — maybe the next urban legend in Belobog is a strange person who's trying to intimidate a display board?

C: 好嘞，到点下班，该去准备「奇异果」的第十二次投稿了…
E: All right, it's time to call it a day and prepare for the twelfth submission to the Kiwis...

C: 深层梦境的全部章节都已为您解锁，您可以尽情选择想要游玩的关卡。
E: All chapters of Deep Dreamscape have been unlocked for you. You are free to choose the stage you want to play.

C: 坏消息是，他们依旧手握监狱系统的控制权。如今我们半区的生产设施基本停运，所有出口也都被隔离门封锁了。照这么下去，大伙很快就会支撑不住……
E: The bad news is, they are still in control of the prison system. The production facilities in our divisions have stopped operating, and all the exits have been blocked by quarantine gates. If this goes on, we won't be able to hold on for much longer...

C: 滴答？原来是宾客在帮忙，真是惭愧……
E: Tick-tock? So you are the one helping out. I am ashamed...

C: 滴答，我们的团长…不能说，不能说，她说这是保密事项。
E: Tick-tock, our team leader... I can't say, can't say. She said it was classified.

C: 报社的信息不是你发的吗？
E: You weren't the one who sent the agency's message?

C: 好，请跟我来吧。记得表现得低调些，别太招摇……
E: Okay, please follow me. And remember to keep a low profile, as we don't want any attention...

C: 再说嘛，就是个收音机，干嘛这么在乎。想听点啥…嘿，不如，我来讲给它听。
E: Besides, it's just a radio. What's the big deal anyway? If he wants to listen to something... Heh, I'll give him something to listen to.

C: 新来的调饮师，你可得帮我！
E: You're the new drinksmith. You've got to help me!

C: 回想起来，尽是悲伤的事。
E: All my mind can come up with are sad moments.

C: 我也不知道为什么喊我留在这里，就很郁闷，为什么，为什么就只针对我呢。
E: I have no idea why she asked me to stay here. This is just depressing. Why is it always me?

C: 嗯！向着甜蜜的未来——出发！
E: Yeah! Let's go! Toward a sweet future!

C: 我需要先处理完酒吧的工作。
E: I need to finish my work at the lounge first.

C: 收起你那些无聊的善心。要是有人被怪物伤到了，你能负责么？
E: Enough with your naive kindness. Can you take responsibility if someone gets hurt because of those monsters?

C: 是玛姬的开拓意志！
E: I'm Mag's trailblazing will!

C: 玛姬也变成了模因？
E: Have you become a memetic entity, Mag?

C: 我的目标是，从银河遥远的过去向更多无名客发去最新的问候！
E: My objective is to send the latest regards to more Nameless from the distant cosmic past!

C: 你们也太笨了。
E: You people were incompetent.

C: 让我们见识见识，到底是什么宝贝，能藏得这么深？
E: Let's see... just what kind of treasure would get tucked away so deep?

C: 台词上只写了这么多呀……
E: But the script only has so much...

C: 等等，就让宾客给你最真实的反馈吧！
E: Wait, why don't you let the guest give you the most genuine feedback?

C: 虽然之前有些矛盾，但市场中没有永远的敌人——如果您对这活儿感兴趣，也可以去处理一下，也算是个掌握「导演技巧」的好机会。
E: We've had some differences with them, but there are no eternal enemies in the business world. If you're interested, you can handle the collaboration. It's a good opportunity to hone your Directorial Skills.

C: 接下来该干什么？
E: What's next?

C: 不，「钟表匠」先生早已完成了这部作品……
E: No, Mr. Watchmaker has completed the piece for quite some time already...

C: 该片为《美梦往事》的第五部，讲述了美梦小镇在繁荣过后，■■■爷与钟表■■分道扬镳。为了守护小镇的■■与■■，钟表■■建立了■■村，开始了■■■■■……
E: This movie is the fifth installment of the Dreamjoy Memoir series, which tells the story of Dreamville after its prosperity, where Clock■■ and Old ■■■ ■■■■ part ways. To preserve the ■■■■■■■ and ■■■■■ of the town, Clock■■ sets up ■■■■■ville and begins ■■■ ■■■■■■■■ ■■■■■■...

C: （感觉她似乎隐藏了什么事情，尝试走进她的内心看看吧……）
E: (I can tell she is hiding something. Let's find out what's on her mind...)

C: 估计是这个叛徒带进来的走狗，跟着一起挨揍吧！
E: Must be an underling of that traitor. Just beat the two of them up!

C: 爱你，太爱你了！
E: Butter my fudge, it's so lit!

C: 克劳克影业亦会带着这样的使命继续前行，守望着美梦，直到每个人都拥有「从梦中醒来」的权利。
E: Clock Studios will continue to move forward with this mission. It will watch over the dream until everyone has the right to "wake up from the dream."

C: 帮帮我，哈努兄弟！
E: Help me, Brother Hanu!

C: 滴答，走廊的布置越来越绕了…石头老板到底把苏乐达藏在哪了？
E: Tick-tock, the hallway setup is getting more and more repetitive... Where did Boss Stone hide the SoulGlad?

C: 太好了！哈努兄弟正在那边解救被困住的小镇居民，一切就交给他了！
E: That's great! Brother Hanu is over there rescuing the trapped townspeople. We'll leave it to him!

C: 哈哈，互利共赢的事情，当然不会让导演这边亏损的。
E: Haha, as it is with such matters with mutual benefits, you will surely stand to gain as well.

C: 再拍一次吧。
E: Let's reshoot that.

C: 「在前往大树的路上，危机四伏。钟表小子与伙伴们不仅要警惕来自惊梦剧团的报复，更是要战胜自己的内心。」
E: "The journey to the Great Tree is fraught with danger. Clockie and his companions not only have to stay alert against any Dreamjolt Troupe vengeance, but they must also conquer their hearts."

C: 抛开人气不谈，他的故事我也不知道该怎么写。石头老板是美梦小镇的敌人，也就是匹诺康尼的敌人——但你看看这亲仁善邻的盛会之星，谁会视此处为敌呢？
E: Putting aside his popularity for now, I have no idea how to write his story. Boss Stone is the villain of Dreamville and, therefore, is the enemy of Penacony... But just look at this harmonious and friendly Planet of Festivities. Who could ever view this place as the enemy?

C: 听说匹诺康尼在阿斯德纳星系存在了上千年，肯定遇到过各种危险…但家族把大家保护得这么好，谁还会天天惦记那些破事。
E: I heard Penacony has existed in the Asdana System for millennia. It must have faced all manner of disasters... But then again, The Family has kept everyone perfectly safe, so who would be worrying about such things all the time?

C: 再见，好导演，祝你在生活中不会遇到石头老板这样的坏蛋。
E: So long, maestro! I hope you'll never encounter for yourself a bad guy like Boss Stone.

C: 居然能遇见同好…
E: Never thought I'd meet people into the same stuff...

C: 好了，趁着测试还没结束，赶紧再玩两把吧。
E: Alright. Go play a couple more rounds before the testing is over.

C: 接下来是第二个问题：作为玩家，你愿意为这款游戏掏腰包吗？
E: Next up is question two: As a player, would you be willing to pay for this game?

C: 哈哈，非常有建设性的意见！我会考虑采纳的。
E: Haha, very constructive criticism! I'll consider it.

C: 打起精神来，我们必须通过「盛会海选」的挑战，尽快进入匹诺康尼大剧院才行！
E: Get yourself together. We need to pass the Festivity Auditions and enter the Penacony Grand Theater as soon as possible!

C: 这次我来请你吧！
E: Let me treat you this time!

C: 欢迎来到最终舞台。其实你们方才经历的情节，全都出自电影《逐梦往事》。
E: Welcome to the final stage. Actually, all the scenarios that you previously encountered, were all from the film Once Upon a Time in Dreams.

C: 动作派…感觉我们只要本色出演就行了……
E: The School of Action... Looks like we just have to be ourselves...

C: 「『筑梦拼图』很紧张刺激吗？」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: "Is Dream Jigsaw really that intense and thrilling?" You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

C: 你怎么也在？
E: How come you're here too?

C: 我们到了！缺失的零件就在对面…可是要怎样才能过去？
E: We're here! There's a missing part on the opposite side... But how do we get over there?

C: 是吗？如果你说的不是奉承之言，这个评价反而让我有些失望——你的审美不该对这样的情节予以赞美。
E: Is that so? If your words aren't mere flattery, this evaluation actually leaves me somewhat disappointed — someone of your taste shouldn't have praised such a storyline.

C: 你感觉到了吗？大部分人的生命都像这部不知所云的影片一样无趣，人们总是遵循某种「剧本」行事。那份剧本或名为「习惯」，或名为「规则」，或名「命运」……
E: Do you feel it now? Most people's lives are as uninteresting as this perplexing film, where they always follow some kind of "script." That script may be called "habits," or "rules," or "destiny"...

C: 苏乐达™集团
E: SoulGlad™ Enterprises

C: 在许多学术观点中，「艺术」是独属于有机生命的认知，一如这绚烂瑰丽的迷梦。
E: From many academic perspectives, art is a perception reserved exclusively for organic life, just like this splendorous dream.

C: 哪里哪里，两位师父客气了。欸，等等，咱们的教学现在才算是正式开始吗？
E: Thank you so much, masters. Oh, wait, does this mean our training is only officially starting right now?

C: 二位小师父，我现在可是斗志满满，一定会好好学剑，再狠狠地教训一下那家伙！
E: I'm now filled with determination, masters! I'll learn swordplay well and teach that guy a lesson!

C: 我念三月小姐是初学剑术，强调口诀有助于加深理解。纵是像云璃姑娘这般天赋异禀，怠慢了基本功，充其量也只是些花拳绣腿。
E: Miss March is still a novice, so I'm giving her some tips on the basics to help her better understand them. Neglecting the basics will only make you vulnerable in a fight, even for an extraordinary swordmaster like you, Yunli.

C: 事在人为吧。
E: Hope for the best, and prepare for the worst.

C: 感觉你的格局太小了。
E: Seems kinda petty, don't you think?

C: 是不是找错复仇对象了？
E: Are you even seeking revenge on the right person?

C: …可是你复仇金人巷，与欺负不夜侯的小老板娘有什么关系？
E: ...But then wait, where does bullying the owner of the Sleepless Earl fit in with all of this?

C: 闭嘴——！
E: Ugh! Shut up!

C: 嘿！这小东西的胆子是越来越大了，敢讽刺你尾巴大爷了是吧？
E: Hey! This little one is getting cheeky! Now you're being sarcastic with me, huh?

C: 藿藿，快救救被附身的三月七！
E: Huohuo, hurry up and save the possessed March 7th!

C: 算了吧，你连剑都握不稳，就这水平还想帮别人？
E: Hah, you can't even hold your sword steady. Don't you think you're overestimating your skills?

C: 学什么都不能走捷径！
E: There are no shortcuts when it comes to learning!

C: 再见！
E: Catch you later!

C: 第一位受害者，是演武仪典的报名选手。被发现的时候肌肉僵硬，双手前举，嘴里念念有词各种功法口诀。
E: The first victim is a Wardance combat registrant. Their muscles were rigid when they were discovered, their arms were stretched out in front of them, and they were muttering all sorts of exercise rhymes.

C: 斯科特！你赶紧给我滚过来！！！
E: Skott! Get your butt over here!!!

C: 去去去，你别凑热闹！这药膳是大补之物，若稍后没有大运动量消耗，反而对身体有害。
E: Hey now! This tonic is very potent, if you don't engage in any intense physical activity, it might do more harm than good.

C: 别担心，我们会抢救斯科特的。希望人没事。
E: Rest assured, we will come to Skott's aid if needed. Let's hope he's alright.

C: 三月七，你怎么在写信啊？
E: Why are you writing a letter, March?

C: 我、我根本没有自己的生活！
E: But I... I don't have a life of my own...

C: 从明天起，做一个幸福的人，喝茶看报，漫游宇宙。
E: Starting tomorrow, I'm going to be happy. I'll have some tea, read the paper, and explore the universe.

C: 倒也没那么惊奇。这雪莲是用温室大棚种植，三十日一开花。
E: It's nothing so grandiose. This snow lotus is grown in a greenhouse and blooms every thirty days.

C: 二位求药心切，我这边也有些新的菜品想要试试药，于是一拍即合…鄙人可没有许诺过「吃下就能增长功力」哦。
E: You two are sincere in your medicinal search, and I've got new dishes that I wish to test, so it was a mutually beneficial situation... I never promised that your skills would grow if you ate them.

C: 等你们好久了。
E: What took you two so long?

C: 我、我只是想象不出到自己变成大人究竟是什么样子，{NICKNAME}，你呢？
E: I—I just cannot imagine how I will be as an adult. What about you, {NICKNAME}?

C: 妾身不是甩手掌柜，给你这小小麻雀添了不少麻烦，今日我也会帮你一起整理。
E: I'm not the kind to let others do all the work. I have caused you a lot of trouble, little sparrow, let me help you with the organizing.

C: {NICKNAME}……
E: {NICKNAME}...

C: …千年茫茫…若梦，转瞬…即逝……
E: ...Thousands of years... they pass like a dream. Before we know it... we pass on...

C: 要是有这本事，我就不站在这里了。
E: If I could do that, I wouldn't be standing here.

C: …书库的整理有条不紊，这都得多亏了你们，你们有什么需要帮忙，记得向我开口哦！
E: ...The repository is organized beautifully, I must thank you all. If there is anything that you need in the future, please just let me know!

C: 饭可以乱吃，话不可以乱说…
E: What nonsense are you spouting...

C: 好吧，如果还需要补拍，欢迎随时过来。
E: Alright. If you need to retake any pictures, you can come back anytime.

C: 小桶宝力由不得你。它打开自己头顶的盖子，跳起来将桶身倒扣在你头上，垃圾倒出撒落满地。
E: Litter Pony does not care what you have to say. He flips open his lid and jumps to land upside-down on your head, spilling trash all over the surrounding area.

C: 没错！现在，佩拉小姐，你也是真正的魔法少女了——赶快投入实战，和我一起打败那些「夹层入侵者」吧！
E: That's right! Now, you are a true magical girl, Miss Pela! It's time for you to join the real battlefield and defeat these "Betweenwhere intruders" by my side!

C: 你似乎看到了某人的影子……
E: You feel like you can see the shadow of someone else...

C: 慢走不送。
E: See you.

C: 哈哈，原来如此。这还是我第一次离开贝洛伯格，跑到…「外星」去打比赛。
E: Haha, I see. This is my first time leaving Belobog to compete in outer space.

C: 公司真是严苛啊……
E: The IPC sure is harsh...

C: 这是卢卡选手的第一场比赛，你一定会出师大捷！
E: This is your first match, Luka. You're bound to win!

C: 贝洛伯格人一直生活在艰难的环境里，我们这些孩子早就学会了走自己的路。
E: The Belobogians have always lived under difficult conditions. We children already knew our path forward long ago.

C: 暂时假定结果为——这封邀请函在传输过程中被积压延迟，近期恢复通讯后才成功送达我们手中。
E: We can assume that this invite was delayed in transmission and only reached us after the restoration of communications.

C: 再稍等一下。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 当然了，老子在新闻里瞧见你作为教练登场了。你掺和的事情还不少啊……
E: Obviously. I saw in the news that you're a coach now. You've got your hands in all kinds of pies, haven't you...

C: 老子看到你给演武仪典的选手做教练了。这不，也想你给咱们藿藿也好好训练训练，让她登上演武仪典和人面对面打上几场，这不比看什么恐怖片更能练胆量？
E: I see that you're coaching a Wardance contender. How about training Huohuo, so she can join the Wardance and fight against a few others. Isn't this much more effective at training one's bravery than watching horror flicks?

C: 哎哟我去…什么加油鼓劲，你个小怂包就是转移话题，不想去打演武仪典呗？
E: Ugh, what cheering? You're just trying to change the subject, you timid brat. You don't want to fight in the Wardance, do you?

C: 我去送送他们。
E: I'll see them off.

C: 我定不辱使命。
E: I won't let you down.

C: 玛吉？玛吉你去哪儿了？玛吉？玛吉！玛吉！
E: Margie? Margie, where are you? Margie? Margie! Margie!

C: 唉？
E: Eh?

C: 什…什么啦！洞洞机才不是什么「铁臂」！卢卡哥哥好笨哦！
E: Wh—What? Diggertron isn't an iron arm! You're so silly, Luka!

C: 莫非是畏惧彦卿的剑，还是公司的通缉令正悬在头上，不得不抽身离开？
E: Was he intimidated by Yanqing's swords, or was he forced to leave because he's wanted by the IPC?

C: 对了，这是报道卢卡与彦卿决战的那期报纸。我买了一百份～这份送给你，留个纪念吧。
E: By the way, this is the issue of the newspaper that features the showdown between Luka and Yanqing. I bought <unbreak>100</unbreak> copies. This one's for you to keep.

C: 僧侣也会有争胜的欲望吗？
E: Do monks also have the desire to win?

C: 数据库中并不存在相关的资料，为了得出答案，我只能记录下僧侣们的只言片语，作为推演的参考。
E: Relevant information does not exist within the database. To obtain the answer, I can only record the monks' verbal exchanges as references for extrapolation.

C: 离群的狼逃走了，伤痕累累的护法僧终于倒下。
E: The scattered wolves flee, and the battered and bloodied Dharmic monk finally topples.

C: 人类像一株巨树般彼此紧密相联，不断滋长。人们塑造历史，历史造就英雄，英雄鼓舞着未来，而未来又诞生出全新的人们。
E: People are like a giant tree, closely intertwined and ever-growing. People shape history, history creates heroes, heroes inspire the future, and the future brings forth new people.

C: 扑满最难打了。
E: Trotters are hardest to deal with.

C: 可能他也有个武侠梦。
E: Maybe he also has a warrior's dream.

C: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和——「神奇植物在哪里」！
E: The two sides in this match are, Luka "Strongarm" and — Fantastic Botany and Where to Find Them!

C: 那当然啦。赛场上失去的东西，只能重新在赛场上夺回来。请大家期待我们在复活赛上的表现吧。
E: Of course. What was lost in the ring can only be regained by re-entering it. Please look forward to our performance in the repechage.

C: 据说您与银枝先生交情匪浅，银枝先生甚至还暧昧地称呼你为「挚友」。
E: It's said that you and Mr. Argenti are close, and he also rather intimately refers to you as "dear friend."

C: 卢卡和史瓦罗在贝洛伯格时本就是宿命的对手，彼此之间知根知底。
E: Luka and Svarog have been destined rivals in Belobog, and they have complete understanding of each other.

C: 卢卡选手点燃了全场的热情！
E: Luka has set the arena ablaze with excitement!

C: 两位选手一动不动，在擂台两边对峙！
E: Our two contestants haven't moved a muscle, as they face each other on opposite sides of the ring!

C: 比赛双方还没有动作！全场观众的神经都快要绷断了！
E: No action yet from either side! All the spectators are on the edge of their seats, their nerves on the brink of snapping!

C: 彦卿大人的飞剑环绕着竞锋舰的擂台……
E: Yanqing's flying swords are swirling around the ring...

C: 这是个非常好的开始！
E: He's off to a flying start!

C: 上次侥幸被你偷袭成功，这次我要好好收拾你。
E: You were lucky that you got me in that ambush last time. I'm gonna fix you up real good this time.

C: 黑幕！黑幕！黑幕！
E: Rigged! Rigged! Rigged!

C: 当然是因为见到偶像，所以心情比较激动了啊！
E: It's because I'm meeting my idol! Of course I'm hyped!

C: 「庙会」这东西其实是古国时代就有的风俗。过节的时候大家聚集在寺庙附近，进行酬神的表演。后来就演变成了大家一起过节玩乐的集市。
E: The temple fair is actually a tradition from the Primeval Imperium Era. During festivals, everyone will gather near temples to perform rituals for the gods. Later, it evolved into a market where people would gather to play games together.

C: 别这么说嘛！以前是以前，现在是现在！
E: Don't say that! The past is the past. You're living in the now!

C: 怎么真的消失了！算了，我是来拧魔方的，不是来研究人工智能的。走吧。
E: Huh, he really vanished! Forget it, I'm here to turn cubes, not study AI. Let's go.

C: 你不是在吃牢饭吗？
E: Aren't you eating prison goop?

C: 顺便一说，你刚才通关的是简单模式。这交感幻戏还有个困难模式，我也稍微多花了点心思才通关。
E: I'd also like to add that you only cleared Easy Mode. This Empathic Immersia also has a Hard Mode — I spent a little more time clearing those levels.

C: 就别叫我了。
E: Please don't invite me again.

C: 活着就是为了玩大衍万象。
E: The meaning of life is to play Mutare Magnus.

C: 那…涂鸦的作者，应该是个很有礼貌的人？
E: Then... I guess that graffiti artist is probably very polite?

C: 啊？你就是小桂子本人？可我听说小桂子是个活力四射的小姑娘啊？
E: Eh? You're Lil Gui herself? I thought Lil Gui was a sprightly young lady, though?

C: 好突然，我有点紧张…
E: So sudden, I'm a little nervous...

C: …这个搞行为艺术的，是你们谐乐学院的么？还真挺谐的。
E: ...Is this artist from your Charmony Academy? She's quite harmonious indeed.

C: 就叫这个吧！
E: Let this be it!

C: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，有件事让我很担忧。
E: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Manager, I'm very concerned about something.

C: …算了，出于对您与学院的信任，我会等首场演出结束后再做判断…您不要抱有什么期待就好。
E: ...Forget it. I'll trust in you and the academy, and wait till the first show ends to pass judgment... Just don't expect too much out of it.

C: 这也太拼了吧！行，我来帮你看看现在的进度。
E: So gung ho! Alright, let me help you check on the progress.

C: 我正式封你为秘书•忍者！
E: I hereby dub you Secretary Ninja!

C: 想要寻找灵感的话，我建议你可以在广场附近转转。贝洛伯格虽然不像大城市那样繁华，但我们上百年音乐底蕴可不会输给他们。
E: If you seek inspiration, I suggest you go walk around the plaza. Belobog may not be as prosperous as those big cities, but we won't lose out with our centuries of musical heritage.

C: 欢迎试玩，欢迎体验。
E: Feel free to give it a go.

C: 不、不可以，我…我不得不退出了。真…对不起……
E: No, I cannot, I... I have to leave. I'm... I'm so sorry...

C: …看我的时间吧。再见。
E: ...I'll see if I get time. Goodbye.

C: 此言差矣，诸位忍徒都很重视这场狩猎，阁下不应用此等态度……
E: You are mistaken. All ninja disciples are placing great importance on this hunt. This is not the correct attitude...

C: 因此，倒数第一也是第一。证明完毕。
E: By this logic, the bottom of the class is also the top. There is your proof.

C: 阁下请直言，若是在下能做到的，当尽力满足。
E: Please, tell me. If it is within my power, I shall do everything I can.

C: 不，我不是关心这只乐队，而纯粹是在发泄未能被选为核心的愤懑。
E: No, I was not thinking of the band. I was simply throwing a fit at not being selected as the band leader.

C: 这话怎么听着怪怪的…我就先走啦，期待「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的演出！我们会来应援的！
E: That sounded kinda awkward... I'm heading off now. I look forward to Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party's show! We'll be in the crowd cheering you guys on!

C: 我已经是酒吧的专属调饮师了。
E: I'm already the lounge's exclusive drinksmith.

C: 没想到吧，我曾经是校运动会皮皮西分会男子组轻量级的竞走亚军！
E: Bet you weren't expecting that I was once the academy sport day's Pepeshi Division runner-up for the men's lightweight racewalking!

C: 在下参加此次音律祭典，原本便是受阁下所托，协助诸位忍徒完成试炼。
E: I originally participated in this music festival at your behest, to assist you all in your trials.

C: 老鸟以为，这座小镇有了他们的保护，不会被世界上的任何东西破坏，永远不会。
E: The old bird thought that with their protection, this town would never be destroyed by anything in the world, for ever more.

C: 嗯。那就…麻烦您了。
E: Okay. Then... I'll be troubling you.

C: 你怎么啦？
E: What's wrong?

C: 哈？！唱不好是你自己的事，和别人有什么关系。
E: Huh!? It's your problem if you're bad at singing. Nothing to do with anyone else.

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 找到了。
E: I did.

C: 唔，复杂的知识我也不是很懂。但姐姐说过，乐队最重要的还是要让观众感到开心。
E: Mm, I don't really know that complicated stuff. But Big Sis said that the most important thing about being in a band is that the audience is happy.

C: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我们该返回学校了吧，有点事情…需要再想想。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager, we should be heading back to school. I have something... I need to think about.

C: 可以有，都可以有。只要玩得开心，所有需求都可以满足哈。我绝对听劝！
E: Yes, there can be! We can add anything you want. As long as you have fun, all requests will be fulfilled. As a dev, I will listen!

C: 过去软弱的我已经不在了，现在我能独立生活，不用再靠梦想来欺骗自己。
E: The weak me of the past is long gone — I can now live independently without relying on dreams to lie to myself.

C: 那风筝上连着根金属丝，随着「啪」一声巨响，天上的雷光就被他收在了一只当容器的玻璃瓶里。
E: That kite was tied to a metal thread, and with a massive "bang," he successfully stored a flash of lightning from the sky in a glass bottle.

C: 还有什么能帮助您的，家人？
E: Is there anything I can do to help, fam?

C: 压根没听到闹钟。
E: I didn't hear my alarm at all.

C: 这样的菜谱，还是从世上消失为好。是非对错，就由我一人承担。
E: Such recipes should be eternally removed for the good of mankind. For better or worse, I will shoulder the sole responsibility.

C: 丹恒乘客，昨天半夜你怎么在车厢里到处逛啊？是失眠了吗？
E: Dan Heng, what were you doing pacing about in the carriage last night? Couldn't sleep?

C: …发现列车上的扫把太旧了。
E: ...noticed that the broom on the Express is too worn-out.

C: 姬子表情平静，甚至带着一丝释怀的微笑。但仔细观察就会发现，她气得双手发抖、青筋暴起。
E: Himeko's expression is calm, even with a hint of a faint smile. But careful observation would reveal that her hands are clenched in furious anger, their veins bulging.

C: 偷偷重买一只。
E: Secretly buy a replacement.

C: 哼哼哼，你们猜呢？
E: Heh-heh-heh, what do you guys think?

C: 抱怨归抱怨，但本姑娘可早就蓄势待发了～「闭嘴」，谢谢你来帮我们一起抢票！
E: My mouth may be ranting, but my mind was super ready a long time ago! Shush, thanks for coming to help us grab tickets!

C: 完了，已售罄…我们没抢到！
E: It's over, all sold out... We didn't get any!

C: 我模拟出三千个不同的网络地址和设备编码，生成五十八种用户种族及使用习惯，同时对接页面的抢票接口。
E: I simulated three thousand different network addresses and device codes, generated fifty-eight user races and usage habits, then concurrently connected to the page's ticket-grabbing interface.

C: 丹恒，快看～我和{NICKNAME}去了一趟「乐之宝™奇迹扭蛋星」，在那里集资端了一整盒「仓鼠侠盗团」的扭蛋！这回，一定能开出隐藏款「富饶向日葵」。
E: Dan Heng, look! {NICKNAME} and I went to the Baby Joy™ Miracle Capsule Star, pooled our resources and came back with a whole box of Hamster Heist Heroes capsules! This time, I'll definitely pull the hidden Bountiful Sunflower toy.

C: 不过，这两份请托在排期上重叠了，我们大概只能选择其一。
E: But, the schedules on these two commissions overlap. We can probably only take one.

C: 这群「星空生态学派」的…坏人，绝对向我们隐瞒了货物的真实情况。这根本不可能是正常的鼻行兽。
E: These shady Astral Ecology School people definitely hid the true nature of their cargo from us. These aren't your ordinary Nosewalkers at all.

C: 不如这样如何——我们兵分两路，你带着{NICKNAME}和小三月去协助「丹轮寺」，我带着丹恒去运送鼻行兽。
E: How about this? We'll split up our forces — you take {NICKNAME} and March with you to assist the Claretwheel Temple. I'll transport the Nosewalkers with Dan Heng.

C: 就像「陶俑」。
E: Just like a pottery figurine.

C: 喵~嗝～
E: Meow... *burp*

C: 靠近些试试…他应该就在雕像附近。
E: Go closer and try it... He should be near the statue.

C: 「世界一如往常地搬演着来来去去的剧目，你们打算如何将它打断，定格独属于自己的一刻？你们为此按下的快门，又将带来何种作品？」
E: "The world goes about its endless cycle of dramatic life. How do you intend to interrupt it, and frame a moment that belongs only to you? What masterpieces will be brought forth when you press your shutter?"

C: 藿藿在镜头里会变成什么样，我也有点好奇呢。
E: I'm also a bit curious what Huohuo will look like through the lens.

C: 这下闯祸了！这个镜头到底是干什么的啊！
E: We've done it now! What the heck does this lens do!

C: 合影也给你一份吧。{NICKNAME}，你可要好好珍藏哦！
E: Here's a copy of the group photo, {NICKNAME}. You'd better not lose it!

C: 还是得我们正牌出马！
E: It seems like we need to step in!

C: 想必在很久之后再回看这些照片，会颇有感慨吧。
E: The next time you see these photos again, they'll probably bring back some great memories.

C: 无论是<color=#dbc291ff>「人间喜剧」最后的迭代</color>，还是<color=#dbc291ff>未来的全新课题</color>，你的帮助都不可或缺。
E: Be it <color=#dbc291ff>the Human Comedy's final iteration</color>, or <color=#dbc291ff>a whole new research project in the future</color>, your help will be invaluable.

C: 没问题，加钱就行。
E: No problem at all. For an additional fee, though.

C: 还有作战能力的，统统上前迎战！掩护平民和伤员先走——
E: Those who can still fight, form up! Cover the civilians and wounded and let them escape first...

C: 听到你的夸奖，小奇美拉很开心呢。它说，虽然你个子高高的，但也很可爱！
E: Hearing your praise, the little chimera is delighted. It says, despite your tall height, you're still really cute!

C: 正好，我有个绝佳的提议——既然两位的管教如此出色，不妨…就从我这买走这支队伍的管理权如何？我天资愚钝，就是个普通人，可担不起这样的重任！
E: Perfect timing. I've got a most excellent proposal: Since your management skills are so superb, why not... buy this squad's rights from me? I'm but an ordinary person of mediocre talent unable to bear such heavy responsibility!

C: 要是继续跟着我，这群奇美拉不知道还要吃多少苦头，你们不是觉得心疼吗，那就发发善心，帮它们逃离苦痛的深渊呗。
E: If they continue to follow me, who knows how much more hardship these chimeras will suffer? Does your heart not bleed for them? Spare some benevolence and deliver them from the abyss of suffering.

C: 我才不会付钱给你！
E: I'm not paying you a single coin!

C: 好啦。你仍然是管理员，但没有小奇美拉愿意继续待在你的队伍里。现在的结果，不是正符合你所坚持的*公正*嘛？
E: Pipe down. You may still be their administrator, but no chimeras are willing to stay on in your squad. From the looks of it, this is fitting of the "fairness" you so insist?

C: 咳，我继续说。<color=#dbc291ff>每只小队都有位登记在案的管理员，负责督察奇美拉的工作情况</color>…理解成监工之类的也行啦。
E: Ahem, I'll continue. <color=#dbc291ff>Each squad has a registered administrator charged with monitoring the chimeras' work situations</color>... Something like what a foreman does.

C: 刚才那个很拽的人，就是这群奇美拉的管理员。
E: That pompous person just now is the administrator for this group of chimeras.

C: 哎，别「嗷呜」了，我也听不懂，但有件事很确定啊…就是你加入的这支队伍不过是群乌合之众。才刚组建起来，跟着{F#她}{M#他}能有什么前途？
E: *sigh* Stop awoo-ing. I don't understand you either, though I'm sure of one thing... This squad you joined comprises nothing but misfits. What future could there be, following {F#her}{M#him} with a newly formed squad?

C: 诚信接单，包过。
E: I'll guarantee a sure win for you, hand to heart.

C: 你藏得可真够深啊？
E: You really hid it well, huh.

C: 我能打十个它。
E: I can fight ten of them.

C: 我信奉的…建立最强奇美拉自治小队的理想，原来…是在帮助人类吗……
E: The ideal I believe in... creating the strongest autonomous chimera squad, is... to help humans...?

C: 此时此刻，翁法罗斯内。
E: Currently, in Amphoreus...

C: 你说的是谁啊？
E: Who're you talking about?

C: 这里收集了翁法罗斯古往今来的神话和历史，从众神和英雄身上，我们得以学会「什么是美德」。
E: Gathered here are Amphoreus' collective myths and histories throughout its entire existence. We learn what virtue is from gods to heroes.

C: 跟踪演算命途力量的涨落和相互干涉，我们将得以构建种种事物诞生的可能性和变化趋势。
E: By tracking the fluctuations and mutual interferences of the extrapolated Path Energy, we will be able to construct the various possibilities and trends of change of creation.

C: 您皮肤细腻有光泽，上镜肯定好看。诶！说到皮肤管理啊——
E: With your flawless skin, you'll be a star on screen. Oh, speaking of skincare...

C: 抱歉，打断一下。我受庭院所托，带回出逃的病人普赫斯。
E: Excuse me. I am tasked by the Courtyard to take back the escapee, Perhippas.

C: 咳咳…你别咒我，你咒我，我就要咳咳…血染浴场了！
E: *cough* Don't you curse me... If you do, I will *cough*... dye the baths red!

C: 发什么呆？走吧，属于我们的时代已经落幕了。
E: Stop gawking! Our moment has passed.

C: 下台！下台！下台！
E: BOOOOOOOO! GET OUT! GET OUT!

C: 究竟冠军赛的资格——<color=#dbc291ff>「金盏徽章」</color>将要花落谁手呢？
E: Now, which contestant will claim the <color=#dbc291ff>Golden Chalice Badge</color> and secure their Championship spot?

C: 泡泡，最终还是被你击败了。
E: Bubbles lost to you in the end.

C: 在刺头海豹这里，「牙刺必豹」就是「以牙还牙，以刺还刺」的意思。
E: For the Spiky Seal, "a thorn for a thorn" simply means "an eye for an eye."

C: 嗷呜…你认识我吗？或者，我认识你吗？
E: Awooo? You know me? Or... do I know you?

C: 哇！这是谁，这么好看！
E: Woah! Who's this fabulous devil?

C: 如果小飞儿真的盯上了*这里*的话，就算这些事不是她做的，估计她也都看在眼里……
E: If this place really caught Little Ciphy's interest, even if she didn't do it, she probably saw everything...

C: 观众们果然很在意奖杯呢！
E: As expected, the audience is very interested in the trophy!

C: 那就比吧，反正都是手下败将。
E: Let's fight then. After all, you'll all lose to me.

C: 那我就狠狠挠你胳肢窝，直到你讲出来……
E: Then I'll tickle you until you spill it...

C: 我亲爱的朋友，你还记得那金色梦中的<color=#dbc291ff>《银河球棒侠传说》</color>吗？
E: My dear friend, do you still remember that golden dream of the Legend of the Galactic Baseballer?

C: 毕竟「跳票」这种事情，对商人的信誉而言可是百害而无一利的。
E: After all, delays are a reputation killer for any business. There's absolutely no benefit in that.

C: 我们就咕哩咕哩地告诉你！
E: And make it double, we'll tell you readily!

C: 自那以后，每次坐进驾驶舱，我都觉得自己容光焕发。
E: Since then, every time I sat in that cockpit, I felt like I was walking on air.

C: 「极速杯」冠军诞生后，咱们还有娱乐性质的挑战赛。您的成绩已记录在排行榜上，其他选手会以此为目标发起挑战，您也可再次参赛，刷新纪录！
E: After the "Speed Cup" champion is crowned, we also have some entertainment, focusing on challenge races. Your record has been logged on the leaderboard, and other racers will aim to challenge it. You can also compete again to set a new record!

C: 合着这半天，还没开店呢？
E: So after all this talk, we haven't even opened yet?

C: 多么纯粹的邪祟啊！没想到，诚如密信所言，此处遭遇了恶灵式神•妖鸟。
E: What a being of absolute evil! Exactly as the secret letter warned, this place is plagued by the Evil Spirit Demon Bird!

C: 我去找其他善于调律的家伙问问情况，可能需要去现实酒店里调查一下……
E: I need to talk to other tuning experts about this. We probably need to investigate the hotel in reality too...

C: 谢谢你，酌人•忍者。
E: I appreciate your help, Sommelier Ninja.

C: 啾啾啾！
E: Tweet! Tweet!

C: 啾？啾啾？
E: Tweet? Tweet tweet?

C: 大家都走了呢，抱歉，请让我来服务尊贵的您吧……
E: Everyone's gone... Please allow me to serve you, esteemed guest...

C: 这不等于把宝箱里的珠宝偷走，甩了个破烂箱子出去吗？
E: Isn't that just like stealing the jewels from a treasure chest and tossing out the empty, broken box?

C: 这次学什么叫？
E: So, what sound are we going to have you make this time?

C: 让我摸摸！
E: Let me touch it!

C: 稀客啊。今天你算是来对时候了，看看这个。
E: What a rare visitor! You picked the perfect day to drop by. Take a look at this.

C: 我实在抽不开身，看你一直对调饮挺感兴趣的，要不要试试看？
E: I'm completely tied up right now, but you've always seemed interested in mixology. Want to give it a try?

C: 没问题！把分店开上星穹列车，是每一家酒吧的终极理想！
E: Of course! Having a location on the Astral Express is every lounge owner's ultimate dream!

C: 按照配方来看，这杯调饮能让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>度过惊喜的一刻</color>。
E: According to the recipe, this drink helps the drinker <color=#dbc291ff>experience a moment of delight</color>.

C: 「我司雇我在」。
E: "I Work, Therefore I Am."

C: 姑且试试，希望这杯能让我看到些长进。
E: Might as well give it a try. Let's see if this drink brings out any progress in you.

C: 是什么呀，我也想尝尝！
E: What is it? I want a sip too!

C: 这个配方暂时先试到这里吧。
E: Let's call it a day for this recipe trial.

C: 吧台失去了调饮师，如同神策府没有将军坐镇，可是天大的事。赶紧回去看看吧。
E: The bar's lost its drinksmith, just like the Seat of Divine Foresight without a general. That's a major issue. You'd better get back there, stat.

C: 不知多久之后……
E: Who knows how long has passed since...

C: 如我所见的，约莫十五分钟。至于在此之前，答案恐怕只有你自己知道了。
E: From when I started counting, about fifteen minutes. As for before that, I'm afraid only you can say.

C: 这是梦吗？或许吧。答案只有你自己才能决定。
E: A dream? Maybe. Only you can decide.

C: 按常理，那是舰船的自毁按钮。但显然，他们没有按常理出牌。
E: Normally, it would be the ship's self-destruct trigger. But clearly, they weren't following the norm.

C: 唔…工作里憋了太多不能说的内幕消息，不知为什么，喝了调饮之后，真想把它们一股脑说出来。
E: Hmm... I've got so many classified insider secrets bottled up from work. For some reason, after having this cocktail, I just wanna spill them all out.

C: 抱歉，稍等，我接一个电话。
E: Apologies, one moment, I need to take this call.

C: 希望「花火」不要整出什么「花活」来。
E: Hope "Sparkle" won't cause any "sparky" trouble.

C: 他说最近出土的古代遗物太多了，物多则贱，你就知足吧！
E: He said there've been a lot of relics dug up recently and you know how that tanks the market. Be happy with your lot!

C: 是你啊，准备好去古代遗迹寻宝了吗？
E: Ah, it's you again. Ready to go treasure hunting down in the ancient ruins?

C: 我们去深处寻宝吧！
E: Let's go hunt for relics down in the depths!

C: 听说你有求于我…
E: I heard you're looking for me...

C: 别这么说嘛！在下可以加钱～您跟在下过不去，也别跟钱过不去啊！
E: Don't say that! I'll make it worth your while~ You can refuse me, but you won't refuse money, will you?

C: 故事怎么转到炼丹上去了？
E: How did this turn into a story about forging a miracle pill?

C: 没给我电出毛病来？
E: "Whirlbolt"... Wouldn't that shock me?

C: 你可瞧见那些灵气氤氲、闪闪发亮的光点？
E: Can you see those glowing, sparkly lights up ahead?

C: 不必了，不必了。
E: No, thanks. We're good.

C: 龙尊嘛，自然与凡人不同，那是见风就长！
E: The high elder is naturally superior to the ordinary and grows immediately upon the touch of the wind!

C: {NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}，您好哇！果然是放不下在下的新奇故事吧？谁能拒绝成为一个爽快故事的主角呢？
E: {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, hello! You can't let go of my spellbinding story, can you? Who can resist being the protagonist of their own epic adventure?

C: 哈哈，「主角模板」真是妙用无穷，我又编了些新故事，正等着您洗耳恭听呢！
E: Haha, the Protagonist Model is so incredibly useful that I've ended up writing a few more stories. I wonder what you think of them?

C: 潜渊阁文档目录第三千六百三十二条……
E: Office of Deep Sources document directory article <unbreak>3632</unbreak>...

C: 「{NICKNAME}问丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝道：『这绝灭大君，翻手为云覆手为雨，我等肉体凡胎，该如何与之匹敌呢？』」
E: "{NICKNAME} asked Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe: 'This Lord Ravager has the very powers of this world at its fingertips. How can we mortals hope to ever defeat it?'"

C: 准备好了，开始吧。
E: I'm ready. Let's begin.

C: 器皿里的种子突然暴长开来，一时间枝蔓纷乱，有如乱麻！
E: The seed grew explosively, sprouting wild tendrils in seconds like a thick tangle of roots!

C: 瞧见了没，这就是标示熔金所在之处的地图！
E: See, here's the map showing where the Ignis Aureliae is!

C: 太真二字，乃黄金之古称。丹枫将宝藏置于此处，正如藏木于林，虽答案近在咫尺，数百年来却并无一人勘破。
E: The word "Aureate" pertains to the word "gold." Dan Feng hiding his treasure here is like hiding a tree in a forest — so close, and yet undiscovered for several hundred years.

C: 口下留情啊，石韵老师在一旁，别让他看我笑话啊。
E: Please go easy on me and don't make Shiyun laugh at me.

C: 这妖物口出狂言，且来试一试我罗浮持明的神威！
E: This devil is delusional! Taste the might of the Luofu Vidyadhara!

C: 放入「冷却液」
E: Put in the coolant

C: 我跟他们也不算熟。
E: I don't know them well, either.

C: 哎哟，我只是有些担心，我要是加入商会的物流系统，开始做外卖生意了，那我这儿的老主顾怎么办……
E: You know, I'm just worried about my regulars. What if I join the guild's logistics network and start providing takeout food? What will happen to them...?

C: 哎哟，我说什么来着，就这跟你说话的功夫，玉兆后台上就一直在弹订单消息了。
E: Oh, what a pleasant surprise! I've been receiving orders via my jade abacus just as we're talking!

C: 你说…爸爸是不是不想让我玩以太战线啊？
E: Do you think... my dad was trying to discourage me from playing Aetherium Wars?

C: 总算遇到玩家了，快快快，打完这把我就得去写作业了！
E: I finally found a player! Quick, quick! I have to go and do my homework as soon as we're done!

C: 这…这是我捡来的……
E: B—But this is mine, I found it on the ground...

C: 决胜乐园里都会有些什么呢～真期待呀。
E: Can't wait to find out what's inside these Victory Zones!

C: 哦？看来你们还没有把队伍填满呢……
E: Hmm, it looks like your team isn't complete yet...

C: 话说回来，希露瓦你似乎比我们更了解以太灵——你能看出这个小家伙出了什么问题吗？
E: Serval, you seem to know more about Aether Spirits than us — can you tell us what's up with this little guy?

C: 有本事你们就发起对决！
E: Let's settle this with a duel, if you've got the guts!

C: 我们到啦！只要从这里乘坐星槎，就可以抵达<color=#dbc291ff>「流云渡的决胜乐园」</color>了。
E: We've arrived! From here we need to take a starskiff to the <color=#dbc291ff>Cloudford Victory Zone</color>.

C: 当然方便！只要是我能答得上来的，随时欢迎二位向我提问。
E: Why, of course not! If it's a topic I'm familiar with, I'll do my best to answer.

C: 次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神？哦，是你们给它起的名字？
E: Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord? Oh, is that the name you picked for them?

C: 唔…让我梳理一下思路……
E: Whew... Give me a second to wrap my head around all of this...

C: 哼哼哼！哼！
E: Oink, oink, oink!

C: 圈子里最近出现了一位<color=#dbc291ff>「高手玩家」</color>，引起了不小的骚动。我就是想跟乔瓦尼先生讨论一下这事。
E: There's been a lot of buzz lately about an "<color=#dbc291ff>elite player</color>" who's been making waves in the gaming community — I want to discuss the situation with Mr. Giovanni.

C: 调用完成——请操作「自动机兵•蜘蛛」引发爆炸，驱散捣乱的员工——
E: Access granted. Please take control of the Automaton Spider and trigger an explosion to disperse the disruptive workers.

C: {NICKNAME}，快看！围墙后边好像有座灯炉诶。
E: {NICKNAME}, take a look! It looks like there's a lamp behind that wall.

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}，我们去找下一处谜题～
E: Come on, {NICKNAME}, let's go find the next one~

C: 现在我们已经集齐三重<color=#dbc291ff>冠军候补凭证</color>了——应该算是把决胜乐园的谜题都解决了吧？
E: We've collected all three <color=#dbc291ff>passes</color> now — that should mean we've solved all the puzzles in the Victory Zone.

C: 哈，我可不会说这种话。我还宝刀未老呢。等彻底摸透这个游戏之后，我会再找你赢回来的。
E: Hah, as if I'd say something like that! I'm not past it yet! When I figure this game out, I'll come back and avenge myself.

C: 唔...{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}果然很厉害......克拉拉也要努力才行。
E: Agh... You really are strong, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}... I need to work harder!

C: 下次再说吧。
E: Another time.

C: 这次的对战数据已经更新过了，不会再输给你了，来吧！
E: I've already updated the battle data this time, I won't lose. Bring it on!

C: 让我看看……
E: Let me see...

C: 哼哼！哼！哼哼！
E: Oink! Oink! Oink!

C: 哎呀，咱可没见过这阵仗哪！这不比长乐天那小广场气派多了？
E: Wow, I've never seen anything like this before! It's so much more spectacular than the little plaza in Exalting Sanctum.

C: 真没想到啊。
E: Well, this is unexpected.

C: 嗨，两位，好久不见，也恭喜你们呀。
E: Hey, you two! Long time no see. Congrats on your win, by the way.

C: …啊！我都差点忘了这回事了……
E: Oh! That's right, I almost forgot...

C: 裳裳，听见了吗！这回的我岂止是有用，简直是有用。能有机会作为十王司的鹰犬帮上大家的忙，真是太好了！
E: You hear that, Sushang! I'm a key member of the squad! They said I could be a Ten-Lords Commission intelligence hawk!

C: 哟，这不是一进绥园就昏了过去的小妹妹吗？几天不见，说话口气就硬成这样了？
E: Oh, if it isn't the little girl who fainted in Fyxestroll Garden the moment she encountered the heliobi? Already talking to me like a detective, are you?

C: 门后怎么是这么个地方？
E: I never thought this would be behind the door...

C: 噫，对、对不起！
E: You're right. Sorr... Sowwie!

C: 那…那个…一定要注意安全呀！
E: Umm... b—be careful, okay?

C: 嗯，只有本座受伤的命运达成了。
E: Yes, all is well, minus my headache...

C: 无关人员切勿靠近，这里很危险！
E: Unauthorized personnel should keep their distance — it's dangerous here!

C: 其实咱们…也不算无关人员对吧，判官大人？
E: Actually, we're... not really unauthorized, are we, Judge?

C: 那藿藿岂不是…
E: Then that means Huohuo is...

C: 你们的将军喜欢「缓兵之计」，我就顺势而为，为各位出谋划策，令岁阳们在此汇聚，成为我的助力！
E: He seemed fond of playing the waiting game — I merely capitalized on that. While you were all out on a wild goose chase, I rallied other heliobi to my cause, thereby increasing my strength!

C: 敢于挑战帝弓的将军，并且凭计谋令将军入局鏖战。这可不是「无用之物」能做到的。
E: I know of no "faint flicker" that could strategize such a fierce battle against one of the Reignbow Arbiter's generals.

C: …妹妹她还好吗？
E: ...Is my sister okay?

C: 你不靠近她，她会过得更好的。
E: The farther you stay away from her, the better.

C: 这事就别提了。嘿，藿藿，真的是因为老子的关系，这些人都离开了你吗？
E: Forget about all that, I'm here now. But... did everyone really leave you because of me?

C: 哎，我还是得盯着你，免得你又惹出什么大乱子！对了，眼前还有件麻烦事——藏起来的岁阳，立刻给老子滚出来！
E: ...Somebody needs to keep you out of trouble! Speaking of which, there's a pesky heliobus lurking right here. I'm coming for you!

C: 老师可知道「罗浮杂俎」？我看见有人说这里出了怪事，便来这里看看。
E: Do you know about "Ghostly Grove"? I heard from someone on the site that there were strange things happening here, so I came to see.

C: 对哦，看来你已经相当熟悉仙舟文化了……
E: That's right, they seemed pretty familiar with Xianzhou culture already...

C: 我其实不信什么鬼神之说，更不相信什么死而复生…我发那么个标题骇人的帖子，也确实是因为不知道该找谁帮忙了。
E: I don't actually believe in ghosts or anything, let alone coming back from the dead... I posted this on that spooky thread just because I didn't know whom to turn to for help.

C: 我早上听他说，他要和「妻子」去金人巷逛逛，应该能在那里找到他。
E: This morning I heard him say that he was going shopping around the Aurum Alley with his "wife." You should be able to find him there.

C: 啊？你是谁？什么就叫「被岁阳骗了」？
E: Ah? Who are you? What does "being deceived by a heliobus" mean?

C: 但是，这份感情是真实的。
E: But this feeling, it's real.

C: 若昔…唉……
E: Ruoxi... Sigh...

C: 先预约取号！
E: Make your booking and take a number!

C: 我看到了命运的道路向我敞开怀抱！
E: I have seen the path of destiny opening up before me!

C: 不排除有弄虚作假的可能…
E: We're not ruling out the chance that it's a fraud...?

C: 要我说，十王司也不过如此。
E: If you ask me, the Ten-Lords Commission aren't all they're cracked up to be.

C: 这是民宅应该有的东西吗？
E: Is this something that should be in a civilian home?

C: （事不宜迟，现在就去找找这里有什么线索吧……）
E: (There's no time to waste. Let's take a look around for any clues around here...)

C: 你顺利地打开了保险箱，除了房产证之外，没想到这里面还藏着一只岁阳。
E: You successfully open the safe and, alongside the deed, there is something you never expected to see... A heliobus.

C: 你看，我早就给裳裳你说过了，这「罗浮杂俎」上真真假假什么都有，大家想要的不是真相，而是一段愉快的怪谈体验。
E: Look, I told you before, that there are all sorts of stories on Ghostly Grove, some true, some not. What people are searching for here is not the truth, but a fun ghost story.

C: {NICKNAME}，你准备好了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you ready?

C: 不应该啊，列车上的大家都很正常，那岁阳究竟藏在哪儿呢？
E: This shouldn't be the case. Everyone on the Express is normal. Where could the heliobus be hiding?

C: 你为什么藏在相机里？
E: What were you doing in the camera?

C: 三月，你怎么看？
E: March, what do you think?

C: 把它放归宇宙吧。
E: Release them back to outer space.

C: 我知道{NICKNAME}为什么要坚持将宝烛带回镇妖塔。
E: I know now why {NICKNAME} is so insistent on bringing Arkeri to the suppression tower.

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 别担心，放松点，随便说！这些视频我回去会一帧一帧剪好了再发出来。
E: Don't worry. Just relax and say whatever you like! I'll go back over these and edit out the good stuff before posting it up.

C: 美食！好吃的太多了！我个人比较喜欢金人巷那边的几家老字号，实惠又好吃！
E: The food! There's so much delicious food! I personally love a few revered old classics over on the Aurum Alley. They're both cheap, and delicious!

C: 放心吧，你的反应很可爱，肯定有不少人会买账的。
E: Don't worry, your reactions are very cute. There'll be plenty of people who would buy it.

C: 我想和大家重新走一遍我直播的地方，有你们陪着我走…然后和过去直播的画面剪辑在一起，我觉得…还蛮有看头的，而且也很有纪念意义。
E: I want to revisit everywhere I've vlogged before, but together with you guys too... Then, I'll mix and splice that into scenes from those old streams. I think... it'll be really interesting, and also really memorable.

C: 我感觉这个帖子和上次那个货仓的帖子很像，你们要来看看吗！
E: This post seems really similar to the previous warehouse one. Come have a look!

C: 小姐派了界种科的科员去观测它们的习性，却发现这些可爱的小怪物并没有看上去这么简单……
E: Asta sent over some researchers from the Department of Ecology to observe their behaviors, only to discover that these cute critters were nowhere near as simple as they seemed...

C: 意思是要装修吗？
E: Are you talking about renovating?

C: 进入「奇珍琳琅」
E: Enter "Priceless Jewels."

C: 我有很多其他故事，但并非是为这个宇宙而准备。若你想听，我也可以讲，只是这并不能使你获得奖赏。
E: I've got lots of other stories, but they're just not ready for this universe. I can tell you the stories, if you'd like — you just won't be rewarded for it.

C: 呼哈——味道真棒！所谓的饮料就是要像这样，包含着尊敬和爱戴才行！看看你之前调的都是些什么玩意，是能给人喝的吗？！
E: Aha! A beverage of extraordinary taste! This exemplifies the essence of respect and affection! Look at the beverages you mixed before! Could they ever aspire to grace an honored patron's goblet!?

C: 为什么盯着我看？是要欺凌我吗？唉，就很郁闷，最后总会变成这样。
E: Why are you staring at me? Are you trying to bully me? *sigh* I knew it'd always end up like this.

C: 但有人帮你…帮我们解决了问题。
E: But someone helped you... and helped us out.

C: 你这么喜欢听广播，要不就叫…哈哈，我想到个有意思的！
E: Since you enjoy listening to the radio so much, why don't we call you... Oh! I've got something interesting in mind!

C: （舒翁是要带着黑桃回酒吧吗？跟回去看看吧。）
E: (Is Siobhan bringing Spade back to the lounge? Let's follow them and see.)

C: 我还有事情没做完。
E: I have unfinished business.

C: …嗨呀，是在叫我吗？我现在的心情特好，有什么要求啊，尽管提，我都会认真考虑的！
E: ...Oh, hey! Did you call me? I'm in a wonderful mood right now. If you need anything, just feel free to ask, and I'll seriously consider it!

C: 嘻嘻，人家和您可才刚认识，不能进展这么快的啦。
E: Hehe, I'd love to, but let's not rush things. We've just met, after all.

C: 你是要和谁约会？
E: Who's the lucky person you're dating?

C: 嘻嘻，这是秘密。要是人家再和您更加亲近点的话，说不定就全说出来了呢。
E: Hee-hee, it's a secret. However, if we get to know each other better, I might spill the beans.

C: 哼，尽是些华而不实的玩意。看着漂亮，作用还真没有！
E: Hmph, nothing but fluff and flash. Pretty on the outside, useless otherwise!

C: 你知道吗，来到这家酒吧前，我只是个落魄的戏剧演员，扮演过无数不知名的小角色，始终郁郁不得志。没有方向，没有收入，没有自我。
E: You know, before I came to this lounge, I was a struggling actor relegated to countless minor roles, plagued by desolation. No direction, no income, and no self-esteem.

C: 嘻嘻，还是上钩了。不过现在有些渴了，烦请您先给人家调杯饮料吧。
E: Hee-hee, great! But I'm feeling a bit thirsty now. Could you make me a drink first?

C: …我看着像个假人么？
E: ...Do I look like a drink mixer to you?

C: 「模样很新鲜，性格有些奇怪，都有各自的情绪问题，但习惯了也挺可爱的。」
E: "They look pretty unique. Although they're a bit eccentric and have their own emotional problems, they can be quite adorable once you get used to them."

C: 这杯饮料似乎不是我想要的，您是不是弄错了？要是说得不对，请您指正！
