E: This drink doesn't seem to be what I had in mind. Perhaps you've made a mistake? Please correct me if I'm wrong!

C: 好像没什么特别的。
E: There's nothing special about it.

C: （忧郁派喜欢的是……）
E: (Melancholy likes...)

C: 对，它不怎么挑剔味道，非常好相处，跟舒翁的关系也是最亲密的。
E: Yeah, they're not picky about flavors. They're very easy-going and are closest to Siobhan.

C: 调杯你最擅长的吧。或者说…你认为现在最适合我的饮品。我们相识的时间不短了，在你心中，最适合我的饮品是什么呢？
E: Make me your best drink... or one that you think suits me best right now. We've known each other for quite a while now. So, what do you think is the drink that fits me best?

C: 汪！我是为你带来幸福的汽水狗狗，在你变得快乐前我都不会走的哇！
E: Woof! I'm the Soda Doggo that brings you happiness. I won't be going anywhere until you are happy!

C: 哇嘎嘎，我是个疯子，但我从不害人！咱们认识了这么久，我说过你一句坏话嘛？
E: Wahaha, I'm crazy, but I've never hurt anyone! You and I have known each other for a while. Have I ever said anything bad about you?

C: …你是真的有情绪问题。
E: ...You really have emotional problems.

C: 看<rhythm>得<rhythm>好<rhythm>着<rhythm>急
E: It's <rhythm>so <rhythm>upset <rhythm>to <rhythm>watch

C: 汪汪
E: WoofWoof

C: 汪  汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof  Woof

C: 准备开始正式的合奏吧！
E: Prepare to begin the ensemble proper!

C: 啾——你好聪明！人家好喜欢你！
E: Tweet! You're so clever! I like you!

C: 我已经准备好了，随时可以开始哦。
E: I'm good to go, so we can start anytime.

C: 你…还有你们啾！就知道在那闲聊，我都被压成纸片儿了，也不说先把我拔出来啾！
E: You! And you, tweet! Having fun chit-chatting? I've been flattened into being a flap of paper! Get me out of here, tweet!

C: 论攻略，我是专业的。
E: What can I say? I'm a pro at winning people over.

C: 这肯定不一样啊！我现在的身份不过是一个体育记者，和卢卡选手之间谈不上有什么商务往来。
E: It's completely different! I'm just a sports journalist, and I don't have any business dealings with Contestant Luka.

C: 我先想办法找人辟谣吧…但辟谣的速度永远比不上造谣的速度——那家伙就是利用这一点，想让你溺死在舆论之中。
E: I'll try to find someone to debunk the rumors... but the speed of debunking always lags behind lies — he's counting on that to drown you in public opinion.

C: 那走吧，我们再去一趟丹鼎司。
E: Let's head to the Alchemy Commission.

C: 有人说我以前是混泯灭帮的…对了，卡美丽小姐，泯灭帮是做什么的啊？算了，你不用回答，听名字也知道这不是什么好东西。
E: Some even say I used to be part of the Annihilation Gang... Right, Miss Carmella, what does the Annihilation Gang do? Never mind. You don't have to answer, as the name tells me it's nothing good.

C: 但比赛之外，尤其是在网上…可不是人人都会为胜者高兴的。毕竟，一直胜利在某些人看来也是一种傲慢。
E: But outside of the arena, especially online... not everyone is happy for the winner. After all, being continuously successful can be seen as arrogance to some.

C: 各位且慢震怒！为了证明铄某所言非虚，今天我将穿上这套装甲为各位演示一番，让各位瞧瞧我的一招一式配上这公司铁甲是否是天衣无缝！
E: Everyone, calm down! To prove that my words aren't empty, today I will put on this armor and demonstrate for all of you. Let's see if my every move seamlessly matches with this IPC armor!

C: 说的不错。要是拒绝他的挑战，恐怕要落个拳台上不战而逃的名声，被这位铄金先生当作大肆宣传的材料。
E: Well said. If you refuse his challenge, you might gain infamy for fleeing the ring, and Shuojin would use it as propaganda.

C: 「铁拳卢卡！无敌拳法！」
E: Iron Fist Luka! Iron Fist Fury!

C: 逻辑：在信息不充足的前提下，如果我在接入后，陷入和黑塔女士相同的失联状态，或将导致情况向不可逆的方向恶化。
E: Logic: Given the limited information we have, if I were to connect and subsequently experience the same communication breakdown as Madam Herta, it could result in an irreversible deterioration of the situation.

C: 而且它的名字也颇具巧思——其中恰好暗藏了「柴油」二字，令人忍俊不禁。
E: I particularly like the clever use of "rust" in its name. You can't help but laugh, can you?

C: 我失忆了！我是谁？你们是谁？
E: I've lost my memory! Who am I? Who are you guys?

C: 那时，你刚刚在「黑塔」空间站经历了一场险象环生的冒险。然后你登上了星穹列车，展开了属于自己的太空喜剧。
E: Back then, you had just survived a perilous adventure on the Herta Space Station. Then, you boarded the Astral Express and began your own Space Comedy.

C: 不必着急给出答案。
E: You don't have to give us an answer right away.

C: 今天我们陪你一起，无论如何都要先把卧室装修出来！
E: With us around, we're getting that bedroom done one way or another!

C: 这棵盆栽，叶子翠绿，质地饱满，体态匀称，实在是前所未见…{NICKNAME}乘客，可以告诉帕姆是怎么做到的吗？
E: This potted plant has vibrant green leaves, a full texture, and a perfectly balanced shape — truly exceptional... Passenger {NICKNAME}, could you share with Pom-Pom how you achieved this?

C: 虽说现在已经有了不少先进的显示技术，全息、幻造、脑机接口…但我还是更喜欢实实在在的显示屏。哈哈，也许是我不够时髦了。
E: Even though there are many advanced display technologies now — holograms, illusions, brain-computer interfaces — I still prefer a good old-fashioned screen. Haha, maybe I'm just not trendy enough.

C: 不行。
E: Not okay.

C: 唉，七三开就七三开吧…分赃的话题到此为止！
E: Bah, I'll just live with a 7-3 split... This is final! No more negotiation on how we're splitting the loot!

C: 据说那玩意源自{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的手笔，可以抓取重物，但需要一定天赋才能操纵…
E: According to legend, that object was created by {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}. Although it can grab heavy objects, only people of sufficient talent can control it...

C: 希望这次能有与之匹配的回报吧。
E: Hopefully, this time my effort will bear fruit.

C: 好了，要怎么办呢……
E: Alright. What should you do?

C: 听上去…还挺帅气的，是哪本典籍中的名字吗？
E: Sounds... pretty cool. Is it a name from a certain tome?

C: 灰宝！还有驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大~你们来啦？
E: Grayie! And Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas~ You're both here!

C: 呜嗡？呜…（要考试吗？我要是考不好…不会变成孤儿吧？）
E: Grumph? Gru... (Is there going to be a test? If I fail... I won't become an orphan, will I?)

C: …错不了的，它就是从那颗蛋中诞生的大地兽。我的第二十条方案果然奏效了！
E: ...There's no mistake. It's the dromas that hatched from that egg. My twentieth plan worked after all!

C: 如果没猜错的话，它就是传闻中从蛋里蹦出来的那只大地兽，好像是叫…驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大？想必你就是它的监护人，贵客{NICKNAME}了。
E: If I'm not mistaken, this must be that rumored dromas who popped out from the egg. I think the name was... Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas. Which would make you its guardian, honored guest {NICKNAME}, correct?

C: 从那时起，崇拜大地兽的教团便在奥赫玛城各个角落悄然建立。而一头大地兽究竟为何拥有此等力量，学者们议论纷纷……
E: Since then, cults devoted to dromases quietly sprang up across every corner of Okhema city. As for why such a creature wielded power so great, scholars still argue to this day...

C: 正经地开场。
E: Start seriously.

C: 欢迎来到实习转正的最终考核！介绍一下，这位便是我们的团长「兽皇」。今天的考试，由他担任主考官。
E: Welcome to the final assessment for your internship promotion! Let me introduce you to the troupe's leader, "Beast Emperor." He'll be serving as your chief examiner today.

C: 好小子，兽皇归来！
E: Holy! The return of the emperor!

C: 别欺负人家啊，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大。
E: Don't bully me, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas.

C: 讲点正经的。
E: Let's be serious for a moment.

C: 这宝贝什么来头？
E: What's the story of this treasure?

C: 嗯，明天见。
E: See you tomorrow.

C: 所以就…拜托你啦？您放心，我们对危险梦泡有一整套的安全监管手段，您不会遇到任何危险…随着调查深入，您也会收到相应的报酬……
E: So... please help us out? Don't worry, we have a complete set of safety measures for dangerous dream bubbles, you won't face any risks. And as the investigation progresses, you'll receive compensation accordingly...

C: 啊，不会不会。虽说管理黑塔女士带回来的奇物，确实给空间站造成了不小的预算压力，但放心，资金方面的窟窿，我自己就能填上。
E: Ah, no, no. While managing the Curios that Madam Herta brings back has put quite a strain on the space station's budget, rest assured, I can cover those financial gaps myself.

C: 待会再来找你们玩吧。
E: I'll come hang out with you later.

C: 开始值日。
E: Commence duty.

C: 我倒是无妨。这是个打响名声的好机会，若是能提升评级，也会引来更多客流。
E: I don't mind. It's a golden opportunity to build our reputation. If we can boost our rating, we'll attract even more customers.

C: 除传统的两位妖精评审员外，本次评选会还邀请到了一位神秘嘉宾！
E: Aside from the two traditional fairy judges, we've also invited a mystery guest for this review!

C: 美食评审顺利通过，大家都辛苦啦。发生了好多有趣的事呢，现在回去休息吧。
E: We passed the Food Review. Great work, everyone. It's been quite the day. Let's head back now and take a break.

C: 正好，上次竞赛你我胜负未分。不如借此机会，让我们在厨房再比试一场。
E: Perfect timing. We never settled the score from that last contest. How about we settle it in this kitchen?

C: …确实好难哦。
E: ...It is hard indeed.

C: 我有个想法。既然是迷境里的餐馆，不如就以「哀丽秘榭」为主题怎么样？
E: I have a proposal. Since we're a restaurant in the Maze, how about a theme inspired by Aedes Elysiae itself?

C: 小妖精，喜欢就好！
E: Anything for our little fairies!

C: 这就是所谓的心灵感应吧。
E: Guess this is what they call telepathy.

C: *我们*用各自的方式，对「甜蜜蜜节」做出了阐释。
E: We each had our own take on what the Sweetie Festival means.

C: 缇宁在书里看到过，优秀的餐馆会为顾客讲解菜品烹饪的相关知识，以便更好地品尝。
E: Trinnon read in a book that great restaurants explain to their guests how the food is made. It helps them enjoy it even more.

C: 这是我的餐馆，直接夸我吧。
E: This is my restaurant. You can just say I'm amazing.

C: 迷。就告诉你吧，我们是迷路迷境中，令所有餐馆闻风丧胆的……
E: Mem! Alright, listen up. We are the fearsome names whispered in every restaurant of Membrance Maze...

C: 不如尝尝我特制的「盛宴香汁烤鸡」，口感丰富，鲜嫩多汁，正好用来中和他那过分的咸味。
E: Try my "Feast-Gravy Roast Chicken." It's juicy, full of flavor, and just the thing to balance out that overly salty taste of his.

C: 你还有招吗？我才刚进入状态，手感正热呢。
E: You done already? I'm just getting warmed up!

C: 还有事情要处理…
E: Still got a couple of things to wrap up...

C: 算是吧。
E: You could say that.

C: 想分享的快乐…明明有很多，却不知道从哪说起。
E: There are so many joyful moments to share... we don't know where to begin.

C: 那天，连我也被赛飞儿阁下的诡计骗过，慌忙尝了好多口菜品……
E: I have to admit, even I was fooled by your little scheme that day. I ended up tasting so many dishes...

C: 依我看，这盛宴倒更像是团纠缠不清的纺纱，我们各执金线的一端，最终交织于此。
E: The way I see it, this grand feast is more like a tangled ball of yarn, each of us grasping a golden thread, and all of them converging and intertwining here.

C: 我与这两位树庭学者并不熟识，但从农田情况来看，才能无疑极为出色。
E: I'm not particularly familiar with the two Grove scholars, but judging by the state of the farmland, their talents are beyond question.

E: About the Harvest Festival...

C: 「狩猎的历史也不应为猎人独享。」\n因此，他寡言少语。
E: "And the history of the hunt should not be held by the hunter alone."\nAnd thus, he speaks little.

C: 偶尔，\n狮子会攀上绝顶，\n俯瞰尘世，寻觅故人。
E: Sometimes,\nThe lion would climb to the hilltop\nTo look down on the world and search for friends in longing.

C: 人们常说，\n死是与灰黯之手合掌，\n梦则是被它的小指轻掠。
E: People often say that,\nDying is to meet the palm of the Hand of Shadow,\nAnd dreaming is to be brushed by their fingers a little.

C: 二者的相系比血脉更紧密。\n洞开冥府之门的钥匙，\n是妹妹的私心。
E: Their connection flows tighter than blood,\nAnd the key that opens the netherworld's gates,\nIs the sister's selfish plight.

C: 「你是我心中的宁静。」\n妹妹寻遍花开簇满的「安提灵」，\n却寻不到约定的那束幽蓝。
E: "You are the quiet in my heart amidst the chaotic choreography."\nThe younger sister scores through the blooming Antila fields,\nNever finding that promised dark blue sprig.

C: 故事里有彩虹、云朵、火苗，\n故事里有燕子、蝴蝶、小猫。
E: Rainbows, clouds, and flames dance through the story.\nSwallows, butterflies, and kittens grace its pages.

C:
你们来到了哀丽秘榭，
这是<color=#9e5738>「昔涟」</color>最珍爱的家园。
它永远温暖，永远轻柔，
也是重新翻开第一页的起点。
E:
Here lies Aedes Elysiae,
<color=#9e5738>Cyrene</color>'s most beloved sanctuary.
Forever warm, forever gentle,
the place where the story begins again.

C: 你回到那冷雾缭绕的永夜。\n你熟悉这里，\n正如微种熟悉水与子房。
E: You return to the cold, mist-veiled evernight.\nIt feels familiar,\nas water and fruit to a seed.

C: 大地的兽群将它拱卫，\n畸态的奇兽腾挪咆哮，\n娇小的奇美拉攀上它的肩头。
E: The beasts of the land surrounded it in protection,\nWhile twisted {M#beings}{F#being} shuffled and roared,\nAnd delicate chimeras climbed up its shoulders.

C: 「好像在匹诺康尼看到过它。」 ——{NICKNAME} 「要不，把它培养成宇宙网红？」 ——{NICKNAME} 「这条赛道已经被扑满占据了。」 ——丹恒
E: "I think I saw it in Penacony." — {NICKNAME} "Hey, why don't we turn it into a universal social media star?" — {NICKNAME} "That niche is already dominated by Trotters." — Dan Heng

C:
与众爵并肩的岁月，
似乎没有过去太远。
英雄们在一场场战争落幕后才发现，
凯撒的身影日渐疏离人群。
E:
The years spent with her dukes
Didn't seem too far distant.
Yet only after the end of many wars did the heroes discover
How the Imperator's form walked more and more alone.

C: 直到一日，\n她那仄暗的水域，\n漂来一尾金鳟的泡泡。
E: Till one day,\nA golden trout's bubbles\nFloated into her gloomy waters.

C: 剑士攥着一只窄杯，\n杯中清汁微漾，\n映出二人面庞。
E: The swordmaster held a tall chalice\nContaining liquid pure,\nReflecting their two faces.

C: 一曲唱毕，人们如梦初醒，\n争着举杯相敬。
E: When her song was over, it felt as if waking from a dream,\nAnd the people rushed to raise their glasses.

C: 她知晓这并非真实，\n正如她所爱的世界，\n只是星海中的泡沫。
E: She knows this is not reality.\nJust like the world she loves,\nMere foam in the sea of stars.

C:
她唱起曾经清醒的泰坦，
公主陪女王遨游碧蓝的海洋。

她唱起意气风发的君王，
骑士陪凯撒征服肃穆的城邦。
E:
She sings of the once-awakened Titan,
How the princess accompanied the queen to swim in azure waves.

She sings of the confident and dashing monarch,
Of loyal knights who marched with the Imperator to seize the solemn states.

C: 「父亲，祖辈为什么沉湎酣战？」 「因为他们只有悲伤的过去。」 「那我们为什么在抚平伤痛？」 「因为我们还有需要呵护的未来。」
E: "Father, why did our ancestors revel in war-like might?" "Because they only have a sorrowful past of lamenting wails." "Then why are we here, soothing the blight?" "Because we have a future that needs protection still."

C: 父亲的故事里，善战的翼兽？\n可眼前睡眼惺忪的小马，\n只如一团刚采的棉花。
E: Could it be the war-like winged beast of her father's tales?\nBut the sleepy and dreary-eyed pony before her,\nWas soft as freshest-plucked cotton.

C: 望着夜色中的金丝与垂藤，\n她已许久不曾想起往事，\n此刻却忆起年少的心愿：
E: Seeing the golden thread and ivy in the night,\nThough it has been long since she recalled her past,\nShe once again thinks of her childhood dream:

C: 少女抬手与画壁相触，\n伴随着肌骨相辗的痛楚，\n将自己也镌刻入图。
E: She placed her hand upon the mural,\nPain seared through skin and bone,\nAs the picture claimed her within its lines.

C: 「这…不是真名吧？」\n人们侧目，心中夹杂着疑问。
E: "That's... not really his name, is it?"\nPeople cast sidelong glances at him, their minds swirling with doubt.

C: 可无人料想，\n这来历不明的新兵，\n顷刻便一战成名。
E: But none expected,\nThis new recruit of unknown history,\nMade his name in one mission.

C:
哪怕沉重往事，
他也总以一笑了之。
引得旁人面面相觑，
不知如何回应。
E:
Despite the weight of the past,
He can always laugh it away.
Those nearby glance at each other,
Unsure of how to respond.

C:
他看见造物者扼住自己的咽喉，
咯咯作响。
而在那无边的梦中，
是他误把它们当作自己的嬉笑。
E:
He saw the creators choke his throat,
Gurgling and gasping.
And in that boundless dream,
He mistook them for his own jest.

C: 在死去前，\n学者亲手为自己写下墓志铭——
E: Before meeting death,\nThe scholar already composed his own epitaph —

C: 可最初并非如此，\n婆娑树影下，他默然追忆起往昔——
E: It was not so in the beginning,\nAs he silently recalls the past under leafy shade —

C:
不知多少次，他机关用尽，

想令预言中的死者复生，
想令预言中的英雄蒙羞，
想令预言中的恶人回首。
E:
Countless times, he exhausted his crafty sleights.

Wanting to rescue the doomed and resurrect wights.
Wanting to shame the prophesied heroes of magic and might.
Wanting to sway promised villains to a course more upright.

C: 也有织者愿意为其裁衣的人。
E: There are, nevertheless, people whom the Weaver is willing to sew and tailor for.

C: 悬锋城：热武器时代
E: Castrum Kremnos: Age of Firearms

C: 女孩虽然落魄，但气质不凡。「吾名阿格莱雅，奥赫玛旧贵遗孤。我来这里，便是要从你的手里夺回我的一切。」
E: Despite her misfortune, the girl carried herself with extraordinary grace. "I am Aglaea, the last noble heir of Okhema. I have come to reclaim everything that is rightfully mine from your hands."

C: *这一页故事，来自第8128次永劫回归，一次奇妙的交换人生。请你试想，倘若那金发的悬锋王储成为树庭贤人，而体弱的渎神学者参与了悬锋祭典……*
E: *This page of the story comes from the 8,128th Eternal Recurrence, a wondrous exchange of lives. Imagine if the blond crown prince of Kremnos had become a Sage of the Grove, while the frail heretical scholar had taken part in the Kremnos Festival...*

C: *这一页故事，来自第18250001次永劫回归，一场孤独与孤独的巧遇。请你试想，如果被驱逐的阳雷骑士塞涅俄丝，在荒原中遇见的并非不谙世事的翼兽，而是那已行走人间百年的大地兽之王……*
E: *This page of the story comes from the 18,250,001st Eternal Recurrence, a chance encounter between two solitudes. Imagine if Seliose, the exiled Daythunder Knight, had met not the innocent winged beasts in the wasteland, but rather the Dromas King who had walked among humans for a hundred years...*

C: 光历<unbreak>3957</unbreak>年，「阳雷龙骑」最重要的伙伴——荒笛，于吉奥里亚讨伐战中牺牲。
E: In Light Calendar <unbreak>3957</unbreak>, Terravox, the Daythunder Dromas Knight's most important companion, fell in battle during the battle against Georios.

C: 少女看着手里的信笺直发愣。死龙轻轻拱了拱少女的肩膀，催促她赶紧拆开。
E: The girl stared blankly at the letter in her hands. Netherwing softly nudged her shoulder, urging her to open it.

C: 而星穹餐车一方，参赛的是一位盛装出席的粉发少女。她下厨的时候似乎有些手忙脚乱，随后端出一杯奇妙的饮品。「我的作品就是它——霸王摇摇杯果汁！宴会结束的时候，用它来碰杯，一定能喝得很尽兴！」
E: From the Astral Food Express, a pink-haired girl in festive dress took her place. She fumbled a little in the kitchen, then proudly held up a strange drink. "My entry is this: the "Overlord Shaky Cup Juice"! At the end of the banquet, clinking glasses with this will make the night complete!"

C: 被遗忘的岁月
E: Forgotten Years

C: 有效性声明
E: Validity Statement

C: δ-me13的自主协议，实验进程、管理员指令、外部访问均受其限制。 为提升迭代速率，开放因子自内部嵌合协议的权限。特定电信号的决策逻辑将转化为协议内容，以辅助权杖优化实验结构。 批注：第19522113次循环中，Nammou320为实现统治，利用协议将其余因子从演算中剔除。这一行为符合「毁灭」倾向，应被标记为嵌合行为的默认值，在后续循环中应用。
E: δ-me13's autonomous protocol, whereby experiment processes, Administrator commands, and external access are all restricted. To increase the iteration rate, factors have been granted permissions from the internal embedded protocol. The decision logic of specific electrical signals will be converted into protocol content to assist the Scepter in optimizing the experiment structure. Annotation: In the 19,522,113th cycle, to achieve dominance, Nammou320 utilized the protocol to eliminate other factors from extrapolation. This behavior aligns with the tendency of "Destruction" and should be marked as the default value for embedded behavior, to be applied in subsequent cycles.

C:
原民间建筑师，受格拉克斯邀请后成为隐夜鸫的筑梦师。作品不拘泥于建筑的原型，在兼顾巧妙创意的同时保证了绝佳的安全性。
<s>后被曝光其真实身份为涉嫌建筑事故的边陲监狱囚犯，由猎犬家系关押至「安谧的时刻」。</s>
<s>在橡木家系的公正审判之下，过去的罪行得到惩罚。</s>
<color=#dbc291ff>于刑期结束前离世。</color>
E:
Formerly a civilian architect who became a Dreamweaver of the Nightingale Family upon Glaux's invitation. His creations are not constrained by the original shape of the building and do not compromise safety while retaining supreme creativity.
<s>Later, his true identity was revealed to be an inmate of the frontier prison, involved in a construction accident. He was detained in the Moment of Serenity by the Bloodhound Family.</s>
<s>With the Oak Family's just tribunal, past transgressions are met with retribution.</s>
<color=#dbc291ff>Passed away before the sentence ends.</color>

C:
感谢你帮我把冰淇淋放到了冷冻室！那天我研究冰淇淋配方，一不小心研究了个通宵。最后脑袋昏昏，竟然把它放进了冷藏室(/ﾟДﾟ)/ 

要不是你出手帮忙，我的美食创作可就要失败了！超级感谢～

我趁热打铁（好像不是趁热），又做了几个冰淇淋。分你一个，就当做是谢礼啦 (●′ω`●)
E:
Thanks for putting the ice cream in the freezer for me! I was researching its recipe the other day and accidentally pulled an all-nighter. In the end, I was so drowsy that I put it in the fridge(/ﾟДﾟ)/

If it weren't for your help, my food creation would have failed! Thanks a lot~

I made a few more ice creams while the iron was hot (the ice creams don't seem hot). I'll share one with you as a thank-you gift (●′ω`●)

C: 这笔「保管费」里，也有丹恒乘客的份。他觉得大家擅自用你的冰箱，你一定非常生气，否则也不至于把一块布硬生生吃下去。\n\n但就算再生气，也不要乱吃东西帕！
E: Passenger Dan Heng's share of this Storage Fee is also included. He believes that you must be very angry about our using your refrigerator without telling you, otherwise you wouldn't have eaten a piece of cloth.\n\nBut even if you're mad, don't eat anything you're not supposed to!

C: 便签下面有一行手写的小字，笔迹清秀但略显幼稚：\n小气鬼(￣^￣)哼！
E: Below the note is a small, handwritten line, delicate but slightly childish: \npenny pincher (￣^￣) hmph!

E: Maybe this member can be recruited for the upcoming duty...

C: 今天姬子乘客和瓦尔特乘客组织了一次货运任务，还算顺利。回看值日报告，发现最近大家每天都在胡闹，今天终于干了点正经事，列车长好欣慰。
E: Today, passengers Himeko and Welt organized a cargo mission, which went smoothly. Reviewing the Duty Report, the conductor found that everyone's been goofing off daily lately — finally, some real work got done today. The conductor is truly relieved!

C: 海选赛场欢声雷动，一如匹城新生时万众逐梦的世纪。\n那是最好的时代，也是最坏的时代；那是人人得见幸福的乐园，那是适者生存的蛮荒之地；人们应有尽有，人们一无所有；我们永远纪念过去，我们永远逃离过去——\n——可又有谁能说，我们已经挣脱一切矛盾，走向无可置疑的新世界？
E: The venue of the audition is thunderous with cheers, as if time had returned to the era when the city of dreams was first born and all souls chased after dreams.\nIt was the best of times, and it was the worst of times. It was a paradise where everyone could be happy, and it was a wilderness where only the strongest could survive. People had everything, and they had nothing. We will always mourn for the past, just as we will always run away from the past —\n— But who can say that we have already broken free from all contradictions and entered what is undoubtedly a new world?

C: 角色在战斗中受到致命攻击时，会转而使战斗<color=#f29e38ff>剩余倒计时</color>减少，<color=#f29e38ff>战斗将提前结束</color>。\n这意味着将<color=#f29e38ff>更难</color>在倒计时结束前<color=#f29e38ff>击败全部敌人</color>。
E: When a character takes a killing blow in combat, the battle <color=#f29e38ff>countdown timer</color> will decrease, causing the <color=#f29e38ff>combat to end early</color>.\nThis means it will be <color=#f29e38ff>harder</color> to <color=#f29e38ff>defeat all enemies</color> before the countdown expires.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>秘技</color>是在探索时可用的特殊技能，施放时需要消耗<color=#f29e38ff>秘技点</color>。不同角色的秘技效果各不相同。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Technique</color> is a special type of ability used in Exploration, which costs <color=#f29e38ff>Technique Points</color>. Different characters have different Technique Buffs.

C: 推动箱子，到达小女孩身前，解救她。
E: Save the little girl by pushing boxes away to unblock her exit.

C: 工造司开发的玉兆基板系统，将储存有子程序的<color=#f29e38ff>兆算模块</color>移动至相应图案的基座上，即可使基板正常作用。
E: The jade abacus substrate system developed by the Artisanship Commission. Move the <color=#f29e38ff>computing modules</color> with subroutines stored in them to bases with corresponding patterns, so that the substrate can function normally.

C: 飞弹命中后的爆炸会击碎<color=#f29e38ff>附近一定范围内的所有敌人</color>并获得大量分数！一发飞弹<color=#f29e38ff>命中多名敌人</color>可以获得更多奖励的额外分数，完美控制飞弹的落点，获得大量分数，拍出精彩的枪战片吧。
E: The explosion caused by a rocket hit will <color=#f29e38ff>obliterate all nearby enemies within a certain range</color> and net you lots of points! If one rocket <color=#f29e38ff>hits multiple enemies</color>, you will receive bonus points that give more rewards. Skillfully control where your rockets land to earn lots of points and shoot a thrilling gunfight film.

C: 在谈判结束时，若你的<color=#f29e38ff>气势值高于或等于对手</color>，即为谈判成功。反之，即为谈判失败。
E: At the end of negotiation, if your <color=#f29e38ff>morale is higher than or equal to your opponent's</color>, it is considered a successful negotiation. Otherwise, it is deemed a failure.

C: 门上的灯纹为<color=#f29e38ff>黄色</color>时，表示这扇门在当前时空<color=#f29e38ff>可以被开启</color>；灯纹为<color=#f29e38ff>白色</color>时，表示这扇门在当前时空<color=#f29e38ff>无法打开</color>。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Yellow</color> light patterns on the door means the door <color=#f29e38ff>can be opened</color> in the current space-time. <color=#f29e38ff>White</color> light patterns on the door means the door <color=#f29e38ff>cannot be opened</color> in the current space-time.

C: 本关初始武器：<color=#f29e38ff>燃火魔杖</color>\n「燃火魔杖」燃烧敌我生命值并释放爆炸，累计燃烧<color=#f29e38ff>我方生命值</color>越多，爆炸时伤害越高。\n优先提升初始<color=#f29e38ff>武器等级</color>，获得其<color=#f29e38ff>共鸣配饰</color>，进阶<color=#f29e38ff>传说武器</color>！
E: This Stage's Initial Weapon: <color=#f29e38ff>Flaming Scepter</color>\n"Flaming Scepter" ignites the HP of allies and enemies, and triggers an explosion. The higher the amount of <color=#f29e38ff>allies' HP</color> ignited, the higher the DMG dealt during the explosion.\nPrioritize the upgrade of the initial <color=#f29e38ff>weapon level</color> and obtain their <color=#f29e38ff>resonant accessories</color> to ascend your weapon to a <color=#f29e38ff>legendary weapon</color>!

C: 好哇，丹恒你默默努力然后惊艳所有人…我也来！
E: Seriously, Dan Heng? You kept your head down, worked hard, and then blew everyone away! I'm gonna do that too!

C: 不枉此行。
E: Worth our while.

C: 人类的求索之心可是永无止境的。
E: The human thirst for discovery is truly boundless.

C: 剧本上没写的，我们决定就好。
E: It's not in the script, so what happens next is up to us.

C: 我已经找到了，要守护的「家」。
E: I've found a home to protect.

C: 无论何时都不能松懈。
E: I can't afford to be complacent.

C: 星辰会铭记我们的名字。
E: The stars will always remember us.

C: 怎么收拾它，全看我心情。
E: Now, how should I dispose of you?

C: 是珍贵的宝物，要好好收着喔。
E: It's a precious treasure. Keep it safe.

C: 听说我不在家的时候，姐姐开始把花拜托给佩拉照顾了…希望没给她添太多麻烦。
E: I heard my sister started asking Pela to look after my flowers when I'm away... I hope it's not too much trouble for her.

C: 脚踏实地，步步为营。
E: One bridgehead at a time.

C: 有我在。
E: I'm with you.

C: 以我对桑博的了解，他最不喜欢欠人情，总会想办法还上——人情这种东西，时间拖得越久，越难估价。
E: If I know Sampo, the last thing he wants is to owe you a favor — he'll think of any way possible to pay you back... The longer you leave a favor, the harder it is to calculate its value.

C: 有一次，克拉拉想找的零件死死地嵌在岩壁里，正好被希儿姐姐看到，她一只手就敲碎了岩壁…克拉拉还没来得及和她道谢，她就走了……
E: I remember one time Miss Seele saw me trying to pull a component out of a crack in the rocks. She smashed the rocks with one hand and walked away before I had time to say thank you...

C: 要是有人能和史瓦罗做成交易，我桑博打心底里佩服！
E: If anyone out there ever managed to strike a deal with Svarog, they'd earn my heartfelt admiration!

C: 还有什么宝物在等着虎克呢。
E: Hook's ready to find the next treasure!

C: 布洛妮娅小姐每天都要和那么多人打交道，一定很累吧。
E: It must be very tiring for Miss Bronya to have to deal with so many people every day.

C: 独处的时光果然令人安心……
E: Everyone needs some time alone...

C: 我不需要什么经纪人，再说了…会给自己取「深蓝帅哥」这种外号的家伙，我压根信不过。
E: I don't need a middleman. Plus, anyone who calls themself "tall, blue, and handsome" definitely can't be trusted.

C: 小女子名作停云，「罗浮」天舶司商团接渡使。接下来还要多多仰仗恩公啦。
E: My name is Tingyun, the Amicassador for the Luofu Sky-Faring Commission merchant guild. Please look after me from now on, benefactor.

C: 还有什么要帮忙的？
E: Need a hand?

C: 那家伙看上去不怎么好说话……
E: That's a tough nut to crack...

C: 战事如棋，局局新啊。
E: Battles are chess games — no two are alike.

C: 若是闲来无事，还可对弈几局。
E: A few games of chess will while away the time.

C: 此番美景，我虽求而不得……
E: That paradise may be unreachable for me ...

C: 这个小玩意儿，和我挺搭的~
E: This little gadget is just what I wanted~

C: …此为偏财，不宜多得。
E: *gasp* Ahem! ...Unexpected. We shouldn't take too much...

C: 素裳姑娘的剑是好剑，但好剑未必称手。要多使出它的一分功力，得多花十倍气力。
E: Sushang has a good sword, but a good sword is not always an easy-to-use sword. One needs to apply ten times more power to make it perform just one-tenth better.

C: 这次不会再轻敌了。
E: I won't underestimate the enemy twice.

C: 不愧是我的宝剑~
E: Victory by the blade~

C: 长乐天有两个说相声的，阿往和阿来。这两个人还蛮热心肠的，帮我润色了好多文案，比如开演前的数来宝之类的。
E: There's a crosstalk comedy duo in Exalting Sanctum — Forth and Back'n. They're a friendly couple of guys — they helped me to embellish a lot of my act. In fact, the doggerel portion of the performance was their idea.

C: 真怀念呀。同过去一样，破敌方略便交给你了，景元。
E: Break the enemy's strategy, Jing Yuan — that's what you always did best.

C: 前方煞气深重，请多留意。
E: Careful, there is evil ahead.

C: 持明的肉身轮回，却能在离去前将记忆和罪业付于古海，实在令人艳羡。不过龙女似乎与别的持明不同…她身上背负着自极远极远的岁月中流传下的重荷，光是看一眼就叫人透不过气来。
E: The ability of the Vidyadhara to cast their memories and past sins to the Lunarescent Depths before reincarnating is truly enviable. But the Dragon Lady seems to be different from other Vidyadhara... She carries a heavy burden that has been passed down since long, long ago, and getting just a glimpse of it can be suffocating.

C: 「寒鸦」与「雪衣」是我们身为十王敕使的代号，以前的名字…已经是以前的事情了。但我始终只有姐姐一个家人，我不会让她再离开第二次。
E: "Hanya" and "Xueyi" are our code names as the envoys of the Ten Lords. Our previous names... are already in the past. But I've always had only one family member, my sister, and I won't let her leave a second time.

C: 藿藿：尾巴救救！
E: Huohuo: Tail, help!

C: 藿藿：这么好的东西，我能收下吗…
E: Huohuo: Wow⁓ Can I really keep it?

C: 也展示下你的手段吧，灵砂。
E: Show me your skills, Lingsha.

C: 晚上好，大忙人。要来杯调饮吗？
E: Evenin'. Someone's been workin' hard. Fancy a drink?

C: 哈哈，见者有份。
E: Haha, finders keepers.

C: 请施我以援助，瓦尔特先生——以您谲若云影的奇巧、醇如美酒的远略。
E: Lend me your aid, Mr. Yang, with your intricate tactics and far-reaching vision.

C: 闪烁的美，动人心魂……
E: A lustrous beauty that sets the heart and soul astir...

C: 星际和平公司打造的各种娱乐以及美食，五光十色，颇为震撼，但我总不甚理解其中门路，希望未来有一天，能得到高人指点。
E: The dazzling array of entertainment and gourmet delights offered by the IPC is quite staggering, but I regularly struggle with making sense of it all. Perhaps one day someone with experience will show me the ropes.

C: 这便是生命的温度么…
E: So, this is the warmth of life...

C: 如何以一枚筹码赢下整颗星球？谋划、经营、算计…但归根结底，要归于运气。强运使人成为强者，攫取命运…没错，命运从一开始就不公平。
E: How to win a whole planet with just one chip? Strategizing, scheming, calculating... but ultimately, it hinges on luck. Good luck makes one powerful, but destiny? Inherently unjust.

C: 既然如今的我依旧不受博识尊的赏识，有理由相信未来的我也不会。
E: If this day I have not gained the recognition of Nous, it stands to reason that I never will at any point in the future.

C: 智慧与记忆的力量……
E: The power of wisdom and memory...

C: 「黄泉」…虽然只是借来的名字，但你知道我是怎样的人，记得我做过怎样的事，如此之后…我便是黄泉。
E: "Acheron..." Merely a borrowed name. You know my nature, remember my deeds... Thus, I am Acheron.

C: 「二度踏入同一条河流」…并不困难。
E: "To cross the same river twice" ...Hardly a hardship.

C: 无妨，就在此了结。
E: This is where it ends.

C: 我喜欢惊喜~
E: I do like surprises~

C: 我很少同知更鸟谈论自己的烦恼，身为兄长理应负起更多责任。那些成人的晦暗也不应被带回我们的家中。
E: I rarely discuss my worries with Robin. As the older brother, I should bear more responsibilities. The dark side of adulthood should not be brought back into our home.

C: 没劲，还不如射靶子有意思。
E: Boring. I'd rather just be shootin' targets.

C: 看来未到退场的时候。
E: It appears the end is not yet at hand.

C: 聆听鸟兽的欢悦，呼吸林间的芬芳，感受水流的温柔…越是亲近世间的一呼一吸，越是惧怕这些风光成为往日的回响，只能在我的指尖重现。
E: The joy of listening to birdsongs, the delight of breathing leafy scents, the touch of gentle water... The more I adore the happiness of this world, the more I fear these sights will be reduced to echoes of the past, only able to be replayed at the tips of my fingers.

C: 把好消息带给全城吧！
E: Share the good news with the whole city!

C: 这必将是名动天下的一战。
E: This will be a battle to shake the very foundations of the world.

C: 告诉后人，我将恪守诺言，镇守悬锋直至最后一滴血。拭目以待吧，并非是黑潮吞噬了我，而是我要将其碾碎。
E: Tell the future generations that I shall keep my promise, guarding Kremnos until I spill my last drop of blood. Watch closely. It won't be the black tide that devours me. I shall be the one who crushes it.

C: 听说她的王座上常常会垫着几本大部头著作…我倒是很愿意向她推荐几本，毕竟，与其浪费纸张，不如让它们物尽其用。
E: I heard that she always has thick tomes stacked up on the throne... I'd be happy to recommend some more books to her. After all, rather than wasting all that paper, it's better to see them being put to good use.

C: 阿姐们可疼我了，以前每次我想偷偷出个远门，总会发现小背包里已经被她们塞满了各种吃的，连翻墙都变难了！
E: Those old girls love me. Whenever I tried to slip away on a secret adventure, I'd discover my backpack already crammed with all sorts of food they snuck in there — it made leaping over the wall way harder!

C: 如果可以，我也想为她手作一朵绚烂的水晶花，作为礼物送给她…就像她曾赠予这世界的「记忆」，永不枯萎，永远无瑕。
E: If possible, I, too, would like to make a brilliant crystal flower for her as a gift... Never wilting, forever flawless, just like the "memories" she once gifted this world.

C: 新世界，终将到来！
E: The new world will arrive!

C: 这次的神谕，是悦耳，还是嘈杂？
E: Will the prophecy be melodious, or discordant this time?

C: 被黑潮吞噬的剧场中，一场独奏持续了数百年之久…只是待到落幕，只剩下满地的骸骨，与仍在哀叹的浪潮。
E: In a theater swallowed by the black tide, a solitary performance endured for hundreds of years... yet when the curtain finally fell, all that remained were scattered bones and the waves still mourning in sorrow.

C: 我的宝库从来不设防卫，正如她的戒心从未因时间而消退。无妨，让我们拭目以待，看这小猫儿未来能掀起何等惊天动地的大浪。
E: My treasury has never needed guards, and her guarded heart has never loosened with age. It matters not. Let us quietly watch, and see what great thunderous waves this small kitten will raise in the future.

C: 夜色将要落幕…嘘，晚安。
E: The night will soon fall... Shh. Good night.

C: 每个轮回里，他都在空白的起点出发，却又总是走向同一个结局。我和三月七的命运，是否会有所不同？
E: He sets out from a blank starting point in every recurrence, yet always ends up at the same finale. Will mine and March 7th's fate be any different?

C: 接纳「大地」的火种后，这具龙裔之躯中的「不朽」之力也将成为翁法罗斯世间万灵的护佑，将它们载向遥远星海，驰骋奔腾在更辽阔的八荒之地。
E: After I accepted the Coreflame of Earth as one of Long's Scions, the power of the Permanence within this body became a shield for all life in Amphoreus, carrying them into the distant sea of stars to race freely through the boundless unknown beyond.

C: 快看快看，飞起来咯？
E: Look! Look! We're flying~

C: 愿「负世」照拂黎明。
E: May "Worldbearing" ignite the dawn.

C: 战势拖得太久了。
E: Don't lose momentum.

C: 「毁灭」的意志究竟从何而来，真的是因为体内的星核么……
E: Just where did the will of Destruction come from? Was it really because of the Stellaron within me...?

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ
E: Jarilo-VI

C: 交互选项切换上
E: Switch Interaction Target — Up

C: 交互
E: Interact

C: 完成噩梦难度挑战
E: Complete the Nightmare difficulty challenge

C: 为了明天，能够笑着从梦中醒来。
E: So when tomorrow comes, we'll wake from our dreams smiling.

C: 实习生
E: Intern

C: 努努斯
E: Nanus

C: 悬锋羊奶
E: Kremnos Goat Milk

C: 胜负还未分出。
E: This isn't over yet.

C: 赢啦！这就是人多力量大！
E: We won! There's strength in numbers!

C: 自身受到伤害时：与后1格同伴交换位置，并使自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When this unit takes DMG: Swaps positions with the companion 1 tile behind, and its <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 购买白色稀有度的奇美拉时：使所有同伴<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When purchasing a white-rarity chimera: Causes all companions' <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>

C: 每回合商店出现1个免费的炼金药水，可以将任意1只奇美拉转化为同等或更高稀有度的奇美拉
E: A free Alchemy Potion appears in the Store in every turn, which can transform any chimera into another chimera of equal or higher rarity.

C: 自身受到伤害时：自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When this unit takes damage: This unit's <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 自身受到伤害时：与后1格同伴交换位置，并使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When this unit takes DMG: Swaps positions with the companion 1 tile behind, and its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

C: 对手专属奇美拉首次攻击时：自身移动到队伍的最前排，并使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When the opponent's exclusive chimera launches its first attack: This unit moves to the front of the team, and its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 努力成长中。
E: Growing stronger.

C: 没有什么好害怕的了。
E: There's nothing to be afraid of anymore.

C: 都变成我的力量吧！
E: Become my power!

C: 嗯，我还没吃饱。
E: Hmm, I'm still hungry.

C: 最强训练家，就这点本事？
E: Is that all you've got, "Strongest Trainer"?

C: 我只为获胜而来。
E: I'm only here to win.

C: 阁下，我会尽量下手轻点。
E: Hey, you, I'll try to go easy on you.

C: 奇美拉
E: Chimera

C: 黄金对决
E: Chrysos Showdown

C: 我方阵容
E: Ally Lineup

C: ・黄泉独自在匹诺康尼寻找线索：由于假面愚者闹事，黄泉被猎犬家系拦住盘查。此时，你经过了这里，以钟表把戏为黄泉解围。\n・黄泉警示你小心黑天鹅后离开，继续自己的调查。
E: ・ Acheron was searching for clues alone in Penacony. She was stopped and questioned by the Bloodhound Family due to the Masked Fools causing trouble. At this moment, you passed by and helped Acheron out of the situation using your Clockwork.\n・ Acheron warned you to be careful of Black Swan before leaving to continue her investigation.

C: 致幻人鱼
E: Hallucinogenic Mermaid

C: 我弥留之际
E: The Moment Before My Death

C: 我方角色在单场战斗中首次生命值百分比小于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>后，激活终结技，并使本场战斗中自身与忆灵造成的终结技伤害可以无视<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>的防御力。
E: When ally character's HP percentage drops below <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for the first time in a single combat, activates Ultimate and allows this unit and memosprite's Ultimate DMG in this combat to ignore <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> DEF.

C: 卡芙卡带她回来的时候也这样
E: She was like this when Kafka brought her back

C: 我能和她聊聊吗？
E: Can I talk to her?

C: 花火？
E: Sparkle?

C: 戮力双雄•铸铠御戈的白卫士
E: Synergy Duo: Ironclad White Guard

C: 使指定我方单体大概率陷入【<u>异梦</u>】状态。
E: Makes one designated target have a high chance of entering "<u>Alien Dream</u>."

C: 进入蓄力状态，下回合施放【暴风骤雨的】。
E: Enters the Charging state. Uses "Tempestoso" in the next turn.

C: 为我方和敌方其他目标施加【可负载】状态。处于【可负载】状态的单位会将受到伤害超出当前生命值的部分转化为<u>【负载生命值】</u>，且不会因此陷入无法战斗状态。同时行动序列上出现【负载清算】，当【负载清算】行动时，将进行生命值结算，当前生命值为0以下的单位会受到致命伤害。【负载清算】会随着敌方召唤物数量的减少而提高行动速度，当敌方召唤物被全部消灭时【负载清算】移除。
E: Applies the "Overloadable" state to all friendly and non-friendly targets (except this unit). When units are in the "Overloadable" state, they will convert DMG taken that exceeds their current HP to <u>"HP Overload,"</u> and will not be knocked down because of this. At the same time, "Overload Settlement" will appear on the Action Order. When "Overload Settlement" takes action, HP will be finalized and units with HP below 0 will take fatal damage. "Overload Settlement" will increase in SPD as the number of friendly summons decreases. When all friendly summons have been defeated, "Overload Settlement" is removed.

C: 锁定指定我方角色，使自身的速度提高，并在数个回合内对该目标施放【罪血嚼齿】和【罪血锯刑】。施放该技能后再行动1次。
E: Locks on to one designated character, increases this unit's SPD, and uses "Hemotort Teethgrind" and "Hemotort Saw" on the target within several turns. Take 1 extra action after using this ability.

C: 在滔滔血海中沉溺
E: Drowned in the Crimson Sea

C: 请泊舟暂歇
E: Respite By The Waters

C: 在「黄金嗷呜大师赛」活动中，累计获得#4点荣誉
E: Obtain #4 Honor in the Chrysos Awoo Championship event

C: 以旅途中的故事为代价。
E: At the cost of stories from the journey.

C: 我方目标生命上限提高。每有一名当前在场的我方目标，造成的【<u>回味</u>】伤害提高。
E: Increases ally targets' Max HP. For each ally target currently on the field, increases the "<u>Aftertaste</u>" DMG.

C: 列车碎片纪念牌（升华）
E: Express Fragment Memorial Plaque (Exalted)

C: 门关月的焚烧
E: Enkindle of Month of Gate

C: 事件
E: Occurrence

C: 使<color=#f29e38ff>%DynamicTargetName</color>维持【受教】状态。
E: Causes <color=#f29e38ff>%DynamicTargetName</color> to enter the "Gleaned Instruction" state.

C: 被添加的额外量子弱点。
E: Additionally implanted Quantum Weakness.

C: 造成的【回味】伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Increases "Aftertaste" DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 「花姐」？想来想去，这个名字也不会是第二个人，去看看她又要搞什么花样。
E: "Sparkly return"? Can't think of anyone else it could be. Let's see what kind of tricks she's up to this time.

C: 你无法再回到往昔，但无论过去是否因你而改变，都会留下为人铭记的痕迹。
E: You can't return to the past, yet the past, regardless of whether you changed it, will leave traces to be remembered.

C: 无论生命因何沉睡，此刻，你要让他们重新拥有醒来的权利。
E: No matter why life fell into slumber, now is the time to grant them back the power to awaken.

C: （可选）与大家谈论现状
E: (Optional) Discuss the current situation with everyone

C: 完成定级赛
E: Complete placement matches

C: 你们怎么……
E: Why are you all...

C: 至少分家没可能。
E: At least not this branch Family.

C: 该道歉的人是我。明知道你状态不佳，还提出这种过分的要求。
E: I'm the one who should apologize. I knew you weren't feeling well, yet I made such an unreasonable request.

C: 多加小心，哥哥。记得给自己留个好位置。
E: Be careful, brother. And don't forget to save a good spot for yourself.

C: 多谢。没想到，时至今日，我仍要麻烦舒翁女士。
E: Thanks. I never thought even after all this time, I'd still be troubling you, Lady Siobhan.

C: 所以发生了什么？
E: So, what happened?

C: 乐意效劳。
E: I'm happy to help.

C: 哦？有个好消息，这片梦境，似乎多了几位闯入者呢。看来，银狼偶尔还是能收到这里的讯息。
E: Oh? Good news. It seems like we've got a few intruders in this dreamscape. Looks like Silver Wolf can still pick up signals from here after all.

C: 「…做得好██杜布拉██无论他们逃往何处██泯灭终将造访…」
E: "...Well done ██ Dubra ██ wherever they go, ██ shall be met by annihilation..."
Hah...

C: 橡木公馆原本就有这种装饰吗？
E: Did Oak Manor always have decor like this?

C: …我看不出哪里公道。
E: ...I don't see any justice in any of this.

C: 放弃自己真正的渴求，不再按照自己的意愿前行。如此，你的命运确会不同，甚至能够左右世界的去向。
E: Give up your true desires and stop walking your own path. In doing so, your destiny will indeed change, and you may even sway the course of the world.

C: 我从未信任过你，同行途中，我把它留在了你的身上——现在，我让它重新燃起，烧尽一道思绪轻而易举。
E: I never trusted you. During our journey together, I planted it on you, and now, I'll let it reignite. It can burn away a thread of thought with ease.

C: 我早已窥得星核之秘，无需确信任何事。若她从未入局，那一击仍会适时降下，令星核就此爆裂。
E: I've already glimpsed the secrets of the Stellaron, and I have no need for certainty here. Even if she never entered the game, that strike would still fall at the appointed time, causing the Stellaron to shatter.

C: 怎么，觉得我也在轻视别人的信仰吗？巧了，这就是公司的信仰——<color=#dbc291ff>别怀疑自己冷酷无情，重要的是每股收益。</color>
E: What, you think I'm also trampling over others' beliefs? Heh. Sorry, but that's exactly what the IPC believes in: <color=#dbc291ff>Don't question your own ruthlessness. All that matters is profit.</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>只要我能一直燃烧下去，我所在的地方，就是「烈火」，而非「灰烬」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>As long as I can keep burning, then wherever I am will be "Flames," not "Ashes."</color>

C: 我会结束这个长夜。
E: I will end this long night.

C: 「秩序」终有瑕缺，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
E: The Order is ultimately flawed. By this decree, it shall be ended!

C: 我也未曾见证过，这是星核猎手为我讲述的情景。当末王再度登神之时，祂将现出千手的神相，如此宣告——
E: The Stellaron Hunters described this scene to me, something I've never seen myself: When Terminus ascends to godhood once more, THEY will manifest their thousand-armed divine form, and proclaim...

C: 好像我还没提到过？来这里之前，我在手账里记录下了所有要做的事——我待在这里，是想完成里面的最后一个心愿。
E: I don't think I've mentioned it, but I wrote down everything I wanted to do in my journal before coming here. I'm staying here because I want to fulfill the last wish written in it.

C: 我要睁眼了哦？
E: I'm gonna open my eyes.

C: 塔塔洛夫教导过我们，不要轻信陌生人。它的伟大教诲，你是何时偷学到的？
E: Tatalov taught us not to trust strangers. When did you secretly learn its great teaching?

C: 哼哼，不知道了吧？要是不定期举办比赛，让奇美拉有事可做的话，它们就要回去工作哦。毕竟，要忙的事就像书库里的字一样多呢。
E: Heh-heh, bet you didn't know that, huh? If we don't hold competitions regularly to keep the chimeras busy, they'll have to go back to work. After all, there's as much work to do as there are books in the repository!

C: 啧，你们多洛斯人就没有偷以外的打招呼方式？没错，树庭的地区徽章就在我手里。
E: Tsk, don't you Dolosians have any way to say hello besides stealing? Yes, I have the Grove's regional badge right here.

C: 烂漫的少女
E: Guileless Girl

C: 养成攻略暂未解锁，推进<color=#f29e38ff>贝洛伯格</color>开拓任务以解锁
E: Build Guide is currently locked. Complete <color=#f29e38ff>Belobog</color> Trailblaze Mission to unlock

C: 队伍编成•大丽花
E: Added to Team With The Dahlia

C: 你的灰烬…一定很美。
E: Your ashes must be beautiful...

C: 来，点燃记忆~
E: Come, ignite memory~

C: 毁掉它，也是一种答案。
E: Destroying it is also a solution, you know.
